meanings.meaning_en: reasonable, practical, and showing good judgment
meanings.example: She seems very sensible.
meanings.example_cn: 她好像很明智。

meanings.meaning_en: an event, fact etc that shows that something is happening or that something is true or exists
meanings.example: A paw print in the dust was a sign that a tiger was close.
meanings.example_cn: 沙土里的一个爪印表明附近有老虎。

meanings.meaning_en: to write your  signature  on something to show that you wrote it, agree with it, or were present
meanings.example: There were no signs of forced entry into the house.
meanings.example_cn: 没有强行入室的痕迹。

meanings.meaning_en: expressed in a way that is very clear and direct
meanings.example: The contrast could not have been made more explicit.
meanings.example_cn: 这个对比再清楚不过了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 破坏，船舶失事；失事船只
meanings.meaning_en: a ship that has sunk
meanings.example: He was still alive when they pulled him from the wreck.
meanings.example_cn: 他们把他从失事的车辆中拖出来时，他还活着。

meanings.meaning_en: to damage something very badly
meanings.example: a country ravaged by civil war
meanings.example_cn: 遭受内战重创的国家

meanings.meaning_en: If something is wreathed in smoke or mist, it is surrounded by it
meanings.example: The ship was wreathed in smoke.
meanings.example_cn: 那艘船笼罩在浓烟中。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it difficult for someone or something to move forward or make progress
meanings.example: Storms at sea impeded our progress.
meanings.example_cn: 海上风暴阻碍了我们的航程。

meanings.meaning_en: a long piece of writing about a particular subject that you do as part of an advanced university degree such as an MA or a PhD
meanings.example: Cynthia’s still working on her thesis.
meanings.example_cn: 辛西娅还在写论文。

meanings.meaning_en: an action or official decision that can be used to give support to later actions or decisions
meanings.example: a legal precedent
meanings.example_cn: 判例

meanings.meaning_en: lofty mountains, buildings etc are very high and impressive
meanings.example: He stayed at the Four Seasons Hotel, from whose lofty heights he could see across New York.
meanings.example_cn: 他住在四季酒店，从酒店高处可以看到纽约的全景。

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of electrical kitchen equipment, used for keeping food and drinks cool
meanings.example: Then all three of you sign the contract and post in on the fridge.
meanings.example_cn: 然后你们三个人要都在协议上签名，并把它贴在冰箱上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 免除的；安全的，不受影响的
meanings.meaning_en: not affected by something that happens or is done
meanings.example: Once we’ve had the disease, we’re immune for life.
meanings.example_cn: 我们一旦得过这种病，就获得了终身免疫力。

meanings.meaning_en: to rub your skin with your nails because it feels uncomfortable
meanings.example: John yawned and scratched his leg.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰打了个呵欠，挠了挠腿。

meanings.meaning_en: a small cut on someone’s skin
meanings.example: Try not to scratch.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量别挠。

meanings.meaning_en: to move around within a system, or to make something do this
meanings.example: Swimming helps to get the blood circulating through the muscles.
meanings.example_cn: 游泳有助于肌肉的血液循环。

meanings.meaning_en: a gas that has no colour or smell, and that forms most of the Earth’s air. It is a chemical element: symbol N
meanings.example: Well, we know nitrogen has what?
meanings.example_cn: 对于氮气我们知道什么？

meanings.meaning_en: A sieve is a tool used for separating solids from liquids or larger pieces of something from smaller pieces. It consists of a metal or plastic ring with a wire or plastic net underneath, which the liquid or smaller pieces pass through.
meanings.example: Press the raspberries through a fine sieve to form a puree.
meanings.example_cn: 用一把细筛子把黑莓压榨成浓汁。

meanings.meaning_en: Spiral is also an adjective
meanings.example: ...a spiral staircase.
meanings.example_cn: …一段旋梯。

meanings.meaning_en: only interested in the money you may be able to get from a person, job etc
meanings.example: She did it for purely mercenary reasons.
meanings.example_cn: 她这么做纯粹是为了钱。

meanings.meaning_en: part of a machine or a set of parts that does a particular job
meanings.example: the brake mechanism
meanings.example_cn: 刹车装置

meanings.meaning_cn: 使一体化，取消种族隔离
meanings.meaning_en: to end the practice of separating people of different races in schools, colleges etc
meanings.example: He didn't integrate successfully into the Italian way of life.
meanings.example_cn: 他没有成功融入到意大利的生活方式中去。

meanings.meaning_en: very serious and sincere
meanings.example: a rather earnest young man
meanings.example_cn: 相当认真的一个年轻人

meanings.meaning_en: the time, usually between the ages of 12 and 18, when a young person is developing into an adult
meanings.example: Some young people suddenly become self-conscious and tongue-tied in early adolescence.
meanings.example_cn: 一些年青人在青春期早期突然变得害羞结舌。

meanings.meaning_en: grave problems, situations, or worries are very great or bad
meanings.example: Matthew’s life is in grave danger .
meanings.example_cn: 马修的生命危在旦夕。

meanings.meaning_en: the place in the ground where a dead body is buried
meanings.example: The report expressed grave concern over the technicians’ lack of training.
meanings.example_cn: 报告中对技术人员缺乏培训深表忧虑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用诡计取得；激起的兴趣
meanings.meaning_en: if something intrigues you, it interests you a lot because it seems strange or mysterious
meanings.example: Other people’s houses always intrigued her.
meanings.example_cn: 别人的房子总令她好奇。

meanings.meaning_en: the making of secret plans to harm someone or make them lose their position of power, or a plan of this kind

meanings.meaning_cn: 要求；款项；要求权；要求之物
meanings.meaning_en: a right to do something or to have something, especially because it belongs to you or because you deserve it
meanings.example: The Maldives pressed its claim to hold the summit.
meanings.example_cn: 马尔代夫一再要求主办这场峰会。

meanings.meaning_en: to state that something is true, even though it has not been proved
meanings.example: Philip feared Edward would lay claim to the Scottish crown.
meanings.example_cn: 菲利普担心爱德华会主张自己继承苏格兰王位的权利。

meanings.meaning_en: to choose one thing or do one thing instead of another
meanings.example: Depending on your circumstances you can opt for one method or the other.
meanings.example_cn: 根据自己的情况，你可以选择这种或那种方法。

meanings.meaning_en: if an agreement, law, or rule stipulates something, it must be done
meanings.example: Laws stipulate the maximum interest rate that banks can charge.
meanings.example_cn: 法律对银行可以收取的最高利率作了规定。

meanings.meaning_en: to completely get rid of something such as a disease or a social problem
meanings.example: an attempt to eradicate inflation
meanings.example_cn: 为消除通货膨胀所作的努力

meanings.meaning_cn: 神智昏迷，说胡话；极度兴奋
meanings.meaning_en: extreme excitement
meanings.example: Before she died she had fits of delirium.
meanings.example_cn: 去世前她一阵阵地胡言乱语。

meanings.meaning_en: the most northern or most southern point on a  planet  , especially the Earth
meanings.example: the distance from pole to equator
meanings.example_cn: 地极到赤道的距离

meanings.meaning_en: a group of animals of one kind that live and feed together
meanings.example: You have to be an individual; it’s no use running with the herd.
meanings.example_cn: 你必须特立独行，随大溜没有用处。

meanings.meaning_en: If you herd animals, you make them move along as a group
meanings.example: Stefano used a motorcycle to herd the sheep.
meanings.example_cn: 斯蒂芬诺骑一辆摩托车驱赶羊群。

meanings.meaning_cn: 缝纫；缝线；(肋部)突然剧痛
meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of thread that has been sewn into a piece of cloth, or the action of the thread going into and out of the cloth
meanings.example: He had to have ten stitches in his head.
meanings.example_cn: 他头上不得不缝了十针。

meanings.meaning_en: a waste material similar to glass, which remains after metal has been obtained from rock
to strengthen the position of power or success that you have, so that it becomes more effective or continues for longer
meanings.example: The company has consolidated its position as the country’s leading gas supplier.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司巩固了作为该国主要煤气供应商的地位。

meanings.example: The team consolidated their lead with a third goal.
meanings.example_cn: 球队以第三个进球巩固了领先优势。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a town or city
meanings.example: Jackson spent the day meeting with local religious and civic leaders.
meanings.example_cn: 杰克逊那天与当地的宗教领袖和市领导会面。

meanings.meaning_cn: 金属碰撞声；互碰；时间冲突；抵触
meanings.meaning_en: if two armies, groups etc clash, they start fighting – used in news reports
meanings.example: Troops clashed near the border.
meanings.example_cn: 军队在边境附近发生了冲突。

meanings.meaning_en: to take someone’s attention away from something by making them look at or listen to something else
meanings.example: Try not to distract the other students.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量不要让其他学生分心。

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow band of strong material that is used to fasten, hang, or hold onto something
meanings.example: a bra strap
meanings.example_cn: 胸罩肩带

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something or someone in place with one or more straps
meanings.example: The strap of my bag is broken.
meanings.example_cn: 我包上的带子断了。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which something such as a television show or meeting is organized or arranged
meanings.example: The courses were run to a consistent format.
meanings.example_cn: 这些课程的编排是有连续性的。

meanings.meaning_en: a business organization that makes or sells goods or services
meanings.example: Which company do you work for?
meanings.example_cn: 你在哪家公司上班？

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow hole dug into the surface of the ground
meanings.example: Workers dug a trench for gas lines.
meanings.example_cn: 工人们挖了一条沟来铺设煤气管道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 徒劳的，无效果的；自负的；不尊敬的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is vain is too proud of their good looks, abilities, or position – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Men can be just as vain as women.
meanings.example_cn: 男人有时会和女人一样虚荣。

meanings.example: So we have the current argument over how much of the derivative market will be exempt from regulation.
meanings.example_cn: 所以我们就看到了当前有关衍生产品市场到底有多大份额可以得到规则的豁免的辩论。

meanings.meaning_en: something that covers all or part of your face, to protect or to hide it
meanings.example: a surgical face mask
meanings.example_cn: 外科手术口罩

meanings.meaning_en: If one thing masks another, it prevents people from noticing or recognizing the other thing
meanings.example: He was attacked and robbed by two people wearing masks .
meanings.example_cn: 他被两个蒙面人袭击并抢劫。

meanings.meaning_en: to live in a particular place
meanings.example: They dwelt in the forest.
meanings.example_cn: 他们住在森林里。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of doubt or fear about what might happen or about whether something is right
meanings.example: Opponents of nuclear energy have deep misgivings about its safety.
meanings.example_cn: 反核能人士非常担心核能的安全性。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel annoyed or worried
meanings.example: It vexed me to think of others gossiping behind my back.
meanings.example_cn: 想到别人在我背后说闲话让我很恼火。

meanings.meaning_en: a passenger in a taxi
meanings.example: He could barely afford the fare.
meanings.example_cn: 他几乎付不起车费。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the outside of something or of a person’s body
meanings.example: the external appearance of the building
meanings.example_cn: 大楼的外观

meanings.meaning_en: to make a legal claim against someone, especially for money, because they have harmed you in some way
meanings.example: If the builders don’t fulfil their side of the contract, we’ll sue.
meanings.example_cn: 如果建筑商不履行合同，我们就要提出起诉。

meanings.example: It was strings of words borrowed from the different languages around them and put together in sort of haphazard ways.
meanings.example_cn: 它只不过是从身边的不同语言当中,借用了一些单词串,以随意的方式将它们放在一起

meanings.meaning_en: to use a particular amount of time for something, or give a particular share of money, space etc to someone or something
meanings.example: The seats are allotted to the candidates who have won the most votes.
meanings.example_cn: 这些席位被分配给了赢得了最多选票的候选人。

meanings.meaning_en: the study and treatment of mental illnesses
meanings.example: In it, he argued that psychiatry was a branch of medical science and should be investigated by observation and experimentation like the other natural sciences.
meanings.example_cn: 在书中，他主张精神病学是医学的一个分支，应当像其他自然科学一样以观察和实验为研究手段。

meanings.meaning_en: the way you position your body when sitting or standing
meanings.example: her upright posture
meanings.example_cn: 她笔挺的姿势

meanings.meaning_en: to put used objects or materials through a special process so that they can be used again
meanings.example: We take all our bottles to be recycled.
meanings.example_cn: 我们把我们所有的瓶子都回收利用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 揭发, 使暴露，使曝光"
meanings.meaning_en: to show the truth about someone or something, especially when it is bad
meanings.example: The film exposes the utter horror of war.
meanings.example_cn: 这部电影揭示了战争的极端恐怖。

meanings.meaning_en: Perception is the recognition of things using your senses, especially the sense of sight
meanings.example: And when they do, what do you think their perception will be?
meanings.example_cn: 当他们这样做时，你觉得他们的知觉是怎样的？

meanings.meaning_en: a mental illness that makes someone believe that they are very important and that people hate them and are trying to harm them
meanings.example: They capitalize on panic and paranoia.
meanings.example_cn: 他们利用恐慌和偏执狂。

meanings.example: We use the whiteboards alongside one of the walls, where you just write down your name if you have a question.
meanings.example_cn: 用其中一面墙壁旁边的白色书写板，如果有问题，你只要在那里写下你的名字。

meanings.meaning_cn: 食堂；小卖部；餐具箱；水壶
meanings.meaning_en: a place in a factory, school etc where meals are provided, usually quite cheaply
meanings.example: Rennie had eaten his supper in the canteen.
meanings.example_cn: 伦尼已在食堂吃过晚饭。

meanings.meaning_cn: 最高的；最大的，最重要的
meanings.meaning_en: having the highest position of power, importance, or influence
meanings.example: the Supreme Allied Commander in Europe
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲盟军最高指挥官

meanings.meaning_en: fair and sensible
meanings.example: a reasonable request
meanings.example_cn: 合情合理的要求

meanings.meaning_en: if you unfold something that was folded, or if it unfolds, it opens out
meanings.example: He unfolded the map.
meanings.example_cn: 他展开地图。

meanings.meaning_en: a cloth bag filled with soft material that you put on a chair or the floor to make it more comfortable
meanings.example: a velvet cushion
meanings.example_cn: 天鹅绒垫子

meanings.meaning_en: to make the effect of a fall or hit less painful, for example by having something soft in the way
meanings.example: a cushion cover
meanings.example_cn: 垫子套

meanings.meaning_en: in the area around a particular place
meanings.example: The stolen car was found in the vicinity of the station.
meanings.example_cn: 被盗汽车在车站附近被发现。

meanings.meaning_en: to throw something, especially something light, with a quick gentle movement of your hand
meanings.example: Toss the carrots in some butter before serving.
meanings.example_cn: 上桌前把胡萝卜放在黄油里搅拌一下。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a substance purer using an industrial process
meanings.example: oil refining
meanings.example_cn: 石油的提炼

meanings.meaning_en: a small thin piece that is torn or cut roughly from something
meanings.example: Cut the cabbage into fine long shreds.
meanings.example_cn: 把这棵卷心菜切成细长条。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut or tear something into small thin pieces
if a group of people disperse or are dispersed, they go away in different directions
meanings.example: Police used tear gas to disperse the crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 警察用催泪瓦斯驱散人群。

meanings.meaning_en: the form that a book, newspaper, magazine etc is produced in
meanings.example: a paperback edition
meanings.example_cn: 平装本

meanings.meaning_en: to restrict someone’s freedom and prevent them from doing what they want
meanings.example: fettered by family responsibilities
meanings.example_cn: 受家庭责任的束缚

meanings.meaning_en: a new interest in something, especially a particular form of art, music etc, that has not been popular for a long period
meanings.example: ...the Renaissance masterpieces in London's galleries.
meanings.example_cn: …伦敦美术馆里文艺复兴时期的杰作。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone uses a court of law to deal with a legal case
meanings.example: John is taking legal proceedings against his ex-partner.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰在对他的前合伙人提起法律诉讼。

meanings.meaning_en: to reduce the length of (a written work) by condensing or rewriting
meanings.example: Article 33 A book publisher may alter or abridge a work with the permission of the copyright owner.
meanings.example_cn: 第三十三条图书出版者经作者许可，可以对作品修改、删节。

meanings.meaning_en: a round roof on a building
meanings.example: ...the dome of the Capitol.
meanings.example_cn: …国会大厦的穹顶。

meanings.meaning_en: to guess a number or amount, without calculating it exactly
meanings.example: The expression ‘full moon’ means the fourteenth day of the moon reckoned from its first appearance.
meanings.example_cn: 所谓“满月”是指从新月初现算起的第14天。

meanings.meaning_en: happening in or relating to the countryside, not the city
meanings.example: a rural setting
meanings.example_cn: 乡村环境

meanings.meaning_en: when you copy someone else’s actions
meanings.example: The remake of ‘Casablanca’ was a pale imitation (= something that is much less good than the thing it imitates ) of the original movie.
meanings.example_cn: 重拍的《卡萨布兰卡》远不如原版。

meanings.meaning_en: a man whose job is to serve food and drinks to passengers on a plane or ship
meanings.example: race stewards
meanings.example_cn: 比赛组织者

meanings.example: Rumors of such coordination abound, but as with many rumors, they have no basis in fact.
meanings.example_cn: 关于这类协调的谣传很多；但如同许多其他谣传一样，它们没有事实根据。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a country that controls and rules other countries, usually ones that are far away
meanings.example: the struggle against colonial rule
meanings.example_cn: 反抗殖民统治的斗争

meanings.meaning_en: someone who lives in a  colony  but who is a citizen of the country that rules the colony
meanings.example: Britain was the largest colonial power .
meanings.example_cn: 英国曾是最大的殖民强国。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely large
meanings.example: People who travel by rail still read an immense amount.
meanings.example_cn: 人们坐火车旅行时仍然会读很多书。

meanings.meaning_en: a large notice or advertisement on a piece of card, which is put up or carried in a public place
meanings.example: a huge placard saying ‘Welcome to Derbyville’
meanings.example_cn: 印有“欢迎来到德比维尔”的巨幅标语牌

meanings.meaning_cn: 律师等的当事人，委托人；商店的顾客
meanings.meaning_en: someone who gets services or advice from a professional person, company, or organization
meanings.example: a meeting with an important client
meanings.example_cn: 与一位重要客户的会面

meanings.meaning_en: the particular taste of a food or drink
meanings.example: Which flavour do you want - chocolate or vanilla?
meanings.example_cn: 你要哪种味道的，巧克力还是香草？

meanings.meaning_en: the act of giving someone something and receiving something else from them
meanings.example: Four of my cassettes for your Madonna CD is a fair exchange.
meanings.example_cn: 我用四盒磁带换你的麦当娜激光唱片很公平。

meanings.meaning_en: a very thin book with paper covers, that gives information about something
meanings.example: a political pamphlet
meanings.example_cn: 政治宣传册

meanings.meaning_cn: 量度单位；建筑用的标准部件
meanings.meaning_en: one of the separate units that a course of study has been divided into. Usually students choose a number of modules to study
meanings.example: a module in mathematics
meanings.example_cn: 数学课的一个单元

meanings.example: Arthur was a very gentle, caring person.
meanings.example_cn: 阿瑟是一个非常温柔体贴的人。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel slightly angry and unhappy about something
meanings.example: What annoyed him most was that he had received no apology.
meanings.example_cn: 最令他生气的是没人向他道歉。

meanings.meaning_en: shining in the dark
meanings.example: luminous paint
meanings.example_cn: 发光涂料

meanings.meaning_en: to say something suddenly and loudly because you are surprised, angry, or excited
meanings.example: ‘No!’ she exclaimed in shock.
meanings.example_cn: “不！”她惊呼道。

meanings.example: He asked me a lot of very pertinent questions .
meanings.example_cn: 他问了我许多直接相关的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to state that something is correct or true, especially after some kind of test
meanings.example: The accounts were certified by an auditor.
meanings.example_cn: 这些账目经审计员核实过。

meanings.meaning_en: money that a business or organization receives over a period of time, especially from selling goods or services
meanings.example: advertising revenue
meanings.example_cn: 广告收入

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement with a company in which you pay them money, especially regularly, and they pay the costs if something bad happens, for example if you become ill or your car is damaged
meanings.example: Your father took out insurance to cover the mortgage.
meanings.example_cn: 你父亲购买了抵押借款保险。

meanings.meaning_en: the power you have because of your official position
meanings.example: an agreement between the US and Colombian authorities
meanings.example_cn: 美国和哥伦比亚当局的一份协议

meanings.meaning_en: to express formal support or approval for someone or something
meanings.example: I can endorse their opinion wholeheartedly.
meanings.example_cn: 我可以全心全意地支持他们的观点。

meanings.meaning_en: to put paper or cloth over something to cover it
meanings.example: I’ve still got a few Christmas presents to wrap up.
meanings.example_cn: 我还有一些圣诞礼物要包起来。

meanings.meaning_en: not strict in the way you punish someone or in the standard you expect
meanings.example: the lenient sentences handed down by some judges
meanings.example_cn: 一些法官作出的宽大判决

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is pompous thinks that they are important, and shows this by being very formal and using long words – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: He seems rather pompous.
meanings.example_cn: 他看上去相当自负。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something look more attractive by putting something pretty on it
meanings.example: Children’s pictures decorated the walls of the classroom.
meanings.example_cn: 教室的墙上装点着儿童画。

meanings.meaning_en: without limits in space or time
meanings.example: The universe is infinite.
meanings.example_cn: 宇宙是无限的。

meanings.meaning_en: if something perplexes you, it makes you feel confused and worried because it is difficult to understand
meanings.example: Shea’s symptoms perplexed the doctors.
meanings.example_cn: 谢伊的症状令医生们困惑。

meanings.meaning_en: If you snatch something or snatch at something, you take it or pull it away quickly
meanings.example: Mick snatched the cards from Archie's hand.
meanings.example_cn: 米克一把夺过阿彻手里的牌。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of cleaning a room with a long-handled brush
meanings.example: The kitchen needs a good sweep.
meanings.example_cn: 厨房需要好好扫一扫了。

meanings.meaning_en: if winds, waves, fire etc sweep a place or sweep through, across etc a place, they move quickly and with a lot of force

meanings.example: The researchers demonstrate that it is possible to generate odor in a compact device that can fit on the back of a TV with potentially thousands of odors.
meanings.example_cn: 研究员表示，将一个可以散发上千种气味的小型设备安装在电视背后，从而实现电视(根据情景)生成气味是可能的。

meanings.meaning_en: to tear something or be torn quickly and violently
meanings.example: Her clothes had all been ripped.
meanings.example_cn: 她的衣服都被撕破了。

meanings.meaning_en: animals such as cows and sheep that are kept on a farm
meanings.example: The heavy rains and flooding killed scores of livestock.
meanings.example_cn: 大雨和洪水淹死了许多家畜。

meanings.meaning_en: not likely to happen
meanings.example: Donna might be able to come tomorrow, but it’s very unlikely.
meanings.example_cn: 唐娜明天也许能来，不过这可能性很小。

meanings.meaning_en: your name written in the way you usually write it, for example at the end of a letter, or on a cheque etc, to show that you have written it
meanings.example: Her signature is totally illegible (= cannot be read ) .
meanings.example_cn: 她的签字完全无法辨认。

meanings.meaning_en: to feel extremely sad, especially because someone you love has died
meanings.example: People need time to grieve after the death of a loved one.
meanings.example_cn: 人们在所爱之人去世后会有一段悲伤期。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling unable to stand steadily, for example because you are looking down from a high place or because you are ill
meanings.example: The heat and the champagne made him feel dizzy .
meanings.example_cn: 高温和香槟酒使他感到眩晕。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of your family who lived a long time ago
meanings.example: My ancestors were French.
meanings.example_cn: 我的祖先是法国人。

meanings.meaning_en: to disappear suddenly, especially in a way that cannot be easily explained
meanings.example: My keys were here a minute ago but now they’ve vanished.
meanings.example_cn: 我的钥匙刚刚还在这里，现在却不翼而飞了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 画廊，美术品陈列室；剧场顶层
meanings.meaning_en: a large building where people can see famous pieces of art
meanings.example: an exhibition of African art at the Hayward Gallery
meanings.example_cn: 海沃德美术馆的非洲艺术展览

meanings.meaning_en: manual work involves using your hands or your physical strength rather than your mind
meanings.example: People in manual occupations have a lower life expectancy.
meanings.example_cn: 干体力活的人预期寿命较短。

meanings.meaning_en: a book that gives instructions about how to do something, especially how to use a machine
used at the beginning of an official document to mean ‘because of a particular fact’
meanings.example: He had never done anything for them, whereas they had done everything for him.
meanings.example_cn: 他从未为他们做过任何事，反之他们却为他做了所有事。

meanings.meaning_en: to look angrily at someone for a long time
meanings.example: She gave him a hostile glare.
meanings.example_cn: 她狠狠地瞪了他一眼。

meanings.meaning_en: to worry about something, especially when there is no need
meanings.example: Don’t fret – everything will be all right.
meanings.example_cn: 别担心——一切都会好的。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement in which you admit that something is true or that you have done something wrong
meanings.example: Reese, by his own admission , lacks the necessary experience.
meanings.example_cn: 里斯自己也承认缺乏必要的经验。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is involved in illegal activities or has been proved guilty of a crime
meanings.example: Police have described the man as a violent and dangerous criminal.
meanings.example_cn: 警方形容那名男子是个凶暴而危险的罪犯。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to crime
meanings.example: a convicted criminal
meanings.example_cn: 一名已决罪犯

meanings.meaning_en: extreme and sudden
meanings.example: drastic cuts in government spending
meanings.example_cn: 政府开支的急剧削减

meanings.meaning_cn: 清楚的，易懂的，神智清醒的
meanings.meaning_en: expressed in a way that is clear and easy to understand
meanings.example: You must write in a clear and lucid style.
meanings.example_cn: 你的写作风格一定要清楚易懂。

meanings.meaning_en: things that are simultaneous happen at exactly the same time
meanings.example: They grabbed each other’s hands in simultaneous panic.
meanings.example_cn: 他们俩同时惊慌起来，相互抓住对方的手。

meanings.meaning_en: not moving, changing, or developing
meanings.example: Economists predict that house prices will remain static for a long period.
meanings.example_cn: 经济学家预测，房价将长期保持稳定。

meanings.meaning_en: noise caused by electricity in the air that blocks or spoils the sound from radio or TV
not necessary because something else means or does the same thing
meanings.example: the removal of redundant information
meanings.example_cn: 多余信息的删除

meanings.meaning_en: used with a present participle to form the  continuous 4  tenses of verbs
meanings.example: Don’t disturb me while I’m working.
meanings.example_cn: 我工作的时候不要打扰我。

meanings.meaning_en: used with a present participle to form the  continuous 4  tenses of verbs
meanings.example: Gemma was reading.
meanings.example_cn: 吉玛正在看书。

meanings.meaning_en: used with a present participle to form the  continuous 4  tenses of verbs
meanings.example: They’ve been asking a lot of questions.
meanings.example_cn: 他们已经问了许多问题。

meanings.example: That guy’s always causing trouble.
meanings.example_cn: 那家伙总是惹麻烦。

meanings.meaning_en: You can refer to the most powerful, rich, or talented people within a particular group, place, or society as the elite
meanings.example: ...a government comprised mainly of the elite.
meanings.example_cn: …主要由精英组成的政府。

meanings.meaning_cn: 经济的；经济学的，便宜的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to trade, in-dustry, and the management of money
meanings.example: Economic growth is slow.
meanings.example_cn: 经济增长缓慢。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to look after a school or other large building
meanings.example: Ed Roberts had been a school janitor for a long time.
meanings.example_cn: 埃德·罗伯茨做学校的看门人已很久了。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that measures the temperature of the air, of your body etc
meanings.example: The thermometer registered over 100˚C.
meanings.example_cn: 温度计显示高于100摄氏度。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell the public about a product or service in order to persuade them to buy it
meanings.example: They no longer advertise alcohol or cigarettes at sporting events.
meanings.example_cn: 他们不再在体育赛事上做烟酒广告了。

meanings.meaning_en: to begin or to start something
meanings.example: Work will commence on the new building immediately.
meanings.example_cn: 新大楼即将破土动工。

meanings.meaning_en: a carefully planned piece of work to get information about something, to build something, to improve something etc
meanings.example: The project aims to provide an analysis of children’s emotions.
meanings.example_cn: 该计划旨在对儿童情绪作出分析。

meanings.meaning_en: If you project a film or picture onto a screen or wall, you make it appear there
meanings.example: a three-year research project
meanings.example_cn: 一项为期三年的研究计划

meanings.meaning_en: the sale of goods in shops to customers, for their own use and not for selling to anyone else
meanings.example: a retail price of £8.99
meanings.example_cn: 8.99英镑的零售价

meanings.meaning_en: the back part of an object, vehicle, or building, or a position at the back of an object or area
meanings.example: He settled back in the rear of the taxi.
meanings.example_cn: 他在出租车后座，往后靠着坐好了。

meanings.meaning_en: to look after a person or animal until they are fully grown

meanings.meaning_cn: 生命的；必需的；极期重要的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely important and necessary for something to succeed or exist
meanings.example: The work she does is absolutely vital.
meanings.example_cn: 她所做的工作至关重要。

meanings.meaning_en: an important job that involves travelling somewhere, done by a member of the air force, army etc, or by a spacecraft
meanings.example: He was sent on over 200 missions before being killed in action.
meanings.example_cn: 在阵亡之前他奉命执行过200多次军事任务。

meanings.meaning_en: if something paralyses you, it makes you lose the ability to move part or all of your body, or to feel it
meanings.example: Her legs were partly paralysed in the crash.
meanings.example_cn: 在撞车事故中她的双腿部分瘫痪。

meanings.meaning_en: very large, solid, and heavy
meanings.example: The bell is massive, weighing over 40 tons.
meanings.example_cn: 那口钟非常大，有40多吨重。

meanings.meaning_en: a large mass of ice which moves slowly down a mountain valley
meanings.example: The glacier calved a large iceberg.
meanings.example_cn: 冰川崩解而产生一个大冰山。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance which is produced when a substance is combined with oxygen
meanings.example: iron oxide
meanings.example_cn: 氧化铁

meanings.meaning_en: to happen
meanings.example: A third of accidental deaths occur in the home.
meanings.example_cn: 有三分之一的意外死亡发生在家里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 传送，运送；带有；支持；赞同
meanings.meaning_en: to take people or things from one place to another in a vehicle, ship, or plane
meanings.example: The ship was carrying drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 这艘船上载有毒品。

meanings.meaning_en: to not notice something, or not see how important it is
meanings.example: It is easy to overlook a small detail like that.
meanings.example_cn: 那样的小细节很容易被忽略。

meanings.meaning_en: a long tube with mirrors fitted in it, used to look over the top of something, especially to see out of a  submarine
meanings.example: Submarines are most vulnerable to detection when the submarine commander uses a periscope to assess the situation on the surface.
meanings.example_cn: 当潜艇指挥官使用潜望镜对海面态势进行评估的时候最容易被探测到也最容易被攻击。

meanings.meaning_en: having the usual features or qualities of a particular group or thing
meanings.example: typical British weather
meanings.example_cn: 典型的英国天气

meanings.meaning_en: before other people or things
meanings.example: Members receive priority bookings and reduced ticket prices to all concerts.
meanings.example_cn: 会员可优先预订所有音乐会的门票，并享受优惠票价。

meanings.meaning_en: to make cloth, a carpet, a basket etc by crossing threads or thin pieces under and over each other by hand or on a loom
meanings.example: hand-woven scarves
meanings.example_cn: 手织围巾

meanings.meaning_en: overt actions are done publicly, without trying to hide anything
meanings.example: an overt attempt to silence their political opponents
meanings.example_cn: 他们想压制政敌言论的明显企图

meanings.meaning_en: the side of an animal’s or person’s body, between the  ribs  and the  hip
meanings.example: We were attacked on our left flank.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的左翼受到攻击。

meanings.meaning_en: to successfully control a feeling or problem that prevents you from achieving something
meanings.example: He struggled to overcome his shyness.
meanings.example_cn: 他努力克服自己的羞怯。

meanings.meaning_en: to change, or to make someone or something change
meanings.example: Her face hadn’t altered much over the years.
meanings.example_cn: 过了这么多年，她的容貌并没有多大改变。

meanings.meaning_en: the period of time between two events, activities etc
meanings.example: He left the room, returning after a short interval with a message.
meanings.example_cn: 他离开房间，过了一会儿就带回来一条消息。

meanings.meaning_en: A sheer cliff or drop is extremely steep or completely vertical
meanings.example: There was a sheer drop just outside my window.
meanings.example_cn: 就在我的窗外有一个陡坡。

meanings.meaning_en: small in degree
meanings.example: a slight improvement
meanings.example_cn: 些许的改进

meanings.meaning_en: to offend someone by treating them rudely or without respect
meanings.example: a slight increase
meanings.example_cn: 少许的增加

meanings.meaning_en: to make or produce something that is not real but has the appearance or feeling of being real
meanings.example: a machine that simulates conditions in space
meanings.example_cn: 一台模拟太空环境的机器

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being suitable or useful for a particular purpose, especially by making something easier or saving you time
meanings.example: Ready meals sell well because of their convenience.
meanings.example_cn: 即食餐因为方便销路好。

meanings.meaning_en: electronic equipment, such as computers and televisions, uses electricity that has passed through computer chips, transistors etc
meanings.example: electronic games
meanings.example_cn: 电子游戏

meanings.meaning_en: spoken rather than written
meanings.example: verbal skills
meanings.example_cn: 语言技能

meanings.meaning_en: a white or grey substance that grows on walls or other surfaces in wet, slightly warm conditions
meanings.example: The room smelled of mildew.
meanings.example_cn: 该房间有股霉味。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular type of character which makes someone likely to behave or react in a certain way
meanings.example: the disposition of assets on death
meanings.example_cn: 身后财产的处置

meanings.meaning_cn: 令人惊奇的事；创造奇迹
meanings.meaning_en: You can describe something or someone as a marvel to indicate that you think that they are wonderful
meanings.example: The whale, like the dolphin, has become a symbol of the marvels of creation.
meanings.example_cn: 鲸，和海豚一样，已经成为造物杰作的象征。

meanings.meaning_en: goods that are carried by ship, train, or aircraft, and the system of moving these goods
meanings.example: freight services
meanings.example_cn: 货运公司

meanings.meaning_en: to send goods by air, sea, or train
meanings.example: We’ll send your personal belongings by air freight and your furniture by sea freight .
meanings.example_cn: 你的个人物品我们将以空运方式运送，家具将以海运方式运送。

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh at someone and make jokes in order to have fun by embarrassing them, either in a friendly way or in an unkind way
meanings.example: Don’t get upset. I was only teasing .
meanings.example_cn: 别生气，我只是在逗你玩。

meanings.meaning_en: stopping and starting often and for short periods
meanings.example: The weather forecast is for sun, with intermittent showers.
meanings.example_cn: 天气预报为晴，有阵雨。

meanings.meaning_cn: 驯服了的；(人)顺从的，听话的
meanings.meaning_en: used to describe a person who is willing to do what other people ask, even if it is slightly dishonest
meanings.example: If you have a tame doctor, he might give you a sick note.
meanings.example_cn: 要是你的医生好说话，他可能会给你开个病假条。

meanings.example: Alex woke late, feeling tired and sluggish.
meanings.example_cn: 亚历克斯醒得很晚，感到很倦怠。

meanings.meaning_en: to do or provide what is necessary or needed
meanings.example: There is little doubt that the scheme fulfils a need for our community.
meanings.example_cn: 毫无疑问，这计划会满足我们社区的需求。

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument that shows directions and has a needle that always points north
meanings.example: a map and compass
meanings.example_cn: 地图和指南针

meanings.example: The paternity of the child is in dispute.
meanings.example_cn: 这个孩子的生父是谁尚有疑问。

meanings.meaning_en: violent, dangerous, and frightening
meanings.example: a ferocious, hungry lion
meanings.example_cn: 一头凶猛的饿狮

meanings.meaning_en: having a very strong effect or felt very strongly
meanings.example: Young people today are under intense pressure to succeed.
meanings.example_cn: 如今的年轻人面临要出人头地的巨大压力。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of water contained in the air
meanings.example: The room is kept at 72 degrees and 50% relative humidity.
meanings.example_cn: 房间的温度保持在72度，相对湿度50%。

meanings.meaning_en: having a lot of small parts or details put together in a complicated way
meanings.example: pure silks embroidered with elaborate patterns
meanings.example_cn: 绣有精美图案的真丝衣服

meanings.meaning_en: to give more details or new information about something

meanings.meaning_cn: 含蓄的，潜在的；在下面的
meanings.meaning_en: The underlying features of an object, event, or situation are not obvious, and it may be difficult to discover or reveal them
meanings.example: To stop a problem you have to understand its underlying causes.
meanings.example_cn: 要解决问题，你得了解其潜在原因。

meanings.meaning_en: to give a college, hospital etc a large sum of money that provides it with an income
meanings.example: The ambassador has endowed a $1 million public-service fellowships programme.
meanings.example_cn: 大使资助了一个100万美元的公共服务奖学金项目。

meanings.meaning_en: to expect that something will happen and be ready for it
meanings.example: Sales are better than anticipated.
meanings.example_cn: 销量比预期要好。

meanings.example: The building can accommodate all of the offshore workers and protect them from hurricane damage.
meanings.example_cn: 这个建筑能容纳所有的海上工人并且保护他们不受飓风的伤害。

meanings.meaning_en: harm or damage
meanings.example: Work hard to succeed but not to the detriment of others.
meanings.example_cn: 在不损害他人利益的前提下为成功艰苦奋斗。

meanings.meaning_en: something that helps a feeling, idea, or belief to grow stronger
meanings.example: His favorite fruits and vegetables as well as 55 lb. of bamboo will be on board for nourishment.
meanings.example_cn: 除了它最喜爱的水果和蔬菜以外还有55磅的竹子将会作为它在飞机上的食物。

meanings.meaning_en: to move your tongue across the surface of something in order to eat it, wet it, clean it etc
meanings.example: The dog jumped up and licked her face.
meanings.example_cn: 那只狗跳起来舔她的脸。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of low flat ground that is always wet and soft
meanings.example: He led them away from a marsh.
meanings.example_cn: 他把他们带离沼泽。

meanings.meaning_en: if you perspire, parts of your body become wet, especially because you are hot or have been doing hard work
meanings.example: Willie was perspiring heavily .
meanings.example_cn: 威利大汗淋漓。

meanings.meaning_cn: 标准尺寸,(铁道)轨矩;雨量器；(电线)直径 "
meanings.meaning_en: the width of the barrel of a gun
meanings.example: a 12-gauge shotgun
meanings.example_cn: 12号口径的猎枪

meanings.meaning_en: to burst, or to make something burst, into small pieces, usually with a loud noise and in a way that causes damage
meanings.example: The device was thrown at an army patrol but failed to explode.
meanings.example_cn: 炸弹投向了陆军巡逻队，但没有爆炸。

meanings.meaning_en: if you have a fringe, your hair is cut so that it hangs down over your forehead
meanings.example: a tall girl with straight brown hair and a fringe
meanings.example_cn: 一头棕色直发、留着刘海的高个子女孩

meanings.meaning_en: extremely interesting
meanings.example: a fascinating book
meanings.example_cn: 一本引人入胜的书

meanings.meaning_en: worried or slightly afraid because you think that something bad might happen
meanings.example: She eventually fell into an uneasy sleep.
meanings.example_cn: 她终于睡着了，但睡得并不踏实。

meanings.meaning_en: a long and carefully organized journey, especially to a dangerous or unfamiliar place, or the people that make this journey
meanings.example: an expedition to the North Pole
meanings.example_cn: 北极探险

meanings.meaning_cn: 生物；有机体；有机的组织
meanings.meaning_en: an animal, plant, human, or any other living thing
meanings.example: All living organisms have to adapt to changes in environmental conditions.
meanings.example_cn: 一切生物都要适应环境条件的变化。

meanings.meaning_en: to make food or drink go down your throat and towards your stomach
meanings.example: He swallowed the last of his coffee and asked for the bill.
meanings.example_cn: 他喝完最后一口咖啡，要求结账。

meanings.meaning_en: not being used or not needed at the present time
meanings.example: Have you got any spare boxes?
meanings.example_cn: 你有没有多余的盒子？

meanings.meaning_en: an additional thing, for example a key, that you keep so that it is available
meanings.example: You could sleep in the spare bedroom.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以睡那间空着的客房。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of doing or achieving something
meanings.example: The only means of communication was sign language.
meanings.example_cn: 唯一的交流方法是手语。

meanings.meaning_en: The proportion of one kind of person or thing in a group is the number of people or things of that kind compared to the total number of people or things in the group
meanings.example: The proportion of women in the profession had risen to 17.3%.
meanings.example_cn: 从事那个职业的女性比例已经增长到17.3%。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of film on which pictures and writing can be made very small, so that large amounts can be stored easily
meanings.example: It was to harbor drawers brimming with reference books, microfilm and bibliographic cards.
meanings.example_cn: 操作台的抽屉里塞满了参考书、缩微胶片和各种书目卡片。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to sex in a way that is shocking and offensive
meanings.example: Bradford made an obscene gesture.
meanings.example_cn: 布拉德福德做了个下流手势。

meanings.meaning_en: very quiet and gentle and unwilling to argue with people
meanings.example: He was always so meek and mild .
meanings.example_cn: 他总是那么温顺。

meanings.meaning_en: a small plant that is used to improve the taste of food, or to make medicine
meanings.example: Sprinkle the dish with chopped fresh herbs.
meanings.example_cn: 在菜肴上撒些切碎的新鲜香草。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large house
meanings.example: a beautiful country mansion
meanings.example_cn: 漂亮的乡村宅第

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring time. There are 60 minutes in one hour
meanings.example: It takes me ten minutes to walk to work.
meanings.example_cn: 我步行上班要用十分钟。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely small
meanings.example: The train arrived at four minutes past eight.
meanings.example_cn: 火车于八点零四分到达。

meanings.example: The closure of the local hospital has caused a huge public outcry.
meanings.example_cn: 当地医院的关闭激起了大规模的公众抗议。

meanings.meaning_en: an introduction at the beginning of a book or speech
meanings.example: ...the preface to Kelman's novel.
meanings.example_cn: …凯尔曼小说的前言。

meanings.meaning_en: solid substances that settle at the bottom of a liquid
meanings.example: a thick layer of sediment
meanings.example_cn: 一层厚厚的沉积物

meanings.meaning_en: to officially announce that you have decided to leave your job or an organization
meanings.example: A hospital administrator has resigned over claims he lied to get the job.
meanings.example_cn: 一位医院主管因为有人声称他的职位是骗来的而辞职了。

meanings.meaning_en: a small electric lamp that you carry in your hand
meanings.example: We shone our torches around the cavern.
meanings.example_cn: 我们用手电筒照着山洞。

meanings.meaning_en: to become worse
meanings.example: Ethel’s health has deteriorated.
meanings.example_cn: 埃塞尔的健康状况恶化了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose behaviour is considered to be morally unacceptable

meanings.example: Bright colours characterize his paintings.
meanings.example_cn: 明亮的色彩是他绘画作品的特点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 阅兵整队；列队行进，游行；夸耀；炫示
meanings.meaning_en: to walk or march together to celebrate or protest about something
meanings.example: Young athletes will get a chance to parade their skills.
meanings.example_cn: 年轻运动员将有机会一展身手。

meanings.meaning_en: to allow someone to do something
meanings.example: I can’t come out tonight – my dad won’t let me.
meanings.example_cn: 今天晚上我不能出来，我爸爸不允许。

meanings.meaning_en: to make regular movements forwards and backwards or from one side to another while hanging from a particular point, or to make something do this
meanings.example: Let your arms swing as you walk.
meanings.example_cn: 边走边摆动双臂。

meanings.meaning_en: strange, unexpected, or unsuitable in a particular situation
meanings.example: The new theatre looks utterly incongruous in its setting.
meanings.example_cn: 这座新剧院和周围的环境格格不入。

meanings.meaning_cn: 详细目录，存货清单；存货盘存
meanings.meaning_en: a list of all the things in a place
meanings.example: ...one inventory of twelve sails for each yacht.
meanings.example_cn: …为每艘游艇配备12张帆的存货。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who sing together for other people to listen to
meanings.example: He joined a church choir at the age of eight.
meanings.example_cn: 他八岁时加入了一个教堂唱诗班。

meanings.meaning_en: if an egg hatches, or if it is hatched, it breaks, letting the young bird, insect etc come out
meanings.example: The eggs take three days to hatch.
meanings.example_cn: 这些蛋要三天时间才能孵化。

meanings.meaning_en: to show or prove something clearly
meanings.example: The study demonstrates the link between poverty and malnutrition.
meanings.example_cn: 这项研究证明了贫困与营养不良之间的联系。

meanings.meaning_en: when you change something from one form, purpose, or system to a different one
meanings.example: ...the conversion of disused rail lines into cycle routes.
meanings.example_cn: …把废弃的铁路改变成自行车道。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which there are very few of something that people want or need
meanings.example: Construction had slowed because of a dearth of labourers.
meanings.example_cn: 建筑进程缓慢是因为劳动力不足。

meanings.meaning_en: showing a lack of respect for God or holy things
meanings.example: profane language
meanings.example_cn: 亵渎的语言

meanings.meaning_en: to treat something holy with a lack of respect
a group of things of the same kind that are very close together
meanings.example: a diamond cluster ring
meanings.example_cn: 群镶钻戒

meanings.meaning_en: a refusal to accept someone’s authority or obey rules or laws
meanings.example: The prime minister is now facing a revolt by members of his own party.
meanings.example_cn: 首相现在面临着党内倒戈。

meanings.meaning_cn: 现世的，世俗的；非宗教的
meanings.meaning_en: not connected with or controlled by a church or other religious authority
meanings.example: secular education
meanings.example_cn: 世俗教育

meanings.meaning_en: a list of problems or subjects that a government, organization etc is planning to deal with
meanings.example: The Republicans have stuck to their conservative agenda.
meanings.example_cn: 共和党人坚持自己的保守议题。

meanings.meaning_en: a shape like a curve or a circle made by a line curving back towards itself, or a piece of wire, string etc that has this shape
meanings.example: Mrs. Morrell reached for a loop of garden hose.
meanings.example_cn: 莫雷尔夫人伸手去拿一圈橡胶软管。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a loop or make something into a loop
careful to do everything that it is your job or duty to do
meanings.example: A conscientious teacher may feel inclined to take work home.
meanings.example_cn: 一个认真负责的教师可能会想着把工作带回家去做。

meanings.meaning_en: to punish someone who has done something to harm you or someone else
meanings.example: The poor murdered girl must be revenged.
meanings.example_cn: 一定要为被害的可怜女孩报仇。

meanings.meaning_en: disagreement, angry feelings, or unfriendliness between people
meanings.example: Putting oil on both surfaces reduces friction.
meanings.example_cn: 两面都上油可减小摩擦力。

meanings.meaning_en: a change in the direction or use of something, or the act of changing it
meanings.example: A slight diversion in the road is causing major headaches for businesses along El Camino Real.
meanings.example_cn: 马路上的一小段绕行道让国王大道沿街的商家十分头疼。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something in order to find out whether something really is correct, true, or in good condition
meanings.example: Check the tiles carefully before you buy them.
meanings.example_cn: 购买之前要把瓷砖仔细检查一下。

meanings.meaning_en: to continue to do something that has already been planned or started
meanings.example: Before proceeding further, we must define our terms.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须先定义术语，然后再往下展开。

meanings.meaning_en: to quickly follow someone or something in order to catch them
meanings.example: The dogs saw him running and chased him.
meanings.example_cn: 那些狗看到他在跑就追他。

meanings.meaning_cn: (法律)抗辩；请求，恳求，托词，口实
meanings.meaning_en: a request that is urgent or full of emotion
meanings.example: Caldwell made a plea for donations.
meanings.example_cn: 考德威尔恳求捐款。

meanings.meaning_en: to encourage people to support something in an active way
meanings.example: an attempt to mobilize popular opinion
meanings.example_cn: 鼓动公众舆论的尝试

meanings.meaning_en: to have a strong desire for something, especially something that is difficult or impossible to get
meanings.example: He yearned for freedom.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾渴望自由。

meanings.meaning_en: the people who work in a company, organization, or military force
meanings.example: All personnel are to receive security badges.
meanings.example_cn: 所有人员都将拿到安保徽章。

meanings.meaning_en: criminal activities that involve sex or drugs
meanings.example: the fight against vice on the streets
meanings.example_cn: 打击街头犯罪

meanings.meaning_en: a short pole that is wide and flat at the end, used for moving a small boat in water
meanings.example: Each man had a paddle for an hour and then a rest.
meanings.example_cn: 每人划一小时桨， 然后休息一下。

meanings.meaning_en: to move a small light boat through water, using one or more paddles
meanings.example: We strive to paddle to follow the stream, however, we are unsure if how and when we will reach the horizon.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿着河流奋力划桨，但是我们无法确定我们什么时候和怎样才能到达地平线。

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly take hold of someone or something because you are frightened, in pain, or in danger
meanings.example: He clutched at a pillar for support.
meanings.example_cn: 他猛地抓住一根柱子作支撑。

meanings.meaning_en: the  pedal  that you press with your foot when driving a vehicle in order to change  gear  , or the part of the vehicle that this controls
meanings.example: Tom fell to the ground clutching his stomach.
meanings.example_cn: 汤姆捂着肚子倒在地上。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is walking, especially along a street or other place used by cars
meanings.example: Ingrid was a walker, even in Los Angeles, where a pedestrian is a rare sight.
meanings.example_cn: 英格丽德是个步行者，即使在行人少见的洛杉矶也是如此。

meanings.meaning_en: Graphic means concerned with drawing or pictures, especially in publishing, industry, or computing
meanings.example: ...fine and graphic arts.
meanings.example_cn: …美术与制图艺术。

meanings.meaning_en: concerned with trade
meanings.example: mercantile law
meanings.example_cn: 商法

meanings.meaning_en: a flat board that contains the controls for a machine, piece of electrical equipment, computer etc
meanings.example: No one could console her when Peter died.
meanings.example_cn: 彼得去世时没人能够安慰她。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel better when they are feeling sad or disappointed

meanings.meaning_cn: 巨大的，极大的；非常的，极好的
meanings.meaning_en: very big, fast, powerful etc
meanings.example: Suddenly, there was a tremendous bang, and the whole station shook.
meanings.example_cn: 突然一声巨响，整个车站都晃动了。

meanings.meaning_en: to become less or go down to a lower level, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The number of people who have the disease has decreased significantly in recent years.
meanings.example_cn: 近年来，这种病的患者人数明显下降。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone performs a play or a piece of music
meanings.example: This evening’s performance will begin at 8.00 pm.
meanings.example_cn: 今晚的演出8点开始。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of trying to do something, especially something difficult
meanings.example: He made no attempt to hide his anger.
meanings.example_cn: 他毫不掩饰自己的愤怒。

meanings.meaning_en: not wearing any clothes or not covered by clothes
meanings.example: The children ran naked through the yard.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们光着身子跑过院子。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that belongs to the sex that can have babies or produce eggs
meanings.example: Hay fever affects males more than females.
meanings.example_cn: 男性感染花粉热多于女性。

meanings.meaning_en: a short attack on a place by soldiers, planes, or ships, intended to cause damage but not take control
meanings.example: a bombing raid
meanings.example_cn: 轰炸

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel very unhappy, uncomfortable etc
meanings.example: They endured hours of backbreaking work in miserable conditions.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在恶劣条件下忍受长时间的繁重劳动。

meanings.meaning_en: not guilty of a crime
meanings.example: Nobody would believe that I was innocent.
meanings.example_cn: 没人肯相信我是清白的。

meanings.meaning_en: An innocent is someone who is innocent
meanings.example: The court found him innocent and he was released.
meanings.example_cn: 法庭判他无罪，他被释放了。

meanings.meaning_en: a neat pile of things
meanings.example: stacks of dirty dishes
meanings.example_cn: 一摞摞脏盘子

meanings.meaning_en: not considering yourself or your ideas to be as important as other people’s
meanings.example: a modest and humble man
meanings.example_cn: 一个谦卑的男人

meanings.meaning_en: to walk slowly and awkwardly, not lifting your feet much, for example because you are tired, weak, or lazy
meanings.example: Zombies shamble up the rows of the grid toward your house, and if they get past your defenses, well, you know.
meanings.example_cn: 僵尸们在网格的每一行向你的房子蹒跚而行，如果他们越过了你的防线，那么，你知道的。

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow piece of attractive cloth that you use, for example, to tie your hair or hold things together
meanings.example: little girls with ribbons in their hair
meanings.example_cn: 头发上系着丝带的小姑娘们

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a cruel and unfair way towards someone you have power over
meanings.example: a tyrannical parent
meanings.example_cn: 一位专横的家长

meanings.meaning_cn: 空气的；空中的 (无线电)天线
meanings.meaning_en: in or moving through the air
meanings.example: Weeks of aerial bombardment had destroyed factories and motorways.
meanings.example_cn: 数周的空袭已经摧毁了各工厂和公路。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of the stars and  planet s
meanings.example: Do you know anything about astronomy?
meanings.example_cn: 你懂天文学吗?

meanings.meaning_en: a part of something that is different from or affected differently from the whole in some way
meanings.example: Decorate with orange segments.
meanings.example_cn: 用几瓣橙子作点缀。

meanings.meaning_en: to trick a person or organization in order to get money from them
meanings.example: He faces charges of theft and conspiracy to defraud (= a secret plan to cheat someone, made by two or more people ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他面临偷窃和合谋诈骗的指控。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something without any preparation, because you are forced to do this by unexpected events
meanings.example: I forgot to bring my notes, so I had to improvise.
meanings.example_cn: 我忘了带笔记，只好临时发挥。

meanings.meaning_en: to treat a group of people unfairly or cruelly, and prevent them from having the same rights that other people in society have
meanings.example: native tribes oppressed by the authorities
meanings.example_cn: 受到当局压迫的土著部落

meanings.meaning_en: used to describe something that is weak or not effective
meanings.example: intellectually flabby arguments
meanings.example_cn: 说不通的论据

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of writing giving someone’s ideas about politics, society etc
meanings.example: We asked Jason to write an essay about his hometown.
meanings.example_cn: 我们让杰森写一篇关于他家乡的短文。

meanings.meaning_en: a loud noise
meanings.example: The old machine used to make an awful racket .
meanings.example_cn: 这台旧机器以前噪音大得吓人。

meanings.meaning_en: a mistake, mark, or weakness that makes something imperfect
meanings.example: A design flaw (= a mistake or weakness in the way something was made ) caused the engine to explode.
meanings.example_cn: 一个设计缺陷导致了引擎爆炸。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially suggest someone or something for an important position, duty, or prize
meanings.example: This week one of them will be nominated by the Democratic Party for the presidency of the United States.
meanings.example_cn: 本周他们中的一人将被民主党提名为美国总统职位的候选人。

meanings.meaning_en: a plan that states exactly what students at a school or college should learn in a particular subject
meanings.example: The course syllabus consisted mainly of novels by African-American authors, male and female.
meanings.example_cn: 该课程的教学大纲主要包括了非裔美国男女作家的小说。

meanings.meaning_cn: 坚硬的；费劲的；不易弯的
meanings.meaning_en: firm, hard, or difficult to bend
meanings.example: a shirt with a stiff collar
meanings.example_cn: 领子挺括的衬衫

meanings.meaning_en: containing poison, or caused by poisonous substances
meanings.example: fumes from a toxic waste dump
meanings.example_cn: 有毒废料堆产生的毒气

meanings.meaning_cn: (指植物)繁茂的；蔓生的；不能控制的
meanings.meaning_en: a plant that is rampant grows and spreads quickly, in a way that is difficult to control
meanings.example: Pickpocketing is rampant in the downtown area.
meanings.example_cn: 闹市区扒窃活动猖獗。

meanings.example: But magnetic propulsion has some drawbacks.
meanings.example_cn: 但是磁力推进有一些缺陷。

meanings.meaning_en: having a great or important effect
meanings.example: a telling argument
meanings.example_cn: 有说服力的论点

meanings.meaning_en: in every part of a particular area, place etc
meanings.example: a large organization with offices throughout the world
meanings.example_cn: 在世界各地都设有办事处的一家大型机构

meanings.meaning_cn: 光线最强处，最突出部分
meanings.meaning_en: the most important, interesting, or enjoyable part of something such as a holiday, performance, or sports competition
meanings.example: ...a match that is likely to prove one of the highlights of the tournament.
meanings.example_cn: …可能是本届锦标赛最精彩的赛事之一。

meanings.meaning_en: to plan or invent a new way of doing something
meanings.example: She devised a method for quicker communications between offices.
meanings.example_cn: 她想出一种加快办公室之间通信联络的方法。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a lot of power or influence, and to use it
meanings.example: The Church wields immense power in Ireland.
meanings.example_cn: 在爱尔兰，教会操纵着大权。

meanings.meaning_en: very big in size or in amount
meanings.example: an enormous bunch of flowers
meanings.example_cn: 巨大的花束

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually disappear
meanings.example: Hopes of a peace settlement are beginning to fade.
meanings.example_cn: 达成和平协议的希望日渐渺茫。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel very excited and happy

meanings.example: a slum area
meanings.example_cn: 贫民区

meanings.meaning_en: your peers are the people who are the same age as you, or who have the same type of job, social class etc
meanings.example: American children did less well in math than their peers in Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 美国儿童的数学成绩不如日本的同龄儿童。

meanings.meaning_en: to look very carefully at something, especially because you are having difficulty seeing it
meanings.example: Staff members are trained by their peers.
meanings.example_cn: 员工由同事培训。

meanings.meaning_en: a short phrase that is easy to remember and is used in advertisements, or by politicians, organizations etc
meanings.example: an advertising slogan
meanings.example_cn: 一句广告口号

meanings.meaning_cn: 办理，处理；执行；事务，事项，交易
meanings.meaning_en: a business deal or action, such as buying or selling something
meanings.example: The bank charges a fixed rate for each transaction.
meanings.example_cn: 银行对每一笔业务收取固定费用。

meanings.meaning_en: If you discard something, you get rid of it because you no longer want it or need it
meanings.example: Read the manufacturer's guidelines before discarding the box.
meanings.example_cn: 先阅读制造商的说明书再把盒子丢掉。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to find something that you cannot see by feeling with your hands
meanings.example: With his left hand he groped for the knob, turned it, and pulled the door open.
meanings.example_cn: 他用左手摸索到门把手，转动把手，把门拉开。

meanings.meaning_en: having three parts or involving three groups, people, events etc
meanings.example: a triple murder investigation
meanings.example_cn: 对一宗三重谋杀案的调查

meanings.meaning_en: to increase by three times as much, or to make something do this
meanings.example: a triple bill of horror movies
meanings.example_cn: 三部恐怖电影的连续放映

meanings.meaning_cn: 多样化；种；变种；综艺演出
meanings.meaning_en: a lot of things of the same type that are different from each other in some way
meanings.example: The girls come from a variety of different backgrounds.
meanings.example_cn: 这些女孩出身背景各不相同。

meanings.meaning_en: causing harm or damage
meanings.example: the detrimental effect of pollution on the environment
meanings.example_cn: 污染对环境的不利影响

meanings.meaning_en: up to this time
meanings.example: a species of fish hitherto unknown in the West
meanings.example_cn: 迄今在西方还不为人知的一种鱼

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is indispensable is so important or useful that it is impossible to manage without them
meanings.example: Mobile phones have become an indispensable part of our lives.
meanings.example_cn: 移动电话已经成为我们生活中的必需品。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard shiny white substance that is used for making expensive plates, cups etc
meanings.example: a porcelain vase
meanings.example_cn: 瓷花瓶

meanings.meaning_en: a strong desire for something or interest in something, especially one that affects a lot of people at the same time
meanings.example: The mania for dinosaurs began in the late 1800s.
meanings.example_cn: 恐龙热兴起于19世纪晚期。

meanings.meaning_cn: 神经官能病，精神性神经病
meanings.meaning_en: a mental illness that makes someone unreasonably worried or frightened
meanings.example: He was anxious to the point of neurosis.
meanings.example_cn: 他的忧虑达到了神经机能病症状的程度。

meanings.meaning_en: a small round mark or spot
meanings.example: a pattern of dots
meanings.example_cn: 圆点图案

meanings.meaning_en: to mark something by putting a dot on it or above it
completely – used especially to emphasize that something is very bad, or that a feeling is very strong
meanings.example: You look utterly miserable.
meanings.example_cn: 你看起来很痛苦。

meanings.meaning_en: if a liquid evaporates, or if heat evaporates it, it changes into a gas
meanings.example: Most of the water had evaporated.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分的水都蒸发了。

meanings.meaning_en: a long search for something that is difficult to find
meanings.example: They journeyed to the distant Molucca islands in quest of spices.
meanings.example_cn: 他们远赴摩鹿加群岛寻找香料。

meanings.meaning_en: having a rough surface that feels slightly hard
meanings.example: a jacket of coarse wool
meanings.example_cn: 粗羊毛夹克衫

meanings.meaning_cn: 重新开始；继续；重新占用
meanings.meaning_en: to start doing something again after stopping or being interrupted
meanings.example: She hopes to resume work after the baby is born.
meanings.example_cn: 她想生完孩子后继续工作。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being honest and strong about what you believe to be right
meanings.example: I have always regarded him as a man of integrity.
meanings.example_cn: 我一直把他当作一个正直诚实的人。

meanings.meaning_en: argument and disagreement between people
meanings.example: His case has become a source of contention between civil liberties activists and the government.
meanings.example_cn: 他的案子已变成了公民自由活动家们和政府之间的争论缘由。

meanings.meaning_en: involving everyone in the world or in a particular group
meanings.example: free universal healthcare
meanings.example_cn: 免费的全民保健制度

meanings.meaning_en: someone who you try to defeat in a competition, game, fight, or argument
meanings.example: Graf’s opponent in today’s final will be Sukova.
meanings.example_cn: 格拉芙今天的决赛对手将是苏科娃。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the sun
meanings.example: a solar eclipse
meanings.example_cn: 日食

meanings.meaning_en: Something that consists of particular things or people is formed from them
meanings.example: My diet consisted almost exclusively of chocolate-covered cookies and glasses of milk.
meanings.example_cn: 我的饮食几乎只包含裹上巧克力的曲奇饼和一杯杯牛奶。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of animal, such as a snake or  lizard  , whose body temperature changes according to the temperature around it, and that usually lays eggs to have babies
meanings.example: Bird evolved from reptiles, so the first bird must have come out of an egg--laid by a reptile.
meanings.example_cn: 禽类是由爬虫类进化而来，所以，第一只禽鸟肯定是从爬虫类孵化的蛋里出来的。

meanings.meaning_en: very determined to do what you want, even when other people advise you not to do it
meanings.example: He's young, very headstrong, but he's a good man underneath.
meanings.example_cn: 他年轻、任性，但骨子里是个好人。

meanings.meaning_en: consisting of many closely connected parts
meanings.example: a complicated pattern
meanings.example_cn: 复杂的图案

meanings.meaning_en: If you deprive someone of something that they want or need, you take it away from them, or you prevent them from having it
meanings.example: They've been deprived of the fuel necessary to heat their homes.
meanings.example_cn: 他们无法得到住房取暖必需的燃料。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of aircraft with large metal blades on top which turn around very quickly to make it fly
meanings.example: You can helicopter to the island.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以乘坐直升机去那个岛。

meanings.meaning_en: extreme sadness, especially because someone you love has died
meanings.example: Every change in our lives brings with it griefs.
meanings.example_cn: 我们生活当中的每一个变化都有让人伤心的一面。

meanings.meaning_cn: 委任；佣金；军事任职；考察团
meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who have been given the official job of finding out about something or controlling something
meanings.example: The Government set up a commission to investigate allegations of police violence.
meanings.example_cn: 政府成立了一个委员会调查对警察施暴行为的指控。

meanings.meaning_en: to formally ask someone to write an official report, produce a work of art for you etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 恢复地位；使残疾者恢复正常的生活
meanings.meaning_en: to help someone to live a healthy, useful, or active life again after they have been seriously ill or in prison

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of thin cloth that you put on a bed to lie on or lie under

meanings.example_cn: 我去给你们找些干净的床单和毯子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 港口，舱门，舱口；(船、飞机)左舷
meanings.meaning_en: a place where ships can be loaded and unloaded

meanings.example_cn: 英国最大的港口城市

meanings.meaning_en: the main ideas or facts about something, without the details

meanings.example_cn: 研究计划梗概

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone leave a place or building by using force
meanings.example: Officials used guard dogs to eject the protesters.
meanings.example_cn: 官员们用护卫犬驱走抗议者。

meanings.meaning_en: a chance to do something or an occasion when it is easy for you to do something
meanings.example: There are fewer opportunities for new graduates this year.
meanings.example_cn: 今年新毕业的大学生就业机会较少。

meanings.meaning_en: very violent or cruel

meanings.example_cn: 一条凶猛的狗

meanings.meaning_en: an approximate number, amount, or time is close to the exact number, amount etc, but could be a little bit more or less than it

meanings.example_cn: 每个班大致有多少学生？

meanings.meaning_en: to be close to a particular number

meanings.example_cn: 这些百分比仅仅是近似值。

meanings.meaning_en: a movement of part of your body, especially your hands or head, to show what you mean or how you feel

meanings.example_cn: 卢克用手指做了一个下流的手势。

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of land surrounded on three sides by water

meanings.example_cn: 科德角

meanings.meaning_cn: 交换，兑换；减轻；经常往来
meanings.meaning_en: to change the punishment given to a criminal to one that is less severe
meanings.example: Baldry’s 20-year prison sentence was commuted to three years.
meanings.example_cn: 鲍德里二十年的刑期被减至三年。

meanings.meaning_en: dangerous, especially to people’s health or safety

meanings.example_cn: 有害废弃物的处理

meanings.meaning_en: a line that gradually bends like part of a circle

meanings.example_cn: 这条曲线显示人均费用。

meanings.meaning_en: to bend or move in the shape of a curve, or to make something do this
a line that gradually bends like part of a circle
a complete list of things that you can look at, buy, or use, for example in a library or at an art show

meanings.example_cn: 邮购商品目录

meanings.meaning_en: an area on the surface of your skin that has been injured by being rubbed against something hard

meanings.example_cn: 她因划伤和擦伤而接受治疗。

meanings.meaning_en: when you are so anxious, nervous, or upset that you cannot think calmly

meanings.example_cn: 她处于相当焦虑的状态。

meanings.example: But I also believe that everyone who comments here should be accountable: in other words that the rest of us should be able to see who they are.

meanings.meaning_en: something that is done by people in a particular society because it is traditional

meanings.example_cn: 他很早醒来，这是他的习惯。

meanings.meaning_en: happening fairly often, but not regularly

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of cloth that you use for drying your skin or for drying things such as dishes

meanings.example_cn: 他本以为门是锁住的，但是转了一下把手门就开了。

meanings.meaning_en: if something invariably happens or is invariably true, it always happens or is true

meanings.example: Psychologists try to plumb the deepest mysteries of the human psyche.
meanings.example_cn: 心理学家试图探究人类心理最深层的奥秘。

meanings.meaning_en: to succeed in understanding something completely
an important victory or success after a difficult struggle

meanings.example_cn: 赢得冠军是伟大的个人成就。

meanings.meaning_en: an organization, meeting, TV programme etc where people have a chance to publicly discuss an important subject

meanings.example_cn: 理事会成员们一致认为那是一个用于讨论的重要论坛。

meanings.meaning_en: to decay or make something decay

meanings.example_cn: 部分腐烂的尸体

meanings.meaning_en: sure that something will happen in the way that you want or expect

meanings.example_cn: 菲莉帕虽然有残疾，却很自信。

meanings.meaning_cn: 慷慨的，大方的，胸怀宽大的
meanings.meaning_en: generous or given in large amounts

meanings.example_cn: 饮料的充足供应

meanings.example_cn: 树木在和风中轻轻摇曳。

meanings.meaning_cn: (正式用语)困惑，窘困，令人困惑的事或物

meanings.example_cn: 道德难题

meanings.meaning_en: You use prospective to describe someone who wants to be the thing mentioned or who is likely to be the thing mentioned

meanings.meaning_cn: 正直的，坦率的，老实的，简明易懂的

meanings.meaning_cn: 大理石，(游戏用的)玻璃弹子
meanings.meaning_en: a type of hard rock that becomes smooth when it is polished, and is used for making buildings,  statue s  etc

meanings.example_cn: 柱子是白色的大理石。

meanings.example: The groom knew immediately that something was wrong when the registrar at Derry's Guildhall unexpectedly claimed that there was unfinished paperwork just before the ceremony began.

meanings.meaning_en: the first form that a new design of a car, machine etc has, or a model of it used to test the design before it is produced

meanings.example_cn: 但是你将如何为这个进化的原型提出系统的架构呢？

meanings.example_cn: 那些领导人已被民族主义者赶下了台。

meanings.example: Stephen Leckar has 30 minutes to represent Jones, and he tries to advance a second argument in this case: The very act of installing the GPS device on a private vehicle constitutes a trespass.
meanings.example_cn: 琼斯的律师斯蒂文·莱卡有30分钟时间替琼斯辩护，他又提出了一个新论点：警方在琼斯私人汽车上装跟踪器的做法本身构成“非法入侵”。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance that is produced in a plant or animal, and helps chemical changes to take place in the plant or animal

meanings.example_cn: 据信它能抑制一种能在肿瘤中促进细胞增殖的酶的生成。

meanings.example_cn: 我的讯息是，“你若企图走私毒品，那是犯傻。”

meanings.example: Fossils can only tell us so much about the shape of the vocal tract because much of it is soft tissue.
meanings.example_cn: 因为发音系统大部分是软组织，无缘变成化石，现存的化石也只能告诉我们一点呼吸道的形状。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the sea and the creatures that live there

meanings.example: the effects of oil pollution on marine mammals

meanings.example_cn: 我以前从未见过这么多的星星。

meanings.meaning_en: to steal large amounts of money or property from somewhere, especially while fighting in a war

meanings.example_cn: 小亚细亚的富饶地区遭到侵略者的劫掠。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious book or article about a particular subject

meanings.meaning_cn: 仔细考虑；注视；打算；预计

very bad luck, or something that happens to you as a result of bad luck

meanings.meaning_en: a quick and effective way of dealing with a problem
the passage from the back of your mouth to the top of the tubes that go down to your lungs and stomach

meanings.example_cn: 极为鄙视的样子

kind and generous, especially to someone that you have defeated

meanings.meaning_en: a medical operation to end a  pregnancy  so that the baby is not born alive

meanings.meaning_en: something such as a book or an article that explains or discusses a book, poem, idea etc

meanings.meaning_en: happening one after the other without anything diffe-rent happening in between

meanings.example_cn: 她连续四次夺得冠军。

meanings.meaning_en: showing a lot of respect and admiration

meanings.example_cn: 毕恭毕敬的低语声

meanings.meaning_en: determined not to change your mind, even when people think you are being unreasonable

meanings.meaning_en: a book, play, or film that is important and has been admired for a long time
a feeling of sadness for no particular reason

meanings.example_cn: 他陷入深深的忧郁之中。

meanings.meaning_en: very sad
finally, after everything else has been done or considered

meanings.example_cn: 最终，决定权在这孩子的父母手中。

meanings.example: the laborious business of drying the crops
meanings.example_cn: 把收获的庄稼晒干这一艰苦的工作

meanings.meaning_en: an idea, belief, or opinion

meanings.example_cn: 她根本不明白他是什么意思。

meanings.meaning_en: An ensemble is a group of musicians, actors, or dancers who regularly perform together

meanings.example_cn: …一个由年轻音乐家组成的乐团。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually change your behaviour and attitudes in order to be successful in a new situation

meanings.example_cn: 人质说他们挨了饿，但没有受到虐待。

meanings.meaning_en: when you are loyal to your husband, girlfriend etc, by not having sex with anyone else

meanings.example_cn: 对婚姻忠贞的重要性

meanings.meaning_en: a short sleep, especially during the day

meanings.meaning_en: a type of soft rubber with a lot of air in it, used in furniture

meanings.example_cn: 海绵橡胶床垫

meanings.meaning_en: an object made out of stone, wood, clay etc by an artist

meanings.example_cn: …人物及动物石雕。

meanings.meaning_cn: 吸引力，可爱之处，迷人；行魔法
meanings.meaning_en: a special quality someone or something has that makes people like them, feel attracted to them, or be easily influenced by them – used to show approval

meanings.example_cn: 乔身上的稚趣

meanings.example_cn: 那位教授被指控剽窃学生的观点拿去发表。

meanings.meaning_en: a relationship between two amounts, represented by a pair of numbers showing how much bigger one amount is than the other

meanings.example_cn: 双方人数对比是一对四。

meanings.meaning_en: a grey powder made from  lime  and clay that becomes hard when it is mixed with water and allowed to dry, and that is used in building

meanings.example_cn: 一袋水泥

meanings.meaning_en: If things are cemented together, they are stuck or fastened together

meanings.example_cn: 绝大部分人造关节是被黏结复位的。

meanings.meaning_en: to make an illness or medical condition go away

meanings.example_cn: 现在许多癌症都可以治好。

meanings.meaning_en: a medicine or medical treatment that makes an illness go away

meanings.example_cn: 15分钟就可治愈近视的一种手术

meanings.meaning_en: the way that your parents care for you and teach you to behave when you are growing up
meanings.example: Mike had had a strict upbringing.
meanings.example_cn: 迈克从小家教很严。

meanings.example_cn: 请阅读协议书并签字。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使联合，统一，使相同，一致

meanings.meaning_en: the act of making a state or situation continue

meanings.example_cn: 维修保养费

meanings.meaning_en: to injure yourself slightly

meanings.example_cn: 你要是想搬那个箱子，会伤着自己的。

meanings.example_cn: 有些人说他是暗示1884年成立的费边社成立一百年。

meanings.meaning_en: Twilight is the time just before night when the daylight has almost gone but when it is not completely dark

meanings.example_cn: 他们在黄昏时返回。

meanings.meaning_en: a place for someone to stay, live, or work

meanings.example_cn: 度假的价格包括机票和住宿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 亲密的，私人的，秘密的，精湛的
meanings.meaning_en: having an extremely close friendship

meanings.example_cn: 毕加索的一个密友

meanings.meaning_en: to make people understand what you mean without saying it directly

meanings.example_cn: 亲密的关系

meanings.meaning_en: to put liquid, especially a drug, into someone’s body by using a special needle
meanings.example: His son was injected with strong drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 他的儿子被注射了强效的药。

meanings.meaning_en: the person who has the legal right to receive the property or title of another person when they die

meanings.example_cn: 琼森是他的政治接班人，他将担任该党派的领袖。

meanings.meaning_cn: 大学毕业后的，研究院的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to studies done at a university after completing a first degree
meanings.example: postgraduate degrees
meanings.example_cn: 研究生学位

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is studying at a university to get a  master’s degree  or a  phd
to be impossible to forget

meanings.example_cn: 你的结婚戒指可以刻上个人题字不另收费。

meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when there are performances of many films, plays, pieces of music etc, usually happening in the same place every year
meanings.example: Christmas is one of the main festivals in the Christian Calendar.
meanings.example_cn: 圣诞节是基督教历的重大节日之一。

meanings.example: I had a slight mishap with one of the glasses.
meanings.example_cn: 我犯了一个小小的错误，把其中的一个玻璃杯打破了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 特有的，表示特征的；特性
meanings.meaning_en: a quality or feature of something or someone that is typical of them and easy to recognize
meanings.example: Genes determine the characteristics of every living thing.
meanings.example_cn: 基因决定每个生物的特征。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say what part of someone or something is hit or touched
