meanings.example_cn: 我真想一拳打到他鼻子上。

meanings.example: Where children respect a parent and know that he or she demands good behavior in school, even mediocre or loutish teachers can pull off the trick④of producing modestly literate and numerate children.
meanings.example_cn: 如果孩子尊重父母，并且知道父母要求自己好好上学，即便是平庸的或是很笨的老师也能够成功地教出一般水平的能读会算的小学生。

meanings.meaning_en: a long area of high land, especially at the top of a mountain
meanings.example: We made our way carefully along the ridge.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿着山脊小心前行。

meanings.meaning_en: the entrance to a room or building, or the area of floor or ground at the entrance
meanings.example: She opened the door and stepped across the threshold.
meanings.example_cn: 她打开门，跨过门槛。

meanings.meaning_en: money that you gain by selling things or doing business, after your costs have been paid
meanings.example: The shop’s daily profit is usually around $500.
meanings.example_cn: 这家商店每天的利润一般在500美元左右。

meanings.meaning_en: the buildings and land that a shop, restaurant, company etc uses
meanings.example: Schools may earn extra money by renting out their premises.
meanings.example_cn: 学校通过出租房屋场地可以获取额外收入。

meanings.meaning_en: a line where two pieces of cloth, leather etc have been stitched together
meanings.example: She was repairing Billy’s trousers, where the seam had come undone.
meanings.example_cn: 她在补比利裤子的开线处。

meanings.meaning_en: to express in a shorter, clearer, or different way what someone has said or written
meanings.example: To paraphrase Finkelstein, mathematics is a language, like English.
meanings.example_cn: 芬克尔斯坦的意思是，数学是一门语言，就像英语一样。

meanings.meaning_en: to think or guess that something is smaller, cheaper, easier etc than it really is
meanings.example: None of us should ever underestimate the degree of difficulty women face in career advancement.
meanings.example_cn: 我们谁都不应低估妇女在职业发展中所面临的困难程度。

meanings.meaning_en: a car
meanings.example: the automobile industry
meanings.example_cn: 汽车工业

meanings.meaning_en: having four straight equal sides and 90˚ angles at the corners
meanings.example: a large square room
meanings.example_cn: 一个正方形的大房间

meanings.meaning_en: a shape with four straight equal sides with 90˚ angles at the corners
a book or piece of writing before it is printed
meanings.example: Unfortunately, parts of the original manuscript have been lost.
meanings.example_cn: 遗憾的是，部分原始手稿丢失了。

meanings.meaning_en: the force that causes something to fall to the ground or to be attracted to another  planet
meanings.example: the force of gravity
meanings.example_cn: 重力

meanings.meaning_en: the situation in which people live or work, especially the physical things that affect the quality of their lives
meanings.example: Conditions in the prison were atrocious.
meanings.example_cn: 这座监狱的条件糟透了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a person or an animal think or behave in a certain way by influencing or training them over a period of time
meanings.example: In May, staff went on strike, demanding better pay and conditions .
meanings.example_cn: 五月份员工举行了罢工，要求提高工资和改善工作条件。

meanings.meaning_en: to limit all or most of your study, business etc to a particular subject or activity
meanings.example: "You must specialize, " he says.
meanings.example_cn: “你必须做到专门化。” 他说。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually make someone or something less strong or effective
meanings.example: economic policies that threaten to undermine the health care system
meanings.example_cn: 可能会损害医疗保健制度的经济政策

meanings.meaning_en: an idea, subject, or image that is regularly repeated and developed in a book, film, work of art etc
meanings.example: The theme of creation is a recurrent motif in Celtic mythology.
meanings.example_cn: 天地万物的创造是凯尔特神话中反复出现的主题。

meanings.meaning_en: very silly or stupid
meanings.example: fatuous questions
meanings.example_cn: 愚昧的问题

meanings.meaning_cn: 给保险；同意赔款(海上保险)
meanings.meaning_en: if an insurance company underwrites an insurance contract, it agrees to pay for any damage or loss that happens
meanings.example: The government has agreed to underwrite the project with a grant of £5 million.
meanings.example_cn: 政府同意拨款 500 万英镑资助该项目。

meanings.meaning_en: a place on a farm where milk is kept and butter and cheese are made
meanings.example: In my childhood, local dairies bought milk from local farmers.
meanings.example_cn: 在我小时候，本地的乳品公司向当地农场主收购牛奶。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of getting control of a country by fighting
meanings.example: the Norman Conquest (= the conquest of England by the Normans )
meanings.example_cn: 诺曼征服

meanings.meaning_cn: 淹死，(高声音)遮掩(低声音)
meanings.meaning_en: to die from being under water for too long, or to kill someone in this way
meanings.example: Many people drowned when the boat overturned.
meanings.example_cn: 船翻后许多人淹死了。

meanings.meaning_en: an invented name that a writer, artist etc uses instead of their real name
meanings.example: Both plays were published under the pseudonym of Philip Dayre.
meanings.example_cn: 两个剧本都是以菲利普·戴尔的笔名发表的。

meanings.meaning_en: to organize an activity so that the people involved in it work well together and achieve a good result
meanings.example: The agencies are working together to co-ordinate policy on food safety.
meanings.example_cn: 这些机构在共同合作为食品安全政策做协调工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to choose someone or something for a particular job or purpose
meanings.example: Buildings are designated by red squares on the map.
meanings.example_cn: 在地图上建筑物用红色方块标明。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who competes in sports competitions, especially running, jumping, and throwing
meanings.example: a professional athlete
meanings.example_cn: 一位专业运动员

meanings.meaning_en: to draw a line under a word to show that it is important
meanings.example: This tragic incident underlines the need for immediate action.
meanings.example_cn: 这一悲剧事件突显了立即采取行动的必要性。

meanings.meaning_en: to be unwilling to do something
meanings.example: Sarah was loath to tell her mother what had happened.
meanings.example_cn: 萨拉不愿意告诉母亲所发生的事。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately try to influence or change a situation that does not concern you, or that you do not understand
meanings.example: He accused the US of meddling in China’s internal affairs .
meanings.example_cn: 他指责美国干涉中国内政。

meanings.meaning_cn: 神话，传说；虚构的人或物
meanings.meaning_en: an ancient story, especially one invented in order to explain natural or historical events
meanings.example: a book of Greek myths
meanings.example_cn: 一本关于希腊神话的图书

meanings.meaning_en: a continuous series of circular rings into which something such as wire or rope has been wound or twisted
meanings.example: the coil in a light bulb
meanings.example_cn: 灯丝

meanings.meaning_en: to wind or twist into a series of rings, or to make something do this
an organization of people who do the same job or have the same interests
meanings.example: the Women’s Guild
meanings.example_cn: 妇女协会

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece taken from a book, poem, piece of music etc
meanings.example: ...an excerpt from Tchaikovsky's Nutcracker.
meanings.example_cn: …柴可夫斯基的《胡桃夹子》选段。

meanings.meaning_en: to move suddenly and roughly, or to make someone or something move in this way
meanings.example: We jolted along rough wet roads through an endless banana plantation.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿崎岖潮湿的公路颠簸着驶过无边无际的香蕉种植园。

meanings.meaning_en: the group of people in some countries who belong to the highest social class and have titles such as ‘Duke’ or ‘Countess’
meanings.example: the nobility of his intentions
meanings.example_cn: 他崇高的志向

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being new, unusual, and interesting
meanings.example: Many toys have no attraction beyond their novelty value.
meanings.example_cn: 许多玩具除了有些新奇感之外，别无吸引力。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing
meanings.example: She pulled the garment on and zipped it up.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿上衣服并拉好拉链。

meanings.meaning_en: always doing what you are told to do, or what the law, a rule etc says you must do
meanings.example: an obedient child
meanings.example_cn: 听话的孩子

meanings.meaning_en: a tool or machine used for making holes in something
meanings.example: an electric drill
meanings.example_cn: 电钻

meanings.meaning_en: to train soldiers to march or perform other military actions
meanings.example: a whine like a dentist’s drill
meanings.example_cn: 像牙钻发出的那种呜呜声

meanings.meaning_en: to move quickly to avoid someone or something
meanings.example: He ran across the courtyard, dodging a storm of bullets.
meanings.example_cn: 他跑过院子，躲避雨点般的子弹。

meanings.meaning_en: a  gym
meanings.example: The next day, the arsonist was arrested at a gymnasium.
meanings.example_cn: 第二天，纵火犯在一家体育馆被逮捕了。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece or feature of something such as an object, area, event, or period of time
meanings.example: For part of the day, you will be outside doing practical work.
meanings.example_cn: 你们每天将有一部分时间在户外实际操作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使(轮胎)瘪下去 降低重要性

meanings.meaning_en: a small metal object for fastening a bag, belt, piece of jewellery etc
meanings.example: the firm clasp of her hand
meanings.example_cn: 她有力的握手

meanings.meaning_en: to make something or someone extremely wet
meanings.example: In the early morning they had got drenched in the grass.
meanings.example_cn: 一大清早他们在草丛里弄得浑身湿透。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which plants, animals, and people are related to each other and to their environment, or the scientific study of this
meanings.example: the natural ecology of the Earth
meanings.example_cn: 地球的自然生态

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is legally responsible for looking after someone else’s child, especially after the child’s parents have died
meanings.example: Destiny's legal guardian was her grandmother.
meanings.example_cn: 德斯蒂妮的法定监护人是她的祖母。

meanings.meaning_en: a hole in the floor of a garage that lets you get under a car to repair it
meanings.example: an inspection pit
meanings.example_cn: 汽车检修坑

meanings.meaning_en: fighting or a war
meanings.example: efforts to resolve the conflict
meanings.example_cn: 解决武装冲突的努力

meanings.meaning_en: caring and feeling sorry about someone’s problems
meanings.example: a sympathetic friend
meanings.example_cn: 一个有同情心的朋友

meanings.meaning_en: based on facts, or making a decision that is based on facts rather than on your feelings or beliefs
meanings.example: Scientists need to be objective when doing research.
meanings.example_cn: 科学家做研究时要客观。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you are trying hard to achieve, especially in business or politics
relating to electricity
meanings.example: The fire was caused by an electrical fault.
meanings.example_cn: 大火是电力故障引起的。

meanings.meaning_en: a turbulent situation or period of time is one in which there are a lot of sudden changes
meanings.example: the turbulent times of the French Revolution
meanings.example_cn: 法国大革命的动荡时期

meanings.meaning_en: to enter a country, town, or area using military force, in order to take control of it
meanings.example: The Romans invaded Britain 2,000 years ago.
meanings.example_cn: 2,000年前古罗马人入侵了英国。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing to exist for a long time or for all the time in the future
meanings.example: He gave up a permanent job in order to freelance.
meanings.example_cn: 他放弃了固定工作，为的是当一名自由职业者。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the most basic and important parts of something
meanings.example: We have to tackle the fundamental cause of the problem.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须解决问题的根本原因。

meanings.example: the fundamental principles of liberty and equality
meanings.example_cn: 自由和平等这两个基本原则

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of paper that you are given which shows that you have paid for something
meanings.example: Keep your receipt in case you want to bring it back.
meanings.example_cn: 保留收据以备退货之需。

meanings.meaning_cn: 极其丰富的；很多的；大量的
meanings.meaning_en: produced or existing in large quantities
meanings.example: He made profuse apologies .
meanings.example_cn: 他不住地道歉。

meanings.meaning_en: to illegally force someone to give you something, especially money, by threatening them
meanings.example: Corrupt government officials were extorting money from him.
meanings.example_cn: 腐败的政府官员那时正向他勒索钱财。

meanings.meaning_en: a spacious house, room etc is large and has plenty of space to move around in
meanings.example: a spacious living area
meanings.example_cn: 宽敞的居住空间

meanings.meaning_en: the speed of something that is moving in a particular direction
meanings.example: the velocity of light
meanings.example_cn: 光速

meanings.meaning_en: a general medical examination that a doctor or  dentist  gives you to make sure you are healthy
meanings.example: It’s important to have regular checkups .
meanings.example_cn: 定期做体检是很重要的。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of countryside or land of a particular type, used especially when talking about its appearance
meanings.example: the beauty of the New England landscape
meanings.example_cn: 新英格兰风光之美

meanings.meaning_en: if a group of people convene, or someone convenes them, they come together, especially for a formal meeting
meanings.example: a report by experts convened by the National Institutes of Health
meanings.example_cn: 由全国健康协会召集的专家提出的一份报告

meanings.meaning_en: the  bark (= outer part )  of a tree from southern Europe and North Africa, used to make things
meanings.example: a cork bulletin board
meanings.example_cn: 软木公告板

meanings.meaning_en: to close a bottle by blocking the hole at the top tightly with a long round piece of cork or plastic
the amount by which a number, value, or amount increases
meanings.example: Any time you want to add another test, just add another row to your datapool and increment the counter value in the loop.
meanings.example_cn: 在您想要增加另一个测试时，只要向您的数据池中增加另一行，并在循环中增加计数器的值。

meanings.meaning_cn: 主人; 许多，一大群，旅店老板
meanings.meaning_en: someone at a party, meal etc who has invited the guests and who provides the food, drink etc
meanings.example: Our host greeted us at the door.
meanings.example_cn: 主人在门口迎接我们。

meanings.meaning_en: Suspense is a state of excitement or anxiety about something that is going to happen very soon, for example about some news that you are waiting to hear
meanings.example: The suspense over the two remaining hostages ended last night when the police discovered the bullet ridden bodies.
meanings.example_cn: 有关剩下两名人质的悬念在昨晚警方发现布满弹孔的尸体后结束了。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that is against a law or someone’s legal rights
meanings.example: A backup copy of a computer program does not infringe copyright.
meanings.example_cn: 计算机程序的备份不侵犯版权。

meanings.meaning_en: to notice or understand something by thinking about it carefully
meanings.example: We could just discern a town in the distance.
meanings.example_cn: 我们依稀看到远处有一座城镇。

meanings.meaning_en: to shine with a soft light that looks as if it shakes slightly
meanings.example: The lake shimmered in the moonlight.
meanings.example_cn: 月色下，湖面波光粼粼。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat piece of metal, usually shaped like a coin, that is given to someone who has won a competition or who has done something brave
meanings.example: She won a gold medal at the last Olympics.
meanings.example_cn: 她在上届奥运会上赢得一枚金牌。

meanings.meaning_en: when something is made to have no effect or be the opposite of what it should be
meanings.example: Much of what passes for Christianity is a negation of Christ’s teachings.
meanings.example_cn: 许多被认为是基督教的东西，和基督的教诲是相悖的。

meanings.meaning_en: a new business activity that involves taking risks
meanings.example: ...a Russian-American joint venture.
meanings.example_cn: …一个俄美合资的风险项目。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely good, attractive, enjoyable etc
meanings.example: You look fantastic!
meanings.example_cn: 你看上去棒极了！

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin mark on a piece of paper, the ground, or another surface
meanings.example: Draw a straight line across the top of the page.
meanings.example_cn: 在这一页的上方画一条直线。

meanings.meaning_en: to form rows along the sides of something
meanings.example: Sign your name on the dotted line (= line made up of a series of dots ).
meanings.example_cn: 在虚线上签名。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially stop something from continuing, especially for a short time
meanings.example: Sales of the drug will be suspended until more tests are completed.
meanings.example_cn: 这种药品在完成进一步检验之前将暂停销售。

meanings.meaning_en: difficult to see, hear, smell etc
meanings.example: She gave a faint smile.
meanings.example_cn: 她淡淡一笑。

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly become unconscious for a short time
meanings.example: a very faint noise
meanings.example_cn: 很微弱的声响

meanings.meaning_cn: 应支付的，正当的，预定应到的(to)，由于
meanings.meaning_en: expected to happen or arrive at a particular time
meanings.example: Any money due you will be sent by cheque through the post.
meanings.example_cn: 应该支付给你的款项将会以支票邮寄给你。

meanings.meaning_cn: 沉默寡言的；言不如意的
meanings.meaning_en: unwilling to talk about what you feel or what you know
meanings.example: She is so reticent about her achievements.
meanings.example_cn: 她对于自己的成就如此缄默。

meanings.meaning_en: to use the knowledge and information you have in order to understand something or form an opinion about it
meanings.example: Alison cleverly deduced that I was the author of the letter.
meanings.example_cn: 艾莉森聪明地推断出我是这封信的作者。

meanings.meaning_en: to say a poem, piece of literature etc that you have learned, for people to listen to
meanings.example: She recited a poem that she had learnt at school.
meanings.example_cn: 她背诵了一首学校里学的诗。

meanings.meaning_en: If you are dubious about something, you are not completely sure about it and have not yet made up your mind about it
meanings.example: My parents were a bit dubious about it all at first but we soon convinced them.
meanings.example_cn: 起初我父母亲对此尚心存疑虑，但很快我们便说服了他们。

meanings.meaning_en: a contract, ticket, claim etc that is invalid is not legally or officially acceptable
meanings.example: Without the right date stamped on it, your ticket will be invalid.
meanings.example_cn: 票上若没有加盖正确日期就是废票。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who cannot look after themselves because of illness, old age, or injury
If you are exuberant, you are full of energy, excitement, and cheerfulness
meanings.example: So the exuberant young girl with dark hair and blue eyes decided to become a screen actress.
meanings.example_cn: 因此，这个充满活力的年轻黑发碧眼女孩决定成为一名荧屏演员。

meanings.meaning_en: freedom that a place or an organization has to govern or control itself
meanings.example: campaigners who want greater autonomy for Corsica
meanings.example_cn: 希望科西嘉有更多自治权的活动家

meanings.meaning_en: water in walls or in the air that causes things to be slightly wet
meanings.example: Damp had stained the walls.
meanings.example_cn: 墙上留下了潮湿的痕迹。

meanings.meaning_en: to desire and work towards achieving something important

meanings.meaning_cn: 传递，播送电视节目；汽车传动系统
meanings.meaning_en: the process of sending out electronic signals, messages etc, using radio, television, or other similar equipment
meanings.example: worldwide data transmission
meanings.example_cn: 全球数据传输

meanings.meaning_en: bread that has been heated so that it is brown on both sides and no longer soft
meanings.example: I had a piece of toast for breakfast.
meanings.example_cn: 我早饭吃了一片吐司。

meanings.meaning_en: to drink a glass of wine etc to thank some-one, wish someone luck, or celebrate something
a group of people and animals who travel to different places performing skilful tricks as entertainment
meanings.example: Piccadilly Circus
meanings.example_cn: 皮卡迪利广场

meanings.meaning_en: if you have a qualification, you have passed an examination or course to show you have a particular level of skill or knowledge in a subject
meanings.example: He left school without any qualifications.
meanings.example_cn: 他离校时没有拿到任何文凭。

meanings.meaning_en: to stand, sit, or lie in a lazy or relaxed way
meanings.example: Nathan was lounging on the grass bank outside the cottage.
meanings.example_cn: 内森正懒洋洋地躺在小屋外的草堤上。

meanings.meaning_en: to put something into a liquid and lift it out again
meanings.example: Are you coming in for a dip?
meanings.example_cn: 你游一会儿吗？

meanings.meaning_en: determined to do something and unwilling to stop trying even when the situation becomes difficult
meanings.example: a tenacious negotiator
meanings.example_cn: 锲而不舍的谈判者

meanings.meaning_en: to move your hand, or something such as a cloth, backwards and forwards over a surface while pressing firmly
meanings.example: You’ll have to rub harder if you want to get it clean.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你想把它弄干净，就得更使劲地擦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 断层，裂口；巨大分歧，差别
meanings.meaning_en: a big difference between two people, groups, or things
meanings.example: a rope bridge across the chasm
meanings.example_cn: 峡谷上的索桥

meanings.meaning_en: your thoughts or your ability to think, feel, and imagine things
meanings.example: It is impossible to understand the complex nature of the human mind .
meanings.example_cn: 要想了解人类思维复杂的特性是不可能的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 证明是正当的或有理的，为辩护
meanings.meaning_en: to give an acceptable explanation for something that other people think is unreasonable
meanings.example: Ministers must appear before Parliament and justify their actions.
meanings.example_cn: 大臣们必须就自己的行为向议会作出解释。

meanings.meaning_en: if a skill, idea, or quality transfers from one situation to another, or if you transfer it, it can be used in the new situation
meanings.example: Ideas that work well in one school often don’t transfer well to another.
meanings.example_cn: 在一所学校行得通的理念套用在另一所学校上往往行不通。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of changing from one bus, aircraft etc to another while travelling
the size and appearance of someone’s body
meanings.example: She didn’t have the physique to be a dancer.
meanings.example_cn: 她没有当舞蹈演员的体形。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to check equipment or machines and make sure that they are working properly
meanings.example: a laboratory technician
meanings.example_cn: 实验室技术人员

meanings.meaning_en: one of several natural substances that exist in food such as meat, eggs, and beans, and which your body needs in order to grow and remain strong and healthy
meanings.example: Where do you get your protein?
meanings.example_cn: 你从哪里获得蛋白质？

meanings.example: The language in the Minister’s statement is highly ambiguous.
meanings.example_cn: 部长的声明措辞很含糊。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone or something fascinates you, you are attracted to them and think they are extremely interesting
meanings.example: The idea of travelling through time fascinates me.
meanings.example_cn: 穿越时光的想法深深吸引着我。

meanings.meaning_en: happening slowly over a long period of time
meanings.example: There has been a gradual change in climate.
meanings.example_cn: 气候渐渐发生了变化。

meanings.meaning_en: to find new people to work in a company, join an organization, do a job etc
meanings.example: We’re having difficulty recruiting enough qualified staff.
meanings.example_cn: 我们难以招聘到足够的合格职员。

meanings.meaning_en: to communicate or express something, with or without using words
meanings.example: All this information can be conveyed in a simple diagram.
meanings.example_cn: 所有这些信息可以通过一张简单的图表来表示。

meanings.meaning_en: a moral or legal duty to do something
meanings.example: Employers have an obligation to treat all employees equally.
meanings.example_cn: 雇主有责任对所有员工一视同仁。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal statement saying that something is true, especially one a  witness  makes in a court of law
meanings.example: Barker’s testimony is crucial to the prosecution’s case.
meanings.example_cn: 巴克的证词对控方的指控起到了关键作用。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of something that has broken off or that comes from something larger
meanings.example: glass fragments
meanings.example_cn: 玻璃碎片

meanings.meaning_en: to break something, or be broken into a lot of small separate parts – used to show disapproval
not very large or very small, very hot or very cold, very fast or very slow etc
meanings.example: Even moderate amounts of alcohol can be dangerous.
meanings.example_cn: 喝酒即使不多也会有危险。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose opinions or beliefs, especially about politics, are not extreme and are considered reasonable by most people
meanings.example: a moderate degree of success
meanings.example_cn: 一定程度上的成功

meanings.meaning_en: to make something less extreme or violent, or to become less extreme or violent
meanings.example: a student of moderate ability
meanings.example_cn: 能力一般的学生

meanings.example: She improved visibly from day to day, until Martin wondered if he was doing right, for he knew that all her compliance and endeavor was for his sake.
meanings.example_cn: 她一天比一天进步了，直到马丁怀疑起自己的做法是否得体。 因为他明白她的这一切迁就和努力都是为了他。

meanings.meaning_en: a group or class of people, things etc that have similar qualities or features
meanings.example: Most of the victims developed psychological problems of one sort or another (= of various different types ) .
meanings.example_cn: 大多数受害者都出现了这样那样的心理问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things in a particular order or arrange them in groups according to size, type etc
meanings.example: They do burgers, pizzas, that sort of thing .
meanings.example_cn: 他们供应汉堡包、比萨饼什么的。

meanings.meaning_en: to hide something carefully
meanings.example: The shadows concealed her as she crept up to the house.
meanings.example_cn: 她借着阴影蹑手蹑脚地走向房子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 命令，训令；授权(选民对代表)
meanings.meaning_en: if a government or official has a mandate to make important decisions, they have the authority to make the decisions because they have been elected by the people to do so
meanings.example: Matters debated in meetings do not become a mandate automatically.
meanings.example_cn: 会议上讨论的事宜并不能自动成为一项指令。

meanings.meaning_en: If you crumple something such as paper or cloth, or if it crumples, it is squashed and becomes full of untidy creases and folds
meanings.example: She crumpled the paper in her hand.
meanings.example_cn: 她把手中的纸揉成了一团。

meanings.meaning_en: Crumple up means the same as
meanings.example: She crumpled up her coffee cup.
meanings.example_cn: 她挤瘪了咖啡杯。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure with a curved top and straight sides that supports the weight of a bridge or building
meanings.example: When she passed under the arch leading out of the park, Mira whooped with delight.
meanings.example_cn: 从通向公园外的拱门下走过时，米拉高兴地喊叫起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to form or make something form a curved shape
to be in charge of an activity or person, and make sure that things are done in the correct way
meanings.example: Griffiths closely supervised the research.
meanings.example_cn: 格里菲思密切指导该项研究。

meanings.meaning_en: land that is owned or controlled by a particular country, ruler, or military force
meanings.example: Hong Kong is a Chinese territory.
meanings.example_cn: 香港是中国的领土。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or done quickly and immediately
meanings.example: My letter received a swift reply.
meanings.example_cn: 我的信很快就得到了回复。

meanings.meaning_en: a robust person is strong and healthy
meanings.example: a robust man of six feet four
meanings.example_cn: 一个身高六英尺四英寸的壮汉

meanings.meaning_en: if you unravel threads, string etc, or if they unravel, they stop being twisted together
meanings.example: Detectives are still trying to unravel the mystery surrounding his death.
meanings.example_cn: 侦探们仍在试图解开他的死亡之谜。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone or something is responsive, they react quickly and favourably
meanings.example: With an election coming soon, your representative should be very responsive to your request.
meanings.example_cn: 大选在即，你们的代表应该对你们的要求作出迅速积极的反应。

meanings.meaning_en: to join metals by melting their edges and pressing them together when they are hot
meanings.example: The new handle will have to be welded on.
meanings.example_cn: 新的把手得焊上去。

meanings.example: What is the moral of this fable? If you want to accumulate enduring wealth, do not lend to grasshoppers.
meanings.example_cn: 这则故事的寓意是什么？如果你希望积累长久的财富，就不要借钱给蚱蜢。

meanings.meaning_en: a shape like a circle, but wider in one direction than the other
meanings.example: Using 2 spoons, form the cheese into small balls or ovals.
meanings.example_cn: 用两把勺把干酪挤成小圆球状或椭圆球状。

meanings.example: I cherish for you the liveliest feeling of affection and gratitude.
meanings.example_cn: 我对你怀有最强烈的爱和感激之情。

meanings.meaning_en: the distance or measurement around the outside of a circle or any round shape
meanings.example: ...a scientist calculating the Earth's circumference.
meanings.example_cn: …一位正在计算地球周长的科学家。

meanings.meaning_en: If there is congestion in a place, the place is extremely crowded and blocked with traffic or people
meanings.example: The problems of traffic congestion will not disappear in a hurry.
meanings.example_cn: 交通堵塞问题不会很快消失。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of societies and the behaviour of people in groups
meanings.example: Out with every theory of human behavior, from linguistics to sociology.
meanings.example_cn: 从语言学、社会学的人类行为原理里解脱吧。

meanings.meaning_en: a high mountain top
meanings.example: the pinnacle of academic achievement
meanings.example_cn: 学术成就的顶峰

meanings.meaning_en: common at a particular time, in a particular place, or among a particular group of people
meanings.example: the prevalent belief in astrology
meanings.example_cn: 对占星术的普遍相信

meanings.meaning_en: a quality or illness that is hereditary is passed from a parent to a child before the child is born
meanings.example: a hereditary peer
meanings.example_cn: 世袭贵族

meanings.meaning_en: A speciality of a particular place is a special food or product that is always very good there
meanings.example: ...seafood, paella, and other specialities.
meanings.example_cn: …海鲜、西班牙肉菜饭及其他特色食品。

meanings.meaning_en: a supply of a particular type of thing that a shop has available to sell
meanings.example: We have a huge stock of quality carpets on sale.
meanings.example_cn: 我们备有大量优质地毯出售。

meanings.example: Buy now while stocks last!
meanings.example_cn: 存货有限，欲购从速！

meanings.meaning_en: to suggest something as a plan or course of action
meanings.example: the changes currently proposed by the local planning authorities
meanings.example_cn: 目前由地方规划局提议的改革

meanings.meaning_en: a period of history
meanings.example: the Victorian epoch
meanings.example_cn: 维多利亚时代

meanings.meaning_en: an effect caused by hot air in a desert, which makes you think that you can see objects when they are not actually there
meanings.example: Perhaps we are just chasing a mirage.
meanings.example_cn: 也许我们只是在追逐一个梦。

meanings.meaning_en: provided in addition to what already exists
meanings.example: supplementary information
meanings.example_cn: 补充信息

meanings.meaning_en: information that is clearly arranged in the form of a simple picture, set of figures,  graph  etc, or a piece of paper with this information on it
meanings.example: a chart showing last year’s sales
meanings.example_cn: 显示去年销售情况的一份图表

meanings.meaning_en: the number of people in a particular country or area who cannot get a job
meanings.example: a town where there is high unemployment
meanings.example_cn: 高失业率城镇

meanings.meaning_en: a false idea or belief, especially one that a lot of people believe is true
meanings.example: It’s a common fallacy that a neutered dog will become fat and lazy.
meanings.example_cn: 说阉割过的狗会变得又胖又懒，这是普遍的谬见。

meanings.meaning_en: if a situation, fact etc inclines you to do or think something, it influences you towards a particular action or opinion
meanings.example: The telescope is inclined at an angle of 43 degrees.
meanings.example_cn: 这架望远镜以43度角倾斜。

meanings.meaning_en: a slope
to say that an action is illegal or not allowed
meanings.example: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the factory.
meanings.example_cn: 厂区严禁吸烟。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of animals and their behaviour
meanings.example: The scholarship money she won helped her attend Cornell University, where she majored in zoology.
meanings.example_cn: 她赢得的奖学金帮助她上康奈尔大学，在那里他主修动物学。

meanings.meaning_en: to succeed in getting information or a reaction from someone, especially when this is difficult
meanings.example: When her knock elicited no response, she opened the door and peeped in.
meanings.example_cn: 敲门没有回应，她便推开门往里张望。

meanings.meaning_en: expressed or considered in numbers
meanings.example: a numerical code
meanings.example_cn: 数字密码

meanings.meaning_en: having enough money to pay your debts
meanings.example: They're going to have to show that the company is now solvent.
meanings.example_cn: 他们将不得不证明公司现在是具备偿债能力的。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical that is used to  dissolve  another substance
the process of sending and receiving letters
meanings.example: The magazine is unable to enter into any correspondence on medical matters.
meanings.example_cn: 本杂志无法答复有关医学方面的来信。

meanings.example: Traffic was disrupted by a hoax bomb.
meanings.example_cn: 有人虚报有炸弹，造成了交通混乱。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel ashamed or stupid, especially when other people are present
meanings.example: Her boss humiliated her in front of all her colleagues.
meanings.example_cn: 她的老板在所有同事面前羞辱了她。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of communicating information and news to people, such as newspapers, television etc
meanings.example: Advertising is a powerful medium.
meanings.example_cn: 广告是具有强大影响力的传播媒介。

meanings.meaning_en: of middle size, level, or amount
a small low wave on the surface of a liquid
meanings.example: ripples on the surface of the pond
meanings.example_cn: 池面上的涟漪

meanings.meaning_en: to move in small waves, or to make something move in this way
meanings.example: She dived into the pool, making scarcely a ripple.
meanings.example_cn: 她跳入池中，几乎没有泛起水波。

meanings.meaning_en: a swear word or words that you say because you are very angry
meanings.example: He muttered a curse under his breath.
meanings.example_cn: 他低声骂了一句。

meanings.meaning_en: to swear

meanings.meaning_cn: 冒犯或引起反感的行动；流言，诽谤
meanings.meaning_en: Scandal is talk about the shocking and immoral aspects of someone's behaviour or something that has happened
meanings.example: He loved gossip and scandal.
meanings.example_cn: 他喜欢闲话和流言蜚语。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of lawyer who represents you in court
meanings.example: He had always been able to count on her wise counsel.
meanings.example_cn: 他总是能够指望她明智的忠告。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk or move unsteadily, almost falling over
meanings.example: He managed to stagger home.
meanings.example_cn: 他好不容易才蹒跚着走回家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 荚；装一剂药的小囊；密封舱
meanings.meaning_en: a plastic container shaped like a very small tube with medicine inside that you swallow whole
meanings.example: a space capsule orbiting the Earth
meanings.example_cn: 沿地球轨道飞行的太空舱

meanings.meaning_cn: 紧急的，必要的，强制的，祈使语气
meanings.meaning_en: extremely important and needing to be done or dealt with immediately
meanings.example: It is imperative that politicians should be good communicators.
meanings.example_cn: 政治家应该是很好的沟通者，这很重要。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of instructions for cooking a particular type of food
meanings.example: a recipe book
meanings.example_cn: 一本烹饪书

meanings.meaning_en: to move slowly on water or in the air
meanings.example: Smoke drifted up from the jungle ahead of us.
meanings.example_cn: 我们前方的丛林里有烟升起。

meanings.meaning_en: a slow change or development from one situation, opinion etc to another
to make a low continuous sound
meanings.example: Machines hummed on the factory floor.
meanings.example_cn: 机器在车间里嗡嗡作响。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a whole group of things rather than to one thing
meanings.example: Parmesan is a generic term used to describe a family of hard Italian cheeses.
meanings.example_cn: 巴尔马干酪是一个用来描述一类坚硬的意大利奶酪的通用名称。

meanings.meaning_en: when people vote in order to make a decision about a particular subject, rather than voting for a person
meanings.example: The city council agreed to hold a referendum on the issue in November.
meanings.example_cn: 市政会同意在11月就此问题进行全民投票。

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid
meanings.example: He is not allowed solid food yet, only fluids.
meanings.example_cn: 他还不能吃固体食物，只能进流食。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation that is fluid is likely to change
meanings.example: a powerful cleaning fluid
meanings.example_cn: 一种强力清洁液

meanings.meaning_en: a painting, document, book etc that is authentic has been proved to be by a particular person
meanings.example: an authentic work by Picasso
meanings.example_cn: 毕加索的真迹

meanings.meaning_en: land that is always very wet or covered with a layer of water
meanings.example: I spent one whole night by a swamp behind the road listening to frogs.
meanings.example_cn: 我整个晚上都在这条路后面的一个沼泽地旁听蛙鸣。

meanings.meaning_en: to raise and then lower your shoulders in order to show that you do not know something or do not care about something
meanings.example: I just shrugged my shoulders and ignored him.
meanings.example_cn: 我只是耸耸肩，没有理睬他。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden feeling of anger, embarrassment etc
meanings.example: She felt a sudden flush of anger.
meanings.example_cn: 她突然感到一阵愤怒。

meanings.meaning_en: if two surfaces are flush, they are at exactly the same level, so that the place where they meet is flat
to send someone back to their own country
meanings.example: After the war, prisoners were repatriated.
meanings.example_cn: 战后，战俘被遣返。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment fastened to the back of people who jump out of planes, which makes them fall slowly and safely to the ground
meanings.example: a parachute jump
meanings.example_cn: 跳伞

meanings.meaning_en: a special wall built across a river or stream to stop the water from flowing, especially in order to make a lake or produce electricity
meanings.example: Once she allowed her anger to show, it could not be dammed up again.
meanings.example_cn: 她一旦发起脾气来就不可收拾。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who is responsible for a particular place and whose job is to make sure its rules are obeyed
when someone tries to get, achieve, or find something in a determined way
meanings.example: The quarterback sprinted toward the end zone with Jansen in hot pursuit (= following closely behind ) .
meanings.example_cn: 那名四分卫快速冲向底线区，詹森穷追不舍。

meanings.meaning_en: to see someone doing something that they did not want you to know they were doing
meanings.example: He was caught red-handed (= as he was doing something wrong ) taking money from the cash register.
meanings.example_cn: 他从现金出纳机偷钱时被当场抓住。

meanings.meaning_en: the events that form the main story of a book, film, or play
meanings.example: The plot was a little confusing.
meanings.example_cn: 情节有些费解。

meanings.meaning_en: to draw marks or a line to represent facts, numbers etc
meanings.example: We discover that Jack isn’t as innocent as he seems, as the plot unfolds (= gradually becomes clearer ) .
meanings.example_cn: 随着情节的展开，我们发现杰克并不像表面上看起来那么清白。

meanings.meaning_en: if a vehicle or its driver reverses, they go backwards
meanings.example: I owe you nothing. If anything, the reverse is true (= you owe me ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我不欠你什么。 如果说欠的话，是你欠我才对。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality or state of being pure
meanings.example: the purity of tap water
meanings.example_cn: 自来水的纯净度

meanings.meaning_en: quantitative data on any subject, esp data comparing the distribution of some quantity for different subclasses of the population
meanings.example: statistics for earnings by different age groups

meanings.meaning_cn: 可防守的，守得住的；可保持的，可维持的
meanings.example: an idea which is no longer tenable
meanings.example_cn: 不再成立的观点

meanings.meaning_cn: 可触知的；明确的；确实的
meanings.meaning_en: clear enough or definite enough to be easily seen or noticed
meanings.example: The scheme must have tangible benefits for the unemployed.
meanings.example_cn: 这个计划一定要对失业者有实实在在的好处。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove someone from their job
meanings.example: The government has dismissed criticisms that the country’s health policy is a mess.
meanings.example_cn: 有人认为国家医疗政策一塌糊涂，政府对这种批评持否认态度。

meanings.meaning_en: to send someone an invoice
meanings.example: The agency invoices the client who then pays the full amount to the agency.
meanings.example_cn: 那个代销处给客户开具发票，然后客户向代销处支付全部的款项。

meanings.meaning_en: a list of goods that have been supplied or work that has been done, showing how much you owe for them
the process of giving or getting the right type of food for good health and growth
meanings.example: Nutrition and exercise are essential to fitness and health.
meanings.example_cn: 营养和运动是保持健康所必不可少的。

meanings.meaning_en: very thin and pale, especially because of illness or continued worry
meanings.example: the old man’s gaunt face
meanings.example_cn: 老人那瘦削的脸庞

meanings.meaning_en: the person in a court of law who has been  accused  of doing something illegal
meanings.example: We find the defendant not guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 我们裁定被告无罪。

meanings.meaning_en: if a price or amount fluctuates, it keeps changing and becoming higher and lower
meanings.example: Insect populations fluctuate wildly from year to year.
meanings.example_cn: 昆虫的数量每年变化很大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提高(强度、力量、数量等)，增加(进)
meanings.meaning_en: to improve something
meanings.example: Good lighting will enhance any room.
meanings.example_cn: 良好的照明能给房间增色不少。

meanings.example: That’s a terrific idea!
meanings.example_cn: 这个主意真棒！

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement of things for people to look at or buy
meanings.example: a dazzling display (= very good display ) of flowers
meanings.example_cn: 令人目眩神迷的花卉展

meanings.meaning_en: a long piece of music usually in four parts, written for an  orchestra
meanings.example: Bruckner’s Fifth Symphony
meanings.example_cn: 布鲁克纳的《第五交响曲》

meanings.meaning_cn: 滋补品，补药；强身的，健体的
meanings.meaning_en: a drink that you have as a medicine to give you more energy or strength when you feel tired
meanings.example: A lot of people need a tonic at the end of the winter.
meanings.example_cn: 很多人冬末需要进补。

meanings.meaning_cn: 生理组织；薄纸；棉纸；织物；一套
meanings.meaning_en: light thin paper used for wrapping, packing etc
meanings.example: a box of tissues
meanings.example_cn: 一盒面巾纸

meanings.meaning_en: teaching, especially in small groups
meanings.example: I had to have extra tuition in maths.
meanings.example_cn: 我不得不上数学补习课。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious magazine produced for professional people or those with a particular interest
meanings.example: the British Medical Journal
meanings.example_cn: 《英国医学杂志》

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a nut or seed inside the shell, or the part inside the stone of some fruits
meanings.example: The kernel of that message was that peace must not be a source of advantage or disadvantage for anyone.
meanings.example_cn: 那一信息的核心是和平绝不应该成为对任何人有利或不利的根源。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your hand that is shaped like a thick short finger and helps you to hold things
meanings.example: a baby sucking its thumb
meanings.example_cn: 吮着大拇指的婴儿

meanings.meaning_en: a small book that advertises a school, college, new business etc
meanings.example: ...a prospectus for a new issue of stock.
meanings.example_cn: …新发行股票的招股说明书。

meanings.meaning_en: to find out what illness someone has, or what the cause of a fault is, after doing tests, examinations etc
meanings.example: How did they diagnose you?
meanings.example_cn: 他们怎么给你的诊断的？

meanings.meaning_cn: 额外的/地，非常，另外；额外的人
meanings.meaning_en: Extras are additional amounts of money that are added to the price that you have to pay for something
meanings.example: There are no hidden extras.
meanings.example_cn: 没有任何隐蔽的额外费用。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually become less and less or smaller and smaller
meanings.example: The elephant population is dwindling.
meanings.example_cn: 大象的数量在减少。

meanings.meaning_cn: 补钉；眼罩；斑点；小块土地
meanings.meaning_en: a small area of something that is different from the area around it
meanings.example: Look out for icy patches on the road.
meanings.example_cn: 小心路上结冰的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: to repair a hole in something by putting a piece of something else over it
meanings.example: a cat with a white patch on its chest
meanings.example_cn: 胸部有一块白斑的猫

meanings.meaning_en: a simple, quickly made drawing that does not show much detail
meanings.example: So if we just sketch that.
meanings.example_cn: 那么如果我们把那画个草图。

meanings.meaning_en: a short humorous scene on a television programme, in a theatre etc, that is part of a larger show
meanings.example: He squiggled a sketch on the ground.
meanings.example_cn: 他在地上胡乱地画了个草图。

meanings.meaning_cn: 难看的，简陋的；吝啬的，自私的
meanings.meaning_en: not wanting to spend money, or not wanting to use much of something
meanings.example: He’s too mean to buy a present for his wife.
meanings.example_cn: 他很吝啬，给他妻子买件礼物都不肯。

meanings.meaning_en: a method of doing something which is between two very different methods, and better than either of them …
a small sign that shows that someone or something was present or existed
meanings.example: There was no trace of anyone having entered the room since then.
meanings.example_cn: 没有任何迹象表明在那以后有人进过这房间。

meanings.meaning_en: to copy a drawing, map etc by putting a piece of transparent paper over it and then drawing the lines you can see through the paper
meanings.example: Petra’s lost all trace of her German accent.
meanings.example_cn: 彼得拉已完全没有德国口音。

meanings.meaning_cn: 防卫 防护 防御物 辩护 被告律师
meanings.meaning_en: something that you say or do in order to support someone or something that is being criticized
meanings.example: The land was flat, giving no scope for defence.
meanings.example_cn: 土地非常平坦，无法做防卫之用。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of forcing someone to leave a place
meanings.example: The headmaster threatened the boys with expulsion.
meanings.example_cn: 校长警告这几名男生说要开除他们。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to develop into a particular type of person or thing in the future
meanings.example: The company has identified 60 potential customers.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司已确定了60位潜在的客户。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to develop into a particular type of person or thing in the future
the possibility that something will develop in a particular way, or have a particular effect
a small official document that you get from your government, that proves who you are, and which you need in order to leave your country and enter other countries
meanings.example: I have an Irish passport.
meanings.example_cn: 我持爱尔兰护照。

meanings.meaning_cn: 工艺；手工业；船；技巧；诡计
meanings.meaning_en: a job or activity in which you make things with your hands, and that you usually need skill to do
meanings.example: traditional rural crafts
meanings.example_cn: 传统的乡村手工艺

meanings.meaning_cn: 微光，闪光，短暂而微弱的闪现
meanings.meaning_en: to shine softly
meanings.example: His teeth gleamed under his moustache.
meanings.example_cn: 他的八字须下面，牙齿晶莹发亮。

meanings.meaning_en: if a river, lake, or container overflows, it is so full that the liquid or material inside flows over its edges
meanings.example: The drains flooded and water overflowed down the main street.
meanings.example_cn: 下水道被淹，水溢到了大街上。

meanings.meaning_en: very serious and not happy, for example because something bad has happened or because you are at an important occasion
meanings.example: a solemn expression
meanings.example_cn: 严肃的表情

meanings.meaning_en: plants in general
meanings.example: Lefkas has an abundance of lush green vegetation.
meanings.example_cn: 莱夫卡斯有葱郁茂盛的植被。

meanings.meaning_cn: 易弯的，柔韧的；易受影响的
meanings.meaning_en: able to bend without breaking or cracking
meanings.example: a shoe made of soft pliable leather
meanings.example_cn: 柔韧的皮革做成的鞋子

meanings.meaning_en: anxiety about the future, especially about dealing with something unpleasant or difficult
meanings.example: a feeling of apprehension
meanings.example_cn: 担忧的心情

meanings.meaning_en: to talk in an angry, uncontrolled, or crazy way
meanings.example: He was still ranting and raving the next morning.
meanings.example_cn: 第二天上午他仍在大叫大嚷。

meanings.meaning_en: enthusiastic or extravagant praise
relating to movement
meanings.example: an increase in locomotive power
meanings.example_cn: 运动力的增加

meanings.meaning_en: a railway engine
someone who starts a new business or arranges business deals in order to make money, often in a way that involves financial risks
not sure that something is true or right
meanings.example: ‘Everything’s going to be all right, you’ll see.’ Jenny looked doubtful .
meanings.example_cn: “一切都会顺顺当当的，你等着看好了。” 珍妮看起来不大相信的样子。

meanings.meaning_en: with a strong and unhealthy interest in unpleasant subjects, especially death
meanings.example: The trip was made all the worse by Frankie’s morbid fear of flying.
meanings.example_cn: 弗朗基对坐飞机有种病态的恐惧，使得旅途变得更加糟糕。

meanings.meaning_cn: 猛烈的，凶暴的；由暴力引起的；强烈的
meanings.meaning_en: involving actions that are intended to injure or kill people, by hitting them, shooting them etc
meanings.example: the increase in violent crime
meanings.example_cn: 暴力犯罪的增多

meanings.meaning_en: to give an example of something
meanings.example: Problems are exemplified in the report.
meanings.example_cn: 问题都在报告中作了举例说明。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop doing something or stop happening
meanings.example: The things people will do for charity never cease to amaze me (= I am always surprised by them ) .
meanings.example_cn: 人们的慈善义举总是让我感到惊讶。

meanings.meaning_en: to turn with a circular movement around a central point, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The Earth rotates on its axis once every 24 hours.
meanings.example_cn: 地球每24小时绕地轴自转一周。

meanings.meaning_cn: 解决困难，解答问题；溶解；溶液
meanings.meaning_en: a way of solving a problem or dealing with a difficult situation
meanings.example: The best solution would be for them to separate.
meanings.example_cn: 最好的解决方法是他们分开。

meanings.meaning_en: to recognize and correctly name someone or something
meanings.example: He was too far away to be able to identify faces.
meanings.example_cn: 他离得太远，没法看面孔认出谁是谁。

meanings.meaning_en: more important than anything else
meanings.example: During a war the interests of the state are paramount, and those of the individual come last.
meanings.example_cn: 战争时期国家利益是首要的，个人利益置于最后。

meanings.meaning_en: if you combine two or more different things, or if they combine, they begin to exist or work together
meanings.example: Diets are most effective when combined with exercise.
meanings.example_cn: 节食和锻炼相结合是最有效的。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people, businesses etc who work together
meanings.example: Ruth hesitated, uncertain of how to combine honesty and diplomacy in her answer.
meanings.example_cn: 露丝犹豫了，她不知道怎样回答才能既诚实又婉转。

meanings.meaning_en: a large mass of snow, ice, and rocks that falls down the side of a mountain
meanings.example: Two skiers were killed in the avalanche.
meanings.example_cn: 两名滑雪者在雪崩中丧生。

meanings.meaning_en: the set of tools and machines that you use for a particular scientific, medical, or technical purpose
meanings.example: Astronauts have special breathing apparatus.
meanings.example_cn: 航天员有专门的呼吸装装备。

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow hole dug at the side of a field, road etc to hold or remove unwanted water
meanings.example: Both vehicles ended up in a ditch.
meanings.example_cn: 两辆车都掉进了沟里。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop having something because you no longer want it
to put things in a particular order or position
meanings.example: In the dining room, team photographs were ranged along the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 餐厅里，球队的照片排列在墙上。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that something is extremely large
meanings.example: a colossal statue of the King
meanings.example_cn: 国王的巨大雕像

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is slim is attractively thin
meanings.example: a slim young woman
meanings.example_cn: 身材苗条的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_en: a hard level surface or path at the side of a road for people to walk on
meanings.example: A small group of journalists waited on the pavement outside her house.
meanings.example_cn: 有一小群记者守候在她家外面的人行道上。

meanings.meaning_en: to interrupt someone so that they cannot continue what they are doing
meanings.example: Sorry to disturb you, but I have an urgent message.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起打扰一下，我有个紧急消息。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone extremely afraid
meanings.example: Her husband’s violence terrified her.
meanings.example_cn: 丈夫的暴力行为让她感到害怕。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使保持某一状态，阻止，保留，履行，保卫
meanings.meaning_en: to stay in a particular state, condition, or position, or to make someone or something do this
meanings.example: You can keep it. I don’t need it any more.
meanings.example_cn: 你留着吧，我不需要了。

meanings.meaning_en: a doctor
meanings.example: ...your family physician.
meanings.example_cn: …你的家庭医生。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is precious is valuable and important and should not be wasted or used without care
meanings.example: planes delivering precious supplies of medicine and food
meanings.example_cn: 运送药品、食品等宝贵物资的飞机

meanings.meaning_en: completely stupid or crazy, often in a way that is dangerous
meanings.example: That’s an insane risk.
meanings.example_cn: 那是疯狂的冒险之举。

meanings.meaning_en: If the title of something such as a book, film, or painting is, for example, "Sunrise," you can say that it is entitled "Sunrise."
meanings.example: ...a performance entitled "United States."
meanings.example_cn: …一场名为“合众国”的演出。

meanings.example: An alternative route is along the Via Unione.
meanings.example_cn: 另一条路线是沿着联合路走。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可供选择的；可供替代的
meanings.meaning_en: an alternative idea, plan etc is different from the one you have and can be used instead
a standard that you use to judge something or make a decision about something
meanings.example: the criteria we use to select candidates
meanings.example_cn: 我们挑选候选人的标准

meanings.meaning_en: a large room in a hospital where people who need medical treatment stay
meanings.example: the other patients in the ward
meanings.example_cn: 病房里的其他病人

meanings.meaning_en: to make a judgment about a person or situation after thinking carefully about it
meanings.example: The test was to assess aptitude rather than academic achievement.
meanings.example_cn: 该测试将评估能力而不是学业成绩。

meanings.meaning_en: the soft part of the body of a person or animal that is between the skin and the bones
meanings.example: a freshwater fish with firm white flesh
meanings.example_cn: 一种肉色雪白、肉质紧实的淡水鱼

meanings.meaning_en: A stuntman is a man whose job is to do dangerous things, either for publicity, or in a movie instead of an actor so that the actor does not risk being injured
meanings.example: Both Jacky Chan and Jet Li don't like to use stuntman in their films.
meanings.example_cn: 成龙和李连杰在电影中都不爱用替身演员。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of ideas, rules, or beliefs from which something is developed, or on which decisions are based
meanings.example: We have to act within the existing legal framework.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须在现行的法律框架下行事。

meanings.meaning_en: to sit or stand in a particular position in order to be photographed or painted, or to make someone do this
meanings.example: In her book she poses the question ‘How much do we need to be happy?’
meanings.example_cn: 她在书里提出了这样一个问题﹕“我们要拥有多少才能快乐？”

meanings.meaning_en: to keep someone or something within the limits of a particular activity or subject
meanings.example: Vaughan is confined to a wheelchair .
meanings.example_cn: 沃恩离不开轮椅。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to birth
meanings.example: Green turtles return to their natal island to breed.
meanings.example_cn: 绿毛龟回到它们出生的岛上繁殖。

meanings.meaning_en: hot bright burning gas that you see when something is on fire
meanings.example: Flames poured out of the windows of the building.
meanings.example_cn: 火焰从大楼窗口冒出来。

meanings.meaning_en: to succeed in dealing with a problem or difficulty
meanings.example: He has had to surmount immense physical disabilities.
meanings.example_cn: 他不得不克服严重的身体残疾。

meanings.meaning_en: similar to something else in size, number, quality etc, so that you can make a comparison
meanings.example: A car of comparable size would cost far more abroad.
meanings.example_cn: 同样大小的汽车在国外要贵得多。

meanings.meaning_en: if something is transparent, you can see through it
meanings.example: a transparent plastic container
meanings.example_cn: 透明的塑料容器

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a camera through which the light travels before it reaches the film
meanings.example: a standard 50mm lens
meanings.example_cn: 50毫米标准镜头

meanings.meaning_cn: 压碎，压坏，弄皱，压垮；挤入
meanings.meaning_en: to press something so hard that it breaks or is damaged
meanings.example: His leg was crushed in the accident.
meanings.example_cn: 他的腿在事故中被压断。

meanings.meaning_cn: 谴责，迫使；判刑；宣告(建筑)不宜使用
meanings.meaning_en: to say very strongly that you do not approve of something or someone, especially because you think it is morally wrong
meanings.example: Politicians were quick to condemn the bombing.
meanings.example_cn: 政治家们立即对爆炸事件进行了谴责。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something is considered to be more impor-tant than someone or something else, and therefore comes first or must be dealt with first
meanings.example: Guests were seated in order of precedence .
meanings.example_cn: 宾客们按席次就座。

meanings.meaning_en: a newspaper or magazine which gives information, news etc for an organization or group
meanings.example: ...damage to the muscles and internal organs.
meanings.example_cn: …对肌肉和内脏的损伤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 主要产品；名产；纤维；主要成分，主食
meanings.meaning_en: a food that is needed and used all the time
meanings.example: staples like flour and rice
meanings.example_cn: 面粉和大米等主食

meanings.meaning_en: to recognize or express the difference between things or people
meanings.example: What differentiates these two periods of history?
meanings.example_cn: 这两个历史时期的差别在哪里？

meanings.meaning_cn: 雇用；从事；订婚；吸引；啮合
meanings.meaning_en: to attract someone’s attention and keep them interested
meanings.example: She engaged the clutch and the car moved.
meanings.example_cn: 她踩下离合器，汽车便开动了。

meanings.meaning_en: a student who stays away from school without permission
meanings.example: persistent truants
meanings.example_cn: 老是逃学的学生

meanings.meaning_en: a group of officials who represent their government in a foreign country, or the building they work in
meanings.example: the American Embassy in Paris
meanings.example_cn: 美国驻巴黎大使馆

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that makes someone unfriendly or unwilling to support you
meanings.example: The latest tax proposals will alienate many voters.
meanings.example_cn: 最新的纳税提案将失去远许多选民的支持。

meanings.meaning_cn: (法律或道义上)必须的，应尽的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is obligatory must be done because of a law, rule etc
meanings.example: She offered him the obligatory cup of tea.
meanings.example_cn: 她照例给他端来一杯茶。

meanings.meaning_en: more powerful, more common, or more easily noticed than others
meanings.example: the predominant group in society
meanings.example_cn: 社会中的主导群体

meanings.meaning_cn: 不感兴趣的，不关心的，质量不高的
meanings.meaning_en: not at all interested in someone or something
meanings.example: an indifferent cook
meanings.example_cn: 手艺平平的厨师

meanings.meaning_en: to remove something that has been written down or stored in a computer
meanings.example: His name was deleted from the list.
meanings.example_cn: 他的名字从名单上删掉了。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle with no roof that is pulled by a horse and used for carrying heavy things
meanings.example: Cars are prohibited, so transportation is by electric cart or by horse and buggy.
meanings.example_cn: 由于汽车被禁止使用，交通依赖于电车或轻便马车。

meanings.meaning_en: to take something somewhere in a cart, truck etc
not trans-parent, but clear enough to allow light to pass through
meanings.example: Blue veins showed through her translucent skin.
meanings.example_cn: 她半透明的皮肤下青筋显现。

meanings.meaning_en: all the people in the future who will be alive after you are dead
meanings.example: A photographer recorded the scene on video for posterity.
meanings.example_cn: 一位摄影师为子孙后代摄下了这个场面。

meanings.meaning_en: the subjects that are taught by a school, college etc, or the things that are studied in a particular subject
meanings.example: Languages are an essential part of the school curriculum.
meanings.example_cn: 语言是学校课程中必不可少的部分。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop being angry with someone and stop blaming them, although they have done something wrong
meanings.example: He didn’t look the sort of man to forgive and forget (= forgive someone and no longer think about it ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他看上去不是那种不记仇的人。

meanings.meaning_en: one of several parts that together make up a whole machine, system etc
meanings.example: companies that make electronic components for computer products
meanings.example_cn: 为计算机产品生产电子零件的公司

meanings.meaning_en: consisting of granules
meanings.example: ...a granular fertilizer.
meanings.example_cn: ...一种粒状化肥。

meanings.meaning_en: careful and thorough examination of someone or something
meanings.example: Their activities have come under police scrutiny .
meanings.example_cn: 他们的活动受到警方的严密监视。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is wary is careful because they think something might be dangerous or harmful
meanings.example: Keep a wary eye on the weather before you set sail.
meanings.example_cn: 出航前要密切注意天气。

meanings.meaning_en: directly relating to the subject or problem being discussed or considered
meanings.example: Relevant documents were presented in court.
meanings.example_cn: 法庭上出示了相关的文件。

meanings.meaning_cn: 精神的，心灵的；神圣的，超自然的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to your spirit rather than to your body or mind
meanings.example: Painting helps fill a spiritual need for beauty.
meanings.example_cn: 绘画可以满足对美的精神需求。

meanings.example: I’ve had a pretty hectic day.
meanings.example_cn: 我忙乱了一整天。

meanings.meaning_en: very great or impressive
meanings.example: the phenomenal success of computer games in recent years
meanings.example_cn: 近年来电脑游戏的惊人成功

meanings.meaning_cn: 保证; 担保，保证人，担保物
meanings.meaning_en: to promise that you will pay back money that someone else has borrowed, if they do not pay it back themselves
meanings.example: The bank will only lend me money if my parents guarantee the loan.
meanings.example_cn: 只有我父母作担保，银行才会给我贷款。

meanings.meaning_cn: 跛的；瘸的，不能说服人的
meanings.meaning_en: a lame excuse or explanation is weak and difficult to believe
meanings.example: a lame attempt to deflect criticism
meanings.example_cn: 转移批评的一个无力的尝试

meanings.meaning_en: to make a person or animal unable to walk properly
a very slight, hardly noticeable difference in manner, colour, meaning etc
meanings.example: He was aware of every nuance in her voice.
meanings.example_cn: 他听得出她声音中的每一个细微变化。

meanings.meaning_en: the place that someone or something is going to
meanings.example: Ellis Island has become one of America's most popular tourist destinations.
meanings.example_cn: 埃利斯岛已经成为美国最受欢迎的游览地之一。

meanings.example: The modularity system can then match you with what you need irrespective of which module provides it.
meanings.example_cn: 模块化系统可以很好地匹配您的需求，而不需要考虑是哪个模块提供的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 苦工，重活，单调乏味的工作
meanings.meaning_en: hard boring work
meanings.example: We cannot hope for cheap food, but we can improve skills, boost productivity, reduce drudgery and enhance people's quality of life.
meanings.example_cn: 我们不能把希望放在廉价食品上，但是我们可以改善技能，促进生产力，减少单调的苦工，并提高人们的生活质量。

meanings.meaning_en: containing or consisting of salt
meanings.example: saline solution
meanings.example_cn: 盐溶液

meanings.meaning_en: the process of going down
meanings.example: Passengers must fasten their seat belts prior to descent.
meanings.example_cn: 乘客在飞机降落之前必须系好安全带。

meanings.meaning_en: related to the process of knowing, understanding, and learning something
meanings.example: cognitive psychology
meanings.example_cn: 认知心理学

meanings.example: Hippos are unable to submerge in the few remaining water holes.
meanings.example_cn: 河马无法淹没在仅存的几个水坑里。

meanings.meaning_en: to invent a clever story, excuse, or plan, especially in order to deceive someone
meanings.example: John concocted an elaborate excuse for being late.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰为迟到编了一个巧妙的借口。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of wanting to do something very much
meanings.example: Her voice was full of anxiety.
meanings.example_cn: 她的声音饱含焦虑。

meanings.meaning_en: moving in a way that does not look graceful
meanings.example: a tall ungainly teenager
meanings.example_cn: 一个动作笨拙的高个子少年

meanings.meaning_en: an influence that makes something happen or makes it happen more quickly
meanings.example: The discovery gave fresh impetus to the research.
meanings.example_cn: 这个发现为研究带来新动力。

meanings.meaning_en: protection given to someone by a government because they have escaped from fighting or political trouble in their own country
meanings.example: He applied for asylum in 1987 after fleeing the police back home.
meanings.example_cn: 他于1987年逃脱本国的警察之后申请了避难许可。

meanings.meaning_en: a combination of different things that have come together by chance
meanings.example: The two clauses are joined by a conjunction.
meanings.example_cn: 这两个分句由一个连词连在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of paper money worth one dollar
meanings.example: I don’t have any ones.
meanings.example_cn: 我没有一美元的纸币。

meanings.meaning_en: to form a picture of someone or something in your mind
meanings.example: I tried to visualize the house while he was describing it.
meanings.example_cn: 我一边听他描述，一边想象那房子的样子。

meanings.meaning_en: existing or popular for only a short time
meanings.example: Fashion is by nature ephemeral.
meanings.example_cn: 从本质上说，时尚不过是一时的潮流。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing that covers you from your waist to your feet and has a separate part for each leg
meanings.example: She was wearing dark blue pants and a white sweater.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿着深蓝色长裤和白色毛衣。

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument used for keeping a room or a machine at a particular temperature
meanings.example: Turn off your thermostat when you’re not home.
meanings.example_cn: 当你不在家的时候关掉恒温器。

meanings.meaning_en: to encourage or help an activity to begin or develop further
meanings.example: Her interest in art was stimulated by her father.
meanings.example_cn: 她对艺术的兴趣是她父亲激发的。

meanings.meaning_en: to use machines to make goods or materials, usually in large numbers or amounts
meanings.example: the company that manufactured the drug
meanings.example_cn: 生产这种药的公司

meanings.meaning_en: the process of making goods or materials using machines, usually in large numbers or amounts
meanings.example: manufactured goods
meanings.example_cn: 工业品，制成品

meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that shows you refuse to do what someone tells you to do, especially because you do not respect them
meanings.example: ...his courageous defiance of the government.
meanings.example_cn: …他对政府的大胆蔑视。

meanings.meaning_en: in addition – used to introduce information that adds to or supports what has previously been said
meanings.example: The rent is reasonable and, moreover, the location is perfect.
meanings.example_cn: 租金合理，而且位置也非常好。

meanings.meaning_en: a refusal to give official permission for something, or the right to refuse to give such permission
meanings.example: The Senate had a sufficient majority to override the presidential veto (= not accept his refusal ).
meanings.example_cn: 参议院有足够的多数票可以推翻总统的否决。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone in authority vetoes something, they refuse to allow it to happen, especially something that other people or organizations have agreed
fighting, especially during a war
meanings.example: We flew over 200 combat missions in the war.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在战争中执行过两百多次战斗飞行任务。

meanings.meaning_en: something wrong with your body or mind which shows that you have a particular illness
meanings.example: One of the most common symptoms of schizophrenia is hearing imaginary voices.
meanings.example_cn: 精神分裂症最常见的症状之一是幻听。

meanings.meaning_cn: 偶然的，碰巧的；随便的；临时的
meanings.meaning_en: not formal or not for a formal situation
meanings.example: Jean felt more comfortable in casual clothes .
meanings.example_cn: 琼穿上便服感到更舒服。

meanings.meaning_en: a concerted effort etc is done by people working together in a carefully planned and very determined way
meanings.example: Libraries have made a concerted effort to attract young people.
meanings.example_cn: 各图书馆同心协力吸引年轻人。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with, but less important than, something else
meanings.example: a subsidiary hypothesis
meanings.example_cn: 一个附带假设

meanings.meaning_en: a company that is owned or controlled by another larger company
rude and not showing any respect
meanings.example: an insolent tone of voice
meanings.example_cn: 傲慢的语气

meanings.meaning_en: to allow something to happen, especially by an official decision, rule, or law
meanings.example: Smoking is only permitted in the public lounge.
meanings.example_cn: 只允许在公共休息室里抽烟。

meanings.meaning_en: an official written statement giving you the right to do something
meanings.example: He had more than the permitted level of alcohol in his blood.
meanings.example_cn: 他血液中的酒精含量超出了允许的水平。

meanings.meaning_en: dull and making you feel sad or bored
meanings.example: the same dreary routine
meanings.example_cn: 一成不变的、乏味的日常事务

meanings.meaning_en: an advantage or good feature of something
meanings.example: The merit of the report is its realistic assessment of the changes required.
meanings.example_cn: 这份报告的优点就是它对所要求的变动进行了实事求是的评估。

meanings.meaning_en: to be good, important, or serious enough for praise or attention
meanings.example: The great merit of the project is its flexibility and low cost.
meanings.example_cn: 该项目最大的优点是它的灵活性和低成本。

meanings.meaning_en: a large amount of water moving very quickly and strongly in a particular direction
meanings.example: After five days of heavy rain the Telle river was a raging torrent (= a very violent torrent ) .
meanings.example_cn: 下了五天的大雨之后，泰勒河急流汹涌。

meanings.meaning_cn: 阿谀，使高兴；(肖像)等胜过(真人真物)
meanings.example: That dress really flatters your figure.
meanings.example_cn: 那件连衣裙很显你的身材。

meanings.meaning_en: When there are layoffs in a company, people become unemployed because there is no more work for them in the company
meanings.example: It will close more than 200 stores nationwide resulting in the layoffs of an estimated 2,000 employees.
meanings.example_cn: 在全国范围内将关闭二百多家商店，造成约两千人失业。

meanings.meaning_en: to judge how good, useful, or successful something is
meanings.example: You should be able to evaluate your own work.
meanings.example_cn: 你应该能够评估自己的工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something violent or harmful to express feelings of anger, hatred etc
meanings.example: Children give vent to their anger in various ways.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童用各种方法发泄怒气。

meanings.meaning_en: packed or put together firmly and closely
meanings.example: The bushes grew in a compact mass.
meanings.example_cn: 灌木长成茂密的一片。

meanings.meaning_en: the rate at which goods are produced, and the amount produced, especially in relation to the work, time, and money needed to produce them
meanings.example: high productivity levels in manufacturing
meanings.example_cn: 制造业中的高生产率

meanings.meaning_en: not limited by or depending on any conditions

meanings.example_cn: 所有政治犯的无条件释放

meanings.meaning_en: to wait somewhere quietly and secretly, usually because you are going to do something wrong
meanings.example: a dark formless danger, lurking in the shadows
meanings.example_cn: 一种潜藏在阴影里的无形危险

meanings.meaning_en: continuous feelings of worry about your work or personal life, that prevent you from relaxing
meanings.example: Your headaches are due to stress.
meanings.example_cn: 你的头痛是压力造成的。

meanings.meaning_en: to emphasize a statement, fact, or idea

meanings.example_cn: 珍妮特自从母亲生病以来承受了很大的压力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 乐趣；滋味，风味; 兴趣
meanings.example: The danger of being caught added a certain zest to the affair.
meanings.example_cn: 被捉奸的危险为这件风流韵事增添了一些刺激性。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, group, or organization that you compete with in sport, business, a fight etc
meanings.example: This gives the company a competitive advantage over its rivals.
meanings.example_cn: 这使该公司与其对手相比具有一项竞争优势。

meanings.meaning_en: a pleasant smell
meanings.example: ...a shrubby plant with a strong characteristic fragrance.
meanings.example_cn: …一种有独特浓郁香味的灌木。

meanings.meaning_en: to do what you have to do or are asked to do

meanings.example_cn: 联邦探员要求这家报社给予协助，报社同意配合。

meanings.meaning_en: able to be trusted and depended on
meanings.example: He is a trustworthy and level-headed leader.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个可信赖的、头脑冷静的领导。

meanings.meaning_cn: 染料，着色剂，污点，沾污处
meanings.meaning_en: to accidentally make a mark on something, especially one that cannot be removed, or to be marked in this way
meanings.example: Be careful you don’t stain the carpet.
meanings.example_cn: 当心别把地毯弄脏了。

meanings.meaning_en: protected by a patent
meanings.example: a patent lock
meanings.example_cn: 专利锁

meanings.meaning_en: a special document that gives you the right to make or sell a new  invention  or product that no one else is allowed to copy
to obtain a special document giving you the right to make or sell a new  invention  or product
when someone behaves in an unpleasant or threatening way towards you
meanings.example: African-Americans have been complaining about police harassment for years.
meanings.example_cn: 美国黑人多年来一直抱怨受到警察的骚扰。

meanings.meaning_en: an imaginary creature that looks like a small man
meanings.example: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
meanings.example_cn: 《白雪公主和七个小矮人》

meanings.meaning_en: to be so big that other things are made to seem very small
a statement or opinion judging the worth, value, or condition of something
meanings.example: What is needed in such cases is a calm appraisal of the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 在此类情况下需要的是对形势的冷静估计。

meanings.meaning_en: very careful and thorough
meanings.example: The work had been done with painstaking attention to detail.
meanings.example_cn: 这项工作被一丝不苟地完成了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is frail is weak and thin because they are old or ill
meanings.example: {"COLLOINEXA":["frail elderly people"]}
meanings.example_cn: 年老体衰者

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to do something well
meanings.example: Typing is considered by most employers to be a basic competence.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数雇主认为打字是一项基本技能。

meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when an opinion, idea etc is discussed
meanings.example: give them an airing.
meanings.example_cn: 把室内盆栽植物搬出去透透气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 否认, 否定，拒绝一项要求"
meanings.meaning_en: to say that something is not true, or that you do not believe something
meanings.example: The government denied the existence of poverty among 16- and 17-year-olds.
meanings.example_cn: 政府否认十六七岁的青少年当中存在贫困问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a house, especially a large or official one
meanings.example: the ambassador’s official residence
meanings.example_cn: 大使官邸

meanings.meaning_en: to successfully complete something or get a good result, especially by working hard
meanings.example: Frances achieved very good exam results.
meanings.example_cn: 弗朗西丝考试取得了优异成绩。

meanings.example_cn: 情感与智力同步发展吗？

meanings.example: Car thefts are commonplace in this part of town.
meanings.example_cn: 镇上的这个地段盗车案屡见不鲜。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in a light sleep or to feel as though you are almost asleep
meanings.example: I was drowsing in front of the television when you called.
meanings.example_cn: 我正坐在电视机前打瞌睡，恰好你打电话来。

meanings.meaning_en: living or growing in water

meanings.example_cn: 水生植物

meanings.meaning_en: a shout of happiness, praise, approval, or encouragement

meanings.example_cn: 人群中爆发出巨大的欢呼声。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赈济款、物；慈善团体；博爱
meanings.meaning_en: an organization that gives money, goods, or help to people who are poor, sick etc
meanings.example: Several charities sent aid to the flood victims.
meanings.example_cn: 有几家慈善机构已向洪灾灾民送去了救援物资。

meanings.example: The wheels suddenly locked.
meanings.example_cn: 轮子突然卡住不动了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 遗腹的；父亡后出生的；死后的；身后的
meanings.meaning_en: happening, printed etc after someone’s death

meanings.example_cn: 他身后出版的文集

meanings.meaning_en: a small hole made accidentally in a tyre

meanings.example_cn: 她骑车回家途中轮胎被扎破了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 国外来的(姑娘)帮助料理家务换取住宿的

meanings.meaning_en: shared by or involving all the members of a group

meanings.example_cn: 共同的责任

meanings.meaning_en: to say publicly or officially that something important is true or exists

meanings.example_cn: 总统宣布共和国独立。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being known about by a lot of people because of your achievements

meanings.example_cn: 他称自己对出名真的没有兴趣。

meanings.example_cn: 为琐事争吵毫无意义。

meanings.meaning_en: if a feeling, idea, or smell pervades a place, it is present in every part of it

meanings.example_cn: 一种无望的情绪笼罩着该国。

meanings.example_cn: 他的右脸上有一道弯弯的长疤。

meanings.example_cn: 她被找到时还活着，但已不省人事。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to find out the truth about something such as a crime, accident, or scientific problem

meanings.example_cn: 州警察正调查此事。

meanings.meaning_en: a place with water and trees in a desert

meanings.example_cn: 那些打理得非常整洁的花园是杂乱扩张的开罗市区中的一片绿洲。

meanings.meaning_cn: 坚硬的；困难的；难忍的；严厉的；结实的
meanings.meaning_en: firm, stiff, and difficult to press down, break, or cut

meanings.example_cn: 一把硬木椅

meanings.meaning_en: orthodox ideas, methods, or behaviour are accepted by most people to be correct and right

meanings.example_cn: 传统疗法

meanings.meaning_cn: (从火灾及其他灾难中)抢救财物救助
meanings.meaning_en: when you save things from a situation in which other things have already been damaged, destroyed, or lost

meanings.meaning_en: when you do not understand what is happening or what something means because it is not clear

meanings.example_cn: 为了避免混淆，各队穿着不同颜色的服装。

meanings.meaning_en: unusually good

meanings.example_cn: 出类拔萃的学生

meanings.meaning_en: a long period of dry weather when there is not enough water for plants and animals to live

meanings.example_cn: …过去18年来干旱和饥荒致死达两百万人的一个国家。

meanings.example_cn: 该合同被宣布无效。

meanings.meaning_en: If you fetch something or someone, you go and get them from the place where they are

meanings.example_cn: 西尔维娅从浴室拿来一条毛巾。

meanings.meaning_en: to control and use the natural force or power of something

meanings.example_cn: 我们可以利用风力发电。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of leather bands used to control a horse or to attach it to a vehicle it is pulling

meanings.meaning_cn: 琐碎的，不重要的；平常的，平凡的
meanings.example: a trivial sum
meanings.example_cn: 一笔极小的金额

meanings.meaning_cn: 减轻，放松，小心移置；舒适
meanings.meaning_en: feeling relaxed, especially in a situation in which people might feel a little nervous

meanings.example_cn: 他们轻松获胜。

meanings.meaning_en: to put furniture and other things into a house or room

meanings.example_cn: 买下房子后，他们没有钱买家具了。

meanings.meaning_en: You can refer to a large number of objects that someone has with them or that are connected with a particular activity as paraphernalia

meanings.example_cn: …一个充满建筑装备的大院子

meanings.meaning_cn: 起作用的，有助于，乐器的
meanings.meaning_en: instrumental music is for instruments, not for voices
meanings.example: He was instrumental in developing links with European organizations.
meanings.example_cn: 他在建立与欧洲各组织之间的联系中起了重要作用。

meanings.meaning_en: an exorbitant price, amount of money etc is much higher than it should be

meanings.example_cn: 过高的房价使穷人负担得起的房源严重短缺。

meanings.meaning_en: able to burn easily

meanings.example_cn: 煤能够释放易燃气体这一点早已为人所知。

meanings.meaning_en: the details of the place where someone lives or works, which you use to send them letters etc

meanings.example_cn: 你的新地址是什么？

meanings.meaning_cn: 向致词；在信封上写姓名
meanings.meaning_en: if you address an envelope, package etc, you write on it the name and address of the person you are sending it to
meanings.example: I can give you the address of a good attorney.
meanings.example_cn: 我可以给你一个好律师的地址。

meanings.example: Consumers will not have to junk their old cassettes to use the new format.
meanings.example_cn: 消费者们将不必为了使用新制式而丢掉他们的老盒式磁带。

meanings.meaning_en: to get rid of something because it is old or useless
the opinion that people have about someone or something because of what has happened in the past
meanings.example: Alice Munro has a reputation for being a very depressing writer.
meanings.example_cn: 艾丽斯•门罗有文风抑郁的名声。

meanings.meaning_en: to block a road, passage etc

meanings.example_cn: 一架小型飞机堵住了跑道。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is put inside an envelope with a letter
