meanings.example_cn: 将耕地圈起来用作牧场

meanings.meaning_en: the telegraphic or telephonic communication of audio, video, or digital information over a distance by means of radio waves, optical signals, etc, or along a transmission line
meanings.example: If large media and telecommunication companies decide to close their offerings to the web, I am convinced the web will route around it.
meanings.example_cn: 如果大型媒体和电信公司决定停止向万维网提供内容，我很确信万维网会绕过这一点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 保管人，监护人；公共建筑看守
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is responsible for looking after something important or valuable
meanings.example: a custodian at the stadium
meanings.example_cn: 体育场看门人

meanings.meaning_en: to think seriously and deeply about something

meanings.example_cn: 在她儿子入学那天，她深思了有关他未来的种种不确定因素。

meanings.meaning_cn: (以誓言或契约等)束缚某人；施惠
meanings.example: It’s always a good idea to oblige important clients.
meanings.example_cn: 能满足重要客户的请求总是好的。

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that two people or teams are competing against each other in a game or court case
meanings.example: the New York Knicks versus the LA Lakers
meanings.example_cn: 纽约尼克斯队对洛杉矶湖人队

meanings.example: They mocked at my timidity.
meanings.example_cn: 他们耻笑我胆小。

meanings.meaning_cn: (液体)易挥发的；(人)反复无常的
meanings.meaning_en: a volatile liquid or substance changes easily into a gas
meanings.example: an increasingly volatile political situation
meanings.example_cn: 日益动荡的政治局势

meanings.meaning_en: angry and surprised because you feel insulted or unfairly treated

meanings.example_cn: 愤慨的回复

meanings.meaning_en: a large sea animal that eats fish and lives around coasts
meanings.example: The window was sealed shut.
meanings.example_cn: 这扇窗户被封了起来。

meanings.meaning_en: having the highest power in a country
meanings.example: Lithuania and Armenia signed a treaty in Vilnius recognizing each other as independent sovereign states.
meanings.example_cn: 立陶宛和亚美尼亚在维尔纽斯签订了一份互相承认各自为独立主权国家的协定。

meanings.meaning_en: very pretty or attractive
meanings.example: a cute little puppy
meanings.example_cn: 一只逗人爱的小狗

meanings.meaning_en: the science or job of planning which way you need to go when you are travelling from one place to another
meanings.example: compasses and other instruments of navigation
meanings.example_cn: 罗盘及其他导航仪器

meanings.meaning_en: if something that happens is a shock, you did not expect it, and it makes you feel very surprised, and usually upset
meanings.example: She was shaking with shock and humiliation.
meanings.example_cn: 她又是震惊，又是羞辱，身体直发抖。

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement in which a bank keeps your money safe so that you can pay more in or take money out
meanings.example: My salary is paid into my bank account.
meanings.example_cn: 我的工资直接存入我的银行账户。

meanings.example: I’ve opened an account with Barclay’s Bank.
meanings.example_cn: 我在巴克莱银行开了一个账户。

meanings.meaning_en: a large pipe or wire carrying the public supply of water, electricity, or gas
meanings.example: The report found that many of Yorkshire’s water mains needed replacing.
meanings.example_cn: 报告中说约克郡的很多自来水总管道需要更换。

meanings.meaning_en: all the plays, pieces of music etc that a performer or group knows and can perform
meanings.example: the behavioural repertoire of infants
meanings.example_cn: 婴幼儿的行为能力

meanings.example: Her eyes were void of all expression.
meanings.example_cn: 她的眼神一片茫然。

meanings.meaning_en: a word used especially in letters or speeches to introduce the subject you are writing or talking about
meanings.example: Regarding your recent inquiry, I have enclosed a copy of our new brochure.
meanings.example_cn: 关于你最近的咨询，我随信附上一本我们最新的手册。

meanings.meaning_en: an official agreement between two or more people, stating what each will do
meanings.example: Employees who refuse to relocate are in breach of contract (= have done something not allowed by their contracts ) .
meanings.example_cn: 员工拒绝调动岗位是违反合约的。

meanings.meaning_en: to get an illness
to find a satisfactory way of dealing with a problem or difficulty
meanings.example: Barnet was desperate for money to resolve his financial problems.
meanings.example_cn: 巴尼特急需钱来解决他的经济问题。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a very honest and moral way
meanings.example: a virtuous man
meanings.example_cn: 品行端正的男子

meanings.meaning_en: too strange to be believed, or very difficult to believe
meanings.example: It’s incredible that he survived the fall.
meanings.example_cn: 他跌下去竟然能够生还，真不可思议。

meanings.meaning_en: to replace or balance the effect of something bad
meanings.example: Because my left eye is so weak, my right eye has to work harder to compensate.
meanings.example_cn: 因为我左眼视力差，右眼就要辛苦点来弥补一下。

meanings.meaning_cn: 歇斯底里的, 狂热的
meanings.meaning_en: unable to control your behaviour or emotions because you are very upset, afraid, excited etc
meanings.example: Janet became hysterical and began screaming.
meanings.example_cn: 珍妮特歇斯底里起来，开始尖叫。

meanings.meaning_en: to put your arms around someone and hold them tightly to show love or friendship
meanings.example: We stood there crying and hugging each other.
meanings.example_cn: 我们站在那里哭着互相拥抱。

meanings.meaning_en: if animals or people inhabit an area or place, they live there
meanings.example: The woods are inhabited by many wild animals.
meanings.example_cn: 很多野生动物栖居在这片森林里。

meanings.meaning_en: a small tool that has two narrow pieces of metal joined at one end, used to pull or move very small objects
meanings.example: She was plucking her eyebrows with a pair of tweezers .
meanings.example_cn: 她正拿着一把小镊子在拔眉毛。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in charge of a group of workers and check that a piece of work is done satisfactorily
meanings.example: A team leader was appointed to oversee the project.
meanings.example_cn: 任命了一位组长来监管该工程。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the sides of something, or movement to the side
meanings.example: The wall is weak and requires lateral support.
meanings.example_cn: 墙体不坚固，需要从侧面加以支撑。

meanings.meaning_en: a long piece of paper that can be rolled up, and is used as an official document
meanings.example: Ancient scrolls were found in caves by the Dead Sea.
meanings.example_cn: 在死海边的洞穴里发现了古代的卷轴。

meanings.meaning_en: at or from the beginning of an event or process
meanings.example: It was clear from the outset that there were going to be problems.
meanings.example_cn: 从一开始就很清楚会有问题出现的。

meanings.meaning_en: A locker is a small metal or wooden cabinet with a lock, where you can put your personal possessions, for example in a school, place of work, or sports club
meanings.example: a meat locker
meanings.example_cn: 肉类冷藏间

meanings.meaning_en: relating to an empire or to the person who rules it
meanings.example: Britain’s imperial expansion in the 19th century
meanings.example_cn: 19世纪英帝国的扩张

meanings.meaning_en: the process of keeping something in good condition
meanings.example: Poorer people find it hard to pay for their pet’s upkeep.
meanings.example_cn: 经济不宽裕的人难以负担养宠物的开销。

meanings.meaning_en: done willingly and without being forced
meanings.example: Workers are being encouraged to take voluntary redundancy.
meanings.example_cn: 工人被鼓励主动离职。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无情的，不仁慈的，残酷的
meanings.meaning_en: strict, cruel, or determined, without ever stopping
meanings.example: her relentless determination to succeed
meanings.example_cn: 她要成功的坚定决心

meanings.meaning_en: to move smoothly and quietly, as if without effort
meanings.example: Waiters glide between tightly packed tables bearing trays of pasta.
meanings.example_cn: 侍者们托着一盘盘的意大利面食在拥挤的餐桌间自如穿行。

meanings.meaning_en: beautiful and impressive
meanings.example: All the rooms have splendid views.
meanings.example_cn: 所有的房间都能看到漂亮的景致。

meanings.meaning_cn: 怪诞的思想、行动或事件；畸形的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is considered to be very strange because of the way they look, behave, or think
meanings.example: These glasses make me look like a freak.
meanings.example_cn: 我戴这副眼镜看上去像个怪人。

meanings.meaning_en: full of energy and new ideas, and determined to succeed
meanings.example: dynamic and ambitious people
meanings.example_cn: 精力充沛且雄心勃勃的人

meanings.meaning_en: something that causes action or change
very important or basic
meanings.example: Having clean hands is one of the cardinal rules when preparing food.
meanings.example_cn: 双手洁净是准备食物时的一项最基本要求。

meanings.meaning_en: a  cardinal number
meanings.example: an issue of cardinal importance
meanings.example_cn: 至关重要的问题

meanings.meaning_en: a fine cloth made with patterns of many very small holes
meanings.example: a handkerchief trimmed with lace
meanings.example_cn: 饰有蕾丝花边的手绢

meanings.meaning_en: a derelict building or piece of land is in very bad condition because it has not been used for a long time
meanings.example: Her body was found dumped in a derelict warehouse less than a mile from her home.
meanings.example_cn: 她的尸体被发现丢在离她家不到一英里的一座废弃的仓库里。

meanings.meaning_en: able to continue to live or to develop into a living thing
meanings.example: viable seeds
meanings.example_cn: 可存活的种子

meanings.meaning_en: A fusion of different qualities, ideas, or things is something new that is created by joining them together
meanings.example: His previous fusions of jazz, pop and African melodies have proved highly successful.
meanings.example_cn: 他先前对爵士乐、流行乐和非洲音乐旋律的融合已经证明是非常成功的。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement that something will happen in the future, especially one made by someone with religious or magic powers
meanings.example: She had the gift of prophecy.
meanings.example_cn: 她有预言的天赋。

meanings.meaning_cn: 自我，自己，个人思考和感觉能力
meanings.meaning_en: the opinion that you have about yourself
meanings.example: That promotion really boosted her ego (= made her feel better about herself ).
meanings.example_cn: 那次晋升确实增强了她的自信心。

meanings.meaning_en: having large strong muscles
meanings.example: She was fast and strong, with a slender, muscular body.
meanings.example_cn: 她动作敏捷，身体强壮，身材苗条，肌肉结实。

meanings.meaning_en: the outside of something, especially a building
meanings.example: The dome is tiled on the exterior.
meanings.example_cn: 穹顶表面铺了瓦片。

meanings.meaning_en: to provide someone with a place to stay, live, or work
meanings.example: The island was used to accommodate child refugees.
meanings.example_cn: 该岛用于收容儿童难民。

meanings.meaning_en: to disobey or do something against an official agreement, law, principle etc
meanings.example: 34 protesters were arrested for violating criminal law.
meanings.example_cn: 34名抗议者因违反刑法而被逮捕。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling unhappy because someone has something that you wish you had
meanings.example: She got insanely jealous and there was a terrible fight.
meanings.example_cn: 她变得过分地猜忌，接着是一场激烈的打斗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 创始，着手，介绍某人为(会员等)
meanings.example: They have decided to initiate legal proceedings against the newspaper.
meanings.example_cn: 他们决定向该报提起法律诉讼。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance used for building that is made by mixing sand, small stones,  cement  , and water
meanings.example: The posts have to be set in concrete.
meanings.example_cn: 这些柱子必须固定在混凝土中。

meanings.meaning_en: definite and specific
to cover something such as a path, wall etc with concrete
a political situation in which people protest or behave violently
meanings.example: There is growing unrest throughout the country.
meanings.example_cn: 全国各地日益动荡不安。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a formal request, usually written, for something such as a job, a place at a university, or permission to do something
meanings.example: We need to apply for planning permission to build a garage.
meanings.example_cn: 我们建车库需要申请规划许可。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which there is a lot of damage or a lack of order, especially so that it is difficult for something to continue in the normal way
meanings.example: policies that would wreak havoc on the country’s economy
meanings.example_cn: 会危害该国经济的政策

meanings.meaning_en: a large printed notice, picture, or photograph, used to advertise something or as a decoration
meanings.example: A team of volunteers were putting up posters .
meanings.example_cn: 一队志愿者正在张贴海报。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something become twisted and caught in a rope, net etc
meanings.example: The blade of the oar had entangled itself with the strap of her bag.
meanings.example_cn: 桨叶和她包的带子紧紧缠在了一起。

meanings.meaning_en: to force people to leave a place or organization because the people in power do not like them
meanings.example: Anorexics may overeat before purging themselves or vomiting.
meanings.example_cn: 厌食症患者会在暴饮暴食之后服用泻药或者把吃下去的东西呕吐出来。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who officially introduces or supports a proposal for a new law
meanings.example: Dozens of companies, including Hewlett-Packard, are sponsoring the event.
meanings.example_cn: 包括惠普在内的许多公司都在赞助这项赛事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 标题；题目；称号；法律权利，所有权
meanings.meaning_en: the name given to a particular book, painting, play etc
meanings.example: "Patience and Sarah" was first published in 1969 under the title "A Place for Us."
meanings.example_cn: 《耐心与萨拉》于1969年以《我们的地方》为书名首次出版。

meanings.meaning_en: a  steamship
the feeling that someone or something is stupid or does not deserve respect
meanings.example: Researchers greeted the proposal with scorn.
meanings.example_cn: 研究者们对这个提议报以轻蔑的态度。

meanings.meaning_en: the force that keeps an object in the same position or keeps it moving until it is moved or stopped by another force
meanings.example: political inertia
meanings.example_cn: 政治上的保守

meanings.meaning_en: a short performance by an actor, singer etc that someone watches to judge if they are good enough to act in a play, sing in a concert etc
meanings.example: ...an audition for a Broadway musical.
meanings.example_cn: …一部百老汇歌舞剧的试演。

meanings.meaning_en: a field with wild grass and flowers
meanings.example: The meadow has been ploughed up.
meanings.example_cn: 那片草地已用犁翻过。

meanings.meaning_en: to look after someone very kindly, for example by giving them the things that they want and making them feel warm and comfortable
meanings.example: She spent her childhood as the pampered daughter of a wealthy family.
meanings.example_cn: 她出身于一个富裕家庭，从小娇生惯养。

meanings.meaning_en: a  memo
meanings.example: ...a memorandum from the Department of Defense on its role.
meanings.example_cn: …一份来自国防部的有关其角色的备忘录。

meanings.meaning_en: slow and unwilling
meanings.example: She gave a reluctant smile.
meanings.example_cn: 她勉强笑了笑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 褴褛的，外形参差不齐的
meanings.meaning_en: wearing clothes that are old and torn
meanings.example: Crowds of ragged children played among the rocks.
meanings.example_cn: 一群群破衣烂衫的孩子在岩石间玩耍。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the long thin parts of a sea creature such as an  octopus  which it uses for holding things
meanings.example: Free speech is being gradually eroded year after year by new tentacles of government control.
meanings.example_cn: 言论自由正被政府控制的新触角逐渐侵蚀。

meanings.meaning_en: related to land that is owned or controlled by a particular country
meanings.example: a territorial dispute
meanings.example_cn: 领土争端

meanings.meaning_en: a book that you put photographs, stamps etc in
meanings.example: a photograph album
meanings.example_cn: 相册

meanings.meaning_en: to make something return to its former state or condition
meanings.example: She was hoping that the Mediterranean climate would restore her to full health.
meanings.example_cn: 她希望地中海的气候能使她的身体完全复原。

meanings.meaning_cn: 爬行；缓慢移行；(时间)悄悄过去；蔓延
meanings.meaning_en: if something such as an insect, small animal, or car creeps, it moves slowly and quietly
meanings.example: He crept back up the stairs, trying to avoid the ones that creaked.
meanings.example_cn: 他蹑手蹑脚地回楼上，尽量避开那些嘎吱作响的梯级。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce something, for example by putting the different parts of it together
meanings.example: I’m going to show you how to make a box for your tools.
meanings.example_cn: 我来教你怎么做一个箱子存放工具。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten or connect one object to another
meanings.example: It’s easy to become attached to the children you work with.
meanings.example_cn: 你很容易就会喜欢上工作中接触到的孩子。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the large groups of stars that make up the universe
meanings.example: Astronomers have discovered a distant galaxy.
meanings.example_cn: 天文学家们发现了一个遥远的星系。

meanings.meaning_en: to experience something, especially problems or opposition
meanings.example: The doctor had encountered several similar cases in the past.
meanings.example_cn: 那位医生过去曾碰到过好几个类似病例。

meanings.meaning_en: a large case with a handle, used for carrying clothes and possessions when you travel
meanings.example: It did not take Andrew long to pack a suitcase.
meanings.example_cn: 安德鲁没有用多长时间就整理好了手提箱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分隔栏；售货摊；前排座位
meanings.meaning_en: a table or a small shop with an open front, especially outdoors, where goods are sold
meanings.example: a market stall
meanings.example_cn: 市场摊位

meanings.meaning_en: People who are part of a particular staff are often referred to as staff
meanings.example: 10 staff were allocated to the task.
meanings.example_cn: 10名员工被分派做这项任务。

meanings.meaning_en: to reduce or limit something
meanings.example: The new law will curtail police powers.
meanings.example_cn: 这条新法规将削弱警方的权力。

meanings.meaning_cn: vi大声哀号，恸哭；呼啸，尖啸
meanings.meaning_en: to say something in a loud, sad, and complaining way
meanings.example: ‘But what shall I do?’ Bernard wailed.
meanings.example_cn: “但我该怎么办呢？”伯纳德哭喊道。

meanings.example: This gives you the opportunity to pray for and bless the other thereby blessing yourself.
meanings.example_cn: 它其实是给了你一个机会，去为他人祈祷和祝福，从而赐福给你自己。

meanings.meaning_en: not very good
meanings.example: I thought the book was pretty mediocre.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为这本书非常一般。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of lower land between two lines of hills or mountains, usually with a river flowing through it
meanings.example: the San Fernando Valley
meanings.example_cn: 圣费尔南多山谷

meanings.meaning_en: willingness to allow people to do, say, or believe what they want without criticizing or punishing them
meanings.example: ...his tolerance and understanding of diverse human nature.
meanings.example_cn: …他对各种人性的宽容和理解。

meanings.meaning_en: known and admired by a lot of people, especially for a special skill, achievement, or quality
meanings.example: The area is renowned for its Romanesque churches.
meanings.example_cn: 这个地区以其罗马式教堂闻名。

meanings.meaning_en: a secret plan made by two or more people to do something that is harmful or illegal
meanings.example: There were many conspiracy theories (= beliefs that something is the result of a conspiracy ) surrounding Princess Diana’s death.
meanings.example_cn: 围绕戴安娜王妃之死有许多阴谋论。

meanings.meaning_en: a system of rules about the correct way to behave on an official occasion
meanings.example: a breach of diplomatic protocol
meanings.example_cn: 违反外交礼节

meanings.meaning_en: if you have a picnic, you take food and eat it outdoors, especially in the country
meanings.example: We decided to have a picnic down by the lake.
meanings.example_cn: 我们决定在湖边野餐。

meanings.meaning_en: if a very bright light dazzles you, it stops you from seeing properly for a short time
meanings.example: a deer dazzled by the headlights
meanings.example_cn: 被车头灯光照得目眩的鹿

meanings.meaning_en: when someone becomes ill or weak because they have not eaten enough good food
meanings.example: refugees suffering from malnutrition
meanings.example_cn: 营养不良的难民

meanings.meaning_en: a very bad situation that someone is in
meanings.example: the country’s economic plight
meanings.example_cn: 该国的经济困境

meanings.meaning_en: to affect someone or something in an unpleasant way, and make them suffer
a liquid or powder used for washing clothes, dishes etc
meanings.example: ...a brand of detergent.
meanings.example_cn: …一种品牌的清洁剂。

meanings.meaning_en: if something engrosses you, it interests you so much that you do not notice anything else
meanings.example: The scene was stunning, and for a time engrossed all our attention.
meanings.example_cn: 景色非常美丽，一时间把我们都完全吸引住了。

meanings.meaning_en: a written or printed copy of a piece of music, especially for a large group of performers, or the music itself
meanings.example: a musical score
meanings.example_cn: 乐谱

meanings.meaning_cn: 难使用的，笨拙的；尴尬的
meanings.meaning_en: making you feel embarrassed so that you are not sure what to do or say
meanings.example: I hoped he would stop asking awkward questions .
meanings.example_cn: 我希望他不要再问令人难堪的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to save something or someone from being harmed or destroyed
meanings.example: We must encourage the planting of new trees and preserve our existing woodlands.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须鼓励栽种新树木，同时也要保护现有的林地。

meanings.meaning_en: if a plan, project etc comes to fruition, it is successfully put into action and completed, often after a long process
meanings.example: Some of the current FSA investigations are expected to reach fruition in the next six months, one person said.
meanings.example_cn: 一人说，目前正在进行的部分金融服务管理局调查有望在未来六个月完成。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin stick with a curved handle that you can use to help you walk
meanings.example: Children knew that if they misbehaved they would get the cane .
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们知道，如果调皮捣蛋的话就会挨藤条。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent something from growing or developing well
meanings.example: An unhappy family life may inhibit children’s learning.
meanings.example_cn: 不幸福的家庭生活可能会阻碍儿童的学习。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who operates the controls of an aircraft or spacecraft
meanings.example: an airline pilot
meanings.example_cn: 航空公司飞行员

meanings.meaning_en: a way of thinking about something that seems correct and reasonable, or a set of sensible reasons for doing something
meanings.example: There isa certain logicin their choice of architect.
meanings.example_cn: 他们对建筑师的选择是有一定道理的。

meanings.meaning_en: very great or very noticeable
meanings.example: He showed a singular lack of tact in the way he handled the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 他处理这局面的方式显得极不得体。

meanings.meaning_en: the place where the souls of bad people are believed to be punished after death, especially in the Christian and Muslim religions
meanings.example: War is hell.
meanings.example_cn: 战争是人间地狱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 实行的；注重实际的，实用的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to real situations and events rather than ideas, emotions etc
meanings.example: Candidates should have training and practical experience in basic electronics.
meanings.example_cn: 应征者应该具备基础电子学方面的培训和实践经验。

meanings.meaning_en: a plane, bus, or train that makes regular short journeys between two places
meanings.example: He took the Washington - New York shuttle.
meanings.example_cn: 他乘坐华盛顿－纽约的往返班机。

meanings.meaning_en: to travel frequently between two places
meanings.example: A shuttle bus operates to and from the beach of San Benedetto.
meanings.example_cn: 有穿梭巴士往返于圣贝内代托海滩。

meanings.example: “By investing in it, we can count it as an offset,” she said.
meanings.example_cn: 她说：“通过对其投资，我们可以把它视为一项补偿。”

meanings.meaning_en: the things that will happen to someone in the future, especially those that cannot be changed or controlled
meanings.example: She always had a strong sense of destiny .
meanings.example_cn: 她向来很相信天意。

meanings.meaning_en: a mental or physical illness which prevents part of your body from working properly
meanings.example: severe eating disorders such as bulimia and anorexia
meanings.example_cn: 像贪食症和厌食症这类严重的进食障碍

meanings.meaning_en: a statement saying that something is not true
meanings.example: It seems clear that despite official denials, differences of opinion lay behind the ambassador's decision to quit.
meanings.example_cn: 很清楚，尽管官方否认，人们对大使决定辞职还是有不同看法。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell a story, especially using a lot of imagination
meanings.example: She spun a story about a trip to Athens to meet one of the authors.
meanings.example_cn: 她编了一个故事，说是去雅典见了其中的一位作者。

meanings.meaning_en: the beginning of something, especially something bad
meanings.example: the onset of winter
meanings.example_cn: 冬天的来临

meanings.meaning_en: a native ability is one that you have naturally from birth
meanings.example: her native wit
meanings.example_cn: 她天生的机智风趣

meanings.meaning_cn: 过分劳累的，过度兴奋的
meanings.example: Clara was tired and overwrought after all the problems of the last few days.
meanings.example_cn: 经历了过去几天的重重困难之后，克拉拉既疲惫又紧张。

meanings.meaning_en: to cook something, such as meat, in an  oven  or over a fire, or to cook in this way
meanings.example: Are you going to roast the chicken?
meanings.example_cn: 这鸡你是准备烤的吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 环视，眺望；测量；勘定；检查；概述
meanings.meaning_en: a set of questions that you ask a large number of people in order to find out about their opinions or behaviour
meanings.example: a survey of modern English literature
meanings.example_cn: 现代英国文学概论

meanings.meaning_en: a side view of someone’s head
meanings.example: Dani has a lovely profile.
meanings.example_cn: 达尼的侧面轮廓很好看。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal’s baby or babies
meanings.example: a lion and its offspring
meanings.example_cn: 一头狮子和它的幼崽

meanings.meaning_cn: 可实行的；能用的，可行的
meanings.meaning_en: a practicable way of doing something is possible in a particular situation
meanings.example: The only practicable course of action is to sell the company.
meanings.example_cn: 唯一可行的做法是把公司卖掉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 卸货；排出(液体，气体)；释放
meanings.meaning_en: to send out gas, liquid, smoke etc, or to allow it to escape
meanings.example: Hospitals now tend to discharge patients earlier than in the past.
meanings.example_cn: 与过去相比，现在医院更趋向于让病人早些出院。

meanings.meaning_en: a large group of people who sing together
meanings.example: I sing with the university chorus.
meanings.example_cn: 我在大学合唱队里唱歌。

meanings.meaning_en: a law passed by a parliament, council etc and formally written down
meanings.example: Protection for the consumer is laid down by statute (= established by law ) .
meanings.example_cn: 保障消费者权益已有法律明文规定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 纬度；地区；(言论，行动的)自由
meanings.meaning_en: the distance north or south of the equator(= the imaginary line around the middle of the world ), measured in degrees
meanings.example: The birds breed in northern latitudes.
meanings.example_cn: 这些鸟在北纬地区繁殖。

meanings.meaning_en: to decay by a gradual natural process, or to make something do this
meanings.example: Candy will rot your teeth.
meanings.example_cn: 吃糖会腐蚀牙齿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 阶段；月的盈亏；方面;相位vt按计划进行
meanings.meaning_en: one of the stages of a process of development or change
meanings.example: a new drug that is in the experimental phase
meanings.example_cn: 处于试验阶段的一种新药

meanings.example: He ruffled her hair affectionately.
meanings.example_cn: 他亲昵地拨弄她的头发。

meanings.meaning_en: very different from each other
meanings.example: subjects as diverse as pop music and archaeology
meanings.example_cn: 像流行音乐和考古学这样各不相同的学科

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a way that is morally wrong
meanings.example: the wicked stepmother in ‘Hansel and Gretel’
meanings.example_cn: 《糖果屋》中那个恶毒的继母

meanings.meaning_en: to not include someone or something, either deliberately or because you forget to do it
meanings.example: Please don’t omit any details, no matter how trivial they may seem.
meanings.example_cn: 请不要忽略任何细节，不管它多细小。

meanings.meaning_en: a document showing that someone has successfully completed a course of study or passed an examination
meanings.example: I’m hoping to get my teaching diploma this year.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望今年能拿到教师证书。

meanings.meaning_cn: 裂缝，破裂声；v使破裂；噼啪作响；解开
meanings.meaning_en: a very narrow space between two things or two parts of something
meanings.example: She opened the door a crack and peeped into the room.
meanings.example_cn: 她把门打开一条缝，往房间里偷看。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that you send to pay for something
meanings.example: Please enclose your remittance, making checks payable to Valley Technology Services.
meanings.example_cn: 请随信附上您的汇款，支票收款方为瓦利科技服务公司。

meanings.meaning_en: if something vibrates, or if you vibrate it, it shakes quickly and continuously with very small movements
meanings.example: The floor was vibrating to the beat of the music.
meanings.example_cn: 地板随着音乐的节奏在颤动。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious argument about something that involves many people and continues for a long time
meanings.example: a political controversy
meanings.example_cn: 政治争议

meanings.meaning_en: an extremely small living thing which you can only see if you use a  microscope  . Some microbes can cause diseases.
meanings.example: ...a type of bacteria that include the microbes responsible for tuberculosis and leprosy.
meanings.example_cn: …包括引起结核病和麻风病的微生物在内的一类细菌。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent someone’s plans, efforts, or attempts from succeeding
meanings.example: Their attempts to speak to him were frustrated by the guards.
meanings.example_cn: 他们想跟他说话，但被警卫拦住了。

meanings.meaning_en: a sign of what will happen in the future
meanings.example: The car won’t start. Do you think it’s an omen?
meanings.example_cn: 汽车发动不起来。你觉得这是某种预兆吗？

meanings.meaning_en: If a situation or action is fraught with problems or risks, it is filled with them
meanings.example: The earliest operations employing this technique were fraught with dangers.
meanings.example_cn: 最早采用这一技术的手术充满了危险。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something publicly known, especially after it has been kept secret
meanings.example: Some companies have already voluntarily disclosed similar information .
meanings.example_cn: 一些公司已经主动透露了类似的信息。

meanings.example: The food was superb.
meanings.example_cn: 食物好吃极了。

meanings.meaning_en: having a natural ability to do something well
meanings.example: a talented actor
meanings.example_cn: 一名很有天赋的演员

meanings.meaning_en: Hydrogen is a colourless gas that is the lightest and commonest element in the universe
meanings.example: Water contains hydrogen and oxygen.
meanings.example_cn: 水含有氢和氧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不流动的；不变的，不景气的
meanings.meaning_en: stagnant water or air does not move or flow and often smells bad
meanings.example: a stagnant pond
meanings.example_cn: 死水塘

meanings.meaning_en: something that makes it difficult to achieve some­thing
meanings.example: The tax puts obstacles in the way of companies trying to develop trade overseas.
meanings.example_cn: 这项税收为想在海外发展贸易的公司设置了障碍。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a liquid or other substance flow out of or into a container by holding it at an angle
meanings.example: She poured coffee for everyone.
meanings.example_cn: 她为每个人都倒了咖啡。

meanings.meaning_cn: 呼吸作用；一次呼吸；植物光合作用
meanings.meaning_en: the process of breathing
meanings.example: His respiration grew fainter throughout the day.
meanings.example_cn: 一天当中，他的呼吸越来越微弱。

meanings.meaning_en: if you are aware that a situation exists, you realize or know that it exists
meanings.example: Mr Braley has been made aware of the need for absolute secrecy.
meanings.example_cn: 布雷利先生被告知需要绝对保密。

meanings.meaning_cn: 各部分组成的，各阶层或不同部分的
meanings.example: community groups seeking to protect sectional interests
meanings.example_cn: 致力保护群体利益的社区组织

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which there are a lot of problems that must be dealt with quickly so that the situation does not get worse or more dangerous
meanings.example: The country now faces an economic crisis .
meanings.example_cn: 该国目前正面临一场经济危机。

meanings.meaning_en: to obtain something, especially something that is difficult to get
meanings.example: It remained very difficult to procure food, fuel, and other daily necessities.
meanings.example_cn: 当时仍然很难获得食品、燃料和其他日用必需品。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a gun that you pull with your finger to fire it
meanings.example: A man pointed a gun at them and pulled the trigger.
meanings.example_cn: 一个男人用枪指着他们，扣动了扳机。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something happen very quickly, especially a series of events
clearly separate
meanings.example: The change happens in a series of discrete steps.
meanings.example_cn: 这个变化在一系列分离的步骤中发生。

meanings.meaning_en: to become firm, steady, or unchanging, or to make something firm or steady
meanings.example: The patient’s condition has now stabilized.
meanings.example_cn: 病人的情况现已稳定下来了。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where young children are taken care of during the day while their parents are at work
meanings.example: He has painted murals in his children's nursery.
meanings.example_cn: 他在他家的育儿室画上了壁画。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly right for a particular situation or purpose
meanings.example: ‘Love at first sight’ is a very apt description of how he felt when he saw her.
meanings.example_cn: 用“一见钟情”来形容他见到她时的感觉再恰当不过。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin piece of rope or leather with a handle, that you hit animals with to make them move or that you hit someone with to punish them
meanings.example: The coachman cracked his whip and the carriage lurched forward.
meanings.example_cn: 马车夫甩了一记响鞭，马车猛然向前冲去。

meanings.meaning_en: to hit someone or something with a whip
to come together to publicly express disapproval or opposition to something
meanings.example: ‘I don’t see why I should take the blame for this!’ she protested.
meanings.example_cn: “我不明白为什么我要对此承担责任！”她抗议道。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you do to show publicly that you think that something is wrong and unfair, for example taking part in big public meetings, refusing to work, or refusing to buy a company’s products
the top part of your leg, between your knee and your  hip
meanings.example: chicken thighs
meanings.example_cn: 鸡腿

meanings.meaning_en: if liquid trickles somewhere, it flows slowly in drops or in a thin stream
meanings.example: The water in the stream had been reduced to a trickle.
meanings.example_cn: 小溪里的水已只剩下一股细流。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you get because you have done something good or helpful or have worked hard
meanings.example: The school has a system of rewards and punishments to encourage good behaviour.
meanings.example_cn: 学校有奖惩制度以鼓励良好行为。

meanings.example: The bill would have outlawed several types of guns.
meanings.example_cn: 这项法案将全面禁用几种枪支。

meanings.meaning_en: to completely stop something by making it illegal
a metal tool with a sharp edge, used to cut wood or stone
meanings.example: He set out to chisel a dog out of sandstone.
meanings.example_cn: 他开始用凿子将砂岩雕刻成一只狗。

meanings.meaning_en: a principle about what is morally right or a perfect standard that you hope to achieve
meanings.example: Walt Disney stayed true to his ideals.
meanings.example_cn: 沃尔特·迪斯尼坚持他的理想。

meanings.meaning_en: the best or most suitable that something could possibly be
a metal pin used to fasten pieces of metal together
meanings.example: The West Ham crest features two crossed rivet hammers and the club has been known has the Hammers ever since
meanings.example_cn: 球队的队徽上有两个交叉的铆钉锤，这也让人们把球队和铁锤联系在一起。

meanings.meaning_cn: 铆接，铆牢；集中(目光或注意力)
meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something with rivets
treating all people in a fair and equal way
meanings.example: an equitable distribution of food supplies
meanings.example_cn: 所供应食品的合理分配

meanings.meaning_en: a book in which words are put into groups with other words that have similar meanings
to enter something and pass or spread through it, especially when this is difficult
meanings.example: bullets that penetrate thick armour plating
meanings.example_cn: 穿过厚装甲的子弹

meanings.meaning_en: if a hollow part of your body dilates or if something dilates it, it becomes wider
meanings.example: dilated pupils
meanings.example_cn: 扩大的瞳孔

meanings.meaning_en: to take part in an activity or event
meanings.example: Some members refused to participate.
meanings.example_cn: 有些会员拒绝参加。

meanings.meaning_en: a condition in an agreement or law
meanings.example: The agreement includes a provision for each side to check the other side’s weapons.
meanings.example_cn: 协议有项规定，允许双方互查武器。

meanings.meaning_en: to say something in a strong way
meanings.example: The report emphasizes the importance of improving safety standards.
meanings.example_cn: 报告强调了改进安全标准的重要性。

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow piece of wooden board, used especially for making structures to walk on
meanings.example: a long plank of wood
meanings.example_cn: 一长条厚木板

meanings.meaning_cn: 给船装帆;为提供必要装备
meanings.meaning_en: to put ropes, sails etc on a ship
meanings.example: The ship was fully rigged and ready to sail.
meanings.example_cn: 船已装备就绪，等待起航。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two parts of a bicycle that you push round with your feet to make the bicycle go forward
meanings.example: She put her foot down on the accelerator pedal.
meanings.example_cn: 她踩下了油门踏板。

meanings.meaning_en: not producing a chemical reaction when combined with other substances
meanings.example: inert gases
meanings.example_cn: 惰性气体

meanings.example: You have probably heard of this tactic before.
meanings.example_cn: 你以前也可能听说过这个策略。

meanings.meaning_en: a disease that causes death and spreads quickly to a large number of people
meanings.example: drops in population levels due to plagues and famines
meanings.example_cn: 瘟疫和饥荒造成的人口水平下降

meanings.meaning_en: to have earned something by good or bad actions or behaviour
meanings.example: What have I done to deserve this?
meanings.example_cn: 我做了什么事，要得到这样的报应？

meanings.meaning_cn: 通讯，交往，交流，传达的消息；交通
meanings.meaning_en: the process by which people exchange information or express their thoughts and feelings
meanings.example: Good communication is vital in a large organization.
meanings.example_cn: 在大机构里良好的沟通是极为重要的。

meanings.meaning_en: a place, often in a hospital, where medical treatment is given to people who do not need to stay in the hospital
meanings.example: an appointment at an outpatient clinic
meanings.example_cn: 门诊预约

meanings.meaning_en: a hard silver-white metal that is often combined with other metals, for example to make steel. It is a chemical element: symbol Ni
meanings.example: ...a large glass jar filled with pennies, nickels, dimes, and quarters.
meanings.example_cn: …一个装满1分、5分、10分和25分硬币的大玻璃罐。

meanings.meaning_cn: 整齐的；有秩序的；有条不紊的
meanings.meaning_en: arranged or organized in a sensible or neat way
meanings.example: She needs to organize her ideas in a more orderly way.
meanings.example_cn: 她需要把自己的想法组织得更有条理些。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of trust or confidence in someone or something
meanings.example: People have lost faith in the government.
meanings.example_cn: 人们已失去了对政府的信心。

meanings.meaning_en: to change a plan or situation in a way that causes problems
meanings.example: The chemicals upset the balance of the environment.
meanings.example_cn: 这些化学品破坏了环境的平衡。

meanings.meaning_cn: 故意毁坏，故意破坏，阴谋
meanings.meaning_en: deliberate damage that is done to equipment, vehicles etc in order to prevent an enemy or opponent from using them
meanings.example: The terrorists were planning acts of sabotage to destabilize the country.
meanings.example_cn: 恐怖分子在策划破坏国家安定的行动。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin flat piece of food cut from a larger piece
meanings.example: pizza slices
meanings.example_cn: 比萨块

meanings.meaning_en: to cut meat, bread, vegetables etc into thin flat pieces
meanings.example: Cut the tomatoes into slices .
meanings.example_cn: 把番茄切成片。

meanings.meaning_en: an exciting and unusual experience or situation you imagine happening to you, but which will probably never happen
meanings.example: I used to have fantasies about living in Paris with an artist.
meanings.example_cn: 我过去常幻想着在巴黎与一位艺术家同住。

meanings.meaning_en: if an official document expires, it can no longer be legally used
meanings.example: My passport expires next week.
meanings.example_cn: 我的护照下周就到期了。

meanings.meaning_en: an iron ring on a chain that is put around the wrist or  ankle  of a prisoner
meanings.example: His hands were manacled behind his back.
meanings.example_cn: 他的双手被铐在了身后。

meanings.meaning_en: If a prisoner is manacled, their wrists or legs are put in manacles in order to prevent them from moving or escaping
meanings.example: He was manacled by the police.
meanings.example_cn: 他被警察上了镣铐。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of training someone so that they learn to control their behaviour and obey rules
meanings.example: The book gives parents advice on discipline.
meanings.example_cn: 这本书指导父母如何管教孩子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 恶臭的；邪恶的；暴风雨的n犯规v弄脏
meanings.meaning_en: a foul smell or taste is very unpleasant
meanings.example: He woke up with a foul taste in his mouth.
meanings.example_cn: 他醒过来，嘴里一股臭味。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a god or religion
meanings.example: a sacred vow
meanings.example_cn: 神圣的誓言

meanings.meaning_en: to think that something is probably true, especially something bad
meanings.example: She strongly suspected he was lying to her.
meanings.example_cn: 她非常怀疑他在对她撒谎。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is thought to be guilty of a crime
meanings.example: She’s not going to be very happy about this, I suspect .
meanings.example_cn: 我想对于此事她不会太高兴。

meanings.meaning_en: not likely to be completely true
the front part of your head, where your eyes, nose, and mouth are
meanings.example: She had a beautiful face.
meanings.example_cn: 她面容秀美。

meanings.meaning_en: to accept that a difficult situation or problem exists, even though you would prefer to ignore it
meanings.example: Her face was white with fear.
meanings.example_cn: 她吓得脸煞白。

meanings.meaning_en: a description of events in a story, especially in a novel
meanings.example: At several points in the narrative the two stories cross.
meanings.example_cn: 叙述中两条故事线多次交织在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: An oblong is a shape which has two long sides and two short sides and in which all the angles are right angles
meanings.example: ...an oblong table.
meanings.example_cn: ...一张长方形桌子。

meanings.meaning_en: when you decide not to have something valuable, in order to get something that is more important
meanings.example: The minister stressed the need for economic sacrifice.
meanings.example_cn: 部长强调了在经济上作出牺牲的必要性。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone calm, quiet, and satisfied after they have been angry or upset
meanings.example: ‘You’re right,’ Rita said, in order to pacify him.
meanings.example_cn: “你是对的。”丽塔安抚他道。

meanings.meaning_en: a drug, usually in the form of a white powder, that is taken illegally for pleasure or used in some medical situations to prevent pain
meanings.example: The police report said she was doing cocaine.
meanings.example_cn: 警方报告说她正在吸可卡因。

meanings.meaning_cn: 解释，说明，认为的意思；口译
meanings.meaning_en: to translate spoken words from one language into another
meanings.example: They spoke good Spanish, and promised to interpret for me.
meanings.example_cn: 他们西班牙语说得很好，答应替我翻译。

meanings.meaning_en: if a situation is conducive to something such as work, rest etc, it provides conditions that make it easy for you to work etc
meanings.example: an environment conducive to learning
meanings.example_cn: 有助于学习的环境

meanings.meaning_en: to shake slightly in a way that you cannot control, especially because you are upset or frightened
meanings.example: His lip started to tremble and then he started to cry.
meanings.example_cn: 他的嘴唇开始颤抖，接着就哭了起来。

meanings.meaning_en: a small box made of  cardboard  or plastic that contains food or a drink
meanings.example: a milk carton
meanings.example_cn: 牛奶盒

meanings.meaning_en: to die, especially in a terrible or sudden way
meanings.example: Hundreds perished when the ship went down.
meanings.example_cn: 轮船沉没，数百人罹难。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone scatters a lot of things, or if they scatter, they are thrown or dropped over a wide area in an irregular way
meanings.example: The sound of gunfire made the crowd scatter in all directions.
meanings.example_cn: 枪声使人群四散奔逃。

meanings.meaning_cn: 紧张局势；情绪紧张；不安状态
meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that exists when people or countries do not trust each other and may suddenly attack each other or start arguing
meanings.example: The tension was becoming unbearable, and I wanted to scream.
meanings.example_cn: 这种紧张变得难以忍受，我真想大声尖叫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 把某人排除在外，排除(可能性等)
meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately not include something
meanings.example: a special diet that excludes dairy products
meanings.example_cn: 不包含奶制品的特别食谱

meanings.meaning_en: a small thin piece that breaks away easily from something else
meanings.example: chocolate flakes
meanings.example_cn: 巧克力薄片

meanings.meaning_en: to stay somewhere a little longer, especially because you do not want to leave
meanings.example: I spent a week at Kandersteg and could happily have lingered on.
meanings.example_cn: 我在坎德施泰格逗留了一个星期，本来还可以开开心心地多待几天。

meanings.meaning_en: a round flat piece of rubber used for stopping the water flowing out of a bath or  sink
meanings.example: the bath plug
meanings.example_cn: 浴缸塞子

meanings.meaning_en: an agreement between enemies to stop fighting or arguing for a short time, or the period for which this is arranged
meanings.example: They agreed to call a truce .
meanings.example_cn: 他们同意宣布休战。

meanings.meaning_en: a subject or problem that is often discussed or argued about, especially a social or political matter that affects the interests of a lot of people
meanings.example: Abortion is a highly controversial issue.
meanings.example_cn: 堕胎是个很有争议的话题。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially make a statement, give an order, warning etc
meanings.example: We should raise the issue of discrimination with the council.
meanings.example_cn: 我们应提请市政会讨论歧视的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: a list that shows the times that buses, trains etc leave or arrive at a particular place
meanings.example: How can he fit everything into his busy schedule ?
meanings.example_cn: 他是怎么把所有的事情都排进自己忙碌的时间表的？

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring length, equal to three feet or 0.91 metres
meanings.example: a hundred yards away
meanings.example_cn: 100码外

meanings.meaning_cn: (江河、海洋)可航行的，可通航的
meanings.meaning_en: a river, lake etc that is navigable is deep and wide enough for ships to travel on
meanings.example: ...the navigable portion of the Nile.
meanings.example_cn: ...尼罗河的适航河段。

meanings.meaning_cn: 感情强烈的；热烈的；(人)有强烈感情的
meanings.meaning_en: showing very strong feelings or opinions
meanings.example: She suddenly became very vehement and agitated, jumping around and shouting.
meanings.example_cn: 她突然变得十分激动和不安，四处暴跳并大喊大叫。

meanings.meaning_en: to completely get rid of something that is unnecessary or unwanted
meanings.example: a ruthless dictator who eliminated all his rivals
meanings.example_cn: 铲除所有异己的残酷独裁者

meanings.meaning_cn: 偏见，成见；(法律)损害，伤害
meanings.meaning_en: an un-reasonable dislike and distrust of people who are different from you in some way, especially because of their race, sex, religion etc – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Women still face prejudice in the workplace.
meanings.example_cn: 女性在职场中仍然面临歧视。

meanings.meaning_en: having two of something or two parts
meanings.example: a dual system of education
meanings.example_cn: 二元[双元]教育体系

meanings.example: She packed a few essentials.
meanings.example_cn: 她把几件生活必需品装进箱子。

meanings.meaning_en: If people promote something, they help or encourage it to happen, increase, or spread
meanings.example: You don't have to sacrifice environmental protection to promote economic growth.
meanings.example_cn: 你们没有必要牺牲环保来促进经济增长。

meanings.meaning_en: used to thank someone in a polite way or to say that you are grateful for something they have done
meanings.example: Thanks ever so much for your help, I really appreciate it.
meanings.example_cn: 多谢你的帮助，我真的很感激。

meanings.meaning_en: a short sentence or phrase giving a rule on how to behave, which expresses the aims or beliefs of a person, school, or institution
meanings.example: ‘Be prepared’ is the motto of the Boy Scouts.
meanings.example_cn: “时刻准备着”是童子军的格言。

meanings.meaning_en: if a small child toddles, it walks with short, unsteady steps
meanings.example: ...once your baby starts toddling.
meanings.example_cn: ...一旦你的小孩开始蹒跚学步。

meanings.meaning_en: an angry and often violent quarrel between two people or groups that continues for a long time
meanings.example: Insults only served to inflame the feud.
meanings.example_cn: 侮辱只是起到了加剧长期不和的作用。

meanings.meaning_en: an official process of counting a country’s population and finding out about the people
meanings.example: a traffic census
meanings.example_cn: 交通状况调查

meanings.meaning_cn: (语言、词汇等)古代的，已不通用的
meanings.meaning_en: old and no longer used
meanings.example: archaic words
meanings.example_cn: 古词

meanings.meaning_en: if a solid dissolves, or if you dissolve it, it mixes with a liquid and becomes part of it
meanings.example: Stir until the sugar dissolves.
meanings.example_cn: 一直搅拌到糖溶解掉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 运货人；带菌者；运输军队的交通工具
meanings.meaning_en: a company that moves goods or passengers from one place to another
meanings.example: an international carrier
meanings.example_cn: 跨国运输公司

meanings.meaning_en: an action or event that is a signal for something else to happen
meanings.example: She stood nervously in the wings waiting for her cue.
meanings.example_cn: 她紧张地站在台侧等待出场的提示。

meanings.meaning_en: to surprise someone very much
meanings.example: Dave amazed his friends by suddenly getting married.
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫突然结婚，令朋友们非常吃惊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 疲倦的，困乏的；令人厌倦的
meanings.meaning_en: very tired or bored, especially because you have been doing something for a long time
meanings.example: She found Rachel in the kitchen, looking old and weary.
meanings.example_cn: 她发现雷切尔在厨房里，看上去苍老而疲惫。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of calm confidence about your own abilities, or that you are right about something
meanings.example: the calm assurance with which she handled the horse
meanings.example_cn: 她对付马儿时的从容镇定

meanings.meaning_en: the use of computers and machines instead of people to do a job
to accept that you are responsible for a piece of work, and start to do it
meanings.example: He undertook to pay the money back in six months.
meanings.example_cn: 他保证在六个月之内还钱。

meanings.meaning_en: a tendency to believe that bad things will happen
meanings.example: ...universal pessimism about the economy.
meanings.example_cn: …对经济形势普遍的悲观看法。

meanings.meaning_en: if you do something by proxy, you arrange for someone else to do it for you
meanings.example: You can vote by proxy.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以请人代你投票。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone who is ill become healthy again, especially by using natural powers or prayer
meanings.example: a preacher who claims that he can heal the sick
meanings.example_cn: 自称可以治病的传道士

meanings.meaning_en: bread or cake that is stale is no longer fresh or good to eat
meanings.example: French bread goes stale (= becomes stale ) very quickly.
meanings.example_cn: 法式面包极易变味。

meanings.meaning_en: causing damage to people or things
meanings.example: the destructive power of modern weapons
meanings.example_cn: 现代武器的破坏力

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly move forward and attack someone or something, after waiting to attack them
meanings.example: The cat was hiding in the bushes, ready to pounce.
meanings.example_cn: 猫躲在灌木丛中，准备扑上去。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of pouncing; a spring or swoop
to make a speech etc to a lot of people
meanings.example: The king delivered a televised speech to the nation on November 5.
meanings.example_cn: 国王在11月5日向全国发表了电视讲话。

meanings.meaning_cn: 公然反抗，蔑视，拒绝服从
meanings.meaning_en: If you defy someone or something that is trying to make you behave in a particular way, you refuse to obey them and behave in that way
meanings.example: This was the first (and last) time that I dared to defy my mother.
meanings.example_cn: 这是我第一次（也是最后一次）胆敢违抗我母亲。

meanings.meaning_en: to give part of your power or work to someone in a lower position than you
meanings.example: A good manager knows when to delegate.
meanings.example_cn: 一个好的经理知道何时该放权。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been elected or chosen to speak, vote, or take decisions for a group
meanings.example: It takes experience to judge correctly how much power should be delegated.
meanings.example_cn: 应该下放多少权力需要靠经验来准确判断。

meanings.meaning_en: to avoid talking about something, especially because you are trying to hide something
meanings.example: I could tell that he was trying to evade the issue.
meanings.example_cn: 我看得出他在极力回避这个问题。

meanings.example: a hilarious story
meanings.example_cn: 极有趣的故事

meanings.example: Put some anti-septic cream on it.
meanings.example_cn: 涂上一些防止败血症的药膏。

meanings.meaning_en: to cover a path, road, area etc with a hard level surface such as blocks of stone or  concrete
meanings.example: a paved courtyard
meanings.example_cn: 地面铺砌过的院子

meanings.meaning_en: to make a deep, very loud noise
meanings.example: We heard a lion roar.
meanings.example_cn: 我们听到狮子在吼叫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 文学，文学作品，文献，著作
meanings.meaning_en: books, plays, poems etc that people think are important and good
meanings.example: He has read many of the major works of literature.
meanings.example_cn: 他读过许多重要的文学作品。

meanings.meaning_en: a historic event or act is very important and will be recorded as part of history
meanings.example: a historic meeting of world leaders
meanings.example_cn: 具有历史意义的世界领导人会议

meanings.meaning_en: a series of musical notes that are played or sung and are nice to listen to
meanings.example: That’s a nice tune.
meanings.example_cn: 那曲调很美。

meanings.meaning_en: very determined to succeed or get what you want
meanings.example: A successful businessman has to be aggressive.
meanings.example_cn: 成功的实业家必须得有股冲劲。

meanings.meaning_en: official papers or cards, such as your passport, that prove who you are
meanings.example: Do you have any identification?
meanings.example_cn: 你有什么身份证明文件吗？

meanings.meaning_en: anxious behaviour or activity that is usually about unimportant things
meanings.example: James said he’d better be getting back or there’d be a fuss .
meanings.example_cn: 詹姆斯说他最好回来，否则就会有人小题大做了。

meanings.meaning_en: to worry a lot about things that may not be very important
meanings.example: The Steamatic enables you to clean any carpet with the minimum of fuss .
meanings.example_cn: 蒸汽清洁器可以让你轻轻松松地清洁地毯。

meanings.meaning_en: the study in  mathematics  of the angles and shapes formed by the relationships of lines, surfaces, and solid objects in space
meanings.example: ...the very ordered way in which mathematics and geometry describe nature.
meanings.example_cn: …数学和几何学描述自然的条理性。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of moving goods or people from one place to another
meanings.example: baggage that is lost or damaged in transit
meanings.example_cn: 在运输过程中丢失或损坏的行李

meanings.meaning_en: having a very powerful effect or influence on your body or mind
meanings.example: potent drugs
meanings.example_cn: 强效药物

meanings.meaning_en: when something changes from one form or state to another
meanings.example: Making the transition from youth to adulthood can be very painful.
meanings.example_cn: 从青少年过渡到成年有时是一个非常痛苦的过程。

meanings.meaning_en: sudden noisy activity
meanings.example: They heard a commotion downstairs.
meanings.example_cn: 他们听见楼下一阵骚动。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two imaginary lines around the world, either the Tropic of Cancer which is 23.5˚ north of the  equator  , or the Tropic of Capricorn which is 23.5˚ south of the equator

meanings.meaning_cn: (金属)可锻的;有延展性的;(性格)可训练的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is malleable is easy to press or pull into a new shape
meanings.example: malleable steel
meanings.example_cn: 展性钢

meanings.meaning_cn: 坚决，坚定；决定，决议；决心，解决
meanings.meaning_en: a formal decision or statement agreed on by a group of people, especially after a vote
meanings.example: a resolution calling for a ban on dumping nuclear waste
meanings.example_cn: 要求禁止倾倒核废物的决议

meanings.meaning_en: a group of ships, or all the ships in a navy
meanings.example: the US seventh fleet
meanings.example_cn: 美国第七舰队

meanings.meaning_en: a short statement that gives the main information about something, without giving all the details
meanings.example: A brief summary is given on a separate sheet.
meanings.example_cn: 摘要另写一页。

meanings.meaning_en: done immediately, and not following the normal process

meanings.meaning_cn: 反话，冷嘲，讽刺性的事件、情况等
meanings.meaning_en: a situation that is unusual or amusing because something strange happens, or the opposite of what is expected happens or is true
meanings.example: Life is full of little ironies.
meanings.example_cn: 生活中充满了小小的讽刺。

meanings.meaning_cn: 透视；透视画法；视角，观点
meanings.meaning_en: a way of thinking about something, especially one which is influenced by the type of person you are or by your experiences
meanings.example: the artist’s use of perspective
meanings.example_cn: 那位画家对透视法的运用

meanings.meaning_en: close to or relating to the North Pole or the South Pole
meanings.example: As our climate warms up, the polar ice caps will begin to melt.
meanings.example_cn: 随着地球气候逐渐变暖，极地的冰冠将开始融化。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to look after or help customers in a public place
meanings.example: a car park attendant
meanings.example_cn: 停车场的服务员

meanings.meaning_en: to make it difficult for someone to do something that they want or need to do
meanings.example: The charity is handicapped by lack of funds.
meanings.example_cn: 这个慈善机构因为缺乏资金难以开展工作。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone has a handicap, a part of their body or their mind has been permanently injured or damaged. Many people think that this word is offensive.
someone who is eligible for something is able or allowed to do it, for example because they are the right age
meanings.example: Stephen was regarded as an eligible bachelor.
meanings.example_cn: 斯蒂芬被认为是一个钻石王老五。

meanings.meaning_en: bent, twisted, or not in a straight line
meanings.example: Your tie’s crooked.
meanings.example_cn: 你的领带歪了。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or involving the work of diplomats
meanings.example: Diplomatic efforts to end the fighting began on October 25.
meanings.example_cn: 停战的外交努力于10月25日开始。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of farm equipment used to turn over the earth so that seeds can be planted
meanings.example: In those days the land was plowed by oxen.
meanings.example_cn: 在那个年代是用公牛来犁地的。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which a large crowd of people are behaving in a violent and uncontrolled way, especially when they are protesting about something
meanings.example: urban riots
meanings.example_cn: 城市骚乱

meanings.meaning_en: to take in liquid, gas, or another substance from the surface or space around something
meanings.example: Plants absorb nutrients from the soil.
meanings.example_cn: 植物从土壤中吸收养分。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing, music etc or an action that copies someone or something in an amusing way
meanings.example: Her performance contains a strong element of self-parody (= when someone makes fun of their own style ) .
meanings.example_cn: 她的表演包含了强烈的自嘲元素。

meanings.meaning_cn: 齿轮的；轮的、杠杆等装置的
meanings.example: The typical career pattern was geared to men whose wives didn’t work.
meanings.example_cn: 这种典型的职业模式是为妻子不工作的男性设计的。

meanings.meaning_en: to be organized in a way that is suitable for a particular purpose or situation

meanings.example: Everybody rushing about on some incomprehensible errand someone forced him to do at pain of death.
meanings.example_cn: 大家都忍受着死亡的痛苦被迫地抢着做一些令人难以理解的差事。

meanings.meaning_en: a small group, society, or place that has the same qualities as a much larger one
meanings.example: Kitchell says the city was a microcosm of all American culture during the '60s.
meanings.example_cn: 基切尔说这个城市曾经是60年代所有美国文化的一个缩影。

meanings.meaning_en: an inapt phrase, statement etc is not right for a particular situation
meanings.example: a very inapt comment
meanings.example_cn: 很不恰当的评论

meanings.meaning_cn: 正当的，合适的；文雅的，尚可的
meanings.meaning_en: following moral standards that are acceptable to society
meanings.example: a decent burial
meanings.example_cn: 得体的葬礼

meanings.meaning_en: a system in which students of both sexes are educated together
meanings.example: It is true that a majority of faculty members voted in favor of coeducation, arguing that it would encourage more students to apply to Grove.
meanings.example_cn: 确实有大部分员工投票赞成男女同校，认为这会使更多的学生申请Grove。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有用，实用；公用事业(煤气，水电)
meanings.meaning_en: a service such as gas or electricity provided for people to use
meanings.example: Does your rent include utilities?
meanings.example_cn: 你的房租包括公用事业费吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 金银标准成份的，货真价实的，纯正的
meanings.example: Ella has done some sterling work.
meanings.example_cn: 埃拉做了一些出色的工作。

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel that something bad is going to happen
meanings.example: ‘How long will she be ill?’ he asked. There was an ominous silence.
meanings.example_cn: “她的病多久会好？”他问。大家的沉默让人感觉不妙。

meanings.meaning_en: to build something such as a building or wall
meanings.example: an imposing town hall, erected in 1892
meanings.example_cn: 一座气势宏伟的市政厅，建于1892年

meanings.meaning_en: in a straight upright position
meanings.example: Police have erected barriers across the main roads into the town.
meanings.example_cn: 警察在进城的主要道路上设立了路障。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who enters another country to live there permanently
meanings.example: an illegal immigrant
meanings.example_cn: 非法移民

meanings.meaning_en: the edge of an area
meanings.example: extremists on the periphery of the animal rights movement
meanings.example_cn: 处于动物权利运动边缘的极端分子

meanings.meaning_cn: 实行，贯彻，实施；处死；演奏
meanings.meaning_en: to kill someone, especially legally as a punishment
meanings.example: 13 people were summarily executed (= killed without any trial or legal process ) by the guerrillas.
meanings.example_cn: 有13人被游击队员就地处决。

meanings.meaning_en: decided or arranged without any reason or plan, often unfairly
meanings.example: an arbitrary decision
meanings.example_cn: 武断的决定

meanings.meaning_en: morally bad
meanings.example: Stay away from Jerry – he’s no good.
meanings.example_cn: 离杰里远点——他不是什么好东西。

meanings.meaning_en: very impressive
meanings.example: a mountainous area with spectacular scenery
meanings.example_cn: 景色壮丽的山区

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not trained in a particular subject or type of work, especially when they are being compared with someone who is
meanings.example: To the layman (= laymen in general ) all these plants look pretty similar.
meanings.example_cn: 对外行的人来说，这些植物看起来都很相似。

meanings.meaning_en: the reddish-brown substance that forms on iron or steel when it gets wet
meanings.example: There were large patches of rust on the car.
meanings.example_cn: 车上有大片锈斑。

meanings.meaning_en: people who are old
meanings.example: a retirement village for the elderly
meanings.example_cn: 供老人退休后居住的村子

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately make something such as a feeling or an activity last longer
meanings.example: I was trying to think of some way to prolong the conversation.
meanings.example_cn: 我在想方设法拖长这次谈话。

meanings.meaning_en: by means of which or according to which
meanings.example: a proposal whereby EU citizens would be allowed to reside anywhere in the EU
meanings.example_cn: 允许欧盟公民在欧盟任何地方居住的一项提议

meanings.meaning_cn: 轻推，轻撞，缓步前进，漫跑
meanings.meaning_en: to run slowly and steadily, especially as a way of exercising
meanings.example: I go jogging every morning.
meanings.example_cn: 我每天早晨都去慢跑。

meanings.meaning_en: to continue to do something, although this is difficult, or other people oppose it
meanings.example: ‘I don’t think it’s right,’ John persisted.
meanings.example_cn: “我认为那不对。”约翰坚持说道。

meanings.meaning_en: to end an argument or solve a disagreement
meanings.example: We hope the factions will be able to settle their differences (= agree to stop arguing ) by peaceful means.
meanings.example_cn: 我们希望各派系能以和平方式解决分歧。

meanings.meaning_en: a large bird that hunts and eats small birds and animals
the traditional beliefs, values, customs etc of a family, country, or society
meanings.example: the importance of preserving the national heritage
meanings.example_cn: 保护民族遗产的重要性

meanings.meaning_en: several sheets of paper fastened together, used for writing or drawing
meanings.example: Keep a telephone pad and a pen to hand.
meanings.example_cn: 手边准备一本电话记事簿和一支笔。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk softly and quietly
meanings.example: a pad of paper
meanings.example_cn: 一本拍纸簿

meanings.meaning_en: continuing, or continuing to develop
meanings.example: their ongoing search for a new director
meanings.example_cn: 他们仍在寻找一个新主任

meanings.meaning_en: an object that you buy or keep to remind yourself of a special occasion or a place you have visited
meanings.example: a souvenir shop
meanings.example_cn: 纪念品商店

meanings.meaning_en: something that you do because you think it is enjoyable or interesting
meanings.example: Reading was her favourite pastime.
meanings.example_cn: 阅读是她最喜爱的消遣方式。

meanings.meaning_en: to take someone else’s child into your family for a period of time but without becoming their legal parent
meanings.example: The couple wanted to adopt a black child they had been fostering.
meanings.example_cn: 那对夫妇想收养他们代养的一个黑人小孩。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something seem better, larger, worse etc than it really is
meanings.example: I couldn’t sleep for three days – I’m not exaggerating.
meanings.example_cn: 我三天没睡觉了——一点不夸张。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a polite, kind, and generous way, especially to people of a lower rank
meanings.example: Sibyl was the most gracious, helpful, and generous person to work with.
meanings.example_cn: 西比尔非常和蔼，乐于助人，而且为人慷慨，和她共事最愉快。

meanings.meaning_cn: 熟悉的，通晓的；亲密的，常见的
meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is familiar is well-known to you and easy to recognize
meanings.example: a familiar tune
meanings.example_cn: 熟悉的曲调

meanings.example: If so, this would add to a growing list of physiological and biological markers of sexual orientation.
meanings.example_cn: 如果是这样，这可能会给生理和生物学上的性取向标记增加一长串名单。

meanings.meaning_en: a large building for storing large quantities of goods
meanings.example: I stored up the old furniture in the warehouse.
meanings.example_cn: 我把旧家具存放在了仓库里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 独居的，孤独的，惟一的；荒凉的
meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that there is only one of something
meanings.example: the solitary goal of the match
meanings.example_cn: 这场比赛的唯一入球

meanings.example: The fact that the plane was late added a further complication to our journey.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机误点给我们的旅行带来了更大的麻烦。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something less bad
meanings.example: Olivier’s performance redeemed an otherwise second-rate play.
meanings.example_cn: 奥利维尔的表演补救了一出本是二流水平的戏。

meanings.meaning_cn: 营业收入；营业额；人员调整，人员更替率
meanings.meaning_en: the amount of business done during a particular period
meanings.example: The company had a turnover of $3.8 million.
meanings.example_cn: 那个公司拥有380万美元的营业额。

meanings.meaning_en: official orders or laws stopping trade, communication etc with another country, as a way of forcing its leaders to make political changes
meanings.example: a resolution to impose sanctions (= start using sanctions ) on DPRK
meanings.example_cn: 对朝鲜实施制裁的决议

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone want to achieve something and make them willing to work hard in order to do this
meanings.example: A good teacher has to be able to motivate her students.
meanings.example_cn: 好教师必须能够激发学生的积极性。

meanings.meaning_en: a sharp point that grows on the stem of a plant such as a rose
meanings.example: a long, low hedge of thorns
meanings.example_cn: 一长排矮矮的荆棘树篱

meanings.meaning_en: if an activity or situation involves something, that thing is part of it or a result of it
meanings.example: What will the job involve?
meanings.example_cn: 这份工作包括什么？

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to design buildings
meanings.example: James Madison was the principal architect of the constitution.
meanings.example_cn: 詹姆斯·麦迪逊是该宪法的主设计师。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of something
meanings.example: dust particles
meanings.example_cn: 尘埃

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which two people, ideas, or statements agree with each other
meanings.example: There was a silence as the women turned with one accord to stare at Doreen.
meanings.example_cn: 那些女人一齐转身盯着多琳看，全场鸦雀无声。

meanings.meaning_en: money that you are given for doing your job
meanings.example: Staff have been working without pay for the last month.
meanings.example_cn: 上个月员工们干活没拿到工资。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone money for the job they do
meanings.example: The tax is deducted from your pay every week.
meanings.example_cn: 这项税收每星期从你薪水中扣。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the production of drugs and medicines
meanings.example: the pharmaceutical industry
meanings.example_cn: 制药业

meanings.meaning_en: to offend someone by saying or doing something they think is rude
meanings.example: Nobody insults my family and gets away with it!
meanings.example_cn: 谁也别想侮辱了我的家人之后就这么算了！

meanings.example: I hope Andy won’t be insulted if I don’t come.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我不来，希望安迪不要介意。

meanings.meaning_en: to pull with one or more short, quick pulls
meanings.example: The woman gently tugged his arm.
meanings.example_cn: 那女人轻轻拽了拽他的胳膊。

meanings.meaning_en: being one of the parts of something
meanings.example: the EU and its constituent members
meanings.example_cn: 欧盟及其成员国

meanings.example: If you have tests, perhaps you could adopt more of the other practices in a piecemeal fashion, but why would you want to?
meanings.example_cn: 如果您有了一些测试，您或许能够进一步零零碎碎地采用更多其它的测试，但您为什么要这样做呢？

meanings.meaning_en: a decimal system is based on the number 10
meanings.example: changing to a decimal system
meanings.example_cn: 改为十进制

meanings.meaning_en: a substance which provides your body with energy and is found in foods such as grain, rice, and potatoes, or a food that contains this substance
meanings.example: He eats a lot of starch.
meanings.example_cn: 他吃大量含淀粉的食物。

meanings.example: The might of the army is "invincible," according to state media but the refugees are rather cynical about the ill equipped force.
meanings.example_cn: 朝鲜官方媒体称朝鲜的军事力量是“无敌的”，可是朝鲜难民却对装备落后的军队表示出不屑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 锚；危难时可依靠的人或物；用锚泊船
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of heavy metal that is lowered to the bottom of the sea, a lake etc to prevent a ship or boat moving
meanings.example: We dropped anchor a few yards offshore.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在离岸几码远的地方抛锚停航。

meanings.meaning_en: If you avail yourself of an offer or an opportunity, you accept the offer or make use of the opportunity
meanings.example: Guests should feel at liberty to avail themselves of your facilities.
meanings.example_cn: 客人们应可以随意使用你们的设施。

meanings.meaning_en: to separate one person, group, or thing from other people or things
meanings.example: The town was isolated by the floods.
meanings.example_cn: 洪水使该镇与外界隔绝。

meanings.meaning_en: not firm or strong
meanings.example: a limp handshake
meanings.example_cn: 无力的握手

meanings.meaning_en: to walk slowly and with difficulty because one leg is hurt or injured
meanings.example: His body suddenly went limp.
meanings.example_cn: 他突然身子一软。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially speak or take action for another person or group of people
meanings.example: Mr Kobayashi was chosen to represent the company at the conference.
meanings.example_cn: 小林先生被选中代表公司出席会议。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually become less or weaker before disappearing completely, or to make something do this
meanings.example: As he thought it over, his anger gradually dissipated.
meanings.example_cn: 他想明白后，怒气就渐渐消了。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where roads, lines etc cross each other, especially where two roads meet
meanings.example: We crossed at a busy intersection.
meanings.example_cn: 我们穿过了一个繁忙的道路交叉口。

meanings.meaning_cn: 补足物，船上的定员；补语
meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that emphasizes the good qualities of another person or thing
meanings.example: The green wallpaper is the perfect complement to the old pine of the dresser.
meanings.example_cn: 绿色墙纸是旧松木梳妆台的完美衬托。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a good combination with someone or something else
a space that is completely empty of all gas, especially one from which all the air has been taken away
meanings.example: His presence should fill the power vacuum that has been developing over the past few days.

meanings.example_cn: …一种会使齐格弗里德忘掉布伦希德尔德而爱上古特鲁内娜的魔剂。

a loud unpleasant noise that continues for a long time

meanings.meaning_en: a large group of fish swimming together

meanings.example_cn: 人类基因

an occasion when something suddenly breaks apart or bursts

meanings.example_cn: 她把她的第一张唱片献给伍迪·艾伦，她说艾伦理解她的痴迷。

meanings.example_cn: 现任总统

meanings.example_cn: 也可以住在当地人家中。

meanings.example_cn: 他朝地平线处仔细眺望，但是找不到那艘船的踪影。

meanings.meaning_en: a smooth way of moving that looks natural, relaxed, and attractive

meanings.example_cn: 以上的引文出自罗伯特•弗罗斯特的一首诗。

meanings.example_cn: 确保你不需要支付昂贵的额外费用。

meanings.example_cn: 我觉得他是我所认识的最有魅力、最体贴的男士。

meanings.example_cn: 他的话被报界严重歪曲。

meanings.example_cn: 急性关节炎

meanings.meaning_en: the words that come just before and after a word or sentence and that help you understand its meaning
