meanings.meaning_en: unusual and attractive, especially in an old-fashioned way
meanings.example: a quaint little village in Yorkshire
meanings.example_cn: 约克郡一个古色古香的小村庄

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange things or put them in their places
meanings.example: Chinese vases are disposed around the gallery.
meanings.example_cn: 中国花瓶摆放在展馆四周。

meanings.meaning_en: to control an activity or process, especially by rules
meanings.example: strict rules regulating the use of chemicals in food
meanings.example_cn: 限制化学品在食物中使用的严格规定

meanings.meaning_en: a drug that is used to kill  bacteria  and cure infections
meanings.example: Your doctor may prescribe antibiotics.
meanings.example_cn: 你的大夫可能会开抗生素。

meanings.meaning_cn: 影响(力)，感化(力)，有影响的人或事
meanings.meaning_en: the power to affect the way someone or something develops, behaves, or thinks, without using direct force or orders
meanings.example: As a scientist, his influence was immense.
meanings.example_cn: 身为一名科学家，他的影响力极大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 静脉，叶脉；(石头)纹理；矿脉
meanings.meaning_en: one of the tubes which carries blood to your heart from other parts of your body
meanings.example: the pulmonary vein
meanings.example_cn: 肺静脉

meanings.meaning_cn: 缠住，被困扰；观念固执，死脑筋

meanings.meaning_en: an important city where the main government of a country, state etc is
meanings.example: Washington D.C., the capital of the United States
meanings.example_cn: 美国首都华盛顿特区

meanings.meaning_en: an offence that is punished by death
to make a sudden sideways movement while moving forwards, usually in order to avoid hitting something
meanings.example: Drivers coming in the opposite direction swerved to avoid the bodies.
meanings.example_cn: 从反方向过来的司机们突然转向以避开这些尸体。

meanings.meaning_en: a small part of something that remains after the rest of it has been used, destroyed, or eaten
meanings.example: Beneath the present church were remnants of Roman flooring.
meanings.example_cn: 在目前的这座教堂下面还有残余的古罗马地板。

meanings.meaning_en: to move a part of your body, especially your head or chin, upwards or to the side
meanings.example: My mother tilted her head and smiled.
meanings.example_cn: 我妈妈歪着头笑了。

meanings.meaning_en: a movement or position in which one side of something is higher than the other
meanings.example: Ned’s mouth tilted upwards slightly at the corners.
meanings.example_cn: 内德的嘴角微微翘起。

meanings.meaning_en: to come up to a particular place, person, or object and go past them
meanings.example: The crowd parted to let the truck pass.
meanings.example_cn: 人群分开让卡车通过。

meanings.meaning_en: opaque glass or liquid is difficult to see through and often thick
meanings.example: a shower with an opaque glass door
meanings.example_cn: 装有不透明玻璃门的淋浴间

meanings.meaning_cn: 威信，声望；(由于成功等而产生)显赫
meanings.meaning_en: the respect and admiration that someone or something gets because of their success or important position in society
meanings.example: The king wanted to enhance his prestige through war.
meanings.example_cn: 国王想通过战争来提高自己的威信。

meanings.meaning_en: a very steep side of a high rock, mountain, or cliff
meanings.example: A loose rock tumbled over the precipice.
meanings.example_cn: 一块松动的岩石从悬崖上滚落下来。

meanings.meaning_en: the parts of a town or city that are furthest from the centre
meanings.example: Hours later we reached the outskirts of New York.
meanings.example_cn: 数小时后我们到达了纽约市的外围地带。

meanings.meaning_en: when you say firmly that you will not do, give, or accept something
meanings.example: Her country suffered through her refusal to accept change.
meanings.example_cn: 她的国家因为她拒绝接受变革而受了害。

meanings.meaning_en: to go around the different parts of an area or building at regular times to check that there is no trouble or danger
meanings.example: Armed guards patrolled the grounds.
meanings.example_cn: 武装卫兵巡逻场地。

meanings.meaning_en: an important official who represents his or her government in a foreign country
meanings.example: ...the German ambassador to Poland.
meanings.example_cn: …德国驻波兰大使。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that you stand under to wash your whole body
meanings.example: Why does the phone always ring when I’m in the shower?
meanings.example_cn: 为什么电话铃总是在我洗澡的时候响？

meanings.meaning_en: A building that is dilapidated is old and in a generally bad condition
meanings.example: ...an old dilapidated barn.
meanings.example_cn: …一座破旧的谷仓。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing or speech that gives details about what someone or something is like
meanings.example: The booklet gives a brief description of each place.
meanings.example_cn: 这本小册子对每一个地方都作了简短的介绍。

meanings.meaning_en: lack of knowledge or information about something
meanings.example: Excuse my ignorance, but how does it actually work?
meanings.example_cn: 请原谅我的无知，它究竟是如何运作的？

meanings.meaning_en: a trained army unit made of two or more  divisions (= groups of soldiers )
meanings.example: the medical corps
meanings.example_cn: 医疗部队

meanings.meaning_cn: 两栖动物；水陆两用飞机和车辆
meanings.meaning_en: an animal such as a  frog  that can live both on land and in water
Patriotism is love for your country and loyalty toward it
meanings.example: He was a country boy who had joined the army out of a sense of patriotism and adventure.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个乡下小伙子，出于爱国心和冒险精神参了军。

meanings.meaning_en: Periodical events or situations happen occasionally, at fairly regular intervals
meanings.example: She made periodical visits to her dentist.
meanings.example_cn: 她定期去看牙医。

meanings.meaning_en: a magazine, especially one about a serious or technical subject

meanings.meaning_cn: 精力充沛的；精力旺盛的
meanings.meaning_en: having or needing a lot of energy or determination
meanings.example: an energetic man
meanings.example_cn: 精力旺盛的男子

meanings.meaning_en: showing signs of being successful or good in the future
meanings.example: a promising career in law
meanings.example_cn: 很有前途的法律职业

meanings.meaning_en: the outside edge of something circular
meanings.example: She looked at him over the rim of her glass.
meanings.example_cn: 她沿玻璃杯口看着他。

meanings.meaning_en: to move something to a particular place or position, especially using your hands
meanings.example: He put the coffee on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 他把咖啡放在桌上。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the tubes that carries blood from your heart to the rest of your body
meanings.example: ...Connecticut Ave., one of the main arteries of Washington.
meanings.example_cn: …康涅狄格大道，华盛顿的主干道之一。

meanings.meaning_en: when you must use or depend on something because nothing better is available
meanings.example: His punishing work schedule had made him resort to drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 他那累人的工作日程已经使他不得不求助于毒品了。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the coloured parts of a flower that are shaped like leaves
meanings.example: rose petals
meanings.example_cn: 玫瑰花瓣

meanings.meaning_en: a lack of something that is necessary
meanings.example: They did blood tests on him for signs of vitamin deficiency.
meanings.example_cn: 他们给他做了血检看是否有缺乏维生素的迹象。

meanings.meaning_en: a small area of a country, city etc
meanings.example: weather reports from several different localities
meanings.example_cn: 来自几个不同地区的天气报告

meanings.meaning_en: an animal, object, or building that is handsome looks attractive in an impressive way
meanings.example: a row of handsome Georgian houses
meanings.example_cn: 一排宏伟的乔治王朝时期的房子

meanings.meaning_en: a very large number of things
meanings.example: We’re still studying a myriad of options.
meanings.example_cn: 我们仍在研究各种备选方案。

meanings.meaning_en: the sound or effect of two things hitting each other with great force
the usual order in which you do things, or the things you regularly do
meanings.example: John’s departure had upset their daily routine .
meanings.example_cn: 约翰的离去打乱了他们的日常生活。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove something that is covering the surface of something else
meanings.example: Strip the beds and wash the sheets.
meanings.example_cn: 把床单撤下来清洗。

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow area of land

meanings.example: During some trials, an audible tone was played through the headphones, either amidst white noise or on its own, and afterwards the participants were asked if they had noticed it.
meanings.example_cn: 在一些测试中，耳机里会播放一些可被听见的声音，该声音或混杂于白噪音中，或单独播放，之后，参与者将被问及是否注意到这些声音。

meanings.meaning_en: a religious ceremony for burying or  cremating (= burning )  someone who has died
meanings.example: The funeral will be held at St. Martin’s Church.
meanings.example_cn: 葬礼将在圣马丁教堂举行。

meanings.meaning_en: if metal corrodes, or if something corrodes it, it is slowly destroyed by the effect of water, chemicals etc
meanings.example: Acidic water will corrode the pipes.
meanings.example_cn: 酸性水会腐蚀管子。

meanings.meaning_en: the number of times something happens, especially crime, disease etc
meanings.example: The incidence of breast cancer increases with age.
meanings.example_cn: 乳腺癌的发病率随着年龄的增长而上升。

meanings.meaning_en: a clever plan, especially to do something that is bad or illegal – used in order to show disapproval
meanings.example: a get-rich-quick scheme
meanings.example_cn: 快速致富的手段

meanings.meaning_en: a bar that is fastened along or around something, especially to stop you from going somewhere or from falling
meanings.example: Several passengers were leaning against the ship’s rail.
meanings.example_cn: 几名乘客斜靠在轮船的栏杆上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 沉重的，笨重的；(文章)冗长的
meanings.meaning_en: Ponderous writing or speech is very serious, uses more words than necessary, and is dull
meanings.example: He had a dense, ponderous style.
meanings.example_cn: 他的风格是词藻堆砌、冗长沉闷。

meanings.example: a movie that degrades women
meanings.example_cn: 贬损女性的影片

meanings.example: X-rays have confirmed that he has not broken any bones.
meanings.example_cn: X光片已经证实他没有骨折。

meanings.meaning_en: a small, very sharp knife that is used by doctors in operations
meanings.example: I pointed with my scalpel to the chest cavity, where nothing but a black lump of coal squatted in the lipstick-red center.
meanings.example_cn: 我用解剖刀指着她的胸腔，那里只有一团黑乎乎的煤块，伏在唇膏般红色的胸腔中部。

meanings.meaning_en: the natural colour or appearance of the skin on your face
meanings.example: Drinking water is good for the complexion.
meanings.example_cn: 喝水让气色变好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 被遗弃的；被遗弃者，被逐出者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not accepted by the people they live among, or who has been forced out of their home
meanings.example: Smokers often feel as though they are being treated as social outcasts.
meanings.example_cn: 吸烟者常常觉得自己遭到社会排斥。

meanings.meaning_en: existing or arranged before something else or before the present situation
meanings.example: You do not need any prior knowledge of the subject.
meanings.example_cn: 你无需事先具备该方面的知识。

meanings.meaning_en: a small raised red spot on your skin, especially on your face
meanings.example: Belushi imitates a giant pimple by squeezing his cheeks and spewing chewed food out of his mouth.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在等候某个毕业生领文凭的同时，可以欣赏像《动物屋》这样与学校有关的经典电影的片断：约翰-贝鲁西模仿一个脸上长满丘疹的巨人，双手挤着脸，从嘴里喷出嚼过的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: the crime of stealing
meanings.example: Car theft is on the increase.
meanings.example_cn: 汽车盗窃案在上升。

meanings.meaning_cn: 组成，构成；创作；排字；使安静
meanings.meaning_en: to write a piece of music
meanings.example: Barrington has composed the music for a new production of ‘A Midsummer Night’s Dream’.
meanings.example_cn: 巴林顿为新版的《仲夏夜之梦》谱了曲。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone a disease
meanings.example: People with the virus may feel perfectly well, but they can still infect others.
meanings.example_cn: 带有这种病毒的人可能毫无症状，却仍可能传染他人。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being symmetrical
meanings.example: ...the incredible beauty and symmetry of a snowflake.
meanings.example_cn: …雪花令人难以置信的美丽和对称。

meanings.meaning_en: having an important effect or influence, especially on what will happen in the future
meanings.example: His most significant political achievement was the abolition of the death penalty.
meanings.example_cn: 他政治上最重大的成就是废除了死刑。

meanings.meaning_en: the system or type of money that a country uses
meanings.example: The bank can supply you with foreign currency .
meanings.example_cn: 这家银行能为你提供外币。

meanings.meaning_en: if an event is a prelude to a more important event, it happens just before it and makes people expect it
meanings.example: Living together as a prelude to marriage is now considered acceptable in many countries.
meanings.example_cn: 婚前同居如今在许多国家都已被接受。

meanings.meaning_en: a very violent tropical storm
meanings.example: The football match have to stand over next week for the typhoon storm.
meanings.example_cn: 由于台风风暴，这场足球赛延期到下个星期举行。

meanings.meaning_en: to treat a person or group differently from another in an unfair way
meanings.example: He is incapable of discriminating between a good idea and a terrible one.
meanings.example_cn: 他没能力在一个好主意和一个坏主意之间进行区分。

meanings.meaning_en: a disadvantage of a situation, plan, product etc
meanings.example: It’s a great city – the only drawback is the weather.
meanings.example_cn: 这是座很不错的城市，唯一的不足就是天气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 空的；未被占用的；空虚的，无表情的
meanings.meaning_en: a vacant seat, building, room or piece of land is empty and available for someone to use
meanings.example: Only a few apartments were still vacant.
meanings.example_cn: 只有几套公寓仍然空着。

meanings.meaning_en: Tracks are marks left in the ground by the feet of animals or people
meanings.example: The only evidence of pandas was their tracks in the snow.
meanings.example_cn: 有熊猫活动的惟一证据就是它们在雪中的足迹。

meanings.meaning_cn: 人类能力的高度发展，文化，教养，文明
meanings.meaning_en: the beliefs, way of life, art, and customs that are shared and accepted by people in a particular society
meanings.example: We speak Danish at home so that the boys don’t lose touch with their language and culture.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在家说丹麦语，这样男孩子们就不会脱离他们的语言和文化。

meanings.meaning_en: if a scientist or archaeologist excavates an area of land, they dig carefully to find ancient objects, bones etc
meanings.example: Schliemann excavated the ancient city of Troy.
meanings.example_cn: 谢里曼发掘出特洛伊古城。

meanings.example: You must be very fit if you do so much running.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你经常这样跑步，身体肯定很健康。

meanings.meaning_en: to put a piece of equipment into a place, or a new part onto a machine, so that it is ready to be used

meanings.meaning_cn: 运动，动态；手势；眼色，姿势；提议
meanings.meaning_en: the process of moving or the way that someone or something moves
meanings.example: Newton’s first law of motion
meanings.example_cn: 牛顿第一运动定律

meanings.meaning_en: to officially force someone to leave a school or organization
meanings.example: More than five-thousand high school students have been expelled for cheating.
meanings.example_cn: 五千多名中学生因考试作弊而被开除。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that you are given regularly or for a special purpose
meanings.example: Sales staff get a generous mileage allowance or a company car.
meanings.example_cn: 销售人员有优厚的里程补贴或者公司提供的专用汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not at all brave
meanings.example: Try it. Don’t be such a coward.
meanings.example_cn: 试一下，别那么胆小。

meanings.meaning_en: The germ of something such as an idea is something which developed or might develop into that thing
meanings.example: This was the germ of a book.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一本书的创作萌芽。

meanings.meaning_en: to shine suddenly and brightly for a short time, or to make something shine in this way
meanings.example: Lightning flashed overhead.
meanings.example_cn: 头顶上电光闪闪。

meanings.meaning_en: to take a number or an amount from a larger number or amount
meanings.example: The pupil could add and subtract but hadn't learned to divide.
meanings.example_cn: 这名小学生能做加法和减法，但还没学会做除法。

meanings.meaning_en: to shine brightly with flashing points of light
meanings.example: The river glittered in the sunlight.
meanings.example_cn: 阳光下河面波光粼粼。

meanings.meaning_en: if something or someone is predictable, you know what will happen or what they will do – sometimes used to show disapproval
meanings.example: The snow had a predictable effect on traffic.
meanings.example_cn: 这场雪对交通造成的影响可以预见。

meanings.meaning_en: more than is reasonable, suitable, or necessary
meanings.example: De Gaulle felt that America had undue influence in Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 戴高乐感到美国在欧洲影响力过大。

meanings.meaning_en: a small pointed object that is thrown or shot as a weapon, or one that is thrown in the game of darts
meanings.example: a poisoned dart
meanings.example_cn: 毒镖

meanings.meaning_en: If you dart a look at someone or something, or if your eyes dart to them, you look at them very quickly
meanings.example: She darted a sly sideways glance at Bramwell.
meanings.example_cn: 她狡猾地斜瞟了布莱威尔一眼。

meanings.meaning_en: to move suddenly and quickly in a particular direction

meanings.meaning_cn: 恰好相合，时间巧合；意见一致
meanings.meaning_en: if two people’s ideas, opinions etc coincide, they are the same
meanings.example: The interests of the US and those of the islanders may not coincide.
meanings.example_cn: 美国的利益和这些岛民的利益可能并不一致。

meanings.meaning_en: consecutive numbers or periods of time follow one after the other without any interruptions
meanings.example: It had rained for four consecutive days.
meanings.example_cn: 雨接连下了四天。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say how something is done or happens
meanings.example: a room furnished in the modern style
meanings.example_cn: 一间以现代风格装饰的房间

meanings.example: Her parents always talk to her in German.
meanings.example_cn: 她的父母总是用德语和她交谈。

meanings.meaning_en: to risk money or possessions on the result of something such as a game or a race, when you do not know for certain what the result will be
meanings.example: Their religion forbids them to drink or gamble.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的宗教禁止饮酒和赌博。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people chosen to do a particular job, make decisions etc
meanings.example: a committee meeting
meanings.example_cn: 委员会会议

meanings.meaning_cn: 哑的；暂不说话的；愚笨的
meanings.meaning_en: stupid
meanings.example: What a dumb question.
meanings.example_cn: 多么愚蠢的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: the practice of keeping yourself and the things around you clean in order to prevent diseases
meanings.example: the importance of personal hygiene
meanings.example_cn: 个人卫生的重要性

meanings.meaning_cn: 使窒息，使闷死；闷住；抑制；忍住
meanings.meaning_en: to kill someone by putting something over their face to stop them breathing
meanings.example: A teenage mother was accused of smothering her 3-month-old daughter.
meanings.example_cn: 一个少女妈妈被指控闷死自己三个月大的女儿。

meanings.meaning_en: A wilderness is a desert or other area of natural land which is not used by people
meanings.example: ...the icy Canadian wilderness.
meanings.example_cn: …冰封的加拿大荒野。

meanings.meaning_en: a sound or action that you make in order to give information to someone or tell them to do something
meanings.example: At a prearranged signal the lights went out.
meanings.example_cn: 预定的信号一发出，灯就全灭了。

meanings.meaning_en: a large container for a very hot fire, used to produce power, heat, or liquid metal
meanings.example: We had better fire up the furnace.
meanings.example_cn: 我们最好把炉子生起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to admit something that you feel embarrassed about
meanings.example: Occasionally people confess to crimes they haven’t committed just to get attention.
meanings.example_cn: 偶尔人们会承认自己并未犯过的罪行，那只是为了引人注意。

meanings.meaning_en: a small group of people or things within a much larger group
meanings.example: Gaelic is still spoken in Ireland by a tiny minority.
meanings.example_cn: 爱尔兰仍有极少数人在说盖尔语。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that a time in the past was good, or the activity of remembering a good time in the past and wishing that things had not changed
meanings.example: He looked back on his university days with a certain amount of nostalgia.
meanings.example_cn: 他带着一点留恋，回忆起大学时光。

meanings.meaning_en: careful to avoid danger or risks
meanings.example: a cautious driver
meanings.example_cn: 一位谨慎的司机

meanings.meaning_en: a cloth bag filled with soft material that you put your head on when you are sleeping
meanings.example: I’ll be asleep as soon as my head hits the pillow.
meanings.example_cn: 我头一碰到枕头就会睡着。

meanings.meaning_en: a room, building, piece of land etc that is adjacent to something is next to it
meanings.example: We stayed in adjacent rooms.
meanings.example_cn: 我们住在毗连的房间里。

meanings.meaning_en: a written or printed copy of a speech, conversation etc
a narrow crack in the surface of something, especially in rock
meanings.example: small creatures that hide in crevices in the rock
meanings.example_cn: 藏在岩石缝里的小生物

meanings.meaning_en: a false spoken statement about someone, intended to damage the good opinion that people have of that person
meanings.example: He is being sued for slander .
meanings.example_cn: 他被控犯有口头诽谤罪。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使屈服、征服，克制；使柔和，使安静
meanings.meaning_en: to defeat or control a person or group, especially using force
meanings.example: Police managed to subdue the angry crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 警察设法控制住了愤怒的人群。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something seem bigger or louder, especially using special equipment
meanings.example: At the Sheffield arena, the speakers were magnified ten times on a giant screen.
meanings.example_cn: 在谢菲尔德体育馆，演讲者在一个巨大的屏幕上被放大了十倍。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a substance chemically neutral
meanings.example: a medicine that neutralizes the acid in the stomach
meanings.example_cn: 能中和胃酸的药

meanings.meaning_en: a line of colour, especially one of several lines of colour all close together
meanings.example: a shirt with black and white stripes
meanings.example_cn: 黑白条纹衬衫

meanings.meaning_cn: 一套家具，一套房间，酒店套房
meanings.meaning_en: a set of rooms, especially expensive ones in a hotel
meanings.example: a honeymoon suite
meanings.example_cn: 蜜月套房

meanings.example: I owe him nothing.
meanings.example_cn: 我不欠他什么。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which an army or the police surround a place and try to gain control of it or force someone to come out of it
meanings.example: The siege lasted almost four months.
meanings.example_cn: 这次封锁历时近四个月。

meanings.meaning_en: something that happens as a result of a particular action or set of conditions
meanings.example: I don’t suppose it is of any consequence now.
meanings.example_cn: 现在我觉得这事一点都无所谓了。

meanings.meaning_en: waste matter from animals that is mixed with soil to improve the soil and help plants grow
meanings.example: ...bags of manure.
meanings.example_cn: …一袋袋的肥料。

meanings.meaning_en: moving or able to move from one job, area, or social class to another
meanings.example: a more mobile workforce
meanings.example_cn: 具有更强流动性的劳动力

meanings.meaning_en: loyalty and general agreement between all the people in a group, or between different groups, because they all have a shared aim
meanings.example: a gesture of solidarity
meanings.example_cn: 团结的表示

meanings.meaning_en: a sticky substance used for joining things together
meanings.example: ...a tube of glue.
meanings.example_cn: …一管胶水。

meanings.meaning_en: to join two things together using glue
a misguided idea or opinion is wrong because it is based on a wrong understanding of a situation
meanings.example: His parents still clung to the misguided belief that his common sense would keep him out of serious trouble.
meanings.example_cn: 他的父母依然错误地认为他的常识能让他远离大的麻烦。

meanings.meaning_en: using a lot of energy and strength or determination
meanings.example: Your dog needs at least 20 minutes of vigorous exercise every day.
meanings.example_cn: 你的狗每天需要进行至少20分钟的剧烈运动。

meanings.meaning_en: a game between two teams of 11 players in which players try to get points by hitting a ball and running between two sets of three sticks
meanings.example: The boy traded his knife for a cricket bat.
meanings.example_cn: 那男孩用他的刀子换了一个板球棒。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has no experience in a skill, subject, or activity
meanings.example: The computer course is ideal for novices.
meanings.example_cn: 这门计算机课程非常适合初学者。

meanings.meaning_en: the degree to which something can reasonably be expected to happen
meanings.example: If I refused, it would in all likelihood mean I’d lose my job.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我拒绝，那我十有八九会丢掉工作。

meanings.meaning_en: the cost of insurance, especially the amount that you pay each year
meanings.example: insurance premiums
meanings.example_cn: 保险费

meanings.meaning_en: friendly and happy
meanings.example: a genial smile
meanings.example_cn: 亲切的微笑

meanings.meaning_en: completely unreasonable, stupid, or wrong
meanings.example: It is ludicrous to suggest that I was driving under the influence of alcohol.
meanings.example_cn: 说我酒后驾车，这真是太荒唐了。

meanings.meaning_en: admired as one of the best and most important
meanings.example: a prestigious literary award
meanings.example_cn: 享有盛名的文学奖

meanings.meaning_en: not looking, pointing etc directly at something
meanings.example: an oblique glance
meanings.example_cn: 斜瞥

meanings.meaning_en: to accidentally hear what other people are saying, when they do not know that you have heard
meanings.example: I overheard part of their conversation.
meanings.example_cn: 我碰巧听到了他们谈话的部分内容。

meanings.meaning_en: when you are expecting something to happen
meanings.example: She waited in eager anticipation for Robert to arrive.
meanings.example_cn: 她急切地期盼着罗伯特到来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有道德的；善良的；贞洁的；简朴的
meanings.meaning_en: not having sex with anyone, or not with anyone except your husband or wife
meanings.example: She led a chaste decent life.
meanings.example_cn: 她过着贞洁正派的生活。

meanings.meaning_en: to travel around an area in order to find out about it
meanings.example: Venice is a wonderful city to explore.
meanings.example_cn: 威尼斯是一个美妙的城市，值得好好探究一番。

meanings.meaning_en: having a strong taste or smell
meanings.example: He expressed some fairly pungent criticisms.
meanings.example_cn: 他提出了一针见血的批评。

meanings.meaning_en: to let someone have or do whatever they want, even if it is bad for them
meanings.example: His mother spoiled him, indulging his every whim.
meanings.example_cn: 他母亲对他纵容娇惯，百依百顺。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something easier or less complicated
meanings.example: an attempt to simplify the tax system
meanings.example_cn: 简化税制的尝试

meanings.meaning_en: very unkind in a way that is intended to hurt someone’s feelings or make their character seem bad
meanings.example: Sarah can be quite vicious at times.
meanings.example_cn: 萨拉有时相当狠毒。

meanings.meaning_en: Something that is a counterbalance to something else counterbalances that thing
meanings.example: ...organizations set up as a counterbalance to groups allied to the ANC.
meanings.example_cn: ...作为对与非洲人国民大会联盟团体制衡而成立的各种组织。

meanings.meaning_en: to have an equal and opposite effect to something such as a change, feeling etc
a set of tools, equipment etc that you use for a particular purpose or activity
meanings.example: Sally keeps her make-up kit in her bag.
meanings.example_cn: 萨莉把化妆包放在手提包里。

meanings.example: a bike repair kit
meanings.example_cn: 一套自行车修理工具

meanings.meaning_en: a small bush with several woody stems
meanings.example: ...flowering shrubs.
meanings.example_cn: …开花的灌木。

meanings.meaning_en: tending to disagree with what other people tell you
meanings.example: ‘You can trust me,’ he said. Jane looked sceptical.
meanings.example_cn: “你可以相信我。”他说。而简看上去一脸怀疑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可怜的，悲惨的；不适当的
meanings.meaning_en: making you feel pity or sympathy
meanings.example: The child looked a pathetic sight.
meanings.example_cn: 那个孩子看上去很可怜。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area where there are a lot of shops, usually a covered area where cars are not allowed
meanings.example: Let’s meet at the mall and go see a movie.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在购物中心碰头，然后去看电影吧。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone think and behave exactly as you want them to, by skilfully deceiving or influencing them
meanings.example: He was one of those men who manipulated people.
meanings.example_cn: 他是那种要摆布别人的人。

meanings.meaning_en: rational thoughts, decisions etc are based on reasons rather than emotions
meanings.example: Parents need to be fully informed so they can make a rational decision.
meanings.example_cn: 父母需要充分了解情况，这样才可以作出合理的决定。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is vulnerable can be easily harmed or hurt
meanings.example: He took advantage of me when I was at my most vulnerable.
meanings.example_cn: 他在我最脆弱的时候利用了我。

meanings.meaning_en: to move up and down with very strong movements
meanings.example: Michael’s shoulders heaved with silent laughter.
meanings.example_cn: 迈克尔憋着不笑出声来，双肩直抖。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong pulling, pushing, or lifting movement
meanings.example: The sea heaved up and down beneath the boat.
meanings.example_cn: 船的下面大海波涛汹涌。

meanings.meaning_en: to move towards you or arrive at the place where you are
meanings.example: Let me know when they come.
meanings.example_cn: 他们来了就告诉我。

meanings.meaning_en: a good and acceptable reason for doing something
meanings.example: Hoggart felt, with some justification, that his colleagues had let him down.
meanings.example_cn: 霍加特觉得同事令他失望，这是有理由的。

meanings.meaning_en: a curved shape or line
meanings.example: the arc of a rainbow
meanings.example_cn: 彩虹的弧状

meanings.meaning_en: to fight someone by holding them and pulling or pushing them
meanings.example: Police officers wrestled him to the ground .
meanings.example_cn: 警察把他扑倒在地。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal written agreement between two or more countries or governments
meanings.example: Both sides have agreed to sign the treaty .
meanings.example_cn: 双方都同意签署该条约。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of animal that drinks milk from its mother’s body when it is young. Humans, dogs, and whales are mammals.
meanings.example: A whale is a kind of mammal.
meanings.example_cn: 鲸是一种哺乳动物。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who publicly supports someone or something
meanings.example: He was a strong advocate of free market policies and a multi-party system.
meanings.example_cn: 他是自由市场政策以及多党制的坚定倡导者。

meanings.meaning_en: If you advocate a particular action or plan, you recommend it publicly
meanings.example: Mr. Williams is a conservative who advocates fewer government controls on business.
meanings.example_cn: 威廉斯先生是一位提倡减少政府对商业的控制的保守人士。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is fickle is always changing their mind about people or things that they like, so that you cannot depend on them – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: an unpredictable and fickle lover
meanings.example_cn: 一个捉摸不透、三心二意的情人

meanings.meaning_en: an act of raising your right hand to your head as a sign of respect, usually done by a soldier to an officer
meanings.example: As they left, the corporal gave them a respectful salute.
meanings.example_cn: 他们离开时，下士恭敬地向他们行礼。

meanings.example: Snowplows have been out clearing the roads.
meanings.example_cn: 扫雪机已经出动，去清扫路面了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make somewhere emptier or tidier by removing things from it
meanings.example: Dad cleared a space (= moved things so there was room ) in the garage for Jim’s tools.
meanings.example_cn: 爸爸在车库里清理出一个地方来放吉姆的工具。

meanings.meaning_en: in a different way
meanings.example: people who smoke or otherwise abuse their bodies
meanings.example_cn: 吸烟或以其他方式糟蹋自己身体的人

meanings.meaning_en: involving a lot of strength and effort
meanings.example: ...a long, hot and arduous trip.
meanings.example_cn: …一段漫长、灼热、艰难的旅程。

meanings.meaning_en: arriving, happening, or being done at exactly the time that has been arranged
meanings.example: She’s always very punctual for appointments.
meanings.example_cn: 她一向准时赴约。

meanings.meaning_en: a book or list of names, facts etc, usually arranged in alphabetical order
meanings.example: I couldn’t find your number in the telephone directory.
meanings.example_cn: 我在电话簿上找不到你的电话号码。

meanings.meaning_en: to defeat someone or something completely
meanings.example: A happy ending is only possible because the hero has first vanquished the dragons.
meanings.example_cn: 只有主人公先把那些恶龙制服，快乐的结局才有可能。

meanings.example: She lay motionless where she was, oblivious to pain.
meanings.example_cn: 她一动不动地躺在原地，感觉不到疼痛。

meanings.example: The apprentice lingered his work.
meanings.example_cn: 这个徒弟磨洋工。

meanings.example: His apprentice always leaves the tools about.
meanings.example_cn: 他的徒弟老是乱放工具。

meanings.meaning_en: a short journey arranged so that a group of people can visit a place, especially while they are on holiday
meanings.example: a shopping excursion
meanings.example_cn: 购物游

meanings.meaning_en: a lot of rain that falls in a short time
meanings.example: ...sheltering from a sudden downpour of rain.
meanings.example_cn: …躲避一场突如其来的瓢泼大雨。

meanings.meaning_en: if something is mandatory, the law says it must be done
meanings.example: Murder carries a mandatory life sentence .
meanings.example_cn: 谋杀罪依照法律要判无期徒刑。

meanings.meaning_en: to appear as a large unclear shape, especially in a threatening way
meanings.example: Vincent loomed over me, as pale and grey as a tombstone.
meanings.example_cn: 文森特赫然出现在我面前，脸色苍白阴沉得像块墓碑。

meanings.meaning_en: a frame or machine on which thread is woven into cloth

meanings.example: Note that you must use the same variant of this option for all compiler runs related to the same project.
meanings.example_cn: 注意，对于所有运行的与同一个项目相关的编译器，必须使用这个选项的相同变体。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is slightly different from the usual form of something
meanings.example: Product variant: This is a product that is based on another product but with some different characteristics.
meanings.example_cn: 产品变体：这是一种基于另一种产品但具备一些不同特性的产品。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people that are chosen to make rules, laws, or decisions, or to give advice
meanings.example: the council for civil liberties
meanings.example_cn: 公民自由委员会

meanings.example: His meager wage is not enough to support their five children.
meanings.example_cn: 靠他一个人的微薄工资不足以养活他们的五个孩子。

meanings.meaning_en: a combination of several musical notes that are played at the same time and sound pleasant together
meanings.example: Many of the things she says will strike a chord with other young women.
meanings.example_cn: 她说的许多话都能引起其他年轻女子的共鸣。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可忍受的，可容许的，尚好的
meanings.meaning_en: a situation that is tolerable is not very good, but you are able to accept it
meanings.example: The apartment is really too small, but it’s tolerable for the time being.
meanings.example_cn: 这套公寓实在太小，不过暂时还能凑合。

meanings.meaning_en: cloth used for making clothes, curtains etc
meanings.example: our new range of fabrics and wallpapers
meanings.example_cn: 我们新的织物和墙纸系列

meanings.meaning_cn: 镶嵌；环境，背景；(日月)沉落
meanings.meaning_en: the place where something is or where something happens, and the general environment
meanings.example: I’ve worked with children in various settings, mainly in secondary school.
meanings.example_cn: 我在许多地方教过孩子，主要是在中学。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you think is true, based on information that you have
meanings.example: There were two inferences to be drawn from her letter.
meanings.example_cn: 从她的来信可以得到两种推论。

meanings.meaning_en: to order someone to come to a place
meanings.example: Robert summoned the waiter for the bill.
meanings.example_cn: 罗伯特召唤服务员结账。

meanings.meaning_en: to see and notice some­thing
meanings.example: Scientists have observed a drop in ozone levels over the Antarctic.
meanings.example_cn: 科学家已经观察到南极洲上方的臭氧浓度有所下降。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is exotic seems unusual and interesting because it is related to a foreign country – use this to show approval
meanings.example: exotic birds
meanings.example_cn: 外国的奇异鸟类

meanings.meaning_en: thinking that you are better than other people – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: She had that superior tone of voice.
meanings.example_cn: 她带着那种傲慢的语气。

meanings.meaning_en: only one
meanings.example: A single tree gave shade from the sun.
meanings.example_cn: 唯有一棵树遮阴。

meanings.meaning_en: a game, especially in tennis, in which one person plays on their own against another person
meanings.example: They won the game by a single point.
meanings.example_cn: 他们仅以一分的优势赢得比赛。

meanings.meaning_en: a very impressive show or scene
meanings.example: a multimedia dance and opera spectacle
meanings.example_cn: 盛大的多媒体舞蹈戏剧表演

meanings.meaning_en: a balance between different people, groups, or forces that compete with each other, so that none is stronger than the others and a situation is not likely to change suddenly
meanings.example: The government is anxious not to upset the economic equilibrium.
meanings.example_cn: 政府急切希望不要打乱经济平衡。

meanings.meaning_en: a soluble substance can be  dissolved  in a liquid
meanings.example: soluble aspirin
meanings.example_cn: 可溶性阿司匹林

meanings.meaning_en: a very strong wind
meanings.example: a severe gale
meanings.example_cn: 一阵狂风

meanings.meaning_en: the hard brown outer surface of bread
meanings.example: sandwiches with the crusts cut off
meanings.example_cn: 切去边皮的三明治

meanings.meaning_en: a place where one road, track etc joins another
meanings.example: the junction of Abbot Road and Mill Street
meanings.example_cn: 阿伯特路与米尔街的交叉口

meanings.meaning_cn: 堆；一堆；堆积；许多，大量；装载
meanings.meaning_en: a large untidy pile of things
meanings.example: a rubbish heap
meanings.example_cn: 垃圾堆

meanings.meaning_en: to feel very sad and to miss someone after they have died
meanings.example: Hundreds of people gathered to mourn the slain president.
meanings.example_cn: 成百上千人聚集在一起悼念遇刺的总统。

meanings.meaning_en: a dog that is fast and has a good sense of smell, used for hunting
meanings.example: A troubled hound was baying the moon.
meanings.example_cn: 一条受惊不安的猎狗正在对月狂吠。

meanings.example: Our fox and hound find their long friendship thoroughly obliterated and end up trying to kill each other.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的狐狸和猎狗发现他们的老交情彻底被毁了，最后居然要杀死对方。

meanings.meaning_en: a change in the  genetic  structure of an animal or plant that makes it different from others of the same kind

meanings.meaning_cn: 斗篷，披风；覆盖物，(煤气灯)白热罩
meanings.meaning_en: a loose piece of outer clothing without sleeves, worn especially in former times
meanings.example: We have the rare opportunity to seize the mantle of national leadership.
meanings.example_cn: 这次是我们担当国家领导职责的天赐良机。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过剩的，多余的，不必要的
meanings.meaning_en: more than is needed or wanted
meanings.example: a modern building with no superfluous decoration
meanings.example_cn: 一栋没有多余装饰的现代建筑

meanings.example: This debate should be set in an international context .
meanings.example_cn: 这场辩论应该放在国际大背景下来看。

meanings.meaning_en: to put something inside or into something else
meanings.example: He took a small key from his pocket and slowly inserted it into the lock.
meanings.example_cn: 他从衣袋里掏出一把小钥匙，然后缓缓地将其插入锁孔里。

meanings.meaning_en: printed pages that are put inside a newspaper or magazine in order to advertise something
to describe or represent something or someone
meanings.example: His most famous painting portrayed the death of Nelson.
meanings.example_cn: 他最著名的画作描绘的是纳尔逊之死。

meanings.meaning_en: a room where television and radio programmes are made and broadcast or where music is recorded
meanings.example: a TV studio
meanings.example_cn: 电视演播室

meanings.meaning_en: feeling very sorry and embarrassed because of something you have done
meanings.example: Everyone cries sometimes – it’s nothing to be ashamed of.
meanings.example_cn: 每个人都会有哭的时候——没什么好难为情的。

meanings.meaning_en: if a problem or difficult situation arises, it begins to happen
meanings.example: A crisis has arisen in the Foreign Office.
meanings.example_cn: 外交部出现了危机。

meanings.meaning_en: if something repels you, it is so unpleasant that you do not want to be near it, or it makes you feel ill
meanings.example: The smell repelled him.
meanings.example_cn: 这气味让他反感。

meanings.meaning_en: not cooked
meanings.example: raw meat
meanings.example_cn: 生肉

meanings.meaning_en: if a particular period of time elapses, it passes
meanings.example: Several months elapsed before his case was brought to trial.
meanings.example_cn: 过了几个月他的案子才开审。

meanings.meaning_en: to make heat, light, liquid etc spread through something, or to spread like this
meanings.example: Their ideas diffused quickly across Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的观点很快在欧洲传播开来。

meanings.meaning_en: spread over a large area

meanings.meaning_cn: 细软的 柔嫩的 精美的 微妙的 难办的
meanings.meaning_en: a part of the body that is delicate is attractive and graceful
meanings.example: Her wrists and ankles were slim and delicate.
meanings.example_cn: 她的手腕和脚踝长得纤巧优雅。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious promise
meanings.example: Jim made a vow that he would find his wife’s killer.
meanings.example_cn: 吉姆发誓要找到杀害他妻子的凶手。

meanings.meaning_en: the main idea and meaning of what someone has said or written
meanings.example: Don’t worry about all the details as long as you get the gist (= understand the main meaning ) of it.
meanings.example_cn: 不要去管各个细节，只要理解主要意思就行了。

meanings.meaning_en: a specific thing, person, or group is one particular thing, person, or group
meanings.example: games suitable for specific age groups
meanings.example_cn: 适合特定年龄组的游戏

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is being considered for a job or is competing in an election
meanings.example: a presidential candidate
meanings.example_cn: 总统候选人

meanings.meaning_en: someone, not usually a lawyer, who works as a judge in a local court of law, dealing with less serious crimes
meanings.example: She will face a local magistrate on Tuesday.
meanings.example_cn: 她将在星期二面见一位地方治安法官。

meanings.meaning_en: something such as a piece of equipment or a decoration that is not necessary, but that makes a machine, car, room etc more useful or more attractive
meanings.example: bathroom accessories such as mirrors and towel-rails
meanings.example_cn: 镜子和毛巾架等浴室配件

meanings.example: The captain dived his submarine deep to escape from the destroyers.
meanings.example_cn: 海军上校使他的潜艇深深下潜以逃避驱逐艇。

meanings.meaning_en: a ship, especially a military one, that can stay under water
relating to or caused by heat
meanings.example: thermal energy
meanings.example_cn: 热能

meanings.meaning_en: impossible to remove or forget
meanings.example: Her words left an indelible impression on me for years to come.
meanings.example_cn: 她的话多年来我都难以忘怀。

meanings.meaning_en: to lengthen or extend (a speech, etc); prolong in time
meanings.example: Delay always breeds danger; and to protract a great design is often to ruin it.
meanings.example_cn: 推迟经常孕育危险；拖延一个伟大的工程常常意味着毁灭它。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave a job, school etc, especially without finishing it completely
meanings.example: He quit his job after an argument with a colleague.
meanings.example_cn: 他和一个同事争吵后就辞职了。

meanings.meaning_en: to go on a walk in the countryside for pleasure
meanings.example: There’s plenty to discover as you ramble around this little island.
meanings.example_cn: 漫步这个小岛，你会有很多新发现。

meanings.meaning_en: to hit a person or animal very hard with a whip, stick etc
meanings.example: Oliver lashed the horses to go faster.
meanings.example_cn: 奥利弗快马加鞭。

meanings.meaning_en: objects made out of baked clay
meanings.example: Native American pottery
meanings.example_cn: 美洲印第安人的陶器

meanings.meaning_en: to charge someone with a crime and try to show that they are guilty of it in a court of law
meanings.example: Shoplifters will be prosecuted.
meanings.example_cn: 在商店行窃者将被起诉。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a bad situation, an illness, or an injury worse
meanings.example: Their money problems were further aggravated by a rise in interest rates.
meanings.example_cn: 由于利率上调，他们的财务问题更加严重。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to end a quarrel between two people, groups, countries etc
meanings.example: The former president has agreed to mediate the peace talks.
meanings.example_cn: 前总统同意就和谈进行斡旋。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your mind that tells you whether what you are doing is morally right or wrong

meanings.meaning_en: very big, impressive, or beautiful

meanings.example: They have to be able to pinpoint people in order to work, but satellite positioning does not work indoors.
