meanings.example: He was lolling on the sofa in the shadows near the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 他懒洋洋地躺在炉火边一个背光的沙发上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 激励，鼓励，灌注以创造力
meanings.meaning_en: to encourage someone by making them feel confident and eager to do something
meanings.example: We need someone who can inspire the team.
meanings.example_cn: 我们需要一个能鼓舞团队士气的人。

meanings.meaning_en: happening regularly or all the time
meanings.example: There was a constant stream of visitors to the house.
meanings.example_cn: 参观这幢房子的游客川流不息。

meanings.meaning_en: the border around an enclosed area such as a military camp
meanings.example: ...the perimeter of the airport.
meanings.example_cn: …机场周边。

meanings.meaning_en: unreasonably anxious or afraid
meanings.example: He seemed a neurotic, self-obsessed man.
meanings.example_cn: 他似乎是个神经过敏又自恋的人。

meanings.meaning_en: A neurotic is someone who is neurotic
meanings.example: These patients are not neurotics.
meanings.example_cn: 这些病人不是神经官能症患者。

meanings.meaning_en: if you assemble a large number of people or things, or if they assemble, they are gathered together in one place, often for a particular purpose
meanings.example: A large crowd had assembled outside the American embassy.
meanings.example_cn: 一大群人聚集在美国大使馆外。

meanings.meaning_en: the place or situation in which something begins to exist
meanings.example: The tradition has its origins in the Middle Ages.
meanings.example_cn: 这一传统源于中世纪。

meanings.meaning_en: to throw something with a lot of force, especially because you are angry
meanings.example: Demonstrators were hurling bricks through the windows.
meanings.example_cn: 示威者在向窗里掷砖块。

meanings.meaning_en: a woman student at a university
meanings.example: ...two University of Florida coeds.
meanings.example_cn: ...两名佛罗里达大学的女生。

meanings.meaning_en: standing or sitting straight up
meanings.example: Katie was still awake, sitting bolt upright(= sitting with her back very straight ) staring at the television.
meanings.example_cn: 凯蒂还醒着，坐得笔直，眼睛盯着电视。

meanings.meaning_en: a mountain with a large hole at the top, through which lava(= very hot liquid rock ) is sometimes forced out
meanings.example: Pompeii was destroyed when the volcano erupted in 79 AD.
meanings.example_cn: 庞贝城于公元79年在火山爆发中毁灭。

meanings.meaning_en: a momentous event, change, or decision is very important because it will have a great influence on the future
meanings.example: a momentous decision
meanings.example_cn: 重大决定

meanings.meaning_en: while noisy, busy, or confused events are happening – used in writing or news reports
meanings.example: The dollar has fallen in value amid rumors of weakness in the US economy.
meanings.example_cn: 在一片美国经济疲软的传言中，美元贬值了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 凶猛的，狂热的，强烈的，愤怒的
meanings.meaning_en: done with a lot of energy and strong feelings, and sometimes violence
meanings.example: fierce fighting in the city
meanings.example_cn: 城里的激烈战斗

meanings.meaning_en: a part of a  cooker  in which strong heat from above cooks food on a metal shelf below
meanings.example: Pop it under the grill for five minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 把它放在烤架下烤五分钟。

meanings.meaning_en: most important
meanings.example: Our primary concern is to provide the refugees with food and health care.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的头等大事是向难民提供食品和医疗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 易弯曲的；柔软的，灵活的
meanings.meaning_en: a person, plan etc that is flexible can change or be changed easily to suit any new situation
meanings.example: We can be flexible about your starting date.
meanings.example_cn: 你具体从哪天开始，我们可以灵活一点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使加入，接受为分支机构
meanings.example: She affiliated herself with the Impressionist school of painting.
meanings.example_cn: 她加入了印象主义画派。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which a large number of people have little or no food for a long time and many people die
meanings.example: the great potato famine in Ireland
meanings.example_cn: 爱尔兰严重的土豆荒

meanings.meaning_en: to express an idea, feeling, thought etc using words
meanings.example: ‘I’m so tired,’ she said.
meanings.example_cn: “我太累了。”她说。

meanings.example: This is undoubtedly important.
meanings.example_cn: 这无疑是重要的。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the navy or used by the navy
meanings.example: a naval officer
meanings.example_cn: 海军军官

meanings.meaning_en: not smooth, flat, or level
meanings.example: She walked back carefully over the uneven ground.
meanings.example_cn: 她小心翼翼地从凹凸不平的地面上走回来。

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指食物)易坏的,易腐烂的;易坏之物"

meanings.example: So I never grudge my love.
meanings.example_cn: 所以，我从不吝惜我的爱。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of dislike for someone because you cannot forget that they harmed you in the past

meanings.meaning_cn: 寓言般的；惊人的，难以置信的
meanings.example: Crystal clear waters, beautiful white sand beaches, swaying palm trees and fabulous dive sites – that’s why the Maldives, is known for being one of the best tropical holiday destinations in the world.
meanings.example_cn: 清澈透明的海水，美丽的白色沙滩，摇曳生姿的棕榈树，难以置信的的潜水胜地——这就是马尔代夫被誉为世界上最佳热带地区度假地之一的原因。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where grain, especially wheat, is stored
meanings.example: The Mid-West is the granary of the U.S.
meanings.example_cn: 中西部是美国的粮仓。

meanings.example: I understood the psychology of this, but it still hurt.
meanings.example_cn: 我理解这种心理，但这仍然让我感到伤心。

meanings.meaning_en: to kill an animal, especially for its meat
meanings.example: Hundreds of innocent civilians had been slaughtered by government troops.
meanings.example_cn: 数百名无辜平民遭政府军屠杀。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the foods that you use to make a particular food or dish
meanings.example: Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl.
meanings.example_cn: 把所有食材都放在一个大碗里。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been forced to leave their country, especially during a war, or for political or religious reasons
meanings.example: Refugees were streaming across the border.
meanings.example_cn: 难民正涌过边境。

meanings.meaning_en: to represent, mean, or be a sign of something
meanings.example: Some tribes use special facial markings to signify status.
meanings.example_cn: 有些部落使用特殊的面部标记来表示地位。

meanings.meaning_en: to change something into a different form, or to change something so that it can be used for a different purpose or in a different way
meanings.example: a 19th-century converted barn
meanings.example_cn: 由19世纪谷仓改建的房子

meanings.meaning_en: to remove an object from somewhere, especially with difficulty
meanings.example: You’ll have to have that tooth extracted.
meanings.example_cn: 你得把那颗牙拔掉。

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of writing, music etc taken from a particular book, piece of music etc
something that is invisible cannot be seen
meanings.example: The house was surrounded by trees, and invisible from the road.
meanings.example_cn: 这所房子树木环绕，从路上是看不见的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发明; 设计; 设法；造成
meanings.meaning_en: to succeed in doing something in spite of difficulties
meanings.example: In 1862, a technique was contrived to take a series of photographs showing stages of movement.
meanings.example_cn: 1862年时发明了一种技术，可以拍出一连串展示连续动作的照片。

meanings.meaning_en: to move from a higher level to a lower one
meanings.example: Our plane started to descend.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的飞机开始下降。

meanings.meaning_en: If something perturbs you, it worries you quite a lot
meanings.example: What perturbs me is that magazine articles are so much shorter nowadays.
meanings.example_cn: 让我不安的是现在杂志文章都短多了。

meanings.example: So, the second method is almost always combined with the first, by checking the fields in instantaneous and then doing a batch validation before the form is submitted.
meanings.example_cn: 所以，第二种方法几乎总是和第一种方法结合在一起，先对域进行瞬时检查，然后在表单被提交之前执行批处理确认。

meanings.meaning_cn: 斜坡地，梯田；看台，大阶级
meanings.meaning_en: the wide steps that the people watching a football match can stand on
meanings.example: ...massive terraces of corn and millet carved into the mountainside like giant steps.
meanings.example_cn: …山坡上开垦出来种玉米和小米的巨型台阶般的大块大块梯田。

meanings.meaning_en: allowed by law or by the rules
meanings.example: the maximum permissible level of radiation
meanings.example_cn: 允许的最大辐射水平

meanings.meaning_en: loyalty to a leader, country, belief etc
meanings.example: an oath of allegiance
meanings.example_cn: 效忠宣誓

meanings.meaning_en: a substance used to cover walls and ceilings with a smooth even surface. It consists of  lime  , water, and sand.
meanings.example: The ceiling he had just plastered fell in and knocked him off his ladder.
meanings.example_cn: 他刚抹过灰泥的那块天花板脱落了，把他从梯子上砸了下来。

meanings.meaning_en: almost
meanings.example: I’ve read practically all of his books.
meanings.example_cn: 我差不多读过他所有的书。

meanings.meaning_en: a hospital – often used in the names of hospitals in Britain
meanings.example: All they need now are the keys to the infirmary.
meanings.example_cn: 现在所需要的就是医务室的门钥匙。

meanings.meaning_en: If a liquid such as whisky or water is distilled, it is heated until it changes into steam or vapour and then cooled until it becomes liquid again. This is usually done in order to make it pure.
meanings.example: The whisky had been distilled in 1926 and sat quietly maturing until 1987.
meanings.example_cn: 这瓶威士忌是1926年被蒸馏的，存放至1987年酿造成熟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 一致同意的；全体一致的
meanings.meaning_en: agreeing completely about something
meanings.example: It was decided by a unanimous vote that the school should close.
meanings.example_cn: 关闭学校是大家一致通过的决定。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool for cutting paper, cloth etc, made of two sharp blades fastened together in the middle, with holes for your finger and thumb
meanings.example: a pair of scissors
meanings.example_cn: 一把剪刀

meanings.meaning_en: if a process accelerates or if something accelerates it, it happens faster than usual or sooner than you expect
meanings.example: measures to accelerate the rate of economic growth
meanings.example_cn: 加快经济增长速度的措施

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone unable to use a part of their body properly
meanings.example: Carter was permanently disabled in the war.
meanings.example_cn: 卡特在那场战争中成了终生残废。

meanings.meaning_cn: 小错，记错；(时间)流逝；[律]权利终止
meanings.example: He forgot to offer Darren a drink, but Marie did not appear to notice the lapse.
meanings.example_cn: 他忘了给达伦倒饮料，玛丽好像也没有注意到这个疏忽。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture, jewellery etc that was made a very long time ago and is therefore valuable
meanings.example: The palace is full of priceless antiques.
meanings.example_cn: 宫殿里到处都是价值连城的古董。

meanings.meaning_en: a line on a piece of cloth, paper etc where it has been folded, crushed, or pressed
meanings.example: She smoothed the creases from her skirt.
meanings.example_cn: 她捋平裙子上的皱褶。

meanings.meaning_en: to become marked with a line or lines, or to make a line appear on cloth, paper etc by folding or crushing it
meanings.example: I’ll have to iron out the creases.
meanings.example_cn: 我得把皱褶熨平。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific idea that plants and animals develop and change gradually over a long period of time
meanings.example: the theory of evolution
meanings.example_cn: 进化论

meanings.meaning_en: to plant or scatter seeds on a piece of ground
meanings.example: Sow the seeds in late March.
meanings.example_cn: 三月底播种。

meanings.meaning_en: very large or great in a surprising or impressive way
meanings.example: the artist’s prodigious output
meanings.example_cn: 那位艺术家惊人的高产

meanings.meaning_en: to go onto a ship or a plane, or to put or take something onto a ship or plane
meanings.example: He's embarking on a new career as a writer.
meanings.example_cn: 他正开始一个当作家的新生涯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 问题单，调查表，征求意见表
meanings.meaning_en: a written set of questions which you give to a large number of people in order to collect information
meanings.example: Teachers will be asked to fill in a questionnaire.
meanings.example_cn: 教师们将被要求填写一份调查问卷。

meanings.meaning_en: an official statement or receipt that is given to some­one to prove that their accounts are correct or that money has been paid
meanings.example: As a basic business voucher in the economic exchange, invoice is a primitive evidence for financial accounting and an important proof for taxation check.
meanings.example_cn: 发票作为经济交往中基本的商事凭证，是财务会计核算的原始凭证和税务稽查的重要凭据。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is difficult to understand or explain
meanings.example: The meaning of the poem has always been a puzzle.
meanings.example_cn: 那首诗的含义始终是个谜。

meanings.meaning_en: to confuse someone or make them feel slightly anxious because they do not understand something
meanings.example: He thought he had solved the puzzle .
meanings.example_cn: 他认为他已经解开了那个谜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 金属薄片；陪衬物；钝头剑
meanings.meaning_en: a light slender flexible sword tipped by a button and usually having a bell-shaped guard
meanings.example: The simple stone floor is the perfect foil for the brightly coloured furnishings.
meanings.example_cn: 朴素的石材地板完美地衬托出色彩鲜艳的家具。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone something or allow them to have something that they have asked for
meanings.example: Britain could grant Spain’s request .
meanings.example_cn: 英国可能会同意西班牙的请求。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money given to someone, especially by the government, for a particular purpose
meanings.example: I would love to be able to grant her wish.
meanings.example_cn: 我很希望能够满足她的愿望。

meanings.meaning_en: a polite or formal demand for something
meanings.example: To request more information, please call our toll free number.
meanings.example_cn: 欲知详情，请拨打我们的免费电话。

meanings.meaning_cn: 微妙的；难以捉摸的；精明的
meanings.meaning_en: not easy to notice or understand unless you pay careful attention
meanings.example: The pictures are similar, but there are subtle differences between them.
meanings.example_cn: 这些图片很相似，但它们之间有细微的差别。

meanings.meaning_en: a pipe or passage under the ground that carries away waste material and used water from houses, factories etc
meanings.example: ...the city's sewer system.
meanings.example_cn: …该城市的下水道系统。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of buying and using products
meanings.example: art intended for mass consumption
meanings.example_cn: 供大众消费的艺术品

meanings.meaning_en: for this reason
meanings.example: The cost of transport is a major expense for an industry. Hence factory location is an important consideration.
meanings.example_cn: 运输成本是企业的一大支出，因此工厂选址是重要的考虑因素。

meanings.meaning_cn: (织物)组织，结构；(材料)构造，结构
meanings.meaning_en: The texture of something, especially food or soil, is its structure, for example, whether it is light with lots of holes, or very heavy and solid
meanings.example: Matured over 18 months, this cheese has an open, crumbly texture with a strong flavour.
meanings.example_cn: 这种奶酪18个月后发酵成熟，气孔多，组织松脆，味道浓郁。

meanings.meaning_en: if something varies, it changes depending on the situation
meanings.example: Quentin’s mood seems to vary according to the weather.
meanings.example_cn: 昆廷的情绪似乎随天气而变化。

meanings.example: Time is fleeting.; Time flies.
meanings.example_cn: 时光飞逝。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is kept as a prisoner by an enemy so that the other side will do what the enemy demands
meanings.example: The group are holding two tourists hostage (= keeping them as hostages ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这伙人挟持了两名游客作为人质。

meanings.meaning_en: something valuable that you leave with someone else as proof that you will do what you have agreed to do
meanings.example: He asked her to pledge the house as security for a loan.
meanings.example_cn: 他要她抵押房子作为贷款担保。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to find out details about someone else’s private life in an impolite way
meanings.example: I don’t want to pry , but I need to ask you one or two questions.
meanings.example_cn: 我不想唐突，不过我需要问你一两个问题。

meanings.meaning_en: something that has been made by combining different things, or the process of combining things
meanings.example: speech synthesis software
meanings.example_cn: 语音合成软件

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of extreme unhappiness
meanings.example: Luke’s behaviour caused his parents great distress.
meanings.example_cn: 卢克的行为使他的父母深感忧虑。

meanings.meaning_en: to frighten or threaten someone into making them do what you want
meanings.example: Attempts to intimidate her failed.
meanings.example_cn: 恐吓她的企图失败了。

meanings.meaning_en: to disagree with something such as a plan or idea and try to prevent it from happening or succeeding
meanings.example: Congress is continuing to oppose the President’s health care budget.
meanings.example_cn: 国会继续反对总统的医疗保健预算。

meanings.example: The reason for this was that he decided to orientate the map in the direction of the Pole Star since Polaris was the immovable guiding light in which the voyagers of that era placed their trust.
meanings.example_cn: 他之所以要这样做就是因为他决定以北极星的方向来确定地图的方位。 因为北极星是一盏不动的导航灯，那个时代的航海家们主要依靠北极星来导航。

meanings.meaning_en: a small object that you keep in your house because it is beautiful rather than useful
meanings.example: a shelf covered with books and ornaments
meanings.example_cn: 摆满书籍和装饰品的架子

meanings.meaning_cn: 猛然抛下；突然发生；加速
meanings.meaning_en: to make something serious happen suddenly or more quickly than was expected
meanings.example: The riot was precipitated when four black men were arrested.
meanings.example_cn: 这场骚乱是因为四名黑人男子的被捕而突然引发的。

meanings.meaning_en: a solid substance that has been chemically separated from a liquid

meanings.meaning_cn: (对品格或忍耐力的)严格考验
meanings.example: They manned themselves for an ordeal.
meanings.example_cn: 他们振奋精神迎接考验。

meanings.meaning_en: a placid person does not often get angry or upset and does not usually mind doing what other people want them to
meanings.example: a large, placid baby
meanings.example_cn: 一个胖胖的、安静的婴儿

meanings.meaning_en: used when one situation is the opposite of another
meanings.example: American consumers prefer white eggs; conversely, British buyers like brown eggs.
meanings.example_cn: 美国的消费者喜欢白色的鸡蛋，而英国的消费者却相反，他们喜欢棕色的鸡蛋。

meanings.meaning_cn: 值得(花时间、精力)的；合算的
meanings.meaning_en: if something is worthwhile, it is important or useful, or you gain something from it
meanings.example: He wanted to do a worthwhile job.
meanings.example_cn: 他想做有意义的工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a country ruled by a king or queen
meanings.example: Defence of the realm is crucial.
meanings.example_cn: 王国的防御是至关重要的。

meanings.meaning_en: teaching or relating to the skills you need to do a particular job
meanings.example: vocational qualifications
meanings.example_cn: 职业资格

meanings.meaning_cn: 为举行就职典礼，为展览会揭幕，开创
meanings.meaning_en: to hold an official ceremony when someone starts doing an important job in government
meanings.example: The Turner Prize was inaugurated in 1984.
meanings.example_cn: 特纳奖于1984年正式设立。

meanings.meaning_en: always supporting your friends, principles, country etc
meanings.example: a loyal supporter of the team
meanings.example_cn: 球队的忠实支持者

meanings.meaning_cn: 水晶，水晶饰品，结晶体；最好的玻璃器皿
meanings.meaning_en: very high quality clear glass
meanings.example: a set of six crystal glasses
meanings.example_cn: 六件套水晶玻璃杯

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel ashamed, nervous, or uncomfortable, especially in front of other people
meanings.example: He didn’t want to embarrass her by asking questions.
meanings.example_cn: 他不想提问让她尴尬。

meanings.meaning_en: if a dog,  wolf  , or other animal howls, it makes a long loud sound
meanings.example: The dogs howled all night.
meanings.example_cn: 那些狗整夜嘷叫。

meanings.meaning_en: to let someone go free, after having kept them somewhere
meanings.example: Police arrested several men, who were later released.
meanings.example_cn: 警察逮捕了几个人，后来都释放了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 心智健全，神智正常；判断正确
meanings.meaning_en: the condition of being mentally healthy
meanings.example: I began to doubt his sanity.
meanings.example_cn: 我开始怀疑他是否神志正常。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is visible can be seen
meanings.example: The comet is visible to the naked eye (= can be seen without using special equipment ).
meanings.example_cn: 这颗彗星肉眼看得见。

meanings.example: Every transistor has at least three electrodes.
meanings.example_cn: 每个晶体管至少有三个电极。

meanings.meaning_en: land or a field that is covered with grass and is used for cattle, sheep etc to feed on
meanings.example: large areas of rough upland pasture
meanings.example_cn: 大片起伏的山地牧场

meanings.meaning_en: to run very fast for a short distance
meanings.example: Sergeant Horne sprinted to the car.
meanings.example_cn: 霍恩中士冲向那辆汽车。

meanings.meaning_cn: 摇篮，策源地；支船架vt把放在摇篮里
meanings.meaning_en: a small bed for a baby, especially one that moves gently from side to side
meanings.example: She rocked the cradle to quieten the child.
meanings.example_cn: 她摇动摇篮，让宝宝安静下来。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who does an activity just for pleasure, not as their job
meanings.example: a gifted amateur
meanings.example_cn: 有天赋的业余爱好者

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of trying to do something even when it is difficult
meanings.example: his dogged determination (= very strong determination ) to succeed
meanings.example_cn: 他想要成功的坚定决心

meanings.meaning_en: careful about what you say or do, so that you do not offend, upset, or embarrass people or tell secrets
meanings.example: He assured her that he would be discreet.
meanings.example_cn: 他向她保证会谨慎行事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 刚愎的；坚持错误的，行为反常的
meanings.example: He gets perverse satisfaction from embarrassing people.
meanings.example_cn: 他通过使人难堪获得变态的满足感。

meanings.meaning_cn: 垂直的，成直角的；直立的
meanings.meaning_en: not leaning to one side or the other but exactly vertical
meanings.example: a perpendicular line
meanings.example_cn: 垂直线

meanings.meaning_en: an exactly vertical position or line
meanings.example: a perpendicular wall of rock
meanings.example_cn: 直立的石壁

meanings.meaning_en: an important or exciting news story that is printed in one newspaper or shown on one television station before any of the others know about it
meanings.example: a journalist looking for a scoop
meanings.example_cn: 抢独家新闻的记者

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone their money back, especially because they are not satisfied with the goods or services they have paid for
meanings.example: I took the radio back, and they refunded my money .
meanings.example_cn: 我把收音机送回去，他们给我退了款。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the production of goods, crops, or wealth
meanings.example: the economy’s productive capacity
meanings.example_cn: 该经济体的生产能力

meanings.meaning_en: to open your mouth wide and breathe in deeply because you are tired or bored
meanings.example: Alan stretched and yawned.
meanings.example_cn: 艾伦伸伸懒腰，打了个呵欠。

meanings.meaning_en: to take someone somewhere illegally by force, often in order to get money for returning them
meanings.example: Police appealed for wit­nesses after a woman was kidnapped at gunpoint.
meanings.example_cn: 一名妇女遭到持枪绑架，警方呼吁目击者挺身而出。

meanings.meaning_en: to send out gas, heat, light, sound etc
meanings.example: The kettle emitted a shrill whistle.
meanings.example_cn: 水壶发出了刺耳的鸣笛声。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to keep and check financial accounts, calculate taxes etc
meanings.example: The boss dropped an accountant from the payroll.
meanings.example_cn: 老板把一名会计师从在职人员名单中除了名。

meanings.meaning_en: the attractive and exciting quality of being connected with wealth and success
meanings.example: ...the glamour of show biz.
meanings.example_cn: …演艺业的诱惑力。

meanings.meaning_en: the air, water, and land on Earth, which is affected by man’s activities
meanings.example: Some of these chemicals are very damaging to the environment.
meanings.example_cn: 这些化学品中有些对环境非常有害。

meanings.meaning_en: to support yourself on your feet or be in an upright position
meanings.example: It looks like we’ll have to stand – there are no seats left.
meanings.example_cn: 看来我们只能站着——没有座位了。

meanings.meaning_en: in the same way
meanings.example: Nanny put on a shawl and told the girls to do likewise.
meanings.example_cn: 南妮披上披肩，并叫女孩们也这样做。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not loyal to their country, friends, or beliefs
meanings.example: ...rumours that there were traitors among us who were sending messages to the enemy.
meanings.example_cn: …谣言说我们中有正给敌人送信的叛徒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 磨碎，折磨，压榨，磨光；苦差使
meanings.meaning_en: to make something smooth or sharp by rubbing it on a hard surface or by using a machine
meanings.example: a stone for grinding knives and scissors
meanings.example_cn: 磨刀剪的石头

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh at someone or something and try to make them look stupid by saying unkind things about them or by copying them
meanings.example: Opposition MPs mocked the government’s decision.
meanings.example_cn: 反对党议员讥笑政府的这一决策。

meanings.meaning_en: not real, but intended to be very similar to a real situation, substance etc
meanings.example: ‘Running away?’ he mocked.
meanings.example_cn: “想逃跑？”他取笑道。

meanings.meaning_en: a holiday, or time spent not working
meanings.example: We’re planning a vacation in Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 我们正计划去欧洲度假。

meanings.meaning_en: the soft fatty substance in the hollow centre of bones
meanings.example: a bone marrow transplant
meanings.example_cn: 骨髓移植

meanings.meaning_cn: 坚定的, 不变的，不动摇的 "

meanings.meaning_en: something that you think is true although you have no definite proof
meanings.example: You would be making an assumption that's not based on any fact that you could report.
meanings.example_cn: 你会做出不以你能报道的任何事实为依据的一种假设。

meanings.meaning_en: the best or most suitable for a particular purpose or in a particular situation
meanings.example: optimum conditions for growth
meanings.example_cn: 最适宜生长的条件

meanings.meaning_en: a difference between two amounts, details, reports etc that should be the same
meanings.example: ...the discrepancy between press and radio reports.
meanings.example_cn: …报刊报道与广播报道之间的差异。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something is present in a particular place
meanings.example: Your presence is requested at the club meeting on Friday.
meanings.example_cn: 敬请出席于周五举行的俱乐部会议。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular type of land
meanings.example: rocky terrain
meanings.example_cn: 多石的地形

meanings.meaning_en: to eat dinner
meanings.example: He was dining with friends at the Ritz.
meanings.example_cn: 他和朋友在里茨饭店一起进餐。

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid with a strong pleasant smell that women put on their skin or clothing to make themselves smell nice
meanings.example: She was wearing the perfume that he’d bought her.
meanings.example_cn: 她擦了他买给她的香水。

meanings.meaning_en: if a sound echoes, you hear it again because it was made near something such as a wall or hill
meanings.example: The sound of an engine echoed back from the thick forest.
meanings.example_cn: 从茂密的森林里传来引擎的回声。

meanings.meaning_cn: 开凿出来的公路，铁路；剪报
meanings.meaning_en: an article that has been cut from a newspaper or magazine
meanings.example: ...notice boards crowded with newspaper cuttings.
meanings.example_cn: …贴满了剪报的布告栏。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to keep increasing, developing, or being more successful
meanings.example: incentives to maintain the momentum of European integration
meanings.example_cn: 保持欧洲一体化发展势头的激励措施

meanings.meaning_en: not in any place or to any place
meanings.example: Nowhere is drug abuse more of a problem than in the US.
meanings.example_cn: 没有什么地方的吸毒问题比美国更严重。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to take care of sheep
meanings.example: In comparison, a German shepherd has a biting pressure of 750 pounds per square inch.
meanings.example_cn: 相比较，德国牧羊犬在咬牙时每平方英寸大约有750英镑的压力。

meanings.meaning_en: to lead or guide a group of people somewhere, making sure that they go where you want them to go
to be in charge of something, and control how it is done
meanings.example: Meese was to superintend the administration's entire domestic policy.
meanings.example_cn: 米斯要监管政府的所有国内政策。

meanings.meaning_en: set of ancient myths
meanings.example: characters from classical mythology
meanings.example_cn: 古典神话中的人物

meanings.example: the ever-rising statistics of delinquency and crime
meanings.example_cn: 青少年违法犯罪不断增加的统计数字

meanings.meaning_en: when something reduces someone’s pain or unhappy feelings
meanings.example: Marijuana can provide pain relief for some cancer patients.
meanings.example_cn: 大麻可以为一些癌症患者减轻疼痛。

meanings.meaning_en: when something is officially stopped for a period of time
meanings.example: He received a six-month suspension for unprofessional behaviour.
meanings.example_cn: 他因有违职业道德的行为被停职六个月。

meanings.meaning_en: deserving praise, even if not completely successful
meanings.example: a laudable attempt
meanings.example_cn: 值得称道的尝试

meanings.meaning_en: a small amount of food that is eaten between main meals or instead of a meal
meanings.example: I grabbed a quick snack.
meanings.example_cn: 我赶紧吃了点零食。

meanings.meaning_en: to completely destroy a building
meanings.example: The entire east wing of the building was demolished in the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 大楼的整个东翼都被大火烧毁了。

meanings.meaning_en: a small object that produces a high whistling sound when you blow into it
meanings.example: The lifeguard blew his whistle.
meanings.example_cn: 救生员吹响哨子。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a high or musical sound by blowing air out through your lips

meanings.meaning_cn: 怪物；畸形的动植物；恶人
meanings.meaning_en: an imaginary or ancient creature that is large, ugly, and frightening
meanings.example: the remains of a prehistoric monster
meanings.example_cn: 史前怪兽的遗骸

meanings.meaning_en: a set of beliefs that form an important part of a religion or system of ideas
meanings.example: traditional doctrines of divine power
meanings.example_cn: 神力的传统教义

meanings.meaning_en: a particular quality in someone’s character
meanings.example: The study found that some alcoholics had clear personality traits showing up early in childhood.
meanings.example_cn: 这项研究发现一些酗酒者早在孩童时就表现出明显的个性特征。

meanings.meaning_en: to wake someone who is sleeping deeply
meanings.example: His banging roused the neighbours.
meanings.example_cn: 他重重的关门声把邻居都吵醒了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可兼容的，可和谐共存的
meanings.meaning_en: if two pieces of computer equipment are compatible, they can be used together, especially when they are made by different companies
meanings.example: The new software is IBM compatible (= can be used with IBM computers ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这个新软件与IBM的计算机兼容。

meanings.meaning_cn: 甲板；公共汽车一层的车厢；纸牌
meanings.meaning_en: one of the levels on a bus, plane etc
meanings.example: Eddie returned to the flight deck (= the part of an aircraft where the pilot sits ) .
meanings.example_cn: 埃迪回到了驾驶舱。

meanings.meaning_en: to decorate something with flowers, flags etc
a small gift of money given to someone for a service they provided
meanings.example: The porter expects a gratuity.
meanings.example_cn: 那个搬运工想要小费。

meanings.meaning_en: A historian is a person who specializes in the study of history, and who writes books and articles about it
meanings.example: I am a historian, and I teach in an American university.
meanings.example_cn: 我是一位历史学家，在美国一所大学任教。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of land where it is always very dry, and there is a lot of sand
meanings.example: the Sahara Desert
meanings.example_cn: 撒哈拉沙漠

meanings.example: This area of the country is mostly desert.
meanings.example_cn: 该国的这一地区大部分是沙漠。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone or something and no longer help or support them
anyone who is not a member of the military forces or the police
meanings.example: Many innocent civilians were killed during the war.
meanings.example_cn: 许多无辜的平民在战争中丧生。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of making something
meanings.example: people involved in decision making at the highest level
meanings.example_cn: 最高层级决策参与者

meanings.meaning_cn: 不平的；粗鲁的，粗略的；刺耳的
meanings.meaning_en: having an uneven surface
meanings.example: Her hands were rough from hard work.
meanings.example_cn: 她的双手因为干重活而变得很粗糙。

meanings.meaning_cn: 值得弄到手的，吸引人的
meanings.example: The ability to speak a foreign language is highly desirable .
meanings.example_cn: 能说一门外语是非常理想的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 深的，极深的；渊博的；深奥的
meanings.meaning_en: having a strong influence or effect
meanings.example: a profound sense of guilt
meanings.example_cn: 强烈的内疚感

meanings.meaning_en: a system or method for carrying passengers or goods from one place to another
meanings.example: commuters who travel on public transport
meanings.example_cn: 乘坐公共交通车辆上下班的人

meanings.meaning_en: to take goods, people etc from one place to another in a vehicle
meanings.example: It’s easier to get to the college if you have your own transport (= a car, bicycle etc ) .
meanings.example_cn: 如果你有自己的交通工具，去学院就会更方便。

meanings.meaning_en: likely or able to be changed in the future
meanings.example: a provisional government
meanings.example_cn: 临时政府

meanings.meaning_en: easily broken or damaged
meanings.example: Be careful with that vase – it’s very fragile.
meanings.example_cn: 小心那只花瓶——很容易打碎的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 捐款，捐助；订阅；同意，赞成
meanings.meaning_en: to pay money, usually once a year, to have copies of a newspaper or magazine sent to you, or to have some other service
meanings.example: My main reason for subscribing to New Scientist is to keep abreast of advances in science.
meanings.example_cn: 我订阅《新科学家》的主要原因是要跟上科学的进步。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奇怪的，不平常的；可疑的；眩晕的
meanings.meaning_en: strange or difficult to explain
meanings.example: She gave a queer laugh.
meanings.example_cn: 她古怪地笑了笑。

meanings.meaning_en: to find the meaning of something that is difficult to read or understand
meanings.example: She studied the envelope, trying to decipher the handwriting.
meanings.example_cn: 她仔细地看信封，试图辨认上面的字迹。

meanings.meaning_en: containing new and interesting ideas
meanings.example: an imaginative use of computer technology
meanings.example_cn: 计算机技术的妙用

meanings.meaning_en: an inclusive price or cost includes everything
meanings.example: Not everyone shares his vision of an inclusive America.
meanings.example_cn: 不是所有人都同意他的观点，认为美国是个包容性很强的国家。

meanings.meaning_en: one of several kinds of  fungus  with stems and round tops, some of which can be eaten
meanings.example: mushroom soup
meanings.example_cn: 蘑菇汤

meanings.meaning_en: very bad - used, for example, about things you see, taste, or smell, or about the weather
meanings.example: The weather has been really horrible all week.
meanings.example_cn: 整个星期天气都很糟。

meanings.meaning_en: to shine in small bright flashes
meanings.example: The sea sparkled in the sun.
meanings.example_cn: 阳光下大海碧波闪耀。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有节制的，不过分的；(气候)温和的
meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that is temperate is calm and sensible
meanings.example: The Nile Valley keeps a temperate climate throughout the year.
meanings.example_cn: 尼罗河流域全年气候温和。

meanings.meaning_en: a right that someone has, especially because of their importance or social position
meanings.example: Arriving late is a woman’s prerogative .
meanings.example_cn: 迟到是女人的特权。

meanings.meaning_en: the words printed over a film in a foreign language to translate what is being said by the actors
meanings.example: a French film with English subtitles
meanings.example_cn: 附有英语字幕的法国电影

meanings.meaning_en: severe mental or physical suffering
meanings.example: The journey must have been a torment for them.
meanings.example_cn: 这次旅途对他们来说一定十分痛苦。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone suffer a lot, especially mentally
If something is seemingly the case, you mean that it appears to be the case, even though it may not really be so
meanings.example: A seemingly endless line of trucks waits in vain to load up.
meanings.example_cn: 看上去没有尽头的一排卡车徒劳地等着装货。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin curved piece of baked clay used for covering roofs
meanings.example: ...a fine building, with a neat little porch and ornamental tiles on the roof.
meanings.example_cn: …一幢精致建筑，有个整洁的小门廊，屋顶上盖着装饰瓦。

meanings.meaning_en: a word for an island, used in poetry or in names of islands
meanings.example: the British Isles
meanings.example_cn: 不列颠群岛

meanings.meaning_en: a soldier, plane etc that is sent to search the area in front of an army and get information about the enemy
meanings.example: He sent three scouts ahead to take a look at the bridge.
meanings.example_cn: 他派出三名侦察兵到前面侦察大桥的情况。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that is paid to free someone who is held as a prisoner
meanings.example: The kidnappers were demanding a ransom of $250,000.
meanings.example_cn: 绑匪索取25万美元的赎金。

meanings.meaning_en: to honour or respect someone or something because they are old, holy, or connected with the past
meanings.example: a symbol of Arab courage, to be venerated for generations
meanings.example_cn: 受到世代尊崇的阿拉伯人勇气的象征

meanings.example: an outright refusal
meanings.example_cn: 断然拒绝

meanings.meaning_en: A pageant is a colourful public procession, show, or ceremony. Pageants are usually held outdoors and often celebrate events or people from history.
meanings.example: ...a historical pageant of kings and queens.
meanings.example_cn: …一场历史上的国王和王后们的盛大庆典。

meanings.meaning_en: a drawing that uses a line or lines to show how two or more sets of measurements are related to each other
meanings.example: Martin showed me a graph of their recent sales.
meanings.example_cn: 马丁给我看了他们最近销售情况的图表。

meanings.meaning_en: A liner is a large ship in which people travel long distances, especially on holiday
meanings.example: ...luxury ocean liners.
meanings.example_cn: …豪华远洋客轮。

meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially a lawyer, who has the legal power to make a signed statement or document official
meanings.example: Want to be an assistant judge or notary.
meanings.example_cn: 想成为一名助理法官或公证人。

meanings.meaning_en: a song or tune
meanings.example: They played some lovely melodies.
meanings.example_cn: 他们演奏了一些动听的曲子。

meanings.meaning_en: almost the same
meanings.example: We have similar tastes in music.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对音乐的品位相近。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to the present time
meanings.example: She writes a lot of contemporary music for people like Whitney Houston.
meanings.example_cn: 她为惠特尼·休斯敦等人创作大量当代音乐作品。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who lived or was in a particular place at the same time as someone else
not caring or worrying about the possible bad or dangerous results of your actions
meanings.example: He was accused of causing death by reckless driving .
meanings.example_cn: 他被控因鲁莽驾驶致人死亡。

meanings.meaning_en: something that forces someone to do something
meanings.example: The offer of economic aid was a goad to political change.
meanings.example_cn: 提供经济援助是政治改革的推动力。

meanings.meaning_en: If you goad someone, you deliberately make them feel angry or irritated, often causing them to react by doing something
meanings.example: Charles was always goading me.
meanings.example_cn: 查尔斯老是刺激我。

meanings.meaning_en: a small hole that lets liquid or gas flow into or out of something
meanings.example: There is a leak in the ceiling.
meanings.example_cn: 天花板上有条裂缝。

meanings.meaning_en: sensible and likely to gain you an advantage
meanings.example: Many towns often found it politic to change their allegiance.
meanings.example_cn: 许多城镇经常发现改变拥戴对象不失为明智之举。

meanings.meaning_en: to put someone’s or something’s name on an official list
meanings.example: The tanker is registered in Rotterdam.
meanings.example_cn: 这艘油轮是在鹿特丹登记的。

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to do something, especially something wrong or dangerous, by making it seem attractive or exciting
meanings.example: He lured her to his home and shot her with his father's gun.
meanings.example_cn: 他把她诱骗到家里，然后用父亲的枪把她打死。

meanings.meaning_en: after a long time, or after a lot of things have happened
meanings.example: He eventually escaped and made his way back to England.
meanings.example_cn: 他终于逃脱并返回英格兰。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可谈判的，可(通行)商议的；可兑换现金的
meanings.meaning_en: an offer, price, contract etc that is negotiable can be discussed and changed before being agreed on
meanings.example: Part-time barman required. Hours and salary negotiable.
meanings.example_cn: 招聘兼职酒吧男服务员，工作时间及薪金面议。

meanings.meaning_en: resonant materials increase any sound produced inside them
meanings.example: the violin’s smooth, resonant tone
meanings.example_cn: 小提琴圆润悠扬的音色

meanings.meaning_en: If you attribute something to an event or situation, you think that it was caused by that event or situation
meanings.example: Women tend to attribute their success to external causes such as luck.
meanings.example_cn: 女性往往把她们的成功归因于外因，如运气。

meanings.meaning_en: a quality or feature, especially one that is considered to be good or useful
to prove or officially announce that someone is guilty of a crime after a  trial  in a law court
meanings.example: a convicted murderer
meanings.example_cn: 已定罪的谋杀犯

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been proved to be guilty of a crime and sent to prison
to tell someone that something will definitely happen or is definitely true so that they are less worried
meanings.example: The document is genuine, I can assure you .
meanings.example_cn: 我能向你保证，这文件是真的。

meanings.meaning_en: when you visit famous or interesting places, especially as tourists
meanings.example: She swam and sunbathed, went sightseeing and relaxed.
meanings.example_cn: 她游泳，晒日光浴，观光，放松。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is latent is present but hidden, and may develop or become more noticeable in the future
meanings.example: latent aggression
meanings.example_cn: 潜在的侵略

meanings.meaning_en: consisting of or including many different kinds of things or people, especially in a way that seems interesting
meanings.example: a varied diet
meanings.example_cn: 丰富多样的饮食

meanings.meaning_cn: 不理(某人的愿望要求)，不顾
meanings.example: The EU commission exercised its power to override British policy.
meanings.example_cn: 欧盟委员会行使其权力来否决英国的政策。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat floating structure, usually made of pieces of wood tied together, used as a boat
meanings.example: ...a river trip on bamboo rafts through dense rainforest.
meanings.example_cn: …一次乘着竹筏穿过茂密雨林的河上旅行。

meanings.meaning_en: to notice, see, or recognize something
meanings.example: That morning, he perceived a change in Franca’s mood.
meanings.example_cn: 那天早上，他注意到弗兰卡情绪的变化。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal meeting in which people who know a lot about a particular subject have discussions about it
meanings.example: He had been taking part in an international symposium on population.
meanings.example_cn: 他那时在参加一个有关人口的国际研讨会。

meanings.meaning_en: correct or suitable for a particular time, situation, or purpose
meanings.example: The timing of the announcement was particularly appropriate .
meanings.example_cn: 通告发布的时机很合适。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在内的；内部的，内地的，国内的
meanings.meaning_en: inside or indoors
meanings.example: The interior walls are all painted white.
meanings.example_cn: 室内墙壁都粉刷成了白色。

meanings.meaning_en: the inner part or inside of something
an unpleasant dirty substance that forms on the surface of water
meanings.example: a pond covered with green scum
meanings.example_cn: 漂满绿色浮沫的池塘

meanings.meaning_en: an agreement between two people to marry, or the period of time they are engaged
meanings.example: Their engagement was announced in the paper.
meanings.example_cn: 他们订婚的消息在报上公布了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 陷阱；圈套；双轮轻便马车
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment for catching animals
meanings.example: The only way to catch mice is to set a trap .
meanings.example_cn: 抓老鼠的唯一办法就是放置捕鼠器。

meanings.meaning_en: to go beyond the usual limits of something
meanings.example: The desire for peace transcended political differences.
meanings.example_cn: 对和平的渴望超越了政治分歧。

meanings.meaning_en: the conditions that affect a situation, action, event etc
meanings.example: The Soviet Union had been forced by circumstances to sign a pact with Nazi Germany.
meanings.example_cn: 苏联为形势所迫同纳粹德国签订了一项条约。

meanings.meaning_en: to give official permission for something
meanings.example: an authorized biography
meanings.example_cn: 授权传记

meanings.meaning_en: a  hip flask
meanings.example: He took out a metal flask from a canvas bag.
meanings.example_cn: 他从帆布袋里拿出了一个金属水瓶。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is spontaneous has not been planned or organized, but happens by itself, or because you suddenly feel you want to do it
meanings.example: The crowd gave a spontaneous cheer.
meanings.example_cn: 人群自发地欢呼起来。

meanings.meaning_en: a punishment for breaking a law, rule, or legal agreement
meanings.example: No littering. Penalty $500.
meanings.example_cn: 禁止乱扔垃圾。 违者罚款500美元。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel physically or mentally stronger
meanings.example: The town was heavily fortified.
meanings.example_cn: 该镇设有重防。

meanings.meaning_en: the season, from about April to October, when it rains a lot in India and other southern Asian countries
meanings.example: ...the end of the monsoon.
meanings.example_cn: …雨季的结束。

meanings.meaning_en: thinking back to a time in the past, especially with the advantage of knowing more now than you did then
meanings.example: In retrospect, I wonder if we should have done more.
meanings.example_cn: 回过头看，我在想我们是否应该做得更多些。

meanings.meaning_en: to force something out of your mouth
meanings.example: Billy stood up slowly, rubbed his jaw, and spat blood.
meanings.example_cn: 比利慢慢站起来，揉揉下巴，吐了口血。

meanings.meaning_en: failure to take enough care over something that you are responsible for
meanings.example: negligence in carrying out safety procedures
meanings.example_cn: 执行安全程序时的疏忽

meanings.meaning_cn: 养老金，退休金；给予养老金
meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money paid regularly by the government or company to someone who does not work any more, for example because they have reached the age when people stop working or because they are ill
meanings.example: At what age can you start drawing your pension ?
meanings.example_cn: 从多少岁可以开始领取养老金？

meanings.meaning_en: to explain something to someone
meanings.example: A few dedicated doctors have fought for years to enlighten the profession.
meanings.example_cn: 少数富有献身精神的医生为启蒙这一行业而奋斗多年。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who come to watch and listen to someone speaking or performing in public
meanings.example: The audience began clapping and cheering.
meanings.example_cn: 观众开始鼓掌欢呼。

meanings.meaning_en: if something symbolizes a quality, feeling etc, it represents it
meanings.example: Crime often symbolizes a wider social problem.
meanings.example_cn: 犯罪问题往往反映出更广泛的社会问题。

meanings.meaning_en: an activity that you enjoy doing in your free time
meanings.example: What are your hobbies?
meanings.example_cn: 你有些什么爱好？

meanings.meaning_en: oil that is obtained from below the surface of the Earth and is used to make petrol,  paraffin  , and various chemical substances
meanings.example: petroleum-based products
meanings.example_cn: 石油产品

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to a traditional style or set of ideas
meanings.example: the classical theory of relativity
meanings.example_cn: 经典相对论

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong feeling of excitement and pleasure, or the thing that makes you feel this
meanings.example: Winning first place must have been quite a thrill.
meanings.example_cn: 赢得第一名肯定让人非常激动。

meanings.meaning_en: a building for public events, especially sports and large rock music concerts, consisting of a playing field surrounded by rows of seats
meanings.example: the new Olympic Stadium
meanings.example_cn: 新的奥林匹克体育场

meanings.meaning_en: a thick rubber ring that fits around the wheel of a car, bicycle etc
meanings.example: I had a flat tyre (= all the air went out of it ) on the way home.
meanings.example_cn: 回家的路上我的轮胎瘪了。

meanings.meaning_en: a careful examination of a situation or process
meanings.example: The policy comes up for review (= will be reviewed ) in April.
meanings.example_cn: 这项政策将在4月份予以审议。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a bad effect on something so that it is no longer attractive, enjoyable, useful etc
meanings.example: The whole park is spoiled by litter.
meanings.example_cn: 整个公园环境都给垃圾破坏了。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin round vegetable with a dark green skin and a light green inside, usually eaten raw
meanings.example: The "gurkophone" is one of their classics, made from a hollowed cucumber, a pepper and a carrot.
meanings.example_cn: 黄瓜管"是他们的经典乐器之一,那是用掏空的黄瓜、辣椒和胡萝卜做的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分配；确定时间或地点；指派
meanings.meaning_en: to give someone a particular job or make them responsible for a particular person or thing
meanings.example: How much time have you assigned for the meeting?
meanings.example_cn: 你给这个会议定了多长时间？

meanings.meaning_en: to bend or turn something, such as wire, hair, or cloth, into a particular shape
meanings.example: She twisted her head sideways and looked toward the door.
meanings.example_cn: 她把头转向一边，朝门口看去。

meanings.meaning_en: a twisting action or movement
the state of being free from public attention
meanings.example: each individual’s right to privacy
meanings.example_cn: 每个人的隐私权

meanings.meaning_cn: 医学探针；新闻调查；探测
meanings.meaning_en: to ask questions in order to find things out, especially things that other people do not want you to know
meanings.example: Police probed claims that he had sold drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 警方就有人称他贩卖毒品一事进行了调查。

meanings.meaning_en: determination to be successful, rich, powerful etc
meanings.example: He was young and full of ambition.
meanings.example_cn: 他年轻，而且雄心勃勃。

meanings.meaning_en: a small, roughly built hut made from thin sheets of wood,  tin  , plastic etc that very poor people live in
meanings.example: Workers were living in tents and shanties.
meanings.example_cn: 工人们住在帐篷和棚屋里。

meanings.meaning_en: to damage something very badly or completely
meanings.example: The city centre was devastated by the bomb.
meanings.example_cn: 市中心被这枚炸弹摧毁了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 承认；表示收到信件，表示感谢
meanings.meaning_en: to admit or accept that something is true or that a situation exists
meanings.example: The family acknowledge the need for change.
meanings.example_cn: 全家人都承认需要改变一下。

meanings.meaning_en: a rough path across countryside or through a forest
meanings.example: The trail led over Boulder Pass before descending to a lake.
meanings.example_cn: 小路越过博尔德山口，然后向下通往湖边。

meanings.meaning_en: to pull something behind you, especially along the ground, or to be pulled in this way
a baby or very young child
meanings.example: An infant’s skin is very sensitive.
meanings.example_cn: 幼儿的皮肤非常敏感。

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement for a meeting at an agreed time and place, for a particular purpose
meanings.example: All consultations are by appointment only .
meanings.example_cn: 就诊必须预约。

meanings.meaning_en: a public meeting where land, buildings, paintings etc are sold to the person who offers the most money for them
meanings.example: The painting is expected to fetch up to $400,000 at auction.
meanings.example_cn: 这幅画预计在拍卖会上能卖到40万美元。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something narrower or tighter, or to become narrower or tighter
meanings.example: Caffeine constricts the blood vessels in your body.
meanings.example_cn: 咖啡因会使体内的血管收缩。

meanings.meaning_en: related to business and the buying and selling of goods and services
meanings.example: Our top priorities must be profit and commercial growth.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须把利润和贸易增长作为我们的第一要务。

meanings.meaning_en: an advertisement on television or radio
if you are equivocal, you are deliberately unclear in the way that you give information or your opinion
meanings.example: His answer was equivocal.
meanings.example_cn: 他的回答模棱两可。

meanings.meaning_en: unknown by name
meanings.example: the anonymous author of a collection of poems
meanings.example_cn: 一本诗集的佚名作者

meanings.meaning_en: exactly the same as something, or made as an exact copy of something
meanings.example: A duplicate copy should be made for the county record office.
meanings.example_cn: 应该制作一个副本呈交县档案室。

meanings.meaning_en: an exact copy of something that you can use in the same way
meanings.example: a duplicate key
meanings.example_cn: 配制的钥匙

meanings.meaning_en: to copy something exactly
the action of saying goodbye
meanings.example: Mourners gathered to bid farewell to the victims of the plane tragedy.
meanings.example_cn: 哀悼者来向空难受害者告别。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys and uses products and services
meanings.example: Consumers will soon be paying higher airfares.
meanings.example_cn: 不久消费者就要支付更高的机票价了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s welfare is their health and happiness
meanings.example: Our only concern is the children’s welfare.
meanings.example_cn: 我们唯一关心的是孩子们的幸福。

meanings.meaning_en: a stream or river that flows into a larger river
meanings.example: ...the Napo river, a tributary of the Amazon.
meanings.example_cn: ...纳波河，亚马孙河的一条支流。

meanings.meaning_cn: 量度，分量，尺寸；量具；行动，步骤
meanings.meaning_en: to know what someone’s strengths and weaknesses are, so that you are able to deal with them or defeat them
meanings.example: She soon got the measure of her opponent.
meanings.example_cn: 她很快就掂出了对手的分量。

meanings.meaning_en: the words and phrases used to express something
meanings.example: The two sides failed to agree on the wording of a final report.
meanings.example_cn: 双方未能就一份总结报告的措辞达成一致。

meanings.meaning_en: Spray is a lot of small drops of water which are being thrown into the air
meanings.example: The moon was casting a rainbow through the spray from the waterfall.
meanings.example_cn: 月亮在瀑布溅起的水雾中映出了一道彩虹。

meanings.meaning_en: to invent a story, piece of information etc in order to deceive someone
meanings.example: The police were accused of fabricating evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 警方被控捏造证据。

meanings.meaning_en: great strength and power
meanings.example: two individuals who took on the might of the English legal system
meanings.example_cn: 挑战英国法律制度权威的两个人

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been officially suggested for an important position, duty, or prize
meanings.example: the Democratic Party presidential nominee
meanings.example_cn: 民主党被提名的总统候选人

meanings.example: One cleric resigned over plans to evict the protesters forcibly, arguing that the Church should have been more supportive of their cause.
meanings.example_cn: 一位因为计划强行驱逐示威者而辞职的神职人员辩解说国教会应当给予他们更多的支持。

meanings.meaning_en: when soldiers walk with firm regular steps from one place to another
meanings.example: The general led his forces on a long march southwards.
meanings.example_cn: 将军率领他的军队朝南长途行军。

meanings.meaning_en: spending or costing a lot of money, especially more than is necessary or more than you can afford
meanings.example: Would it be too extravagant to buy both?
meanings.example_cn: 把两个都买下会不会太奢侈了？

meanings.example: Piping-hot water gushed out.
meanings.example_cn: 滚烫的水涌了出来。

meanings.meaning_en: if a liquid gushes, it flows or pours out quickly and in large quantities

meanings.meaning_cn: 割，切，剪，砍，削；离开；(线条)相交
meanings.meaning_en: to divide something or separate something from its main part, using scissors, a knife etc
meanings.example: Do you want me to cut the cake?
meanings.example_cn: 要我切蛋糕吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to not read, mention, or deal with something that would normally come or happen next
meanings.example: I decided to skip the first chapter.
meanings.example_cn: 我决定跳过第一章。

meanings.meaning_cn: 后退；撤回；(工商业)衷退，价格暴跌
meanings.example: the economic recession of the early 1980s
meanings.example_cn: 20世纪80年代初的经济衰退

meanings.meaning_en: a fact or event that makes you try harder to do something
meanings.example: The crowd’s reaction only acted as a spur.
meanings.example_cn: 人群的反应不过起了刺激作用。

meanings.meaning_en: to succeed in achieving something after trying for a long time
meanings.example: More women are attaining positions of power.
meanings.example_cn: 越来越多的女性获得要职。

meanings.meaning_en: a special advantage that is given only to one person or group of people
meanings.example: He had no special privileges and was treated just like every other prisoner.
meanings.example_cn: 他不享受特权，待遇和任何其他犯人一样。

meanings.meaning_en: sudden and unexpected
meanings.example: an abrupt change of plan
meanings.example_cn: 计划的突然改变

meanings.meaning_en: to refuse to give someone something
meanings.example: I withheld payment until they had completed the work.
meanings.example_cn: 我扣着钱，直到他们完工。

meanings.meaning_en: if there is a resemblance between two people or things, they are similar, especially in the way they look
meanings.example: There was a remarkable resemblance between him and Pete.
meanings.example_cn: 他和皮特有一个惊人的相似之处。

meanings.meaning_en: causing death, or able to cause death
meanings.example: a lethal dose of heroin
meanings.example_cn: 致命剂量的海洛因

meanings.meaning_en: to try very hard to persuade someone to do something
meanings.example: Kennedy exhorted his listeners to turn away from violence.
meanings.example_cn: 肯尼迪劝告他的听众要远离暴力。

meanings.meaning_en: A detective novel or story is one in which a detective tries to solve a crime
meanings.example: ...Arthur Conan Doyle's classic detective novel.
meanings.example_cn: …阿瑟·柯南·道尔的经典侦探小说。

meanings.meaning_en: produced by combining different artificial substances, rather than being naturally produced
meanings.example: synthetic chemicals
meanings.example_cn: 合成化学品

meanings.meaning_en: when you work together with another person or group to achieve something, especially in science or art
meanings.example: The company is building the centre in collaboration with the Institute of Offshore Engineering.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司正与海洋工程学院合建这座中心。

meanings.example: multiple sclerosis (henceforth referred to as MS)
meanings.example_cn: 多发性硬化（以下称为MS）

meanings.meaning_cn: 阴暗的，迟钝的，沉闷的，钝的
meanings.meaning_en: not interesting or exciting
meanings.example: Life is never dull when Elizabeth is here.
meanings.example_cn: 有伊丽莎白在这里生活绝不会无聊。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something become less sharp or clear
meanings.example: a dull movie
meanings.example_cn: 一部沉闷的电影

meanings.example: Weeds were choking the stream.
meanings.example_cn: 野草将溪流堵塞了。

meanings.meaning_en: if something is legal, you are allowed to do it or have to do it by law
meanings.example: What the company has done is perfectly legal.
meanings.example_cn: 公司所做的这一切完全合法。

meanings.meaning_en: very angry
meanings.example: She was absolutely furious .
meanings.example_cn: 她怒不可遏。

meanings.meaning_en: The pivot in a situation is the most important thing that everything else is based on or arranged around
meanings.example: Forming the pivot of the exhibition is a large group of watercolours.
meanings.example_cn: 构成这个展览核心的是一大批水彩画。

meanings.meaning_en: wood used for building or making things
meanings.example: a bench made of timber
meanings.example_cn: 木制长椅

meanings.meaning_en: the curved path travelled by an object which is moving around another much larger object such as the Earth, the Sun etc
meanings.example: Mars and Earth have orbits which change with time.
meanings.example_cn: 火星和地球的轨道随着时间而发生改变。

meanings.meaning_en: to travel in a curved path around a much larger object such as the Earth, the Sun etc
a shop or a part of a shop where medicines are prepared and sold
meanings.example: an all-night pharmacy
meanings.example_cn: 通宵药店

meanings.meaning_en: the thing you are talking about or considering in a conversation, discussion, book, film etc
meanings.example: Paul has strong opinions on most subjects.
meanings.example_cn: 保罗在大多数问题上观点激烈。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone is subject to a particular set of rules or laws, they have to obey those rules or laws
meanings.example: The subjects covered in this chapter are exercise and nutrition.
meanings.example_cn: 本章涵盖的主题是运动和营养。

meanings.meaning_en: to force a country or group of people to be ruled by you, and control them very strictly
meanings.example: The tribunal is unique because Mr. Jones is not subject to the normal police discipline code.
meanings.example_cn: 这个审判很特别，因为琼斯先生不受一般的警务纪律约束。

meanings.meaning_en: to cook something in hot fat or oil, or to be cooked in hot fat or oil
meanings.example: Fry the potatoes, covered, for about 20 minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 盖上盖，将马铃薯煎20分钟左右。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is diligent works hard and is careful and thorough
meanings.example: a diligent student
meanings.example_cn: 勤勉的学生

meanings.meaning_en: relating to amounts rather than to the quality or standard of something
meanings.example: ...the advantages of quantitative and qualitative research.
meanings.example_cn: …定量和定性研究的优点。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to money, especially all the money in a particular country
meanings.example: the government’s tight monetary policy
meanings.example_cn: 政府从紧的货币政策

meanings.meaning_en: to change what you are doing so that you are not following an expected plan, idea, or type of behaviour
meanings.example: They stopped you as soon as you deviated from the script.
meanings.example_cn: 你一偏离剧本，他们就会叫停。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut an article or picture from a newspaper, magazine etc
meanings.example: The hedges had just been clipped.
meanings.example_cn: 树篱刚修剪过。

meanings.meaning_en: a small metal or plastic object that holds or fastens things together
someone who behaves in a stupid or dangerous way
meanings.example: He drove like a maniac to the hospital.
meanings.example_cn: 他像个疯子似的开车去医院。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to machines or processes which are concerned with light, images, or the way we see things
meanings.example: microscopes and other optical instruments
meanings.example_cn: 显微镜和其他光学仪器

meanings.meaning_en: to decide what group something belongs to
meanings.example: We’d classify Drabble’s novels under ‘Romance’.
meanings.example_cn: 我们把德拉布尔的小说归类为“言情小说”。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of describing something by referring to it as something different and suggesting that it has similar qualities to that thing
meanings.example: She uses some wonderful images and metaphors in her writing.
meanings.example_cn: 她在作品中用了一些绝妙的比喻和暗喻。

meanings.meaning_cn: 细长的，苗条的；纤弱的，微小的，微薄的
meanings.meaning_en: thin in an attractive or graceful way
meanings.example: She is slender and stylish.
meanings.example_cn: 她身材修长，穿着时髦。

meanings.meaning_en: a place that is desolate is empty and looks sad because there are no people there
meanings.example: a desolate landscape
meanings.example_cn: 荒凉的景色

meanings.meaning_en: a place that is desolate is empty and looks sad because there are no people there
someone who is desolate feels very sad and lonely
your ability to think quickly and make the right decisions
meanings.example: Alone and penniless, I was forced to live on my wits.
meanings.example_cn: 孤身一人又身无分文，我只得靠我的机智来过活。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of your body at the end of your arm, including your fingers and thumb, that you use to hold things
meanings.example: Steve gripped the steering wheel tightly with both hands.
meanings.example_cn: 史蒂夫双手紧握方向盘。

meanings.meaning_en: to give something to someone else with your hand
meanings.example: In her hand was a tattered old photograph.
meanings.example_cn: 她手中拿着的是一张破旧的老照片。

meanings.meaning_cn: 古怪的，奇数的；单独的；零头的；临时的
meanings.meaning_en: different from what is normal or expected, especially in a way that you disapprove of or cannot understand
meanings.example: It was an odd thing to say.
meanings.example_cn: 这话说得很奇怪。

meanings.meaning_cn: 派遣，发送，迅速办理，急件
meanings.meaning_en: to send someone or something somewhere for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Goods are normally dispatched within 24 hours.
meanings.example_cn: 货物一般在24小时内派送。

meanings.meaning_en: to become twisted together, or make something become twisted together, in an untidy mass
meanings.example: My hair tangles easily.
meanings.example_cn: 我的头发很容易打结。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who you work or do business with
meanings.example: one of his business associates
meanings.example_cn: 他的一个生意伙伴

meanings.meaning_en: to slide a short distance accidentally, and fall or lose your balance slightly
meanings.example: Wright slipped but managed to keep hold of the ball.
meanings.example_cn: 赖特滑了一下，但球还抓在手里。

meanings.meaning_en: to move away from the enemy after being defeated in battle
meanings.example: The rebels retreated to the mountains.
meanings.example_cn: 叛乱分子撤退到山区。

meanings.meaning_en: a surprising fact about someone or something that was previously secret and is now made known
meanings.example: ...following the revelation of his affair with a former secretary.
meanings.example_cn: …在他和前任秘书的风流韵事被揭露之后。

meanings.meaning_en: failure to win or succeed
meanings.example: She was a woman who hated to admit defeat.
meanings.example_cn: 她是个不愿认输的女人。

meanings.meaning_en: a thick flat piece of a hard material such as stone
meanings.example: a concrete slab
meanings.example_cn: 水泥板

meanings.meaning_en: a wide passage or large hall just inside the entrance to a public building
meanings.example: a hotel lobby
meanings.example_cn: 宾馆大堂

meanings.meaning_en: If you lobby someone such as a member of a government or council, you try to persuade them that a particular law should be changed or that a particular thing should be done
meanings.example: I’ll meet you in the entrance lobby.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在入口大厅见。

meanings.meaning_en: the activities that are involved in managing the work of a company or organization
meanings.example: We’re looking for someone with experience in administration.
meanings.example_cn: 我们正在寻找一个有管理经验的人。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone or something is efficient, they work well without wasting time, money, or energy
meanings.example: a very efficient secretary
meanings.example_cn: 效率高的秘书

meanings.example: I shall not be at peace,' moaned Catherine, recalled to a sense of physical weakness by the violent, unequal throbbing of her heart, which beat visibly and audibly under this excess of agitation.
meanings.example_cn: “我不会得到安息的，”凯瑟琳哀哭着，感到她身体的衰弱，因为在这场过度的激动下，她的心猛烈地、不规则地跳动着，甚至跳得能觉察出来。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of ground in a garden or park that is covered with short grass
meanings.example: I spent all morning mowing the lawn (= cutting the grass ).
meanings.example_cn: 我整个上午都在修剪草坪。

meanings.meaning_en: a belief that some objects or actions are lucky or unlucky, or that they cause events to happen, based on old ideas of magic
meanings.example: the old superstition that walking under a ladder is unlucky
meanings.example_cn: 认为从梯子下面穿过不吉利的古老迷信

meanings.meaning_en: somebody who is an important and respected member of a group, and is involved in many public activities

meanings.meaning_en: a lot of different things mixed together in an untidy way, without any order
meanings.example: The photographs were all jumbled up.
meanings.example_cn: 照片乱七八糟地堆在一起。

meanings.meaning_cn: 分期连载，分期支付的款子
meanings.meaning_en: one of a series of regular payments that you make until you have paid all the money you owe
meanings.example: the second instalment of a loan
meanings.example_cn: 一项贷款的第二期还款

meanings.meaning_cn: 使精力恢复的；使耳目一新的
meanings.meaning_en: pleasantly different from what is familiar and boring
meanings.example: It made a refreshing change to talk to someone new.
meanings.example_cn: 和刚认识的人谈话感觉很新鲜。

meanings.meaning_en: a V-shaped cut or hole in a surface or edge
meanings.example: Cut a notch near one end of the stick.
meanings.example_cn: 在手杖的一端刻一个V形记号。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is employed by a newspaper or a television station etc to report news from a particular area or on a particular subject
meanings.example: Our correspondent in South Africa sent this report.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的驻南非记者发来这份报道。

meanings.meaning_en: great danger, especially of being harmed or killed
meanings.example: a voyage that was fraught with peril
meanings.example_cn: 历尽艰险的旅程

meanings.meaning_en: a business that provides a particular service for people or organizations
meanings.example: We had to hire maids through an agency.
meanings.example_cn: 我们得通过代理公司雇用女佣。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely happy and excited, especially because of something that has happened or is going to happen
meanings.example: He felt elated and mildly drunk.
meanings.example_cn: 他感到欢欣鼓舞，而且喝得有点醉了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 危急的；批评的；苛求的，关键的
meanings.meaning_en: if you are critical, you criticize someone or something
meanings.example: He made some highly critical remarks.
meanings.example_cn: 他发表了一些严厉的批判性言论。

meanings.meaning_en: a picturesque place is pretty and interesting in an old-fashioned way
meanings.example: a quiet fishing village with a picturesque harbour
meanings.example_cn: 拥有一座美丽港口的宁静渔村

meanings.meaning_en: tacit agreement, approval, support etc is given without anything actually being said

meanings.example_cn: 三家大公司之间的默契

meanings.meaning_en: causing a lot of disagreement, because many people have strong opinions about the subject being discussed
meanings.example: the controversial issue of welfare reform
meanings.example_cn: 福利改革这一有争议的话题

meanings.meaning_en: of, resembling, or secreting mucus
meanings.example: We evolved to stay away from poo, from bodily fluids, from mucous, from foods that have gone off, from worms in the garden.
meanings.example_cn: 我们进化到如此阶段：避开屎，避开体液，避开粘液，不要碰变质的食物，不要动花园的虫子。

meanings.meaning_en: permanent
meanings.example: the perpetual snows of the mountaintops
meanings.example_cn: 山顶的终年积雪

meanings.meaning_en: allowing liquid, air etc to pass slowly through many very small holes
meanings.example: porous material
meanings.example_cn: 渗透性材料

meanings.meaning_en: If something or someone whirls around or if you whirl them around, they move around or turn around very quickly
meanings.example: Not receiving an answer, she whirled around.
meanings.example_cn: 没有得到答复，她猛地转过身来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使膨胀；使增强，使壮大，使隆起
meanings.meaning_en: to curve or make something curve
meanings.example: The wind swelled the sails.
meanings.example_cn: 风鼓起了船帆。

meanings.meaning_cn: 粗俗的；过胖的；总的；毛的
meanings.meaning_en: a gross sum of money is the total amount before any tax or costs have been taken away
meanings.example: a gross profit of $5 million
meanings.example_cn: 500万美元的毛利

meanings.meaning_en: If a person or a business grosses a particular amount of money, they earn that amount of money before tax has been taken away
meanings.example: The company grossed $16.8 million last year.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司去年税前收入为1680万美元。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something less pure and good, especially by showing no respect
meanings.example: Hallam’s tomb had been defiled and looted.
meanings.example_cn: 哈勒姆的坟墓遭到了亵渎和洗劫。

meanings.meaning_en: almost
meanings.example: Virtually all the children come to school by bus.
meanings.example_cn: 几乎所有的孩子都乘公交车上学。

meanings.example: The word has no equivalent in English.
meanings.example_cn: 这个单词在英语中没有对应词。

meanings.example: Moscow-based Kaspersky Lab has long been a magnet for Russia's young computer geniuses, luring them away from their usual forte, hacking, to viral analysis.
meanings.example_cn: 总部位于莫斯科的卡巴斯基实验室许久以来就是吸引俄罗斯年轻计算机英才的一块磁石，诱使他们远离自己平常的黑客特长，转而从事病毒分析。

meanings.example: Don't tamper with my business.
meanings.example_cn: 别干预我的事。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to do something or suffer from something, especially something bad or harmful
meanings.example: His eyes shifted to the prone body on the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 他的视线移向了趴在地上的尸体。

meanings.example: We just need an estimate of the number of people who will come.
meanings.example_cn: 我们只需估算一下有多少人会来。

meanings.meaning_en: a calculation of the value, size, amount etc of something made using the information that you have, which may not be complete
meanings.example: Try to estimate how many steps it will take to get to a close object.
meanings.example_cn: 估计一下需要多少步才能到达一个近距目标。

meanings.meaning_en: If you estimate a quantity or value, you make an approximate judgment or calculation of it
meanings.example: I estimate that total cost for treatment will go from $9,000 to $12,500.
meanings.example_cn: 我估计治疗费总额将在9千美元到1.25万美元之间。

meanings.meaning_en: being the same in all its parts or among all its members
meanings.example: Grade A eggs must be of uniform size.
meanings.example_cn: A 级鸡蛋必须大小相同。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular type of clothing worn by all the members of a group or organization such as the police, the army etc
the small black round area in the middle of your eye
meanings.example: The sick man's pupils were dilated.
meanings.example_cn: 病人的瞳孔放大了。

meanings.meaning_en: a special vehicle that is used to take people who are ill or injured to hospital
meanings.example: the ambulance service
meanings.example_cn: 救护车服务

meanings.meaning_en: measuring only a short distance from the top to the bottom
meanings.example: a shallow river
meanings.example_cn: 浅河

meanings.meaning_en: Fumes are the unpleasant and often unhealthy smoke and gases that are produced by fires or by things such as chemicals, fuel, or cooking
meanings.example: ...car exhaust fumes.
meanings.example_cn: …汽车尾气。

meanings.meaning_en: to give off smoke or gases
a round flat shape or object
meanings.example: three keys attached to a metal disc
meanings.example_cn: 穿在金属圆盘上的三把钥匙

meanings.meaning_en: an unexpected and dangerous situation that must be dealt with immediately

meanings.example_cn: 救生员接受过应对紧急情况的训练。

meanings.meaning_en: the study of the rocks, soil etc that make up the Earth, and of the way they have changed since the Earth was formed
meanings.example: He was visiting professor of geology at the University of Georgia.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾是佐治亚大学的地质学客座教授。

meanings.meaning_en: the long thin part of a plant, from which leaves, flowers, or fruit grow

meanings.example_cn: 高脚酒杯

meanings.meaning_en: If a condition or problem stems from something, it was caused originally by that thing
meanings.example: All my problems stem from drink.
meanings.example_cn: 我所有的问题都是酗酒引起的。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal, bird etc that is hunted and eaten by another animal
meanings.example: a tiger stalking its prey
meanings.example_cn: 潜行跟踪猎物的老虎

meanings.meaning_cn: 严寒，霜v结霜;使(玻璃)具有光泽的表面
meanings.meaning_en: very cold weather, when water freezes
meanings.example: the risk of frost damage to crops
meanings.example_cn: 庄稼遭受霜冻灾害的危险

meanings.meaning_en: small stones, used to make a surface for paths, roads etc
meanings.example: a gravel path
meanings.example_cn: 石子小道

meanings.meaning_en: a part of a company’s profit that is divided among the people with  share s  in the company

meanings.example_cn: 第一季度的股息增加了近4％。

meanings.meaning_cn: 泵，抽水机vt&vi抽取；盘问；灌注
meanings.meaning_en: a machine for forcing liquid or gas into or out of something
meanings.example: ...pumps that circulate the fuel around in the engine.
meanings.example_cn: …使燃料在发动机内循环的压泵。

meanings.meaning_en: worry that is caused by having to deal with a problem or work too hard over a long period of time
meanings.example: I couldn’t look after him any more; the strain was too much for me.
meanings.example_cn: 我不能再照看他了，压力太大。

meanings.meaning_en: to try very hard to do something using all your strength or ability

meanings.example_cn: 你觉得这份工作紧张吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to eat small amounts of food by taking very small bites

meanings.example_cn: 他小心地啃着饼干。

meanings.meaning_en: a country that agrees to help or support another country in a war
meanings.example: a meeting of the European allies
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲盟国会议

meanings.example: Modern inventions facilitate housework.
meanings.example_cn: 许多现代发明便利了家务劳动。

meanings.meaning_en: a small very thin stem of wood that grows from a branch on a tree

meanings.example_cn: 鸟儿在那里，栖息在树中段的一根细枝上。

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that something such as a hole or a wound gapes, you are emphasizing that it is big or wide

meanings.example_cn: 前门没有了，屋顶裂开一个洞。

meanings.meaning_en: large in a way that is attractive or pleasant

meanings.example_cn: 丰满的胸部

meanings.example_cn: 应变计划

meanings.example: So that satisfies the definition of validity.
meanings.example_cn: 所以这满足了有效性的定义。

meanings.meaning_en: boring because of always being the same

meanings.example_cn: 单调的饮食

meanings.meaning_en: to remove the skin from fruit or vegetables

meanings.example_cn: 把马铃薯去皮并切成丁。

meanings.meaning_en: to put someone or something down carefully into a flat position
meanings.example: He laid his hand on my shoulder.
meanings.example_cn: 他把一只手搭在我的肩上。

meanings.example: He threw a stick into the river and the dog went after it in a flying leap.
meanings.example_cn: 他把一根枝条扔到河里，那条狗一个飞跃就追了过去。

meanings.meaning_en: a big jump
to make it necessary for you to do something
meanings.example: Lack of money necessitated a change of plan.
meanings.example_cn: 由于缺乏资金，只能改变计划。

meanings.meaning_en: a very strong belief or opinion
meanings.example: It was a reasonable explanation, but his voice lacked conviction .
meanings.example_cn: 这解释合情合理，只是他的语气不坚定。

meanings.example: I’ve got an interview tomorrow and I’m dreading it.
meanings.example_cn: 明天我要去面试，我正担心呢。

meanings.meaning_cn: 手迹，笔迹; 手稿; 剧本
meanings.meaning_en: writing done by hand

meanings.example_cn: 用工整的黑色字写下的一则日记

meanings.meaning_en: If you devote yourself, your time, or your energy to something, you spend all or most of your time or energy on it
meanings.example: He decided to devote the rest of his life to scientific investigation.
meanings.example_cn: 他决定把余生奉献给科学研究。

meanings.meaning_en: faster than the speed of sound

meanings.example_cn: 超音速飞机

meanings.meaning_cn: 鳞；尺度；等级；比例规模；天平
meanings.meaning_en: the size or level of something, or the amount that something is happening
meanings.example: A structural survey revealed the full scale of the damage.
meanings.example_cn: 结构检验揭示了实际受损程度。

meanings.meaning_cn: 外侨；外国人的；不相容的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not a legal citizen of the country they are living or working in
meanings.example: illegal aliens entering the country.
meanings.example_cn: 非法入境的外国人

meanings.meaning_en: the imaginary line around which a large round object, such as the Earth, turns
meanings.example: The Earth rotates on an axis between the north and south poles.
meanings.example_cn: 地球绕着南北两极之间的地轴自转。

meanings.meaning_cn: 说话流利的，(演说等)流畅的
meanings.meaning_en: able to speak a language very well

meanings.example_cn: 他用流利的意大利语讲话。

meanings.example_cn: 这种新型飞机正处于最后的设计阶段。

meanings.meaning_en: concered with ordinary daily life rather than religious matters

meanings.example_cn: 刚开始，这工作非常乏味。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop taking part in an activity, belonging to an organization etc, or to make someone do this
meanings.example: calls for Britain to withdraw from the European Union
meanings.example_cn: 要求英国退出欧盟的呼声

meanings.meaning_cn: 使同时发生，使同步发生
meanings.meaning_en: to happen at exactly the same time, or to arrange for two or more actions to happen at exactly the same time
meanings.example: It was virtually impossible to synchronize our lives so as to take vacations and weekends together.
meanings.example_cn: 为了一起度假和过周末而要让我们的生活同步几乎是不可能的。

meanings.example_cn: 树上每片叶子都不相同。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, considered separately from the rest of the group or society that they live in

meanings.example_cn: 每位顾客的需求

meanings.meaning_en: to provide something or allow something to happen

meanings.example_cn: 这房间可以俯瞰城市美景。

meanings.meaning_en: if it is light, there is the natural light of day
meanings.example: We’ll keep on looking while it’s still light.
meanings.example_cn: 我们会趁天亮继续寻找。

meanings.meaning_en: the time when light first appears in the morning sky

meanings.example_cn: 那是早上7点钟，天刚蒙蒙亮。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is perceptible can be noticed, although it is very small
