meanings.example_cn: 微小但可以察觉的变化

meanings.meaning_en: very great comfort and pleasure, such as you get from expensive food, beautiful houses, cars etc
meanings.example: He was leading a life of luxury in Australia.
meanings.example_cn: 他在澳大利亚过着豪华舒适的生活。

meanings.meaning_en: to get something, especially an advantage or a pleasant feeling, from something
meanings.example: Mr. Ying is one of those happy people who derive pleasure from helping others.
meanings.example_cn: 英先生是那种助人为乐的快活人。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the job of managing a business or organization and making decisions
meanings.example: a commission with executive powers
meanings.example_cn: 有执行权的委员会

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a government that makes sure decisions and laws work well

meanings.meaning_cn: 鸟高飞，翱翔；[喻]高涨，猛增
meanings.meaning_en: to increase quickly to a high level
meanings.example: Her temperature soared.
meanings.example_cn: 她的体温骤然升高。

meanings.meaning_en: a large quantity of something
meanings.example: This area of Mexico has an abundance of safe beaches and a pleasing climate.
meanings.example_cn: 墨西哥的这个地区有大量的安全沙滩与宜人的气候。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to suffer from a particular illness or be affected by a particular problem
meanings.example: A lot of TV advertising is aimed at susceptible young children.
meanings.example_cn: 很多电视广告瞄准了易受影响的幼儿。

meanings.meaning_en: an automatic machine is designed to work without needing someone to operate it for each part of a process
meanings.example: an automatic weapon
meanings.example_cn: 自动武器

meanings.meaning_en: a weapon that can fire bullets continuously
meanings.example: an automatic gearbox
meanings.example_cn: 自动变速箱

meanings.meaning_en: using your power in a dishonest or illegal way in order to get an advantage for yourself
meanings.example: Corrupt judges have taken millions of dollars in bribes.
meanings.example_cn: 腐败的法官接受了几百万美元的贿赂。

meanings.meaning_en: to encourage someone to start behaving in an immoral or dishonest way
involving several different countries or groups
meanings.example: a multilateral arms treaty
meanings.example_cn: 多边军火协定

meanings.meaning_cn: 精确地表达；制订；用公式表示
meanings.example: We are studying the situation but have not formulated any response yet.
meanings.example_cn: 我们正在研究形势，但尚未考虑好如何回应。

meanings.meaning_en: one of several parts of someone’s character, a situation etc
meanings.example: The issues are complex and multi-faceted.
meanings.example_cn: 这些问题很复杂，涉及诸多方面。

meanings.meaning_en: if a new idea, product, or method supersedes another one, it becomes used instead because it is more modern or effective
meanings.example: Their map has since been superseded by photographic atlases.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的地图从此被摄影地图册取代。

meanings.meaning_cn: 敌对的，敌方的，不友好的
meanings.meaning_en: angry and deliberately unfriendly towards someone, and ready to argue with them
meanings.example: Southampton fans gave their former coach a hostile reception .
meanings.example_cn: 南安普敦队的球迷对球队的前任教练很不友善。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of music for one performer
meanings.example: a gorgeous piano solo
meanings.example_cn: 一首极其美妙的钢琴独奏曲

meanings.meaning_en: so determined to get what you want that you do not care if you have to hurt other people in order to do it
meanings.example: a ruthless dictator
meanings.example_cn: 无情的独裁者

meanings.meaning_en: to make a short hard sound, or make something produce this sound
meanings.example: The door clicked shut behind me.
meanings.example_cn: 门在我身后咔嗒一声关上了。

meanings.example: His wife is contesting a seat on the council.
meanings.example_cn: 他妻子在角逐市政会的一个席位。

meanings.meaning_en: a competition or a situation in which two or more people or groups are competing with each other

meanings.meaning_cn: 令人愉快的；乐于同意的
meanings.meaning_en: pleasant
meanings.example: We spent a most agreeable couple of hours.
meanings.example_cn: 我们非常愉快地度过了几个小时。

meanings.meaning_en: a round pipe made of metal, glass, rubber etc, especially for liquids or gases to go through
meanings.example: a tube of toothpaste
meanings.example_cn: 一管牙膏

meanings.meaning_en: to develop well and be successful
meanings.example: The economy is booming and small businesses are flourishing.
meanings.example_cn: 经济繁荣，小企业蒸蒸日上。

meanings.meaning_en: to notice or discover something, especially something that is not easy to see, hear etc
meanings.example: Many forms of cancer can be cured if detected early.
meanings.example_cn: 如果发现得早，许多种癌症都可以治愈。

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指金属表面)失去光泽；玷污
meanings.meaning_en: if an event or fact tarnishes someone’s  reputation  , record, image etc, it makes it worse
meanings.example: His regime was tarnished by human rights abuses.
meanings.example_cn: 他的政权因践踏人权而形象受损。

meanings.meaning_en: made to look exactly like something else, in order to deceive people
meanings.example: He admitted possessing and delivering counterfeit currency.
meanings.example_cn: 他承认持有和运送了假币。

meanings.meaning_en: Counterfeit is also a noun
meanings.example: Levi Strauss says counterfeits of the company's jeans are flooding Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 利瓦伊·斯特劳斯说该公司牛仔裤的仿冒品充斥着欧洲市场。

meanings.meaning_en: to copy something exactly in order to deceive people
to bite food several times before swallowing it
meanings.example: This meat’s so tough I can hardly chew it!
meanings.example_cn: 这肉太老了，我几乎嚼不动！

meanings.meaning_cn: 狼吞虎咽地吃；挥霍，耗尽
meanings.meaning_en: to eat something quickly because you are very hungry
meanings.example: The boys devoured their pancakes.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩子们狼吞虎咽地把薄煎饼吃了。

meanings.meaning_en: a single thing, especially one thing in a list, group, or set of things
meanings.example: He opened the cardboard box and took out each item.
meanings.example_cn: 他打开纸板箱把里面的物品一一拿出来。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that you can trust someone or something to be good, work well, or produce good results
meanings.example: I felt I was doing well and my confidence began to grow.
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得自己干得不错，自信心就开始增加了。

meanings.meaning_en: a place that is cosy is small, comfortable, and warm
meanings.example: The living room was warm and cosy .
meanings.example_cn: 客厅暖和又舒适。

meanings.meaning_en: to take air, liquid etc into your mouth by making your lips form a small hole and using the muscles of your mouth to pull it in
meanings.example: They waited in silence and sucked their sweets.
meanings.example_cn: 他们静静地等着，吮着糖果。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of paying someone to work for you
meanings.example: She was offered employment in the sales office.
meanings.example_cn: 她获聘在销售部工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to correct or make small changes to something that is written or spoken
meanings.example: The law was amended to include women.
meanings.example_cn: 该法律经修改把女性也包括在内。

meanings.example: plans to update manufacturing procedures
meanings.example_cn: 更新生产流程的计划

meanings.meaning_en: a violent or harmful action that someone does to punish someone for harming them or their family
meanings.example: a desire for vengeance
meanings.example_cn: 复仇的愿望

meanings.meaning_en: one of several things that influence or cause a situation
meanings.example: The rise in crime is mainly due to social and economic factors.
meanings.example_cn: 犯罪率上升主要由社会和经济因素造成。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately end a  pregnancy  when the baby is still too young to live
meanings.example: The disease causes pregnant animals to abort.
meanings.example_cn: 这种疾病会导致怀孕的动物流产。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is blamed for something bad that happens, even if it is not their fault
meanings.example: I don't think I deserve to be made the scapegoat for a couple of bad results.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为我不该为出现的一些不良后果充当替罪羊。

meanings.meaning_en: large, impressive, and appearing important
meanings.example: an imposing building
meanings.example_cn: 宏伟的建筑

meanings.meaning_cn: (道路，桥梁)通行费；损失，代价；税收
meanings.meaning_en: the money you have to pay to use a particular road, bridge etc
meanings.example: You can pay a toll to drive on Pike's Peak Highway or relax and take the Pike's Peak Cog Railway.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以付通行费开车上派克斯峰公路，或者放松一下，乘坐派克斯峰齿轨式火车。

meanings.meaning_cn: 激怒；使烦躁，使感到不适
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel annoyed or impatient, especially by doing something many times or for a long period of time
meanings.example: It really irritates me when he doesn’t help around the house.
meanings.example_cn: 家里的事情他一点都不帮忙，真让我恼火。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of murdering an important person
meanings.example: He narrowly escaped an assassination attempt (=  when someone tries but fails to kill someone else  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 他在一次暗杀行动中死里逃生。

meanings.meaning_en: a state-ment, report, attitude etc that is subjective is influenced by personal opinion and can therefore be unfair
meanings.example: As a critic, he is far too subjective.
meanings.example_cn: 作为评论家，他过于主观。

meanings.meaning_en: medical treatment in which a surgeon cuts open your body to repair or remove something inside
meanings.example: Dr. Hanson is in surgery.
meanings.example_cn: 汉森医生在手术室。

meanings.meaning_en: a wooden bar used for keeping two animals together, especially cattle, when they are pulling heavy loads
meanings.example: People are still suffering under the yoke of slavery.
meanings.example_cn: 人们仍然生活在奴隶制的枷锁之下。

meanings.meaning_en: to increase by a large amount or number, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The amount of information available has multiplied.
meanings.example_cn: 可获得的信息大大增加了。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove a leader or government from power, especially by force
meanings.example: Rebels were already making plans to overthrow the government.
meanings.example_cn: 反叛者已在密谋颠覆政府。

meanings.meaning_en: if you soak something, or if you let it soak, you keep it covered with a liquid for a period of time, especially in order to make it softer or easier to clean
meanings.example: Soak the clothes in cold water.
meanings.example_cn: 把衣服浸泡在冷水里。

meanings.meaning_en: to put or hold something in a carefully balanced position, especially above something else
meanings.example: Louisa seems to have much more poise and confidence.
meanings.example_cn: 路易莎似乎更加沉着自信了。

meanings.meaning_en: a calm confident way of behaving, combined with an ability to control your feelings or reactions in difficult situations
intended to be used or accepted for a short time only, until something or someone final can be made or found
meanings.example: an interim report
meanings.example_cn: 中期报告

meanings.meaning_en: done quickly, immediately, or at the right time
meanings.example: Prompt action must be taken.
meanings.example_cn: 必须立即采取行动。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone decide to do something
meanings.example: Prompt payment is requested.
meanings.example_cn: 请立即付款。

meanings.meaning_en: to hit your open hands together, to show that you have enjoyed a play, concert, speaker etc
meanings.example: The audience applauded loudly.
meanings.example_cn: 观众掌声雷动。

meanings.meaning_en: enough in quantity or of a good enough quality for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Farmers have been slow to make adequate provision for their retirement.
meanings.example_cn: 农民们迟迟没有为退休做好适当安排。

meanings.meaning_en: to increase the effects or strength of something
meanings.example: These stories only amplified her fears.
meanings.example_cn: 这些故事徒增了她的恐惧感。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone clings to a position or a possession they have, they do everything they can to keep it even though this may be very difficult
meanings.example: Instead, he appears determined to cling to power.
meanings.example_cn: 反而，他看来坚决要握紧权力不放。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where criminals are kept as part of their punishment, or where people who have been charged with a crime are kept before they are judged in a law court
meanings.example: He’s been in jail for three months already.
meanings.example_cn: 他已经入狱三个月。

meanings.meaning_cn: 似是而非的论点；看似悖谬实则正确的观点
meanings.meaning_en: a statement that seems impossible because it contains two opposing ideas that are both true
meanings.example: The paradox is that fishermen would catch more fish if they fished less.
meanings.example_cn: 悖论就是: 如果渔夫减少捕鱼，反而会打到更多的鱼。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of sheep, goats, or birds
meanings.example: They kept a small flock of sheep.
meanings.example_cn: 他们养了一小群绵羊。

meanings.meaning_en: to change the direction in which something travels
meanings.example: The high street is closed and traffic is being diverted .
meanings.example_cn: 大街封闭，车辆正改道而行。

meanings.meaning_en: very offensive language, stories, or pictures about sex
meanings.example: I don’t know how you can watch that filth!
meanings.example_cn: 我不知道你怎么会看那种淫秽的东西！

meanings.example: I am writing to confirm /enquire/inform you…
meanings.example_cn: 我写信是要确认/询问/通知你…

meanings.meaning_en: great speed in doing something, especially because you do not have enough time
meanings.example: I soon regretted my haste.
meanings.example_cn: 我很快就对自己的仓促感到后悔。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有吸引力的，讨人喜欢的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is attractive is good looking, especially in a way that makes you sexually interested in them
meanings.example: an attractive young woman
meanings.example_cn: 妩媚动人的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of land in a hot country, where crops such as tea, cotton, and sugar are grown
meanings.example: a rubber plantation
meanings.example_cn: 橡胶园

meanings.meaning_en: to make an area of desert, wet land etc suitable for farming or building
meanings.example: This land will be reclaimed for a new airport.
meanings.example_cn: 这块土地将被开发用来建新机场。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things in the wrong order
meanings.example: Someone’s muddled up all the papers on my desk.
meanings.example_cn: 有人把我桌上的文件全都弄乱了。

meanings.meaning_en: a metallic noise sounds like pieces of metal hitting each other
meanings.example: The key turned in the lock with a loud metallic click.
meanings.example_cn: 钥匙在锁里转动发出金属撞击的咔嗒声。

meanings.meaning_en: easy to notice or understand
meanings.example: The obvious way of reducing pollution is to use cars less.
meanings.example_cn: 减少污染显而易见的办法就是少用汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: A sentiment that people have is an attitude which is based on their thoughts and feelings
meanings.example: Public sentiment rapidly turned anti-American.
meanings.example_cn: 公众的情绪迅速转向反美。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone’s life unpleasant, for example by frequently saying offensive things to them or threatening them
meanings.example: A number of black youths have complained of being harassed by the police.
meanings.example_cn: 一些黑人青年投诉称受到警察骚扰。

meanings.meaning_en: to limit something
meanings.example: Poor soil has constrained the level of crop production.
meanings.example_cn: 贫瘠的土地限制了农作物的产量。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不幸的，可怜的；令人难受的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is wretched is very unhappy or ill, and you feel sorry for them
meanings.example: the poor, wretched girl
meanings.example_cn: 极其不幸的可怜姑娘

meanings.meaning_en: to feel angry or upset about a situation or about something that someone has done, especially because you think that it is not fair
meanings.example: Paul resented the fact that Carol didn’t trust him.
meanings.example_cn: 保罗非常气愤，因为卡萝尔不信任他。

meanings.meaning_en: an illegal action or a crime
meanings.example: His solicitor said he committed the offence because he was heavily in debt.
meanings.example_cn: 他的律师说他犯罪是因为欠下巨债。

meanings.meaning_en: You can use go with words like "further" and "beyond" to show the degree or extent of something
meanings.example: The governor went further by agreeing that all policy announcements should be made first in the House.
meanings.example_cn: 该州长进一步同意所有政策的宣布都应首先在议院进行。

meanings.meaning_en: precise information, details etc are exact, clear, and correct
meanings.example: precise sales figures
meanings.example_cn: 准确的销售数据

meanings.meaning_cn: 与…互搭，与重叠，与部分相同
meanings.meaning_en: If one thing overlaps another, or if you overlap them, a part of the first thing occupies the same area as a part of the other thing. You can also say that two things overlap.
meanings.example: When the bag is folded, the bottom overlaps one side.
meanings.example_cn: 把包折叠起来时，其底部与一边就重合了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 一系列事件中的一个事件
meanings.meaning_en: a television or radio programme that is one of a series of programmes in which the same story is continued each week
meanings.example: Watch next week’s thrilling episode!
meanings.example_cn: 请收看下周精彩的一集！

meanings.meaning_en: the desire to harm someone because you hate them
meanings.example: James bore her no malice (= did not feel any malice towards her ) .
meanings.example_cn: 詹姆斯对她并无恶意。

meanings.meaning_en: palatable food or drink has a pleasant or acceptable taste
meanings.example: a very palatable wine
meanings.example_cn: 口感极佳的酒

meanings.meaning_en: to make an object or pattern by cutting a piece of wood or stone
meanings.example: carved wooden chairs
meanings.example_cn: 木雕椅子

meanings.meaning_en: a particular attitude or way of thinking, especially one that you think is wrong or stupid
meanings.example: a get-rich-quick mentality
meanings.example_cn: 一夜暴富的心态

meanings.meaning_en: A proposition is a statement or an idea that people can consider or discuss to decide whether it is true
meanings.example: The proposition that democracies do not fight each other is based on a tiny historical sample.
meanings.example_cn: 民主国家间互不交战的观点是基于一个微不足道的历史实例。

meanings.meaning_en: a road, hill etc that is steep slopes at a high angle
meanings.example: The road became rocky and steep.
meanings.example_cn: 路变得崎岖陡峭起来。

meanings.meaning_en: If you hitchhike, you travel by getting rides from passing vehicles without paying
meanings.example: Neff hitchhiked to New York during his Christmas holiday.
meanings.example_cn: 内夫在圣诞节休假期间搭免费便车去了纽约。

meanings.meaning_en: a mass of diseased cells in your body that have divided and increased too quickly
meanings.example: a brain tumour
meanings.example_cn: 脑瘤

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement in which two or more countries, groups etc agree to work together to try to change or achieve something
meanings.example: independent organizations and alliances
meanings.example_cn: 独立组织和联盟

meanings.meaning_cn: 命名 取名 单位

meanings.meaning_en: to make an angry, unhappy, or confused expression, moving your  eyebrows  together
meanings.example: She frowned as she read the letter.
meanings.example_cn: 她看着信皱起了眉头。

meanings.meaning_en: to force someone to do something they do not want to do by threatening them
meanings.example: Potter had argued that the government coerced him into pleading guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 波特曾争辩说是政府胁迫他认罪。

meanings.meaning_en: heavy and difficult to move
meanings.example: a large cumbersome machine
meanings.example_cn: 大而笨重的机器

meanings.meaning_cn: 信任，信誉；存款；信用贷款
meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement with a shop, bank etc that allows you to buy something and pay for it later
meanings.example: The store agreed to let him have credit.
meanings.example_cn: 商店同意他赊购。

meanings.meaning_en: to believe or admit that someone has a quality, or has done something good
meanings.example: What’s the credit limit on your Visa card?
meanings.example_cn: 你的维萨卡信用额度是多少？

meanings.meaning_cn: 韵律，格律；有规律的反复(循环)，周期性
meanings.meaning_en: A rhythm is a regular pattern of changes, for example changes in your body, in the seasons, or in the tides
meanings.example: Begin to listen to your own body rhythms.
meanings.example_cn: 开始聆听你自己身体的规律性变化。

meanings.meaning_en: to have an accident in a car, plane etc by violently hitting something else
meanings.example: The jet crashed after take-off.
meanings.example_cn: 这架喷气式飞机起飞后就坠毁了。

meanings.meaning_en: an accident in which a vehicle violently hits something else
a toneless voice does not express any feelings
meanings.example: ‘I’m sorry,’ he said, in a flat toneless voice.
meanings.example_cn: “对不起。”他以淡淡的声调说道。

meanings.meaning_en: to bring food or drink up from your stomach out through your mouth, because you are ill
meanings.example: He had swallowed so much sea water he wanted to vomit.
meanings.example_cn: 他呛了这么多海水，所以想吐。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to connect or repair electrical wires or equipment
meanings.example: I've heard an electrician got hurt when he hiked.
meanings.example_cn: 我听说有个电工在高空检修电线时摔伤了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发音清晰的；说话表达力强
meanings.meaning_en: to express your ideas or feelings in words
meanings.example: Many people are unable to articulate the unhappiness they feel.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人都表达不出内心的痛苦。

meanings.meaning_en: an entrance covered by a roof outside the front door of a house or church
meanings.example: He was standing on the porch, waving as we drove away.
meanings.example_cn: 我们开车离开的时候，他站在走廊上向我们挥手。

meanings.meaning_en: two weeks
meanings.example: a fortnight’s holiday
meanings.example_cn: 十四天的假期

meanings.meaning_en: to wake someone
meanings.example: His revolutionary work in linguistics has aroused intense scholarly interest.
meanings.example_cn: 他在语言学方面的革命性著作引起了强烈的学术兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that has won a competition, especially in sport
meanings.example: the world heavyweight boxing champion
meanings.example_cn: 世界重量级拳击冠军

meanings.meaning_en: to publicly fight for and defend an aim or principle, such as the rights of a group of people
meanings.example: the Olympic champion
meanings.example_cn: 奥运会冠军

meanings.meaning_en: something that may be dangerous, or cause accidents or problems
meanings.example: That pile of rubbish is a fire hazard (= something that is likely to cause a fire ).
meanings.example_cn: 那堆垃圾是火灾隐患。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of a written law or legal document covering a particular subject of the whole law or document
meanings.example: A confidentiality clause was added to the contract.
meanings.example_cn: 合同中加上了一项保密条款。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling or showing a lot of interest and excitement about something
meanings.example: an enthusiastic supporter of reform
meanings.example_cn: 改革的热心支持者

meanings.meaning_en: a work of art or a document that is not a copy, but is the one produced by the writer or artist
meanings.example: The colours are much more striking in the original.
meanings.example_cn: 原作的色彩要鲜艳得多。

meanings.meaning_en: existing or happening first, before other people or things
meanings.example: I’ll keep a copy of the contract, and give you the original.
meanings.example_cn: 我将留一份合同副本，把原件给你。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of goods or work produced by a person, machine, factory etc
meanings.example: Output is up 30% on last year.
meanings.example_cn: 产量比去年提高了30%。

meanings.meaning_en: reasonable and likely to be true or successful
meanings.example: His story certainly sounds plausible.
meanings.example_cn: 他的叙述听上去当然很合理。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that you have when you think you are going to vomit (= bring food up from your stomach through your mouth )
meanings.example: I was overcome with a feeling of nausea.
meanings.example_cn: 我感到一阵恶心。

meanings.meaning_en: a reduction in the usual price of something
meanings.example: They are often available at a discount.
meanings.example_cn: 它们经常可以以折扣价买到。

meanings.meaning_en: the loud noise that you hear during a storm, usually after a flash of lightning
meanings.example: We were woken in the night by thunder.
meanings.example_cn: 晚上我们被雷声惊醒。

meanings.meaning_en: the final result of a meeting, discussion, war etc – used especially when no one knows what it will be until it actually happens
meanings.example: People who had heard the evidence at the trial were surprised at the outcome.
meanings.example_cn: 在审判过程中听过证词的人都对此结果感到吃惊。

meanings.meaning_en: the round part of a clock, watch, machine etc that has numbers that show you the time or a measurement
meanings.example: The lighted dial of her watch said 1.20.
meanings.example_cn: 她手表上的夜光表面显示时间为1点20分。

meanings.example: She looked at the dial to check her speed.
meanings.example_cn: 她看了看仪表盘，以确认自己的速度。

meanings.meaning_en: spoken or written in secret and intended to be kept secret
meanings.example: a confidential government report
meanings.example_cn: 一份机密的政府报告

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of metal fastened to a door, lid etc that allows it to swing open and shut
to attach something, using a hinge
to like something very much
meanings.example: I simply adore chocolate.
meanings.example_cn: 我简直太喜欢巧克力了。

meanings.meaning_en: having an end or a limit
meanings.example: the earth’s finite resources
meanings.example_cn: 地球有限的资源

meanings.meaning_en: having qualities considered to be typical of men or of what men do
meanings.example: They’re nice curtains, but I’d prefer something a little more masculine.
meanings.example_cn: 这些窗帘很好，但我更喜欢男性化一点的。

meanings.meaning_en: If you mutter, you speak very quietly so that you cannot easily be heard, often because you are complaining about something
meanings.example: "God knows," she muttered, "what's happening in that madman's mind."
meanings.example_cn: “天知道，”她低声抱怨，“那个疯子脑子里正在想什么。”

meanings.meaning_en: the people or groups that are competing against you, especially in business or in a sport
meanings.example: Going to trade fairs is an ideal opportunity to size up the competition .
meanings.example_cn: 参加商品交易会是估量竞争规模的理想机会。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who receives something
meanings.example: ...the largest recipient of U.S. foreign aid.
meanings.example_cn: …最大的美国对外援助接受方。

meanings.meaning_en: an official order to stop trade with another country
meanings.example: Several countries embargoed arms shipments to Yugoslavia.
meanings.example_cn: 好几个国家对南斯拉夫实行武器禁运。

meanings.meaning_en: using a system in which information is recorded or sent out electronically in the form of numbers, usually ones and zeros
meanings.example: digital TV
meanings.example_cn: 数字电视

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that is given to someone by an educational organization to help pay for their education
meanings.example: Her latest publication is a fine piece of scholarship.
meanings.example_cn: 她最新出版的作品是一部优秀的学术著作。

meanings.meaning_en: If you impose your opinions or beliefs on other people, you try and make people accept them as a rule or as a model to copy
meanings.example: Parents should beware of imposing their own tastes on their children.
meanings.example_cn: 父母应该提防把自己的兴趣强加给孩子。

meanings.meaning_en: consisting of many different parts and often difficult to understand
meanings.example: a complex system of highways
meanings.example_cn: 复杂的公路网

meanings.meaning_en: a large number of things which are closely related
meanings.example: Photosynthesis is a highly complex process.
meanings.example_cn: 光合作用是一个非常复杂的过程。

meanings.meaning_en: permission to do something
meanings.example: He took the car without the owner’s consent .
meanings.example_cn: 他没有得到车主的许可就把车开走了。

meanings.meaning_en: a mixture of loud noises, especially the noise of a lot of people talking at the same time
meanings.example: the hubbub from the market
meanings.example_cn: 市场的嘈杂声

meanings.meaning_en: a passage which goes down through a building or down into the ground, so that someone or something can get in or out
meanings.example: a drive shaft
meanings.example_cn: 驱动轴

meanings.meaning_cn: 报纸文章的标题；照片说明
meanings.meaning_en: A caption is the words printed underneath a picture or cartoon which explain what it is about
meanings.example: The local paper featured me standing on a stepladder with a caption, "Wendy climbs the ladder to success."
meanings.example_cn: 当地的报纸刊登了一幅我站在活梯上的特写，下面写着：“温迪登上了成功之梯。”

meanings.meaning_en: an area of water next to the land where the water is calm, so that ships are safe when they are inside it
meanings.example: as they sailed into Portsmouth Harbour
meanings.example_cn: 当他们驶入朴次茅斯港的时候

meanings.meaning_en: to protect and hide criminals that the police are searching for

meanings.meaning_cn: 跌倒，跌落；摇摇欲坠；使倾覆
meanings.meaning_en: to fall down quickly and suddenly, especially with a rolling movement
meanings.example: Oil prices have tumbled.
meanings.example_cn: 石油价格猛跌。

meanings.meaning_en: a large open container that you fill with water and use for washing yourself, washing dishes etc
meanings.example: Dirty plates were piled high in the sink.
meanings.example_cn: 脏盘子在洗涤槽里堆得很高。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赞助人；资助人；老顾客，主顾
meanings.meaning_en: someone who supports the activities of an organization, for example by giving money
meanings.example: a wealthy patron
meanings.example_cn: 富有的赞助人

meanings.meaning_en: a common illness that makes you feel very tired and weak, gives you a sore throat, and makes you cough and have to clear your nose a lot
meanings.example: Steven’s still in bed with flu .
meanings.example_cn: 史蒂文患了流感，仍卧病在床。

meanings.meaning_cn: 柱; 柱状物；书报上的栏；纵列
meanings.meaning_en: a tall solid upright stone post used to support a building or as a decoration
meanings.example: He writes a weekly column for ‘The Times’.
meanings.example_cn: 他每周为《泰晤士报》写一篇专栏文章。

meanings.meaning_en: the formal rules for polite behaviour in society or in a particular group
meanings.example: strict rules of professional etiquette
meanings.example_cn: 严格的行规

meanings.meaning_en: to take away an amount or part from a total
meanings.example: The company deducted this payment from his compensation.
meanings.example_cn: 公司从他的补偿金中扣除了这笔款项。

meanings.meaning_en: made of or containing a lot of things or people that are very close together
meanings.example: a dense rurally-based population
meanings.example_cn: 居住在乡村的密集人口

meanings.meaning_cn: (较淡)着色于，染色；使带有气息
meanings.meaning_en: to give something a small amount of a particular colour, emotion, or quality
meanings.example: Pink tinged her cheeks.
meanings.example_cn: 她面色粉红。

meanings.meaning_en: fitting together well

meanings.meaning_cn: 令人作呕的，令人不快的，下流的

meanings.meaning_en: a tool with a rounded blade and a long handle used for moving earth, stones etc

thinking that someone might be guilty of doing something wrong or dishonest

meanings.example_cn: 他不愿回答我的问题，这引起我的怀疑。

meanings.example_cn: 他把他的自行车斜靠在树干上。

meanings.meaning_en: a leather seat that you sit on when you ride a horse
a very sad event, that shocks people because it involves death

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of weather conditions

meanings.example_cn: 这本书是讲气象的。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something very wet

meanings.meaning_en: the joint where your arm bends

very powerful or impressive, and often frightening

meanings.example_cn: 那幢建筑呈灰色，气势凛然，与漂亮沾不上边。

meanings.meaning_en: if you kindle a fire, or if it kindles, it starts to burn

meanings.example_cn: 第二次世界大战激发了他的政治热情。

meanings.example: The school will enroll new students in August.

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of ground or a surface that slopes

meanings.example: He has exerted himself tirelessly on behalf of the charity.

meanings.example_cn: 截然相反的是，阿什沃思的风格非常简单和现代。

to influence someone so that they begin to think or behave in an immoral way

meanings.example_cn: 不合时宜的教学方法

meanings.example_cn: 通货膨胀的加剧和随之而来的需求下降

meanings.example_cn: 氧分子中只有两个原子。

clearly different or belonging to a different type

meanings.example_cn: 对上学抱消极态度的学生

meanings.example_cn: 工作人员戴着姓名标签，对同僚直呼其名。

meanings.example_cn: 如果他们颁发毅力金牌，卡伦应该站在领奖台上。

meanings.meaning_en: to scatter grit on a frozen road to make it less slippery

meanings.example_cn: 把病人慢慢托到直立的位置。

meanings.meaning_en: the line far away where the land or sea seems to meet the sky

meanings.example_cn: 远处小黑点般的一条小船出现在地平线上。

meanings.meaning_en: to move along on your hands and knees with your body close to the ground

meanings.example_cn: 我们凌晨两点爬上了床。

large in amount or number

meanings.example_cn: 我们有相当多家长的支持。

meanings.meaning_en: a marginal change or difference is too small to be important

meanings.example_cn: 失业人数的小幅增加

meanings.meaning_en: to think or know that something is going to happen in the future

meanings.example_cn: 我把你的名字写在名单上了，估计不会有什么问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something dirty, especially with waste from your body

meanings.example_cn: 她把植物周围的土壤弄湿。

meanings.meaning_en: the top layer of the earth in which plants grow
very bad or unpleasant

meanings.example_cn: 天气很糟糕。

meanings.meaning_en: a government, especially one that was not elected fairly or that you disapprove of for some other reason

meanings.example_cn: 该政权清除了大多数反对者。

meanings.meaning_en: coming from or relating to God or a god

meanings.example_cn: 神的力量

meanings.example: divine love
meanings.example_cn: 上帝的慈爱

meanings.example_cn: 我想我们几乎可以肯定，利率很快会再次上调。

meanings.example_cn: 在复活节星期日

meanings.meaning_en: to break suddenly into very small pieces, or to make something break in this way

meanings.example_cn: 这次爆炸把大楼炸成一片废墟。

meanings.example_cn: “你为什么这么做？”男孩问道。

meanings.example_cn: 他收到了微不足道的100美元年金。

meanings.meaning_en: unwilling to believe that people have good, honest, or sincere reasons for doing something

meanings.example_cn: 认为人性本恶的一种观点

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten or stick something to something else

meanings.example_cn: 我们可以按成本价格重新印刷，这将花费X，或根据她找到的一种修正服务，可以重新粘贴上正确的价格，这将花费X。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of letters added to the beginning or end of a word to change its meaning or use, such as ‘un-’, ‘mis-’, ‘-ness’, or ‘-ly’
to press something or make it smaller so that it takes up less space, or to become smaller
meanings.example: Light silk is best for parachutes, as it compresses well and then expands rapidly.
meanings.example_cn: 轻质丝绸最适合制作降落伞，因为这种面料便于压缩，而且展开迅速。

meanings.meaning_en: the edge of a road, path etc

meanings.example_cn: 汽车滑过路面，在路缘草带上停了下来。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of dry food, especially bread or cake

meanings.example_cn: 她站起来拂去制服上的面包屑。

meanings.example_cn: 没有食物，动物很快就会死亡。

meanings.example_cn: 支持这个政党的选民比例持续下降。

meanings.example_cn: 我们旅行计划的下一站是塞多纳。

meanings.example_cn: 我们参观了当地的市场，看到了漂亮地摆放着的水果蔬菜。

meanings.example_cn: 星星的运动可在天文馆里模拟。

meanings.example_cn: 脑垂体腺

meanings.meaning_en: extremely beautiful and very delicately made
meanings.example: the most exquisite craftsmanship
meanings.example_cn: 最精美的工艺

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is directly below another person in rank, and who is officially in charge when that person is not there
meanings.example: His brother was acting as his deputy in America.
meanings.example_cn: 他的兄弟充当他在美洲的代理人。

meanings.meaning_en: very silly or unreasonable
meanings.example: That’s a ridiculous idea!
meanings.example_cn: 那主意很荒唐！

meanings.meaning_cn: 使和解；使复交；调解，调停
meanings.meaning_en: to have a good relationship again with someone after you have quarrelled with them
meanings.example: Jonah and his youngest son were, on the surface at least, reconciled.
meanings.example_cn: 乔纳和他小儿子和好了，至少表面上如此。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin tube with a wide top that you use for pouring liquid into a container with a narrow opening, such as a bottle
meanings.example: ...a ship with three masts and two funnels.
meanings.example_cn: …一艘有3根桅杆和2个烟囱的轮船。

meanings.meaning_en: to send money, information etc from various places to someone
the outside structure of something, especially the part of a building that remains when the rest of it has been destroyed
meanings.example: They cracked the nuts and removed their shells.
meanings.example_cn: 他们打破坚果并剥掉果壳。

meanings.meaning_en: clearly expressed in a few words – use this to show approval
meanings.example: a succinct explanation
meanings.example_cn: 简明扼要的解释

meanings.meaning_en: an eminent person is famous, important, and respected
meanings.example: an eminent lawyer
meanings.example_cn: 杰出的律师

meanings.meaning_cn: 压紧，夹住，发生故障，塞进
meanings.meaning_en: If something such as a part of a machine jams, or if something jams it, the part becomes fixed in position and is unable to move freely or work properly
meanings.example: The second time he fired his gun jammed.
meanings.example_cn: 他开第二枪时，枪卡壳了。

meanings.meaning_en: Jam is also a noun
meanings.example: A rope jammed the boat's propeller.
meanings.example_cn: 一条绳子卡住了船的推进器。

meanings.meaning_en: if something terminates, or if you terminate it, it ends
meanings.example: The court ruled that the contract must be terminated.
meanings.example_cn: 法庭裁决该合同必须终止。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for only a limited period of time
meanings.example: temporary pain relief
meanings.example_cn: 疼痛的暂时缓解

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of uncontrollable anger
meanings.example: Sobbing with rage, Carol was taken to the hospital.
meanings.example_cn: 卡罗尔气得呜呜哭，被送往医院。

meanings.meaning_en: A bridge or other structure that spans something such as a river or a valley stretches right across it
meanings.example: Travellers get from one side to the other by walking across a footbridge that spans a little stream.
meanings.example_cn: 旅游者通过一座横跨小溪的人行桥从一边走到另一边。

meanings.meaning_en: a form of a language which is spoken only in one area, with words or grammar that are slightly different from other forms of the same language
meanings.example: the local dialect
meanings.example_cn: 当地方言

meanings.meaning_en: a good standard of ability and skill
meanings.example: I brought her proficiency up to the required level.
meanings.example_cn: 我把她的熟练程度提高到所规定的水平。

meanings.meaning_en: a religious person who travels a long way to a holy place
meanings.example: pilgrims visiting a holy shrine
meanings.example_cn: 祭拜圣庙的朝圣者

meanings.meaning_en: to become smaller, or to make something smaller, through the effects of heat or water
meanings.example: I’m worried about washing that shirt in case it shrinks.
meanings.example_cn: 我不太敢洗那件衬衫，怕它会缩水。

meanings.meaning_cn: 半径；以半径度量的面积
meanings.meaning_en: the distance from the centre to the edge of a circle, or a line drawn from the centre to the edge
meanings.example: The shock of the explosion was felt over a radius of forty miles.
meanings.example_cn: 爆炸引起的剧烈震动在方圆40英里内都能感觉得到。

meanings.meaning_en: a long pole with a wide flat blade at one end, used for rowing a boat
meanings.example: Cold worlds shake from the oar.
meanings.example_cn: 冰冷的世界从桨上摇落。

meanings.meaning_en: the system on the Internet that allows you to find and use information that is held on computers all over the world
meanings.example: He watched a spider spinning its web.
meanings.example_cn: 他观察一只蜘蛛织网。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who officially represents their government in a foreign country
meanings.example: French diplomats
meanings.example_cn: 法国外交官

meanings.meaning_en: a large amount of data stored in a computer system so that you can find and use it easily
meanings.example: customer details held on a database
meanings.example_cn: 存储在数据库内的客户详细信息

meanings.meaning_en: permanently agreed or arranged
meanings.example: You have to pay standing charges whether or not you use the service.
meanings.example_cn: 无论是否使用这项服务，你都必须一直付费。

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s rank or position in a system, organization, society etc, based on what other people think of them
meanings.example: A standing committee was established to coordinate the army and navy.
meanings.example_cn: 成立了常务委员会以协调陆军和海军。

meanings.meaning_en: a room under a house or other building, often used for storing things
meanings.example: a coal cellar
meanings.example_cn: 煤窖

meanings.meaning_en: to work with someone else to achieve something that you both want
meanings.example: They agreed to co-operate with Brazil on a programme to protect the rain forests.
meanings.example_cn: 他们同意和巴西合作进行一个保护热带雨林的项目。

meanings.meaning_en: to say words for someone else to write down
meanings.example: Federal funds have to be used as dictated by Washington.
meanings.example_cn: 联邦款项得按照华盛顿规定的途径使用。

meanings.meaning_en: an adherent or devotee of a cause, party, etc
meanings.example: a media campaign to represent Democrats as angry partisans
meanings.example_cn: 把民主党人描述成愤怒的死硬派的媒体宣传

meanings.meaning_en: to remove unwanted plants from a garden or other place
meanings.example: Caspar was weeding the garden.
meanings.example_cn: 卡斯帕正在给花园除草。

meanings.example: Most health chiefs believe the reforms have gone too far.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数卫生部领导人都觉得改革搞得过火了。

meanings.meaning_en: highest in rank

meanings.meaning_cn: (跑道的)一圈；腰以下及大腿的前面部分
meanings.meaning_en: the upper part of your legs when you are sitting down
meanings.example: Rubens Barrichello finished a lap ahead of his team-mate.
meanings.example_cn: 鲁本斯·巴里切罗领先队友一圈跑完全程。

meanings.meaning_en: to say officially that you want to stop fighting, because you realize that you cannot win
meanings.example: Germany surrendered on May 7th, 1945.
meanings.example_cn: 德国于 1945 年 5 月 7 日投降。

meanings.meaning_en: to have the wrong idea; fail to understand
meanings.example: Since namely namely misconceive, that explanation clear nice.
meanings.example_cn: 既然是个误会，那解释清楚就好了。

meanings.meaning_en: believing or feeling something very strongly and sincerely
meanings.example: a fervent appeal for peace
meanings.example_cn: 对和平的强烈呼吁

meanings.meaning_en: a long passage between rows of seats in a church, plane, theatre etc, or between rows of shelves in a shop
meanings.example: Would you like a window seat or an aisle seat (=  seat next to the aisle  ) ?
meanings.example_cn: 您想要靠窗的座位还是靠过道的座位？

meanings.meaning_en: the shape or arrangement of the parts of something
meanings.example: ...Stonehenge, in southwestern England, an ancient configuration of giant stones.
meanings.example_cn: …史前巨石柱群，位于英国西南部，是一座古代巨石阵列。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut and collect a crop of grain
meanings.example: You'll soon begin to reap the benefits of being fitter.
meanings.example_cn: 你很快就会获得身体更健康带来的好处。

meanings.meaning_en: a weapon that can fly over long distances and that explodes when it hits the thing it has been aimed at
meanings.example: a nuclear missile
meanings.example_cn: 核导弹

meanings.example: He crashed into an oncoming car.
meanings.example_cn: 他撞上了一辆迎面驶来的汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially a child or young person, who is mature behaves in a sensible and reasonable way, as you would expect an adult to behave
meanings.example: Laura is very mature for her age .
meanings.example_cn: 相对她的年龄来说劳拉是很成熟的。

meanings.meaning_en: to become fully grown or developed
meanings.example: We’re mature enough to disagree on this issue but still respect each other.
meanings.example_cn: 我们都很成熟，尽管我们对此事意见不同，但还是彼此尊重。

meanings.meaning_en: a suitable or favourable time
meanings.example: I often think fondly of an occasion some years ago in New Orleans.
meanings.example_cn: 我经常深情地想起一些年前在新奥尔良所发生的一幕。

meanings.meaning_en: to cause something
if someone or something is pretentious, they try to seem more important, intelligent, or high class than they really are in order to be impressive
meanings.example: a pretentious film
meanings.example_cn: 矫饰的电影

meanings.meaning_en: bad luck, or a situation that results from bad luck
meanings.example: If by some mischance the government get elected again, I think taxes will rise.
meanings.example_cn: 如果不幸这届政府再次当选，我想税收会提高。

meanings.meaning_en: to get control of a country by fighting
meanings.example: The Normans conquered England in 1066.
meanings.example_cn: 诺曼人于 1066 年征服英格兰。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep a feeling, idea, or belief strong or help it to grow stronger
meanings.example: We need to nourish our hopes and dreams.
meanings.example_cn: 我们应该怀有希望和梦想。

meanings.meaning_en: the business of providing things for people to do, places for them to stay etc while they are on holiday
meanings.example: The country depends on tourism for much of its income.
meanings.example_cn: 该国的大部分收入依靠旅游业。

meanings.meaning_en: a professional judgment about how much something is worth
meanings.example: The property has a valuation of $1.6 billion.
meanings.example_cn: 那处房地产估价为16亿美元。

meanings.meaning_en: an agreement that is achieved after everyone involved accepts less than what they wanted at first, or the act of making this agreement
meanings.example: Compromise is an inevitable part of marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 妥协是婚姻生活中必不可少的。

meanings.meaning_en: to reach an agreement in which everyone involved accepts less than what they wanted at first
meanings.example: To stop the argument they decided on a compromise.
meanings.example_cn: 为停止争吵，他们决定作出妥协。

meanings.meaning_en: something that protects a person or thing from harm or damage
meanings.example: He used his left hand as a shield against the reflecting sunlight.
meanings.example_cn: 他用左手遮挡反射过来的阳光。

meanings.meaning_en: to protect someone or something from being harmed or damaged
always wanting more food, money, power, possessions etc than you need
meanings.example: a greedy and selfish society
meanings.example_cn: 一个贪婪自私的社会

meanings.meaning_en: a way of eating in which you only eat certain foods, in order to lose weight, or to improve your health
meanings.example: Lyn always seems to be on a diet.
meanings.example_cn: 琳恩似乎一直在节食。

meanings.meaning_en: a natural substance that makes skin, hair, plants etc a particular colour
meanings.example: Melanin is the dark brown pigment of the hair, skin and eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 黑色素是头发、皮肤以及眼睛中的深棕色色素。

meanings.meaning_en: to move up through the air
meanings.example: The plane ascended rapidly.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机迅速爬升。

meanings.meaning_en: having a sharp acid taste, like the taste of a  lemon  or a fruit that is not ready to be eaten
meanings.example: Rachel sampled the wine. It was sour.
meanings.example_cn: 雷切尔尝了尝葡萄酒，是酸的。

meanings.meaning_en: extreme, often uncontrolled anger
meanings.example: I was shaking with fury .
meanings.example_cn: 我气得发抖。

meanings.meaning_en: a man
meanings.example: Dave’s a nice guy when you get to know him.
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫是个好人，你了解他后就知道了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something lose its effect or value
meanings.example: Recent inflation could nullify the economic growth of the last several years.
meanings.example_cn: 最近的通货膨胀可能会抵消过去数年的经济增长。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you think is true because it is very likely
meanings.example: She was enraged by his presumption.
meanings.example_cn: 她被他的放肆激怒了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 绊跌，绊倒；结结巴巴说话
meanings.meaning_en: to hit your foot against something or put your foot down awkwardly while you are walking or running, so that you almost fall
meanings.example: In her hurry, she stumbled and spilled the milk all over the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 匆忙中她绊了一下，把牛奶洒得满地都是。

meanings.meaning_en: the central part of an atom, made up of neutrons, protons, and other elementary particles
meanings.example: Neutrons and protons are bound together in the nucleus of an atom.
meanings.example_cn: 在一个原子的核内，中子和质子聚合在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: to become very successful or very strong and healthy
meanings.example: plants that thrive in tropical rain forests
meanings.example_cn: 在热带雨林蓬勃生长的植物

meanings.meaning_en: moving slowly and involving very little energy
meanings.example: He greeted Charles with a languid wave of his hand.
meanings.example_cn: 他无精打采地挥挥手，算是和查尔斯打招呼。

meanings.meaning_en: consisting of people or things that are all of the same type
meanings.example: a homogeneous society
meanings.example_cn: 同种族人组成的社会

meanings.meaning_cn: 不足的，不够多的，缺乏的
meanings.meaning_en: not enough
meanings.example: The story has received scant attention in the press.
meanings.example_cn: 这件事没在报界引起多少注意。

meanings.meaning_cn: 多才多艺的；技术超群的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is versatile has many different skills
meanings.example: a very versatile performer
meanings.example_cn: 多才多艺的表演者

meanings.meaning_en: very easy to notice
meanings.example: The notice must be displayed in a conspicuous place.
meanings.example_cn: 通告一定要贴在显眼的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: to close or fasten something firmly by turning it
meanings.example: Tighten the screws firmly.
meanings.example_cn: 把螺丝拧紧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用力拉，拖；捕获量；拖运的距离
meanings.meaning_en: to pull something heavy with a continuous steady movement
meanings.example: the steam locomotive which hauled the train
meanings.example_cn: 拖动火车的蒸汽机车

meanings.meaning_en: to feel or show that you are very happy
meanings.example: Garbo plays the queen, rejoicing in the love she has found with Antonio.
meanings.example_cn: 嘉宝饰演沉浸在与安东尼奥爱情的欣喜中的王后。

meanings.meaning_en: an object in space like a bright ball with a long tail, that moves around the sun
meanings.example: Halley’s comet
meanings.example_cn: 哈雷彗星

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the sounds of human speech
meanings.example: a phonetic alphabet
meanings.example_cn: 音标

meanings.meaning_en: determined to be successful, rich, powerful etc
meanings.example: Alfred was intensely ambitious, obsessed with the idea of becoming rich.
meanings.example_cn: 艾尔弗雷德雄心勃勃，一心想着发财。

meanings.meaning_en: very different from usual in a way that seems strange, worrying, wrong, or dangerous
meanings.example: abnormal behaviour
meanings.example_cn: 反常行为

meanings.meaning_cn: 调动，机动；演习；策略；总括

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to a simple way of life that existed in the past and does not have modern industries and machines
meanings.example: a primitive society
meanings.example_cn: 原始社会

meanings.meaning_en: a part of a tube or pipe that opens and shuts like a door to control the flow of liquid, gas, air etc passing through it
meanings.example: heart valves
meanings.example_cn: 心脏瓣膜

meanings.meaning_en: too much pride in yourself, so that you are always thinking about yourself and your appearance
meanings.example: Sabrina had none of the vanity so often associated with beautiful women.
meanings.example_cn: 萨布里娜没有一点漂亮女人经常会有的那种虚荣。

meanings.meaning_en: a large formal party to celebrate an event or to welcome someone
meanings.example: It’s an ideal location for a wedding reception .
meanings.example_cn: 这里是举办喜宴的理想地点。

meanings.meaning_en: friendly but quite polite and formal
meanings.example: The talks were conducted in a cordial atmosphere.
meanings.example_cn: 会谈在友好的气氛中进行。

meanings.meaning_en: harmful or poisonous
meanings.example: noxious fumes
meanings.example_cn: 有毒烟雾

meanings.meaning_en: to pay money back to someone when their money has been spent or lost
meanings.example: I'll be happy to reimburse you for any expenses you've had.
meanings.example_cn: 我很乐意报销你的所有花费。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a bad situation worse
meanings.example: The recession has exacerbated this problem.
meanings.example_cn: 经济衰退使这个问题更加严重。

meanings.meaning_en: a solid thing that you can hold, touch, or see but that is not alive
meanings.example: an everyday object such as a spoon
meanings.example_cn: 调羹之类的日常用品

meanings.meaning_en: to feel or say that you oppose or disapprove of something
meanings.example: a small metal object
meanings.example_cn: 一个小金属物件

meanings.meaning_en: If someone's heart palpitates, it beats very fast in an irregular way, because they are frightened or anxious
meanings.example: He felt suddenly faint, and his heart began to palpitate.
meanings.example_cn: 他突然感到晕厥，心脏也开始悸动。

meanings.meaning_en: a very short time
meanings.example: I’ll be with you in a tick (= soon ) .
meanings.example_cn: 我马上就来。

meanings.example: It’ll only take two ticks.
meanings.example_cn: 只要一会儿。

meanings.meaning_en: an official document that states that a fact or facts are true
meanings.example: a degree certificate
meanings.example_cn: 学位证书

meanings.meaning_en: a brave and exciting adventure that someone has had
meanings.example: Homeworkers can easily be exploited by employers.
meanings.example_cn: 在家工作的人容易被雇主剥削。

meanings.meaning_en: to treat someone unfairly by asking them to do things for you, but giving them very little in return – used to show disapproval
giving careful attention to what is happening, so that you will notice any danger or illegal activity
meanings.example: Please remain vigilant at all times and report anything suspicious.
meanings.example_cn: 请时刻保持警惕，有可疑情况随时报告。

meanings.meaning_cn: 最重大的；豪华的；傲慢的；美妙的
meanings.meaning_en: used in the titles of buildings or places that are big and impressive
meanings.example: the Grand Hotel
meanings.example_cn: 格兰大酒店

meanings.meaning_en: a formal meeting of representatives of different groups, countries etc, to discuss ideas, make decisions etc
meanings.example: a congress of the ruling Labor Party
meanings.example_cn: 执政党工党的代表大会

meanings.meaning_en: relating to education, especially at college or university level
meanings.example: He possessed no academic qualifications.
meanings.example_cn: 他没有学历。

meanings.meaning_en: if two things or ideas correspond, the parts or information in one relate to the parts or information in the other
meanings.example: The two halves of the document did not correspond.
meanings.example_cn: 这份文件的前后两部分不相符。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is passive tends to accept things that happen to them or things that people say to them, without taking any action
meanings.example: Kathy seems to take a very passive role in the relationship.
meanings.example_cn: 凯茜在这一关系中似乎扮演着十分被动的角色。

meanings.meaning_en: disagreement or arguing between people
meanings.example: marital discord
meanings.example_cn: 婚姻不和

meanings.meaning_en: to delay something until a later date
meanings.example: The committee deferred their decision .
meanings.example_cn: 委员会延期作出决定。

meanings.meaning_en: sad because you think the situation will not improve
meanings.example: Anne dismissed these gloomy thoughts from her mind.
meanings.example_cn: 安妮抛开了心里这些沮丧的念头。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has extreme political or religious ideas and is often dangerous
meanings.example: fanatics who represent a real danger to democracy
meanings.example_cn: 对民主构成很大威胁的狂热分子

meanings.meaning_en: something you do in order to deceive someone
meanings.example: Pretending he doesn’t remember is an old trick of his.
meanings.example_cn: 假装不记得是他的老花招了。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone, especially someone you are responsible for
meanings.example: How could she abandon her own child?
meanings.example_cn: 她怎么能抛弃自己的孩子？

meanings.meaning_en: the treatment of an illness or injury over a fairly long period of time
meanings.example: new drug therapies
meanings.example_cn: 新的药物疗法

meanings.meaning_en: to lose a right, position, possession etc or have it taken away from you because you have broken a law or rule
meanings.example: By being absent from the trial, he forfeited the right to appeal.
meanings.example_cn: 因缺席审判，他丧失了上诉权。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is killed, especially as a legal punishment
meanings.example: a public execution
meanings.example_cn: 当众处死

meanings.meaning_cn: 多数；多得票数，法定年龄
meanings.meaning_en: most of the people or things in a group
meanings.example: The Labour Party won a huge majority at the last general election.
meanings.example_cn: 工党在上次大选中以巨大的票数优势获胜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 肥沃的，创造力丰富的，能结果实的
meanings.meaning_en: fertile land or soil is able to produce good crops
meanings.example: 800 acres of fertile cropland
meanings.example_cn: 800英亩的肥沃耕地

meanings.meaning_en: something that is done to cure someone who is injured or ill
meanings.example: Just lately, Kyra has been giving me the silent treatment (= refusing to speak to me because she is angry with me ) .
meanings.example_cn: 就在最近，凯拉一直对我不理不睬。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of metal, usually flat and round, that is used as money
meanings.example: Toss a coin to see who goes first.
meanings.example_cn: 抛硬币决定谁先来。

meanings.meaning_en: to invent a new word or expression, especially one that many people start to use
pointing up in a line that forms an angle of 90˚ with a flat surface
meanings.example: a vertical line
meanings.example_cn: 垂直线

meanings.meaning_en: the direction of something that is vertical
meanings.example: the vertical axis of a graph
meanings.example_cn: 图的纵轴

meanings.meaning_en: erroneous ideas or information are wrong and based on facts that are not correct
meanings.example: His economic predictions are based on some erroneous assumptions.
meanings.example_cn: 他的经济预测是基于错误假设之上的。

meanings.meaning_en: a metal that consists of two or more metals mixed together
meanings.example: Brass is an alloy of copper and zinc.
meanings.example_cn: 黄铜是铜和锌的合金。

meanings.meaning_en: a plan, idea, or method that is feasible is possible and is likely to work
meanings.example: a feasible solution
meanings.example_cn: 可行的解决方法

meanings.meaning_en: to disagree strongly with a person or group, especially on a particular subject
meanings.example: The aims of the negotiators in New York again seem likely to collide with the aims of the warriors in the field.
meanings.example_cn: 纽约谈判者的目标看起来可能再次与战场上勇士们的目标相冲突。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat shape with three straight sides and three angles
meanings.example: a triangle of land
meanings.example_cn: 一块三角地

meanings.meaning_en: very many, or too many to be counted
meanings.example: She’s served on innumerable committees.
meanings.example_cn: 她在多个委员会担任委员。

meanings.meaning_en: the time at the beginning of the day when light first appears
meanings.example: When dawn broke (= the first light of the day appeared ) , we were still 50 miles from Calcutta.
meanings.example_cn: 破晓的时候，我们离加尔各答还有50英里。

meanings.meaning_en: not good or favourable
meanings.example: They fear it could have an adverse effect on global financial markets.
meanings.example_cn: 他们担心这会对全球金融市场产生不利影响。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of paper on which a doctor writes what medicine a sick person should have, so that they can get it from a  pharmacist
meanings.example: We are trying to cut the price of prescription drugs .
meanings.example_cn: 我们正努力降低处方药的价格。

meanings.meaning_cn: 自名昭著的，声名狼藉的
meanings.meaning_en: famous or well-known for something bad
meanings.example: a notorious computer hacker
meanings.example_cn: 声名狼藉的电脑黑客

meanings.meaning_en: very offensive, unpleasant, or rude
meanings.example: She’s really obnoxious.
meanings.example_cn: 她这人真讨厌。

meanings.meaning_cn: 绝望的；不顾一切的；危急的
meanings.meaning_en: willing to do anything to change a very bad situation, and not caring about danger
meanings.example: I had no money left and was desperate.
meanings.example_cn: 我身无分文，已经走投无路了。

meanings.meaning_en: the period when someone is king, queen, or  emperor
meanings.example: George VI reigned from 1936 to 1952.
meanings.example_cn: 乔治六世于1936年至1952年在位。

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow road in the countryside
meanings.example: a quiet country lane
meanings.example_cn: 一条宁静的乡间小路

meanings.meaning_cn: 巡航；以节省燃料的速度前进
meanings.meaning_en: to move at a steady speed in a car, aircraft etc
meanings.example: We were cruising along at 50 miles per hour.
meanings.example_cn: 我们以每小时50英里的速度平稳行驶。

meanings.meaning_en: a holiday on a large ship
meanings.example: We fly at a cruising speed of 500 mph.
meanings.example_cn: 我们以每小时500英里的巡航速度平稳飞行。

meanings.meaning_en: very careful about small details in your appearance, work etc
meanings.example: people who are fastidious about personal hygiene
meanings.example_cn: 十分讲究个人卫生的人

meanings.meaning_en: special skills or knowledge in a particular subject, that you learn by experience or training
meanings.example: She was not an accountant and didn't have the expertise to verify all of the financial details.
meanings.example_cn: 她不是会计，不具有核查所有这些财政细目的专业知识。

meanings.meaning_en: unwilling to keep still or stay where you are, especially because you are nervous or bored
meanings.example: After a few weeks in Marseille, I grew restless and decided to move on.
meanings.example_cn: 在马赛住了几星期后，我开始待不住了，决定换个地方。

meanings.meaning_cn: 解开，拨开；败坏(名声，成果)
meanings.meaning_en: to open something that is tied, fastened or wrapped
meanings.example: The screws can be undone by hand.
meanings.example_cn: 这些螺丝可以用手拧开。

meanings.meaning_cn: (旅行)服务员；信使；送急件的人
meanings.meaning_en: a person or company that is paid to take packages somewhere
meanings.example: ...a motorcycle courier.
meanings.example_cn: …一名骑摩托车的信使。

meanings.meaning_cn: 掠夺, 攫取, 抓取"
meanings.meaning_en: to take hold of someone or something with a sudden or violent movement
meanings.example: I grabbed my bag and ran off.
meanings.example_cn: 我抓起我的包就跑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 激动得发狂似的；狂暴的
meanings.meaning_en: If you are frantic, you are behaving in a wild and uncontrolled way because you are frightened or worried
meanings.example: A bird had been locked in and was by now quite frantic.
meanings.example_cn: 一只鸟被关了起来，到现在它都非常狂躁。

meanings.meaning_en: a large boat with a sail, used for pleasure or sport, especially one that has a place where you can sleep
to sleep lightly for a short time
meanings.example: Grandad was dozing in his chair.
meanings.example_cn: 爷爷在椅子上打瞌睡。

meanings.meaning_en: to become ill again after you have seemed to improve
meanings.example: She had a relapse and died soon after.
meanings.example_cn: 她旧病复发，不久就去世了。

meanings.example: Does that metal pit after contact with acid?
meanings.example_cn: 那种金属同酸接触后是否会起凹点?

meanings.meaning_cn: 接触；联络；会晤的人；(电)接点
meanings.meaning_en: communication with a person, organization, country etc
meanings.example: When you contact these two wires, the machine will start at once.
meanings.example_cn: 当你使这两条导线一接触，这台机器就会立刻开始运转。

meanings.example: If we did all the things we are capable of, we would literally astound ourselves.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我们所做的都是我们擅长的事情，我们最终将使自己大吃一惊。

meanings.meaning_en: seeming to be the reason for or the purpose of something, but usually hiding the real reason or purpose
meanings.example: The ostensible purpose of these meetings was to gather information on financial strategies.
meanings.example_cn: 这些会议声称旨在收集金融策略方面的信息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 相等的，相等于，相等匹敌
meanings.meaning_en: to be exactly the same in size, number, or amount as something else
meanings.example: Two plus two equals four.
meanings.example_cn: 二加二等于四。

meanings.meaning_en: a big building where people wait to get onto planes, buses, or ships, or where goods are loaded
meanings.example: the airport’s passenger terminal
meanings.example_cn: 机场航站楼

meanings.meaning_en: a terminal illness cannot be cured, and causes death
to move or drop down from a higher position to a lower position
meanings.example: The tree was about to fall.
meanings.example_cn: 那棵树快要倒下了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something less painful or difficult to deal with
meanings.example: measures to alleviate poverty
meanings.example_cn: 扶贫措施

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is sociable is friendly and enjoys being with other people
meanings.example: a pleasant, sociable couple
meanings.example_cn: 一对和善且喜欢与人交往的夫妇

meanings.meaning_en: likely to make you healthy
meanings.example: good wholesome fun
meanings.example_cn: 健康有益的娱乐

meanings.meaning_en: a solid object with six equal square sides
meanings.example: a sugar cube
meanings.example_cn: 一块方糖

meanings.meaning_en: to cause a reaction or feeling, especially a sudden one
meanings.example: The novel has provoked fierce debate in the US.
meanings.example_cn: 那部小说在美国引发了激烈的争论。

meanings.meaning_en: to obtain something by buying it or being given it
meanings.example: Manning hoped to acquire valuable works of art as cheaply as possible.
meanings.example_cn: 曼宁希望以尽可能低的价格买到有价值的艺术品。

meanings.meaning_en: to look like or be similar to someone or something
meanings.example: It’s amazing how closely Brian and Steve resemble each other.
meanings.example_cn: 布赖恩和史蒂夫真是惊人地相像。

meanings.meaning_en: if a piece of writing, set of ideas etc is coherent, it is easy to understand because it is clear and reasonable
meanings.example: The three years of the course are planned as a coherent whole.
meanings.example_cn: 这三年的课程是作为连贯的整体来安排的。

meanings.meaning_cn: (页边)空白；边缘；(时间，金钱)多余
meanings.meaning_en: the edge of something, especially an area of land or water
meanings.example: the western margin of southern Africa
meanings.example_cn: 非洲南部的西隅

meanings.meaning_en: to leave, especially when you are starting a journey

meanings.example_cn: 欧洲航空公司的航班每逢周二从盖特威克机场起飞。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular way or style of behaving, living or doing something
meanings.example: Set the monitor to 256 colour mode.
meanings.example_cn: 把显示器调成256色彩模式。

meanings.meaning_en: happening before something that is more important, often in order to prepare for it

meanings.example_cn: 竞赛的预赛阶段

meanings.meaning_en: being part of the nature or character of someone or something

meanings.example_cn: 该话题本身的趣味

meanings.meaning_en: to surround something, especially with a fence or wall, in order to make it separate

meanings.example_cn: 游泳区用六英尺高的高墙围了起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to involve something as a necessary part or result

meanings.example_cn: 使用新的计算机系统需要大量的再培训。

meanings.meaning_en: the organ in your chest which pumps blood through your body
meanings.example: Regular exercise is good for the heart.
meanings.example_cn: 经常锻炼对心脏有好处。

meanings.meaning_cn: 确定的；确信的，实际的；正的；阳性的
meanings.meaning_en: if you take positive action, you do something definite in order to try and achieve something

meanings.example_cn: 我们需要采取积极措施来改善贫困家庭的状况。

meanings.meaning_en: if a building, wall etc collapses, it falls down suddenly, usually because it is weak or damaged
meanings.example: Uncle Ted’s chair collapsed under his weight.
meanings.example_cn: 椅子承受不了特德叔叔的重量，塌架了。

meanings.meaning_en: a political or government leader, especially one who is respected as being wise and fair

meanings.example_cn: 一位受人尊敬的政界元老

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh at someone or shout unkind things at them in a way that shows you do not respect them
meanings.example: ‘You know I’m right!’ she jeered.
meanings.example_cn: “你知道我是对的！”她嘲笑道。

meanings.example: The President was booed and jeered by a crowd of protesters.
meanings.example_cn: 总统被一群抗议者报以嘘声和嘲笑。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is dismissed from their job
meanings.example: They’ve never actually given anyone the sack .
meanings.example_cn: 他们从未真的辞退过什么人。

meanings.meaning_en: to dismiss someone from their job
meanings.example: He got the sack for stealing.
meanings.example_cn: 他因偷东西而被解雇。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of drug which makes you sleep and reduces pain
meanings.example: The truth of Johnson’s comment was recently brought home to me by the serene calm of a resident who was treating a particularly complicated narcotic-dependent patient.
meanings.example_cn: 最近，一位住院医生对待一位异常复杂的麻醉药依赖病人的平静态度让我领会到了塞缪尔.约翰逊这句话的真谛。

meanings.meaning_en: a narcotic drug takes away pain or makes you sleep
meanings.example: As a result, almost 50 years after the agreement was adopted, adequate availability of narcotic drugs for pain treatment remains an unfulfilled promise.
meanings.example_cn: 因此虽然条约早在50年前被通过，但确保治疗疼痛的麻醉药物供应充足仍是个未兑现的承诺。

meanings.meaning_en: to spend time thinking carefully and seriously about a problem, a difficult question, or something that has happened
meanings.example: He continued to ponder the problem as he walked home.
meanings.example_cn: 他一边往家走一边继续思考那个问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to state, giving clear reasons, that something is true, should be done etc
meanings.example: She argued the case for changing the law.
meanings.example_cn: 她提出论据，力主修改法律。

meanings.meaning_cn: 健康的，健全的；可靠的，充分的；彻底的
meanings.meaning_en: complete and thorough
meanings.example: a sound understanding of money and banking systems
meanings.example_cn: 对货币和银行业体制的透彻理解

meanings.example: Rivers and lakes provide us with water transport and irrigation.
meanings.example_cn: 江河湖泽给我们以舟楫和灌溉之利。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that you have no hope at all
meanings.example: The noise from the neighbours used to drive him to despair .
meanings.example_cn: 过去，邻居的噪音常常吵得他心烦意乱。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to treat people’s teeth

meanings.example_cn: 每年看两次牙医做检查。

meanings.meaning_en: to give special attention to one particular person or thing, or to make people do this
meanings.example: His eyes were focussed straight ahead.
meanings.example_cn: 他的双眼盯着正前方。

meanings.meaning_en: to cover an area with a large amount of water
meanings.example: The tidal wave inundated vast areas of cropland.
meanings.example_cn: 海啸淹没了大片农田。

meanings.meaning_cn: 爱护，抱有(希望)；怀有(情感)

meanings.example: He genuinely loved and cherished her.
meanings.example_cn: 他真爱并珍惜过她。

meanings.meaning_en: worthless or not likely to have any useful result

meanings.example_cn: 生活对我来说简直没什么意义。

meanings.meaning_en: the art of speaking or writing to persuade or influence people

meanings.example_cn: …政治生活中令人尊崇的机制，诸如政治修辞艺术、政府机构以及公益服务。

meanings.meaning_en: people in general
meanings.example: We want a clean healthy environment for all humanity .
meanings.example_cn: 我们希望全人类拥有一个干净健康的生存环境。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of dislike, annoyance, or disapproval
meanings.example: He reached into the bin with a look of disgust on his face.
meanings.example_cn: 他把手伸进垃圾箱，脸上带着厌恶的表情。

meanings.example_cn: 自从那位参议员宣布引退之后，对某些候选人的打赌猜测纷纷出现。

If you promise that you will do something, you say to someone that you will definitely do it
meanings.example: The post office has promised to resume first class mail delivery to the area on Friday.
meanings.example_cn: 邮局已承诺在星期五恢复该地区第一类邮件的递送。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong desire to have or achieve something
meanings.example: a high level of political aspiration
meanings.example_cn: 崇高的政治抱负

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that you pay to do something or that you pay to a professional person for their work
meanings.example: You can use the gym and pool for a fee of £35 a month.
meanings.example_cn: 月付35英镑，即可使用健身房和游泳池。

meanings.meaning_cn: 缺点；毛病，过错；(地质)断层
meanings.meaning_en: if something bad that has happened is your fault, you should be blamed for it, because you made a mistake or failed to do something
meanings.example: I’m really sorry - it’s all my fault.
meanings.example_cn: 我真的很抱歉——都是我的错。

meanings.meaning_en: to wish that you had someone else’s possessions, abilities etc
meanings.example: I really envy you and Ian, you seem so happy together.
meanings.example_cn: 我真是羡慕你和伊恩，你俩在一起看起来多幸福。

meanings.example: Our research has only recently begun to yield important results.
meanings.example_cn: 直到最近我们的研究才开始取得重要成果。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of profits, crops etc that something produces

meanings.meaning_cn: 古怪的，反复无常的，不稳定的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is erratic does not follow any pattern or plan but happens in a way that is not regular
meanings.example: His breathing was becoming erratic.
meanings.example_cn: 他的呼吸越来越不均匀。

meanings.meaning_cn: (目光)不能移的，集中的，专心的，坚决的
meanings.meaning_en: giving careful attention to something so that you think about nothing else
meanings.example: his intent gaze
meanings.example_cn: 他专注的凝视

meanings.meaning_en: good quality  beef  , or a large thick piece of any good quality red meat

meanings.example_cn: …新鲜的三文鱼排。

meanings.meaning_en: a large group of families who often share the same name
meanings.example: the Campbell clan
meanings.example_cn: 坎贝尔家族

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of people, their societies,  culture s  etc
meanings.example: "In anthropology, you can't equate third gender with homosexuality," he said.
meanings.example_cn: “在人类学中，你不能将同性恋和第三性别混同，”他说。

meanings.meaning_en: deserving or able to be believed or trusted
meanings.example: Her excuse was barely credible.
meanings.example_cn: 她的借口无法让人信服。

meanings.meaning_en: a light with a very bright beam which can be directed at someone or something. Spotlights are often used to light a stage when actors or singers are performing
meanings.example: The yard was lit by three huge spotlights.
meanings.example_cn: 院子里亮着三盏巨大的聚光灯。

meanings.meaning_en: to shine a strong beam of light on something
to move or develop more slowly than others
meanings.example: Western banks still lag behind financial institutions in most other regions of the country.
meanings.example_cn: 西部地区的银行仍然落后于这个国家其他大部分地区的金融机构。

meanings.meaning_en: a delay or period of waiting between one event and a second event
a part of an engine consisting of a short solid piece of metal inside a tube, which moves up and down to make the other parts of the engine move
meanings.example: Filling the cylinder with steam pushes the piston out.
meanings.example_cn: 填充汽缸的蒸汽将活塞推出。

meanings.meaning_en: an opinion that you express about someone or something
meanings.example: He was fined for making abusive comments to the referee.
meanings.example_cn: 他因谩骂裁判而被罚款。

meanings.meaning_en: the chemical processes by which food is changed into energy in your body
meanings.example: This drug speeds up your metabolism.
meanings.example_cn: 这种药物会加快你的新陈代谢。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that makes you want to do something
meanings.example: My natural inclination was to say no.
meanings.example_cn: 我生性爱说“不”。

meanings.meaning_cn: (英国英语)雨衣；苹果计算机的一种型号
meanings.meaning_en: a coat which you wear to keep out the rain
a small organ near your  bowel  , which has little or no use
meanings.example: Christine had to go into hospital to have her appendix out (=  have it removed  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 克里丝蒂娜不得不去医院切除阑尾。

meanings.meaning_en: the main church of a particular area under the control of a  bishop
meanings.example: St Paul’s Cathedral
meanings.example_cn: 圣保罗大教堂

meanings.meaning_en: of various different types
meanings.example: paintbrushes in assorted sizes
meanings.example_cn: 各种大小的画笔

meanings.meaning_en: if something is in your possession, you own it, or you have obtained it from somewhere
meanings.example: That information is not in our possession.
meanings.example_cn: 那则信息不归我们所有。

meanings.meaning_en: the distance from one side of something to the other
meanings.example: a covered terrace extending the full width of the house
meanings.example_cn: 和房子同宽的有顶露台

meanings.meaning_en: a difference between similar things, or a change from the usual amount or form of something
meanings.example: Most of his poems are variations on the theme of love.
meanings.example_cn: 他的大部分诗作都是有关爱情主题的形式不同的作品。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something to show that you remember and respect someone important or an important event in the past
meanings.example: a parade to commemorate the town’s bicentenary
meanings.example_cn: 庆祝该镇建立200周年的游行

meanings.meaning_cn: 镶嵌细工的，镶嵌工艺品的，嵌花式的
meanings.meaning_en: a group of different things that exist next to each other or together
meanings.example: rooms decorated with wall paintings and mosaics
meanings.example_cn: 用壁画和马赛克装饰的房间

meanings.meaning_en: a wrong or illegal action
meanings.example: He now repents of his past misdeeds.
meanings.example_cn: 他现在对自己过去犯下的种种恶行感到懊悔。

meanings.meaning_en: To mitigate something means to make it less unpleasant, serious, or painful
meanings.example: ...ways of mitigating the effects of an explosion.
meanings.example_cn: …减轻爆炸后果的方法。

meanings.meaning_en: material made from threads or wires that have been woven together like a net, or a piece of this material
meanings.example: The windows were covered in wire mesh to keep out flies.
meanings.example_cn: 窗户上装了铁丝纱网，防止苍蝇飞入。

meanings.meaning_cn: 浮子，浮标，(游行中的)彩车
meanings.meaning_en: a large vehicle that is decorated to drive through the streets as part of a special event
meanings.example: We stood and watched the Carnival floats drive past.
meanings.example_cn: 我们站着观看狂欢节彩车经过。

meanings.meaning_en: if something floats, it moves slowly through the air or stays up in the air
to make a light shine on something, or to fill a place with light
meanings.example: A single candle illuminated his face.
meanings.example_cn: 一支蜡烛照亮了他的脸。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where large amounts of stone or sand are dug out of the ground
meanings.example: a slate quarry
meanings.example_cn: 板岩采石场

meanings.meaning_cn: 混合物(的)，复合词(的)；院子(的)
meanings.meaning_en: a substance containing atoms from two or more  elements
meanings.example: man-made organic compounds
meanings.example_cn: 人造有机化合物

meanings.meaning_en: to think wrongly that a person or thing is someone or something else
meanings.example: People might well confuse the two products.
meanings.example_cn: 人们很容易混淆这两种产品。

meanings.meaning_en: a priest of high rank in the Christian church who is in charge of several priests or churches
meanings.example: the admissions dean
meanings.example_cn: 招生主任

meanings.meaning_cn: 流言蜚语；报上社会新闻；爱传流言的人
meanings.meaning_en: information that is passed from one person to another about other people’s behaviour and private lives, often including unkind or untrue remarks
meanings.example: What’s the latest gossip ?
meanings.example_cn: 最近有些什么传闻？

meanings.meaning_en: to stop opposing someone or something that is stronger than you, and allow them to take control
meanings.example: Don't succumb to the temptation to have just one cigarette.
meanings.example_cn: 不要屈服于只抽一支烟的诱惑。

meanings.meaning_en: if something or someone obsesses you, you think or worry about them all the time and you cannot think about anything else – used to show disapproval
a pleasant activity
if a woman who is going to have a baby has a miscarriage, she gives birth before the baby is properly formed and it dies

meanings.meaning_en: not active or not growing at the present time but able to be active later

meanings.meaning_en: the system by which a country’s money and goods are produced and used, or a country considered in this way

meanings.meaning_en: connected with beauty and the study of beauty

meanings.meaning_en: metal or leather clothing that protects your body, worn by soldiers in battles in past times

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone medicine or a drug

meanings.example_cn: 我们不能让她再掐她小弟弟了。

meanings.meaning_en: beautiful, attractive, or graceful

meanings.example_cn: 一根带子已经断了，被打成一个结。

a confused, noisy, and excited situation, often caused by a large crowd

meanings.example_cn: 一片嘈杂声中别人根本听不到我说话。

meanings.example: a woman of great insight
meanings.example_cn: 一位极有眼光的妇女

meanings.meaning_en: not real or not made of natural things but made to be like something that is real or natural
meanings.example: artificial flowers
meanings.example_cn: 假花

meanings.meaning_en: to defend or support a law, system, or principle so that it continues to exist
meanings.example: a committee that aims to uphold educational standards
meanings.example_cn: 旨在保持教育水准的委员会

meanings.meaning_en: a set of basic laws and principles that a country or organization is governed by
meanings.example: The right to speak freely is written into the Constitution of the United States.
meanings.example_cn: 言论自由的权利被写入美国宪法。

meanings.meaning_en: strong cloth used to make bags, tents, shoes etc
meanings.example: a canvas bag
meanings.example_cn: 帆布包

meanings.meaning_en: important
meanings.example: a prominent Russian scientist
meanings.example_cn: 杰出的俄罗斯科学家

meanings.meaning_en: to behave towards someone in a way that shows that you are sexually attracted to them, although you do not really want a relationship with them
meanings.example: Dad's flirting with all the ladies, or they're all flirting with him, as usual.
meanings.example_cn: 爸爸在和所有的女士打情骂俏，或者说她们都在和他调情，跟平常一样。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who flirts with people
in the proper or expected way
meanings.example: Here are your travel documents, all duly signed.
meanings.example_cn: 这是你的旅行证件，都签好了。

meanings.meaning_en: a tall plant with large yellow seeds that grow together on a  cob (= long hard part )  , and that are cooked and eaten as a vegetable
meanings.example: We can grow sorghum or maize on this plot.
meanings.example_cn: 这块地可以种高粱或玉米。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无味的，枯燥乏味的；单调的
meanings.meaning_en: food or drink that is insipid does not have much taste
meanings.example: an insipid pasta dish
meanings.example_cn: 一盘没有味道的意大利面食

meanings.meaning_en: If you favour someone, you treat them better or in a kinder way than you treat other people
meanings.example: The company has no rules about favouring U.S. citizens during layoffs.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司没有在裁员期间偏袒美国公民的规定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 恶意的；恶毒的；(疾病)恶性的
meanings.meaning_en: a malignant disease is one such as  cancer  , which can develop in an uncontrolled way and is likely to cause someone’s death
meanings.example: She developed a malignant tumour in her breast.
meanings.example_cn: 她的乳房长了个恶性肿瘤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有系统的，系统的；有计划有步骤的
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is done in a systematic way is done according to a fixed plan, in a thorough and efficient way
meanings.example: They went about their business in a systematic way.
meanings.example_cn: 他们按部就班地做生意。

meanings.meaning_cn: 腐蚀性的；刻薄的；苛刻的
meanings.meaning_en: a caustic substance can burn through things by chemical action
meanings.example: caustic soda (= a chemical used for cleaning things )
