meanings.example_cn: 苛性钠，烧碱

meanings.meaning_en: a quality that is inherent in something is a natural part of it and cannot be separated from it
meanings.example: Every business has its own inherent risks.
meanings.example_cn: 每笔生意本身都有风险。

meanings.meaning_en: money you earn that is paid according to the number of hours, days, or weeks that you work
meanings.example: He earns a good wage.
meanings.example_cn: 他工资挺高。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone laugh or smile
meanings.example: He made funny faces to amuse the children.
meanings.example_cn: 他做鬼脸逗孩子们开心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 微不足道的，可以忽视的
meanings.meaning_en: too slight or unimportant to have any effect
meanings.example: The damage done to his property was negligible.
meanings.example_cn: 对他财产造成的损失微不足道。

meanings.meaning_en: the mixture of gases around the Earth, that we breathe
meanings.example: Let’s go outside and get some fresh air.
meanings.example_cn: 我们出去呼吸些新鲜空气吧。

meanings.meaning_en: if you incur something unpleasant, it happens to you because of something you have done
meanings.example: The government had also incurred huge debts.
meanings.example_cn: 政府也已承受了大笔债务。

meanings.meaning_en: to attack or harm someone, especially a child, by touching them in a sexual way or by trying to have sex with them
meanings.example: men who molest young boys
meanings.example_cn: 猥亵男童的男子

meanings.meaning_cn: 巨大的；恐怖的；可耻的，丢脸的
meanings.meaning_en: unusually large
meanings.example: a monstrous nose
meanings.example_cn: 很大的鼻子

meanings.meaning_en: something that is edible can be eaten
meanings.example: These berries are edible, but those are poisonous.
meanings.example_cn: 这些浆果可以吃，但那些有毒。

meanings.example: The offer of talks with Moscow marks a significant change from the previous Western position.
meanings.example_cn: 与莫斯科会谈的提议标志着先前西方立场的一个重大转变。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement saying that you are willing to do something for someone or give them something
two alternate things are placed one after the other in a regular pattern
meanings.example: alternate blue and red stripes
meanings.example_cn: 蓝红相间的条纹

meanings.meaning_en: if two things alternate, or if you alternate them, they happen one after the other in a repeated pattern
meanings.example: Arrange the leeks and noodles in alternate layers .
meanings.example_cn: 一层韭葱、一层面条地交替放置。

meanings.example: They put on their coats and tramped through the falling snow.
meanings.example_cn: 他们穿上大衣，在落雪中脚步沉重地缓缓走着。

meanings.meaning_en: if vegetables, seeds, or plants sprout, they start to grow, producing  shoots  ,  buds  , or leaves
meanings.example: Move the pots outside when the seeds begin to sprout.
meanings.example_cn: 种子开始发芽时把盆搬到外面去。

meanings.meaning_en: the speed at which music is played or should be played
meanings.example: the easy tempo of island life
meanings.example_cn: 岛上生活的轻松节奏

meanings.meaning_cn: 坚韧的，咬不动的；强壮的；粗暴的
meanings.meaning_en: very strict or firm
meanings.example: The EU is taking a tough line with the UK over this issue.
meanings.example_cn: 在这一问题上，欧盟对英国的态度很强硬。

meanings.meaning_cn: 海上的；海事的；近海的；沿海的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the sea or ships
meanings.example: San Francisco has lost nearly all of its maritime industry.
meanings.example_cn: 旧金山几乎失去了所有海运业。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of burning material produced by a fire or by hitting or rubbing two hard objects together
meanings.example: sparks from the fire
meanings.example_cn: 火里飞出的火星

meanings.meaning_cn: 建立，委任；安置；证实；确立
meanings.meaning_en: to start a company, organization, system, etc that is intended to exist or continue for a long time
meanings.example: The city of Boerne was established by German settlers in the 1840s.
meanings.example_cn: 博恩市是德国移民于19世纪40年代建立的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 暗的，看不清楚的，迟钝的
meanings.meaning_en: fairly dark or not giving much light, so that you cannot see well
meanings.example: in the dim light of the early dawn
meanings.example_cn: 在微弱的晨曦里

meanings.meaning_en: if a light dims, or if you dim it, it becomes less bright
meanings.example: a dim glow
meanings.example_cn: 昏暗的微光

meanings.meaning_en: to make a formal or official complaint, protest etc
meanings.example: a building used to lodge prisoners of war
meanings.example_cn: 一座关押战俘的建筑物

meanings.meaning_en: a traditional home of Native Americans, or the group of people that live in it
an arrangement to meet someone at a particular time and place, often secretly
meanings.example: plans for a secret rendezvous
meanings.example_cn: 秘密约会的计划

meanings.meaning_en: someone who dies for their religious or political beliefs and is admired by people for this
meanings.example: St. Stephen, the first Christian martyr
meanings.example_cn: 圣司提反，第一个基督教殉道者

meanings.meaning_en: If someone is martyred, they are killed or made to suffer greatly because of their religious or political beliefs
meanings.example: The army has been held back because the government is reluctant to make martyrs of the protesters.
meanings.example_cn: 军队后撤了，因为政府不愿意造成抗议者牺牲。

meanings.meaning_en: if a problem, difficulty etc confronts you, it appears and needs to be dealt with
meanings.example: The problems confronting the new government were enormous.
meanings.example_cn: 新政府面临的难题是巨大的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 整洁的；雅致的；灵巧的；纯的；不掺水的
meanings.meaning_en: tidy and carefully arranged
meanings.example: neat handwriting
meanings.example_cn: 工整的笔迹

meanings.meaning_en: a shape that has four straight sides, two of which are usually longer than the other two, and four 90˚ angles at the corners
meanings.example: Suppose the width of a rectangle is x metres.
meanings.example_cn: 设长方形的宽是 x 米。

meanings.meaning_cn: 越越限度；违反(法律规则)
meanings.meaning_en: to do something that is against the rules of social behaviour or against a moral principle
meanings.example: Orton’s plays transgress accepted social norms.
meanings.example_cn: 奥顿的戏剧违背了公认的社会准则。

meanings.meaning_en: an official decision made in a court of law, especially about whether someone is guilty of a crime or how a death happened
meanings.example: The verdict was ‘not guilty’.
meanings.example_cn: 裁决为“无罪”。

meanings.meaning_en: to send people away from a dangerous place to a safe place
meanings.example: Police evacuated the area.
meanings.example_cn: 警方将该地区人员全部疏散。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of being sorry that you have done something very bad
meanings.example: Throughout the trial, he had shown no remorse .
meanings.example_cn: 整个审判过程中，他没有表示出一丝悔意。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being very careful to avoid danger or risks
meanings.example: The physician must exercise caution when prescribing antidepressants.
meanings.example_cn: 医师在开抗抑郁药处方时必须谨慎。

meanings.meaning_en: in a less important position than someone else
meanings.example: a subordinate officer
meanings.example_cn: 下级官员

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has a lower position and less authority than someone else in an organization
the front part of your face below your mouth
meanings.example: He rubbed his chin thoughtfully.
meanings.example_cn: 他若有所思地抚摸着下巴。

meanings.meaning_en: if you live at a particular time, you are alive then
meanings.example: Without light, plants couldn’t live.
meanings.example_cn: 没有阳光，植物就无法生存。

meanings.meaning_en: not dead or artificial

meanings.meaning_cn: 全世界的，全球的；综合的

meanings.meaning_en: When something such as the economy, a business, a trend, or a feeling is revived or when it revives, it becomes active, popular, or successful again
meanings.example: ...an attempt to revive the economy.
meanings.example_cn: …一次重振经济的尝试。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance used to kill insects and small animals that destroy crops
meanings.example: This pesticide is diluted with water and applied directly to the fields.
meanings.example_cn: 这种杀虫剂用水稀释后直接施用在田里。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something exist that did not exist before
meanings.example: Some people believe the universe was created by a big explosion.
meanings.example_cn: 有些人认为宇宙是通过一次大爆炸创造出来的。

meanings.meaning_en: a bright shine on a surface
meanings.example: This gel will add gloss to even the dullest hair.
meanings.example_cn: 用了这种发胶，即使最干枯的头发也会增添光泽。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone, in a very emotional way, to do something for you
meanings.example: He entreated them to delay their departure.
meanings.example_cn: 他恳求他们晚些再走。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially prevent someone from leaving a place
meanings.example: Two suspects have been detained by the police for questioning .
meanings.example_cn: 两名嫌疑人被警方拘留审问。

meanings.meaning_en: a room, house, desk etc that is tidy is neatly arranged with everything in the right place
meanings.example: a tidy desk
meanings.example_cn: 整洁的书桌

meanings.meaning_en: able to express your ideas and opinions well, especially in a way that influences people
meanings.example: an eloquent appeal for support
meanings.example_cn: 极具说服力的求助呼吁

meanings.meaning_en: the money charged for sending a letter, package etc by post
meanings.example: How much is the postage for a postcard?
meanings.example_cn: 寄一张明信片的邮资是多少？

meanings.meaning_en: to change the date or time of a planned event or action to a later one
meanings.example: The match had to be postponed until next week.
meanings.example_cn: 比赛不得不推迟到下周举行。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is crisp is hard, and makes a pleasant sound when you break it or crush it
meanings.example: She kicked at the crisp leaves at her feet.
meanings.example_cn: 她踢着脚边松脆的树叶。

meanings.meaning_en: a very thin flat round piece of potato that is cooked in oil and eaten cold
meanings.example: He stepped carefully through the crisp deep snow.
meanings.example_cn: 他小心地走在松脆的、厚厚的雪地里。

meanings.meaning_en: to become crisp or make something become crisp by cooking or heating it
a small tool used in work such as science or medicine
meanings.example: surgical instruments
meanings.example_cn: 外科(手术)器械

meanings.meaning_cn: 坐落在的；处于某种境地的
meanings.meaning_en: to be in a particular place or position
meanings.example: His hotel is situated in one of the loveliest places on the Loire.
meanings.example_cn: 他的旅馆坐落在卢瓦尔的一个最优美的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: to formally or officially tell someone about something
meanings.example: The skipper notified the coastguard of the tragedy.
meanings.example_cn: 船长通知了海岸警卫队这一灾难。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong unreasonable fear of something
meanings.example: Some children suffer from school phobia .
meanings.example_cn: 有些儿童对上学有恐惧症。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or belonging to the government of a town or city
meanings.example: the municipal waste dump
meanings.example_cn: 城市垃圾场

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two parts of the body that you use to see with
meanings.example: He’s got beautiful eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 他有一双漂亮的眼睛。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of hair that hangs in a curved shape
meanings.example: a little boy with beautiful blonde curls
meanings.example_cn: 满头漂亮的金色鬈发的小男孩

meanings.meaning_en: If your hair curls or if you curl it, it is full of curls
meanings.example: She has hair that refuses to curl.
meanings.example_cn: 她的头发怎么也不卷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 车辆交通工具；思想媒介
meanings.meaning_en: a machine with an engine that is used to take people or things from one place to another, such as a car, bus, or truck
meanings.example: a description of the stolen vehicle
meanings.example_cn: 对被盗车辆的描述

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that one number or quantity is being  subtract ed  from another
to angrily criticize someone, especially a child, about something they have done
meanings.example: Do not scold the puppy, but simply and firmly say ‘no’.
meanings.example_cn: 不要责骂小狗，但要干脆利落地说“不”。

meanings.meaning_cn: 部分，零件；剖面，横断面，阶层
meanings.meaning_en: one of the parts that something such as an object or place is divided into
meanings.example: The plane’s tail section was found in a cornfield.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机的尾部在玉米田里找到了。

meanings.meaning_en: a reciprocal arrangement or relationship is one in which two people or groups do or give the same things to each other
meanings.example: He spoke of the necessity for a reciprocal relationship that would be useful for all sides.
meanings.example_cn: 他谈及需要建立对各方都有益的互惠关系。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people or things that are all of the same type
meanings.example: people in the over-45 age category
meanings.example_cn: 属45岁以上年龄组的人

meanings.meaning_cn: 俘虏，迷恋者；被俘虏的，被拴住的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is kept as a prisoner, especially in a war
meanings.example: He described the difficulties of surviving for four months as a captive.
meanings.example_cn: 他讲述了沦为阶下囚的4个月中生存的种种不易。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong feeling of fear or nervousness that makes you unable to think clearly or behave sensibly
meanings.example: a feeling of sheer panic
meanings.example_cn: 惊恐万分的感觉

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly feel so frightened that you cannot think clearly or behave sensibly, or to make someone do this
meanings.example: She got into a panic when she couldn’t find the tickets.
meanings.example_cn: 她找不到票，慌了起来。

meanings.meaning_en: not broken, damaged, or spoiled
meanings.example: Only the medieval tower had remained intact.
meanings.example_cn: 只有这座中世纪塔楼保存完好。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of going into something
meanings.example: There was no sign of a forced entry.
meanings.example_cn: 没有强行闯入的迹象。

meanings.example: inspiring music
meanings.example_cn: 激励人心的音乐

meanings.meaning_en: something that is tedious continues for a long time and is not interesting
meanings.example: The work was tiring and tedious.
meanings.example_cn: 这工作既累人又枯燥。

meanings.meaning_en: a large heavy powerful gun that was used in the past to fire heavy metal balls
meanings.example: The cannons boom, the band plays.
meanings.example_cn: 炮声隆隆，鼓乐齐鸣。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine for playing records,  cds  etc that produces sound from two  speakers
meanings.example: a stereo with good speakers
meanings.example_cn: 扬声器音质好的立体声音响

meanings.meaning_en: If you get feedback on your work or progress, someone tells you how well or badly you are doing, and how you could improve. If you get good feedback you have worked or performed well.
meanings.example: Continue to ask for feedback on your work.
meanings.example_cn: 继续征求对你工作的反馈。

meanings.meaning_en: to express feelings of great sadness about something
meanings.example: The nation lamented the death of its great war leader.
meanings.example_cn: 举国上下都在哀悼他们伟大的战时领袖。

meanings.meaning_en: a song, piece of music, or something that you say, that expresses a feeling of sadness
a place that has everything you need for doing a particular activity
meanings.example: The market is a shopper’s paradise.
meanings.example_cn: 这个市场是购物者的乐园。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure from which water is pushed up into the air, used for example as decoration in a garden or park
meanings.example: He was a fountain of information on Asian affairs.
meanings.example_cn: 他是亚洲事务的信息源。

meanings.meaning_en: the process by which you gain knowledge or learn a skill
meanings.example: the acquisition of language
meanings.example_cn: 语言的习得

meanings.meaning_en: to change something because of new information or ideas
meanings.example: The college has revised its plans because of local objections.
meanings.example_cn: 由于地方上的反对，学院已经修改了计划。

meanings.meaning_en: A closet is a very small room for storing things, especially one without windows
a prolific artist, writer etc produces many works of art, books etc
meanings.example: Handel’s prolific output of opera
meanings.example_cn: 韩德尔丰富的歌剧作品

meanings.meaning_en: a sound that is audible is loud enough for you to hear it
meanings.example: His voice was barely audible (=  could only just be heard  ) above the roar of the crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 人声嘈杂，几乎听不见他的说话声。

meanings.meaning_en: the time when something first begins to be widely used
meanings.example: the advent of the computer
meanings.example_cn: 计算机的问世

meanings.meaning_cn: 使得，使成为某种状态，开始起来
meanings.meaning_en: to achieve something
meanings.example: I got 98% in my last maths test.
meanings.example_cn: 上一次数学考试我得了98分。

meanings.meaning_en: to lie or lean back in a relaxed way
meanings.example: She proceeded to recline on a chaise longue.
meanings.example_cn: 她开始斜靠在一个躺椅上。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure that is built over and into the water so that boats can stop next to it or people can walk along it
meanings.example: a yacht moored at a pier
meanings.example_cn: 停在码头的一艘游艇

meanings.meaning_en: something or someone that is dangerous
meanings.example: the growing menace of oil pollution at sea
meanings.example_cn: 日益严重的海洋石油污染

meanings.meaning_en: very shocking and extremely unfair or offensive
meanings.example: outrageous prices
meanings.example_cn: 骇人的价格

meanings.meaning_en: an animal or plant that lived many thousands of years ago and that has been preserved, or the shape of one of these animals or plants that has been preserved in rock
meanings.example: fossils of early reptiles
meanings.example_cn: 早期爬行动物的化石

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a particular race, nation, or tribe and their customs and traditions
meanings.example: The school teaches pupils from different ethnic groups.
meanings.example_cn: 该校教授不同种族的小学生。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to marriage
meanings.example: marital problems
meanings.example_cn: 婚姻问题

meanings.meaning_en: in the same direction as the  hands  of a clock move
meanings.example: Screw the lid on clockwise.
meanings.example_cn: 按顺时针方向拧紧盖子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 战区，防区；(工业等)部门，部分
meanings.meaning_en: a part of an area of activity, especially of business, trade etc
meanings.example: ...the nation's manufacturing sector.
meanings.example_cn: …该国的制造部门。

meanings.meaning_en: a large thick piece of something that does not have an even shape
meanings.example: ice chunks
meanings.example_cn: 大冰块

meanings.meaning_cn: 移植，移种；人工移植(心,胃)；迁移 "
meanings.meaning_en: to move an organ, piece of skin etc from one person’s body and put it into another as a form of medical treatment
meanings.example: heart transplant surgery
meanings.example_cn: 心脏移植手术

meanings.meaning_en: if something radiates light or heat, or if light or heat radiates from something, the light or heat is sent out in all directions
meanings.example: The log fire radiated a warm cosy glow.
meanings.example_cn: 燃烧的原木发出温暖舒适的红光。

meanings.meaning_cn: 一千年，千禧年；太平盛世
meanings.meaning_en: a period of 1,000 years
meanings.example: people who have inhabited this land for millennia
meanings.example_cn: 在这片土地上已经居住了数千年的人们

meanings.meaning_en: to guess about the possible causes or effects of something, without knowing all the facts or details
meanings.example: She refused to speculate.
meanings.example_cn: 她拒绝猜测。

meanings.meaning_en: a young sheep
meanings.example: roast lamb
meanings.example_cn: 烤羊肉

meanings.meaning_en: a small amount or piece that is taken from something, so that it can be tested or examined
meanings.example: a blood specimen
meanings.example_cn: 血样

meanings.meaning_en: to move by jumping on one foot
meanings.example: a little girl hopping and skipping
meanings.example_cn: 一个蹦蹦跳跳的小女孩

meanings.meaning_en: to be different from something in some way
meanings.example: The two systems differ in many respects.
meanings.example_cn: 这两个系统在许多方面不同。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who does a job willingly without being paid
meanings.example: Most of the relief work was done by volunteers.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分救援工作都由志愿人员完成。

meanings.meaning_en: a clear glass or plastic container for fish and other water animals
meanings.example: In Amsterdam the girls all stand in the windows shimmering as tantalising as tropical fish beyond the gleam of aquarium glass.
meanings.example_cn: 在阿姆斯特丹，姑娘们都站在窗后，光芒四射柔情撩人宛如水族馆玻璃背后脉脉含情的热带鱼。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you think is true, even though you are not certain and cannot prove it
meanings.example: His version of events is pure supposition .
meanings.example_cn: 他对事情的说法纯属推测。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of clothes worn by an actor or by someone to make them look like something such as an animal, famous person etc
meanings.example: the film’s lavish costumes and spectacular sets
meanings.example_cn: 影片中奢华的戏装和壮观的场景

meanings.meaning_en: Fixtures are fittings or furniture which belong to a building and are legally part of it, for example, a bathtub or a toilet
meanings.example: ...a detailed list of what fixtures and fittings are included in the purchase price.
meanings.example_cn: …详细列出的室内设施与装备包括在购买价格中。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a great effort to achieve something
meanings.example: He strives hard to keep himself very fit.
meanings.example_cn: 他努力使自己保持非常的健康。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove from contact with others
if something heightens a feeling, effect etc, or if a feeling etc heightens, it becomes stronger or increases
meanings.example: There are fears that the march will heighten racial tension.
meanings.example_cn: 有人担心这次游行会加深种族间的紧张局势。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who had your job before you started doing it
meanings.example: Kennedy’s predecessor as President was the war hero Dwight Eisenhower.
meanings.example_cn: 肯尼迪总统的前任是战争英雄德怀特·艾森豪威尔。

meanings.example: He remained fascinated by the Aboriginals' tales.
meanings.example_cn: 他一直对澳大利亚土著人的故事很着迷。

meanings.meaning_en: arranged according to when things happened or were made
meanings.example: We arranged the documents in chronological order .
meanings.example_cn: 我们把这些文件按时序排列。

meanings.meaning_en: the crime of physically attacking someone
meanings.example: a case of robbery and assault
meanings.example_cn: 一宗抢劫袭击案

meanings.meaning_en: not drunk
meanings.example: He’s a nice guy when he’s sober.
meanings.example_cn: 他没喝醉时是个不错的家伙。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool, especially one used for outdoor physical work
to take action or make changes that you have officially decided should happen
to shake slightly because you are cold, or because you feel very afraid, angry, excited etc
meanings.example: The child was quivering in her arms.
meanings.example_cn: 那孩子在她怀里发抖。

meanings.meaning_en: when you deliberately try to show people how rich or clever you are, in order to make them admire you
meanings.example: Her lifestyle was remarkably free from ostentation.
meanings.example_cn: 她的生活方式毫不张扬。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is compulsory must be done because it is the law or because someone in authority orders you to
meanings.example: the threat of compulsory redundancies
meanings.example_cn: 强制性裁员的威胁

meanings.meaning_en: a long walk in the mountains or countryside
meanings.example: a hike in the woods
meanings.example_cn: 林间远足

meanings.meaning_en: to try to deal with a difficult problem
meanings.example: There is more than one way to tackle the problem.
meanings.example_cn: 解决这个问题不止一个办法。

meanings.meaning_en: a law or set of laws
meanings.example: This is a very important piece of legislation (= law ).
meanings.example_cn: 这是一条非常重要的法规。

meanings.meaning_en: law all of someone’s property and money, especially everything that is left after they die
meanings.example: His estate was valued at $150,000.
meanings.example_cn: 他的遗产价值为15万美元。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone a lot of questions for a long time in order to get information, sometimes using threats
meanings.example: The police interrogated the suspect for several hours.
meanings.example_cn: 警察盘问了这名嫌疑犯好几个小时。

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly and quickly decrease in value or amount
meanings.example: House prices have plummeted down.
meanings.example_cn: 房价已经暴跌。

meanings.meaning_en: if something rolls, especially something round, or if you roll it, it moves along a surface by turning over and over
meanings.example: His sleeves were rolled above his elbows.
meanings.example_cn: 他的袖子卷到了胳膊肘的上面。

meanings.meaning_en: to completely understand and begin to use new ideas, information etc
meanings.example: It will take time to assimilate all these facts.
meanings.example_cn: 充分掌握所有这些情况需要时间。

meanings.meaning_en: harsh conditions are difficult to live in and very uncomfortable
meanings.example: The hostages are being held in harsh conditions.
meanings.example_cn: 人质被拘押在恶劣环境中。

meanings.meaning_en: to remember a particular fact, event, or situation from the past
meanings.example: You don’t happen to recall his name, do you?
meanings.example_cn: 你不会恰巧还想得起他的名字吧？

meanings.meaning_en: the study or industry of making equipment, such as computers and televisions, that work electronically
meanings.example: an electronics engineer
meanings.example_cn: 电子工程师

meanings.meaning_en: a short form of a word or expression
meanings.example: The abbreviation for Kansas is KS.
meanings.example_cn: 的缩写是。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave somewhere very quickly, in order to escape from danger
meanings.example: His attackers turned and fled.
meanings.example_cn: 袭击他的人转身逃走了。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of your body that is numb is unable to feel anything, for example because you are very cold
meanings.example: My fingers were so numb I could hardly write.
meanings.example_cn: 我的手指麻木得几乎没法写字。

meanings.meaning_en: not exact or without any detail, but generally correct and useful
meanings.example: a crude estimate of the population available for work
meanings.example_cn: 对劳动力人口的粗略估计

meanings.meaning_en: relating or belonging to a very large city
meanings.example: a metropolitan area of South Australia
meanings.example_cn: 南澳大利亚的一个都市区

meanings.example: If there are any notable inconsistencies or discrepancies, think through how you are going to explain the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 如果有任何显著的不相符或让人起疑的情况，要想好该如何去解释这个情况。

meanings.meaning_en: important, interesting, excellent, or unusual enough to be noticed or mentioned

meanings.example: But the KGB, in turn, was deceiving the Englishmen, because it really believed that they were playing a treble game and were all traitors to the Communist cause.
meanings.example_cn: 但是克格勃实际上以欺骗回报了英国人，因为他们认为，这几个人在玩三重游戏，实际上是共产主义事业的叛徒。

meanings.meaning_en: to spread an idea, belief etc to many people
meanings.example: The group launched a website to propagate its ideas .
meanings.example_cn: 这个团体建了一个网站来宣扬他们的主张。

meanings.meaning_en: to come from different directions and meet at the same point to become one thing
meanings.example: The two rivers converge into one near Pittsburgh.
meanings.example_cn: 这两条河在匹兹堡附近汇合。

meanings.meaning_en: to force someone to do something
meanings.example: ...the introduction of legislation to compel cyclists to wear a helmet.
meanings.example_cn: …强制骑车人戴头盔的法律的引入。

meanings.meaning_en: having a point at the end
meanings.example: a pointed beard
meanings.example_cn: 一把山羊胡

meanings.meaning_en: a crowd of people who are moving quickly
meanings.example: ...a swarm of locusts.
meanings.example_cn: …一大群蝗虫。

meanings.meaning_en: if people swarm somewhere, they go there as a large uncontrolled crowd
good at judging what people or situations are really like
meanings.example: Malcolm is a shrewd businessman.
meanings.example_cn: 马尔科姆是个精明的商人。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially end a law, system etc, especially one that has existed for a long time
meanings.example: Slavery was abolished in the US in the 19th century.
meanings.example_cn: 美国于19世纪废除了奴隶制。

meanings.meaning_en: to copy the way someone behaves, speaks, moves etc, especially in order to make people laugh
meanings.example: She was a splendid mimic and loved to imitate Winston Churchill.
meanings.example_cn: 她是个出色的模仿者，喜欢模仿温斯顿·丘吉尔。

meanings.example: The ragged man drags a waggon of rag fragments.
meanings.example_cn: 那个衣衫褴褛的人拉著一货车破布碎片.

meanings.meaning_en: a definitive agreement, statement etc is one that will not be changed
meanings.example: a definitive agreement to buy the company
meanings.example_cn: 收购这家公司的最终协议

meanings.meaning_en: an event that is imminent, especially an unpleasant one, will happen very soon
meanings.example: A new trade agreement is imminent.
meanings.example_cn: 一项新的贸易协定即将签署。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious argument or disagreement
meanings.example: It is beyond dispute that advances in medicine have enabled people to live longer.
meanings.example_cn: 医学的发展使人们更加长寿，这是无可置疑的。

meanings.meaning_en: the practice or science of growing flowers, fruit, and vegetables
meanings.example: The area has a long tradition of horticulture.
meanings.example_cn: 园艺是这个地区源远流长的传统。

meanings.meaning_en: If there is a semblance of a particular condition or quality, it appears to exist, even though this may be a false impression
meanings.example: At least a semblance of normality has been restored to parts of the country.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家的部分地区至少在表面上已恢复正常。

meanings.meaning_en: to damage something or make it not as good as it should be
meanings.example: The illness had impaired his ability to think and concentrate.
meanings.example_cn: 这种疾病损害了他的思维能力和注意力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 撞击；冲，短跑；破折号；闯劲
meanings.meaning_en: If you dash somewhere, you run or go there quickly and suddenly
meanings.example: Suddenly she dashed down to the cellar.
meanings.example_cn: 她猛地朝地窖冲过去。

meanings.meaning_en: far from the centre of a city, town etc or from a main building
meanings.example: one of the outlying suburbs
meanings.example_cn: 边远郊区之一

meanings.meaning_en: an illness that is catching is easily passed to other people
meanings.example: Julia’s enthusiasm was catching.
meanings.example_cn: 朱莉娅的热情很有感染力。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop someone from doing something, by making them realize it will be difficult or have bad results
meanings.example: The company’s financial difficulties have deterred potential investors.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司的财务困境令潜在的投资者望而却步。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality that a person, situation, film, or play has that makes you feel pity and sadness
meanings.example: the pathos of the woman trying to keep her lover
meanings.example_cn: 那个女人试图留住爱侣的哀婉之情

meanings.meaning_en: used when saying the names of the people or things you are referring to
meanings.example: Three students were mentioned, namely John, Sarah and Sylvia.
meanings.example_cn: 有三名学生被提到，即约翰、萨拉和西尔维娅。

meanings.meaning_en: the bottom surface of your foot, especially the part you walk or stand on
meanings.example: The soles of his feet were caked in mud.
meanings.example_cn: 他的脚掌上沾满了泥巴。

meanings.meaning_en: the sole person, thing etc is the only one
if ice or snow thaws, or if the sun thaws it, it turns into water
meanings.example: The lake thawed in March.
meanings.example_cn: 3月里，湖水解冻了。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of warm weather during which snow and ice melt
to throw something somewhere using a lot of force
meanings.example: He flung his coat over the back of a chair.
meanings.example_cn: 他把外套扔在椅背上。

meanings.meaning_en: as much as is needed for a particular purpose
meanings.example: We can only prosecute if there is sufficient evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 有了足够的证据，我们才能提出起诉。

meanings.meaning_en: beliefs or ideas about what is right and wrong and about how people should behave
meanings.example: ...standards of morality and justice in society.
meanings.example_cn: …社会中道德和正义的标准。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut off hair very close to the skin, especially from the face, using a  razor
meanings.example: He hadn’t shaved for days.
meanings.example_cn: 他已经好几天没刮脸了。

meanings.meaning_en: the regular exchange of information between groups of people, especially at work, so that each group knows what the other is doing
meanings.example: Liaison between police forces and the art world is vital to combat art crime.
meanings.example_cn: 警方和艺术界之间的联络对于打击艺术犯罪是至关重要的。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a flat object such as a coin go upwards and turn over in the air
meanings.example: We flipped a coin to see who would go first.
meanings.example_cn: 我们抛硬币决定谁先去。

meanings.example: There’s quite an art to flipping pancakes.
meanings.example_cn: 翻煎饼真是门艺术。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut the wool off a sheep
meanings.example: Her long fair hair had been shorn.
meanings.example_cn: 她长长的金发已经剪掉了。

meanings.meaning_cn: (鸟)盘旋，翱翔，(人)逗留在附近徘徊
meanings.meaning_en: If you hover, you stay in one place and move slightly in a nervous way, for example because you cannot decide what to do
meanings.example: Judith was hovering in the doorway.
meanings.example_cn: 朱迪丝在门口徘徊。

meanings.meaning_en: a solid substance made of fat or oil and used to make candles, polish etc
meanings.example: wax crayons
meanings.example_cn: 蜡笔

meanings.meaning_en: to rub a layer of wax into a floor, surface etc to protect it or make it shine
in a happy way
meanings.example: ‘Morning, Albert,’ she called gaily.
meanings.example_cn: “早安，艾伯特。”她快乐地喊道。

meanings.meaning_en: a large structure with steps leading to the top of a long sloping surface which children can slide down
meanings.example: a slide show
meanings.example_cn: 幻灯片放映

meanings.meaning_en: to move smoothly over a surface while continuing to touch it, or to make something move in this way
a small piece of something solid, without a particular shape
meanings.example: Strain the custard to remove lumps.
meanings.example_cn: 滤去牛奶蛋糊里的面块。

meanings.meaning_en: to put two or more different people or things together and consider them as a single group, sometimes wrongly
an official visit to a building or organization to check that everything is satisfactory and that rules are being obeyed
meanings.example: An inspection was carried out at the school.
meanings.example_cn: 有人来学校视察了一遍。

meanings.meaning_en: a building with a large flat central area surrounded by seats, where sports or entertainments take place
meanings.example: a sports arena
meanings.example_cn: 运动场

meanings.meaning_en: using money, time, goods etc carefully and without wasting any
meanings.example: A small car is more economical to run.
meanings.example_cn: 开小型汽车比较省油。

meanings.meaning_en: concerning or produced by  magnetism
meanings.example: magnetic forces
meanings.example_cn: 磁力

meanings.meaning_en: soft light bits of thread that have come from wool, cotton, or other materials
meanings.example: He was picking bits of fluff off his trousers.
meanings.example_cn: 他在揪裤子上的绒毛球。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something soft become larger by shaking it
meanings.example: a ball of carpet fluff
meanings.example_cn: 地毯的绒毛团

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to receive or pay out money in a shop
meanings.example: The cashier absconded with the money.
meanings.example_cn: 出纳员携款潜逃。

meanings.meaning_en: a young girl, or a woman who is not married
meanings.example: ...stories of noble princes and their brave deeds on behalf of beautiful maidens.
meanings.example_cn: …高贵的王子以及他们英雄救美的故事。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone suddenly surprised or slightly shocked
meanings.example: Sorry, I didn’t mean to startle you.
meanings.example_cn: 抱歉，我不是故意吓你一跳的。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of coldness
meanings.example: There was a slight chill in the air .
meanings.example_cn: 空气中有些微的寒意。

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange for a place in a hotel, restaurant, plane etc to be kept for you to use at a particular time in the future
meanings.example: Do you have to reserve tickets in advance?
meanings.example_cn: 你必须预先订票吗？

meanings.meaning_en: someone who does someone else’s job for a limited period of time, especially in a sports team or school
meanings.example: Germany brought on a substitute at half time.
meanings.example_cn: 德国队在比赛半场时换上一名替补队员。

meanings.meaning_en: to use something new or diffe-rent instead of something else
meanings.example: substitute goalkeeper
meanings.example_cn: 替补守门员

meanings.meaning_en: a large building used for concerts or public meetings
meanings.example: ...a high school auditorium.
meanings.example_cn: …一所中学的礼堂。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of respect for someone, or a good opinion of someone
meanings.example: Peden was greatly esteemed by the people of Ayrshire.
meanings.example_cn: 佩登深受艾尔郡人的尊敬。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of creating something
meanings.example: a job creation scheme
meanings.example_cn: 创造就业机会的计划

meanings.meaning_en: plain and easy to see
meanings.example: a manifest error of judgment
meanings.example_cn: 明显的判断错误

meanings.meaning_en: to show a feeling, attitude etc
to officially give someone a title etc, especially as a reward for something they have achieved
meanings.example: The constitution also confers large powers on Brazil's 25 constituent states.
meanings.example_cn: 宪法还授予巴西25个成员州极大的权力。

meanings.meaning_en: directly under another object or covered by it
meanings.example: He got out of the car and looked underneath.
meanings.example_cn: 他下车往底下看了看。

meanings.meaning_en: to raise, lift, or pull something up, especially using ropes
meanings.example: The crew hurried to hoist the flag.
meanings.example_cn: 船员们急忙把旗子升起来。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment used for lifting heavy objects with ropes

meanings.meaning_cn: 容量；容积；理解力；地位；资格
meanings.meaning_en: the amount of space a container, room etc has to hold things or people
meanings.example: The room had seating capacity for about 80.
meanings.example_cn: 这房间能坐80个人左右。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance such as coal, gas, or oil that can be burned to produce heat or energy
meanings.example: Coal is one of the cheapest fuels.
meanings.example_cn: 煤是最廉价的燃料之一。

meanings.meaning_en: if you fuel a vehicle, or if it fuels up, fuel is put into it
in a way that was not planned, but as a result of something else
meanings.example: Quite incidentally, I got some useful information at the party.
meanings.example_cn: 我在聚会上无意中得到了一些有用信息。

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh quickly, quietly, and in a high voice, because something is funny or because you are nervous or embarrassed
meanings.example: If you can’t stop giggling you’ll have to leave the room.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你再咯咯地笑个不停，就给我离开屋子。

meanings.meaning_en: a person or a group of people or vehicles that go with someone in order to protect or guard them
meanings.example: a police escort
meanings.example_cn: 警察护卫队

meanings.meaning_en: to take someone somewhere, especially when you are protecting or guarding them
a game used to make money for a state or a  charity  in which people buy tickets with a series of numbers on them. If their number is picked by chance, they win money or a prize.
meanings.example: a lottery ticket
meanings.example_cn: 彩票

meanings.meaning_en: to keep something or continue to have something
meanings.example: You have the right to retain possession of the goods.
meanings.example_cn: 你有权保留这些物品。

meanings.meaning_en: a word with the same meaning as another word in the same language
meanings.example: The term "industrial democracy" is often used as a synonym for worker participation.
meanings.example_cn: “工业民主”这一词语常被用作“工人参与”的同义词。

meanings.meaning_en: a surface that consists of soil with grass on top, or an artificial surface that looks like this
meanings.example: soft green turf
meanings.example_cn: 柔软的绿色草皮

meanings.meaning_en: to need to pay someone for something that they have done for you or sold to you, or to need to give someone back money that they have lent you
meanings.example: How much do I owe you (= often used to show that you want to pay for something )?
meanings.example_cn: 我该付你多少钱？

meanings.meaning_en: To deplete a stock or amount of something means to reduce it
meanings.example: ...substances that deplete the ozone layer.
meanings.example_cn: …消耗臭氧层的物质。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong building or group of buildings used by soldiers or an army for defending an important place
meanings.example: The fort flanked on a swamp.
meanings.example_cn: 堡垒侧面靠着沼泽。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone believe something that is not true
meanings.example: I was angry with him for trying to delude me.
meanings.example_cn: 他想骗我，因此我很恼火。

meanings.meaning_cn: 机灵的；制作精巧的，灵巧的
meanings.meaning_en: an ingenious plan, idea, or object works well and is the result of clever thinking and new ideas
meanings.example: Many fish have ingenious ways of protecting their eggs from predators.
meanings.example_cn: 很多鱼都有绝妙的方法来保护它们产的卵不被捕食者吃掉。

meanings.meaning_en: to consider two or more things or people, in order to show how they are similar or different
meanings.example: The report compares the different types of home computer available.
meanings.example_cn: 这份报告比较了市场上不同类型的家用计算机。

meanings.meaning_en: an inland area, city etc is not near the coast
meanings.example: the largest area of inland water in the southeast
meanings.example_cn: 东南部最大的内陆水域

meanings.meaning_en: in a direction away from the coast and towards the centre of a country
to stop people from opposing the government, especially by using force
meanings.example: The uprising was ruthlessly suppressed.
meanings.example_cn: 起义受到了残酷的镇压。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of extreme fear
meanings.example: There was a look of sheer terror (= complete terror ) on his face.
meanings.example_cn: 他脸上的表情异常惊恐。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of doing something, especially the correct or usual way
meanings.example: On board, we were given the usual talk on safety procedures (= what to do if an accident happens, or to prevent an accident ) .
meanings.example_cn: 在飞机上，我们听了例行的飞行安全讲解。

meanings.meaning_en: a false reason given for an action, in order to hide the real reason
meanings.example: He’ll phone on some pretext or other.
meanings.example_cn: 他会以这样或那样的理由打电话的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 拍打，挥动，垂下物；袋盖；慌乱
meanings.meaning_en: the noisy movement of something such as cloth in the air
meanings.example: the flap of the sails
meanings.example_cn: 船帆的拍动

meanings.meaning_en: no longer useful, because something newer and better has been invented
meanings.example: obsolete weapons
meanings.example_cn: 已被淘汰的武器

meanings.meaning_en: intended or planned
meanings.example: a deliberate attempt to humiliate her
meanings.example_cn: 对她的故意羞辱

meanings.meaning_en: to think about something very carefully
meanings.example: The attack on him was quite deliberate.
meanings.example_cn: 对他的袭击完全是有预谋的。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal and very serious promise
meanings.example: The president took the oath of office (= made the official public promises that every president makes when starting their job ) .
meanings.example_cn: 总统宣誓就职。

meanings.meaning_en: a description of what is likely to happen in the future, based on the information that you have now
meanings.example: The weather forecast is good for tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 天气预报说明天是晴天。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of your body that is sore is painful, because of infection or because you have used a muscle too much
meanings.example: I had a sore throat and aching limbs.
meanings.example_cn: 我喉咙疼，四肢酸痛。

meanings.meaning_en: using or connected with the  metric system  of weights and measures
meanings.example: a metric tonne
meanings.example_cn: 一公吨

meanings.meaning_en: If you plead the case or cause of someone or something, you speak out in their support or defence
meanings.example: He appeared before the committee to plead his case.
meanings.example_cn: 他出现在委员会上为他的案子辩护。

meanings.meaning_en: to twist and pull something roughly from the place where it is being held
meanings.example: I wrenched the packet from his grasp.
meanings.example_cn: 我用力夺过他攥在手里的纸袋。

meanings.meaning_en: a doctor who does operations in a hospital
meanings.example: ...a heart surgeon.
meanings.example_cn: …一位心脏外科医生。

meanings.meaning_en: money paid to someone because they have suffered injury or loss, or because something they own has been damaged
meanings.example: People who are wrongly arrested may be paid compensation .
meanings.example_cn: 被误抓的人有可能得到补偿费。

meanings.meaning_en: a number that tells you where you can find the information you want in a book, on a map etc
meanings.example: a list of towns, each with a map reference
meanings.example_cn: 一份城镇清单，每个城镇都有地图参照号

meanings.meaning_en: if a group of people huddle together, they stay very close to each other, especially because they are cold or frightened
meanings.example: We lay huddled together for warmth.
meanings.example_cn: 我们紧紧挤在一起取暖。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people or things that are close together, but not arranged in any particular order, pattern, or system
a place in a port where ships are loaded, unloaded, or repaired
meanings.example: A crowd was waiting at the dock to greet them.
meanings.example_cn: 一群人在码头等着迎接他们。

meanings.meaning_cn: 古怪(的)，偏执(的)，不同心(的)
meanings.meaning_en: An eccentric is an eccentric person
meanings.example: Askew used several names, and had a reputation as an eccentric.
meanings.example_cn: 艾斯丘用过几个名字，并以“怪人”著称。

meanings.meaning_cn: 模糊的，不明确的，无定限的
meanings.meaning_en: an indefinite action or period of time has no definite end arranged for it
meanings.example: The next day the union voted to begin an indefinite strike.
meanings.example_cn: 第二天工会投票表决决定开始无限期罢工。

meanings.meaning_cn: 承保险别；新闻报道(范围)；保证金
meanings.meaning_en: when a subject or event is reported on television or radio, or in newspapers
meanings.example: live coverage of the match (= the match is broadcast at the same time that it is happening )
meanings.example_cn: 这场比赛的现场直播

meanings.meaning_cn: 固定的，定置的；不变动的，不移动的
meanings.meaning_en: standing still instead of moving
meanings.example: How did you manage to drive into a stationary vehicle?
meanings.example_cn: 你是怎么开车的，竟会撞上一辆停着的车子？

meanings.meaning_en: the largest number or amount that is possible or is allowed
meanings.example: We might have a third child, but that’s the absolute maximum .
meanings.example_cn: 我们可能会要第三个孩子，但这绝对是极限了。

meanings.meaning_en: to prepare a book, piece of film etc for printing or broadcasting by removing mistakes or parts that are not acceptable
meanings.example: The newspaper edits letters before printing them.
meanings.example_cn: 这家报社刊登读者来信前先作校订。

meanings.meaning_en: in some way, or by some means, although you do not know how
meanings.example: Don’t worry, we’ll get the money back somehow.
meanings.example_cn: 别担心，我们总会把那些钱拿回来的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 顽固的，倔强的，不易屈服的，较难治愈的
meanings.meaning_en: determined not to change your ideas, behaviour, opinions etc, even when other people think you are being unreasonable
meanings.example: He was the most obstinate man I’ve ever met.
meanings.example_cn: 他是我遇到过的最固执的人。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong thread made of several threads twisted together, used for tying or fastening things
meanings.example: Her key hung on a string around her neck.
meanings.example_cn: 她的钥匙穿了根绳子挂在脖子上。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of 24 hours
meanings.example: We spent three days in Paris.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在巴黎度过了三天。

meanings.meaning_en: many
meanings.example: Numerous attempts have been made to hide the truth.
meanings.example_cn: 为掩盖事实作了很多尝试。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone calmly accepts a situation that cannot be changed, even though it is bad
meanings.example: She gave a sigh of resignation.
meanings.example_cn: 她无奈地叹了一口气。

meanings.meaning_en: heavily loaded with something, or containing a lot of something
meanings.example: snow-laden branches
meanings.example_cn: 积满雪的树枝

meanings.meaning_en: a natural tendency to behave in a particular way or a natural ability to know something, which is not learned
meanings.example: Her instinct told her that something was wrong.
meanings.example_cn: 直觉告诉她有些不对劲。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which something is finished or no longer exists
meanings.example: At last it seemed the war might be coming to an end.
meanings.example_cn: 终于战争似乎即将结束。

meanings.meaning_cn: 消灭了的，熄灭了的，绝种的
meanings.meaning_en: an extinct type of animal or plant does not exist any more
meanings.example: Dinosaurs have been extinct for millions of years.
meanings.example_cn: 恐龙已灭绝数千万年了。

meanings.meaning_en: the main subject or idea in a piece of writing, speech, film etc
meanings.example: The book’s theme is the conflict between love and duty.
meanings.example_cn: 本书的主题是爱与责任之间的冲突。

meanings.meaning_en: the introduction to a play, a long poem etc
meanings.example: The prologue to the novel is written in the form of a newspaper account.
meanings.example_cn: 该小说的前言是以新闻报道的形式写的。

meanings.meaning_en: a simple drawing or plan that shows exactly where something is, what something looks like, or how something works
meanings.example: ...a circuit diagram.
meanings.example_cn: …电路图。

meanings.meaning_en: right for a particular situation or occasion
meanings.example: I thought the memorial was a fitting tribute to the President.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为这座纪念碑恰如其分地表达了对总统的敬意。

meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when you put on a piece of clothing that is being made for you, to see if it fits properly
meanings.example: a fitting end to what was a memorable trip
meanings.example_cn: 一次难忘旅行的完美收尾

meanings.meaning_en: to put a piece of equipment somewhere and connect it so that it is ready to be used
meanings.example: They’ve installed the new computer network at last.
meanings.example_cn: 他们终于安装了新电脑网络。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a liquid weaker by adding water or another liquid
meanings.example: diluted fruit juice
meanings.example_cn: 稀释的果汁

meanings.meaning_en: a dilute liquid has been made weaker by the addition of water or another liquid
a floor or level of a building
meanings.example: A staircase leads to the upper storey .
meanings.example_cn: 有一段楼梯通往上面一层。

meanings.meaning_en: how likely it is that something will or will not happen
meanings.example: (= it is likely ) that he will commit the same crime again.
meanings.example_cn: 他可能还会犯同样的罪行。

meanings.meaning_en: to move around quickly in a twisting circular movement, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The river had become a swirling torrent.
meanings.example_cn: 河水变成了翻滚的洪流。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel calmer and less worried or frightened about a problem or situation
meanings.example: Teachers reassured anxious parents.
meanings.example_cn: 老师们安慰焦急的父母。

meanings.example: We have had our first casualty. One runner has dropped out with cramp.
meanings.example_cn: 我们有了第一位伤员，有一位队员因腿部痉挛退出了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 火柴；比赛；对手；婚姻;相称v相当,相配
meanings.meaning_en: an organized sports event between two teams or people
meanings.example: It’s our last match of the season.
meanings.example_cn: 这是我们本赛季最后一场比赛。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of 10 years
meanings.example: ...the last decade of the nineteenth century.
meanings.example_cn: …19世纪的最后10年。

meanings.meaning_en: to be more than a particular number or amount
meanings.example: Working hours must not exceed 42 hours a week.
meanings.example_cn: 工作时间每周不得超过42小时。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who gives private lessons to one student or a small group, and is paid directly by them
meanings.example: The children were educated at home by a succession of tutors.
meanings.example_cn: 这些孩子在家接受教育，连续请过几任家庭教师。

meanings.meaning_en: nearness in distance or time
meanings.example: Here the rich and the poor live in close proximity (= very near to each other ) .
meanings.example_cn: 在这里，富人和穷人比邻而居。

meanings.meaning_en: a cosmopolitan place has people from many different parts of the world – use this to show approval
meanings.example: a vibrant, cosmopolitan city
meanings.example_cn: 一个充满活力的国际性都市

meanings.meaning_en: a person who believes in the ideas taught by Jesus Christ
meanings.example: He was a devout Christian.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾是一个虔诚的基督教徒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 催化剂；造成变化的人或事
meanings.meaning_en: a substance that makes a chemical reaction happen more quickly without being changed itself
meanings.example: I very much hope that this case will prove to be a catalyst for change.
meanings.example_cn: 我非常希望这件事终将成为促成变化的催化剂。

meanings.meaning_en: to send something somewhere, especially in order to sell it
to use a building, car etc under a lease
meanings.example: I’m interested in leasing your cottage.
meanings.example_cn: 我有兴趣租下你的小屋。

meanings.meaning_en: a legal agreement which allows you to use a building, car etc for a period of time, in return for rent
when the moon wanes, you gradually see less of it
meanings.example: My enthusiasm for the project was waning.
meanings.example_cn: 我对这个项目的热情逐渐减退了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 配额，限额(进口及移民人数)
meanings.meaning_en: an official limit on the number or amount of something that is allowed in a particular period
meanings.example: The government has decided to scrap quotas on car imports.
meanings.example_cn: 政府决定取消汽车进口配额。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel very unhappy
meanings.example: The thought of taking the exam again depressed him.
meanings.example_cn: 想到要补考，他就心情沮丧。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something clearer or easier to understand
meanings.example: Reporters asked him to clarify his position (= say exactly what his beliefs are ) on welfare reform.
meanings.example_cn: 记者们要求他阐明他在福利改革问题上的立场。

meanings.meaning_en: very great in degree
meanings.example: Extreme poverty still exists in many rural areas.
meanings.example_cn: 许多农村地区仍处于赤贫状态。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation, quality etc which is as great as it can possibly be – used especially when talking about two opposites
meanings.example: extreme cold
meanings.example_cn: 严寒

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that uses radio waves to find the position of things and watch their movement
meanings.example: The coastline can now be monitored by radar.
meanings.example_cn: 现在能用雷达监测海岸线了。

meanings.meaning_en: If one thing pertains to another, it relates, belongs, or applies to it
meanings.example: ...matters pertaining to naval district defence.
meanings.example_cn: …与海军区域防卫有关的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: any particular time, situation, amount etc that is being used as an example
meanings.example: On any given day in the Houston area, half the hospital beds are empty.
meanings.example_cn: 在休斯敦地区，任何一天医院的床位都有一半是空的。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or caused by  earthquakes
meanings.example: increased seismic activity
meanings.example_cn: 越来越频繁的地震活动

meanings.meaning_cn: 顶点，高峰；峰会(最高级会谈)
meanings.example: But are these the summit of our values, of our aspirations of society?
meanings.example_cn: 但这些是我们的价值观、我们对社会的抱负的顶点吗？

meanings.meaning_en: relating to ships, boats, or sailing
meanings.example: nautical equipment
meanings.example_cn: 航海装备

meanings.meaning_en: an official document giving you permission to own or do something for a period of time
meanings.example: The dealers applied for an export licence.
meanings.example_cn: 经销商申请了出口许可证。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you are trying to achieve, such as a total, an amount, or a time
meanings.example: There is no target date for completion of the new project.
meanings.example_cn: 这个新的项目何时完工没有预定日期。

meanings.meaning_en: thinking about things in a detailed and intelligent way, so that you can examine and understand things
meanings.example: She’s got an analytical mind.
meanings.example_cn: 她思维缜密。

meanings.example: Wilcox jerked his head to indicate that they should move on.
meanings.example_cn: 威尔科克斯扭扭头，示意他们该走了。

meanings.meaning_en: to save someone or something from a situation of danger or harm
meanings.example: Survivors of the crash were rescued by helicopter.
meanings.example_cn: 空难的生还者被直升机救了出来。

meanings.meaning_en: a comfortable piece of furniture big enough for two or three people to sit on
meanings.example: Tom offered to sleep on the couch.
meanings.example_cn: 汤姆说他来睡沙发。

meanings.meaning_en: to be expressed in a particular way
done as part of a plan, especially in a military, business, or political situation
meanings.example: UN forces made a strategic withdrawal.
meanings.example_cn: 联合国部队作了战略性撤退。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong desire to do something without thinking about whether it is a sensible thing to do
meanings.example: The eye converts light signals to nerve impulses.
meanings.example_cn: 眼睛把光信号转变成神经冲动。

meanings.meaning_en: ultraviolet light cannot be seen by people, but is responsible for making your skin darker when you are in the sun
meanings.example: Ozone in the stratosphere is important because it absorbs some of the Sun’s dangerous ultraviolet radiation.
meanings.example_cn: 在平流层的臭氧是重要的，因为它吸收了一些太阳中危险的紫外线辐射。

meanings.meaning_en: something that sounds melodious sounds like music or has a pleasant tune
meanings.example: He spoke in a quiet melodious voice.
meanings.example_cn: 他说话的声音轻柔悦耳。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is crucial is extremely important, because everything else depends on it
meanings.example: The conservation of tropical forests is of crucial importance .
meanings.example_cn: 保护热带雨林至关重要。

meanings.meaning_en: a product that is bought and sold
meanings.example: agricultural commodities
meanings.example_cn: 农业商品

meanings.meaning_en: to think of a new idea, plan etc and develop it in your mind
meanings.example: Scientists first conceived the idea of the atomic bomb in the 1930’s.
meanings.example_cn: 在20世纪30年代，科学家第一次有了原子弹的设想。

meanings.meaning_en: if a company or government has a monopoly of a business or political activity, it has complete control of it so that other organizations cannot compete with it
meanings.example: a monopoly in copper trading
meanings.example_cn: 对铜交易的垄断

meanings.meaning_cn: 怪诞的；离奇的，古怪的；超自然的
meanings.meaning_en: very strange and unusual, and difficult to understand or explain
meanings.example: A really weird thing happened last night.
meanings.example_cn: 昨晚发生了一件非常奇怪的事。

meanings.meaning_en: a smooth surface has no rough parts, lumps, or holes, especially in a way that is pleasant and attractive to touch
meanings.example: Her skin felt smooth and cool.
meanings.example_cn: 她的皮肤摸上去又滑又凉。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something such as cloth or hair flat by moving your hands across it
meanings.example: a smooth pebble
meanings.example_cn: 光滑的卵石

meanings.meaning_en: moving or doing things in a careless way, especially so that you drop things, knock into things etc
meanings.example: A clumsy waiter spilled wine all over her new skirt.
meanings.example_cn: 一名笨手笨脚的服务员把葡萄酒洒得她新裙子上到处都是。

meanings.meaning_en: able to be carried or moved easily
meanings.example: a portable radio
meanings.example_cn: 便携式收音机

meanings.meaning_en: electrical force measured in volts
meanings.example: The systems are getting smaller and using lower voltages.
meanings.example_cn: 这些系统正变得更小而且使用更低的电压。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, thing, or situation that annoys you or causes problems
meanings.example: He could be a bit of a nuisance when he was drunk.
meanings.example_cn: 他喝醉时会是一个有点令人讨厌的人。

meanings.meaning_en: to increase in degree or strength, or to make something do this
meanings.example: In Junethe civil war intensified.
meanings.example_cn: 6月份内战更加激烈了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a situation satisfactory again after there has been a serious mistake or problem
meanings.example: The general made one last desperate effort to retrieve the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 将军为挽回局面而孤注一掷。

meanings.meaning_en: the hand when it is tightly closed, so that the fingers are curled in towards the  palm  . People close their hand in a fist when they are angry or are going to hit someone.
meanings.example: She held the money tightly in her fist.
meanings.example_cn: 她把钱紧紧地攥在手中。

meanings.meaning_en: if a star or light twinkles, it shines in the dark with an unsteady light
meanings.example: stars twinkling in the sky
meanings.example_cn: 天空中闪烁的星星

meanings.example: He directed an orchestra.
meanings.example_cn: 他指挥一个管弦乐队。

meanings.meaning_en: to obey a law, rule etc
meanings.example: the pressure on schoolchildren to conform
meanings.example_cn: 小学生要顺应社会的压力

meanings.meaning_cn: 易犯错误的，错误难免的
meanings.meaning_en: able to make mistakes or be wrong
meanings.example: Humans are fallible.
meanings.example_cn: 人孰无过。

meanings.meaning_en: very great tiredness
meanings.example: {"COLLOINEXA":["metal fatigue"]}
meanings.example_cn: 金属疲劳

meanings.meaning_cn: 实践者，从事者；(医生或律师等)开业者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who regularly does a particular activity
meanings.example: one of golf’s most experienced practitioners
meanings.example_cn: 最有经验的高尔夫球员之一

meanings.meaning_en: A Catholic is a member of the Catholic Church
meanings.example: At least nine out of ten Mexicans are baptized Catholics.
meanings.example_cn: 至少十分之九的墨西哥人是受过洗礼的天主教徒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 喜剧；一出喜剧，喜剧性事件
meanings.meaning_en: entertainment that is intended to make people laugh
meanings.example: a career in stand-up comedy
meanings.example_cn: 单口喜剧表演职业

meanings.example: How did the plan originate?
meanings.example_cn: 这个计划最早是怎么想到的？

meanings.meaning_en: to use something for a particular purpose, give something to a particular person etc, especially after an official decision has been made
meanings.example: Tickets are limited and will be allocated to those who apply first.
meanings.example_cn: 票数有限，将分配给那些先申请的人。

meanings.meaning_en: If you are someone's junior, you are younger than they are
meanings.example: She now lives with actor Denis Lawson, 10 years her junior.
meanings.example_cn: 她现在和比她小10岁的演员丹尼斯·劳森同居。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to sport for young people below a particular age
a piece of furniture with doors, and sometimes shelves, used for storing clothes, plates, food etc
meanings.example: It’s in the kitchen cupboard.
meanings.example_cn: 它在厨房的碗柜里。

meanings.meaning_en: a small two-wheeled vehicle with an engine
meanings.example: Look at that family on a moped!
meanings.example_cn: 看看脚踏车上的那一家子！

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that one number or amount is added to another
meanings.example: Three plus six equals nine (3+6=9).
meanings.example_cn: 3 加6等于9。

meanings.meaning_en: used to talk about an advantage or good feature of a thing or situation
meanings.example: The total cost was $10,000, plus 14% interest.
meanings.example_cn: 全部费用是1万美元，外加14%的利息。

meanings.meaning_en: a tendency to believe that good things will always happen
meanings.example: There are grounds for cautious optimism.
meanings.example_cn: 有理由保持谨慎乐观。

meanings.meaning_en: to be a very good example of an idea or quality
meanings.example: She embodies everything I admire in a teacher.
meanings.example_cn: 她具备了我所钦佩的教师该具备的一切素质。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of wood, metal etc that has one thick edge and one pointed edge and is used especially for keeping a door open or for splitting wood
meanings.example: Garnish with lemon wedges.
meanings.example_cn: 用几角柠檬片作装饰。

meanings.meaning_en: to force something firmly into a narrow space
an important social or religious event, when a traditional set of actions is performed in a formal way
meanings.example: a wedding ceremony
meanings.example_cn: 婚礼

meanings.meaning_en: the act of killing yourself
meanings.example: More people commit suicide at Christmas than at any other time.
meanings.example_cn: 圣诞节期间自杀的人比其他任何时候都多。

meanings.meaning_en: to say very strongly that what you are saying is true
meanings.example: I never touched your purse, I swear!
meanings.example_cn: 我绝对没有碰过你的钱包，我发誓！

meanings.meaning_en: fairly large, especially large enough to have an effect or be important
meanings.example: Michael has already spent considerable time in Barcelona.
meanings.example_cn: 迈克尔在巴塞罗那已经待了相当长的时间了。

meanings.meaning_en: Judicial means relating to the legal system and to judgments made in a court of law
meanings.example: ...an independent judicial system.
meanings.example_cn: …一个独立的司法体系。

meanings.meaning_en: a terrible event in which there is a lot of destruction, suffering, or death
meanings.example: From all points of view, war would be a catastrophe.
meanings.example_cn: 从各个方面来看，战争都会是一场灾难。

meanings.meaning_en: A hose is a pipe made of rubber or plastic, along which a liquid or gas flows, for example from one part of an engine to another
meanings.example: Water in the engine compartment is sucked away by a hose.
meanings.example_cn: 发动机舱里的水由一条软管吸走。

meanings.meaning_en: to wash or pour water over something or someone, using a hose
the smallest amount of something or number of things that is possible or necessary
meanings.example: At a minimum, we must recruit two new teachers.
meanings.example_cn: 我们最起码应该招两名新教师。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or happening in one particular country and not involving any other countries
meanings.example: Unfortunately his domestic life wasn’t very happy.
meanings.example_cn: 不幸的是，他的家庭生活并不幸福。

meanings.meaning_en: a servant who works in a large house
the difference between the amount of something that you have and the higher amount that you need
meanings.example: the country’s widening budget deficit
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家日益严重的预算赤字

meanings.meaning_cn: 离开，遗忘；保持一定状态；留下
meanings.meaning_en: to go away from a place or a person
meanings.example: My baby gets upset when I leave the room.
meanings.example_cn: 我一离开房间宝宝就会不安。

meanings.meaning_en: the use of something in a way that it should not be used
meanings.example: A self-monitoring tax system is clearly open to abuse (=  able to be used wrongly  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 自我监督的税收制度明显会被滥用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 脸一部分，面貌，特征，特写，故事片
meanings.meaning_en: a part of something that you notice because it seems important, interesting, or typical
meanings.example: Air bags are a standard feature in most new cars.
meanings.example_cn: 气囊是大多数新车的标准配置。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of moving stairs that take people to different levels in a building
meanings.example: Take the escalator to the third floor and it's the last office on the left.
meanings.example_cn: 乘电梯到4楼，左边最后的那个办公室就是。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of activity, interest, or knowledge, especially one that a particular person, organization etc deals with
meanings.example: Looking after the house was viewed as a woman’s domain.
meanings.example_cn: 料理家务被认为是女性的份内之事。

meanings.meaning_en: to become larger in size, number, or amount, or to make something become larger
meanings.example: Water expands as it freezes.
meanings.example_cn: 水结冰时会膨胀。

meanings.meaning_en: caused by or connected with something you have already mentioned
meanings.example: The war and the corresponding fall in trade have had a devastating effect on the country.
meanings.example_cn: 战争以及由此所导致的贸易量下降对这个国家产生了致命的影响。

meanings.meaning_en: to think of something in a particular way or as having a particular quality
meanings.example: French and German were deemed essential.
meanings.example_cn: 法语和德语被认为是必需的。

meanings.meaning_en: a very strong feeling of sexual love
meanings.example: His eyes were burning with passion.
meanings.example_cn: 他的眼中欲火燃烧。

meanings.meaning_en: a powder that is made by crushing wheat or other grain and is used for making bread, cakes etc
meanings.example: He added some flour to thicken the soup.
meanings.example_cn: 他加了一些面粉使汤浓些。

meanings.meaning_en: an accident in which two or more people or vehicles hit each other while moving in different directions
meanings.example: Two people were killed in a head-on collision (= between two vehicles that are moving directly towards each other ) on highway 218.
meanings.example_cn: 218号公路上有两辆汽车迎面相撞，两人死亡。

meanings.meaning_en: If you ascribe an event or condition to a particular cause, you say or consider that it was caused by that thing
meanings.example: An autopsy eventually ascribed the baby's death to sudden infant death syndrome.
meanings.example_cn: 一次尸检最终把这名婴儿的死亡归因于婴儿猝死综合症。

meanings.meaning_cn: 大批出动，成群出现(鼠类及害虫)
meanings.meaning_en: if insects, rats etc infest a place, there are a lot of them and they usually cause damage
meanings.example: ...pests like aphids which infest cereal crops.
meanings.example_cn: …像蚜虫那样大肆侵害谷类作物的害虫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 插入，介入，干涉，(时间)介于
meanings.meaning_en: to become involved in an argument, fight, or other difficult situation in order to change what happens
meanings.example: The army will have to intervene to prevent further fighting.
meanings.example_cn: 军队将不得不干预以阻止进一步的战斗。

meanings.meaning_en: to correct something that is wrong
meanings.example: I did my best to rectify the situation, but the damage was already done.
meanings.example_cn: 我竭尽全力去挽回局面，但损害已经造成了。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong desire to have or do something even though you know you should not
meanings.example: Resist the temptation to buy the item until you’re certain you need it.
meanings.example_cn: 要抵挡住购买的诱惑，除非你确有需要。

meanings.meaning_en: to break into pieces violently or noisily, or to make something do this by dropping, throwing, or hitting it
meanings.example: Vandals had smashed all the windows.
meanings.example_cn: 破坏分子打碎了所有的窗子。

meanings.example: ...one-hundred-and-fifty pounds of Semtex explosive.
meanings.example_cn: …150磅的塞姆汀塑料炸药。

meanings.meaning_en: to teach a person or team the skills they need for a sport
meanings.example: Nigel coaches a cricket team in his spare time.
meanings.example_cn: 奈杰尔业余时间担任一个板球队的教练。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who trains a person or team in a sport
To induce a state or condition means to cause it
meanings.example: Doctors said surgery could induce a heart attack.
meanings.example_cn: 医生们说手术可能导致心脏病。

meanings.meaning_en: to control or limit something in order to prevent it from having a harmful effect
meanings.example: measures to curb the spread of the virus
meanings.example_cn: 控制病毒扩散的措施

meanings.example: The rumours will do untold damage to his reputation.
meanings.example_cn: 这些谣言会给他的名声造成无法估计的损害。

meanings.meaning_en: a tendency to behave in a particular way or suffer from a particular illness
meanings.example: There is a thin dividing line between educating the public and creating a predisposition to panic.
meanings.example_cn: 教育公众和营造恐慌倾向之间只有细小的区别。

meanings.meaning_en: the most exciting or important part of a story or experience, which usually comes near the end
meanings.example: The festival reaches its climax with the traditional boat-burning ceremony.
meanings.example_cn: 传统的烧船仪式将节庆活动推向了高潮。

meanings.meaning_en: if a situation, process, or story climaxes, it reaches its most important or exciting part
a way of dealing with a problem or making a bad situation better
meanings.example: The problems in our schools do not have a simple remedy.
meanings.example_cn: 我们学校的问题没有简单的解决办法。

meanings.meaning_en: Archives are a collection of documents and records that contain historical information. You can also use archives to refer to the place where archives are stored.
meanings.example: ...the State Library's archives.
meanings.example_cn: …国立图书馆的档案。

meanings.meaning_en: very good or beautiful, and very impressive
meanings.example: a magnificent performance
meanings.example_cn: 气势恢宏的演出

meanings.meaning_en: When people toil, they work very hard doing unpleasant or tiring tasks
meanings.example: People who toiled in dim, dank factories were too exhausted to enjoy their family life.
meanings.example_cn: 在阴暗潮湿的工厂里苦作的人们精疲力竭了，无法享受家庭生活。

meanings.meaning_en: hard or exhausting work
meanings.example: Workers toiled long hours.
meanings.example_cn: 工人们长时间辛苦工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 必有一死的；致命的；极大的
meanings.meaning_en: something very serious that may cause the end of something
meanings.example: The computer has dealt a mortal blow to traditional printing methods.
meanings.example_cn: 计算机 给了传统的印刷方法一记致命的打击。

meanings.example: Our health service is in mortal danger.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的公共医疗保健服务岌岌可危。

meanings.meaning_cn: 振翼，颤动，(心脏)不规则跳动
meanings.meaning_en: if your heart or your stomach flutters, you feel very excited or nervous
meanings.example: A small bird fluttered past the window.
meanings.example_cn: 一只小鸟拍打着翅膀飞过窗前。

meanings.meaning_cn: 暗的，不清楚的；费解的vt使阴暗,使难解

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that is paid into a bank account
meanings.example: fatty deposits on the heart
meanings.example_cn: 心脏上沉积的脂肪层

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of being respected or deserving respect
meanings.example: Prisoners should be treated with regard for human dignity .
meanings.example_cn: 对待囚犯应该考虑到人的尊严。

meanings.meaning_en: a job or activity that is lucrative lets you earn a lot of money
meanings.example: Thousands of ex-army officers have found lucrative jobs in private security firms.
meanings.example_cn: 成千上万的退役军官在私人保安公司找到了薪水丰厚的工作。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you say or do to suggest something to someone, without telling them directly
meanings.example: There have been hints that he may take up coaching.
meanings.example_cn: 他暗示过可能会出任教练。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability of a substance such as rubber to return to its original shape after it has been pressed or bent
meanings.example: And I think what we're seeing in the economy now is the inherent resilience of the American economy and the American people.
meanings.example_cn: 而且我认为，我认为，在经济方面，我们现在看到的是美国经济和美国人民一直以来所固有的弹性。

meanings.meaning_cn: (事件、观念等的)系列；顺序；关联
meanings.meaning_en: the order that something happens or exists in, or the order it is supposed to happen or exist in
meanings.example: Be careful to perform the actions in the correct sequence .
meanings.example_cn: 注意要按正确的顺序来完成动作。

meanings.meaning_en: a test that measures your natural skills or abilities
a small piece of paper, cloth etc
meanings.example: a rug made out of old scraps of material
meanings.example_cn: 用旧零碎材料拼做的一块小地毯

meanings.meaning_en: the things that a company owns, that can be sold to pay debts
meanings.example: the value of a company’s assets
meanings.example_cn: 公司的资产价值

meanings.meaning_en: a large group of people in one place
meanings.example: She got lost in the throng.
meanings.example_cn: 她在人群中迷路了。

meanings.meaning_en: if people throng a place, they go there in large numbers

meanings.meaning_cn: ，验尸，尸体解剖；事后的，死后的
meanings.meaning_en: A postmortem is a medical examination of a dead person's body in order to find out how they died
meanings.example: A postmortem was carried out to establish the cause of death.
meanings.example_cn: 进行了尸检以确定死因。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing that is measured in minutes, hours, days, years etc using clocks
meanings.example: Einstein changed the way we think about space and time.
meanings.example_cn: 爱因斯坦改变了我们的时空概念。

meanings.meaning_en: in, at, or to another place
meanings.example: She is becoming famous in Australia and elsewhere.
meanings.example_cn: 她在澳大利亚和其他地方渐渐出名了。

meanings.meaning_en: a long speech by one person
meanings.example: Henry looked up, then continued his monologue.
meanings.example_cn: 亨利抬起头，然后继续他的长篇独白。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing or things that someone owns
meanings.example: The hotel is not responsible for any loss or damage to guests’ personal property .
meanings.example_cn: 宾馆对住客个人财物的丢失和损坏概不负责。

meanings.meaning_en: to take the place or position of something or someone
meanings.example: Coal has been displaced by natural gas as a major source of energy.
meanings.example_cn: 作为一种主要能源，煤的地位已为天然气所取代。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly the same, or very similar
meanings.example: four identical houses
meanings.example_cn: 四幢一模一样的房子

meanings.meaning_cn: 华丽的，灿烂的；宜人的；可喜的
meanings.meaning_en: If you say that something is gorgeous, you mean that it gives you a lot of pleasure or is very attractive
meanings.example: ...gorgeous mountain scenery.
meanings.example_cn: …壮观的山间景色。

meanings.meaning_en: If something or someone withstands a force or action, they survive it or do not give in to it
meanings.example: ...armoured vehicles designed to withstand chemical attack.
meanings.example_cn: …设计来抵御化学攻击的装甲车。

meanings.meaning_en: a large flood, or period when there is a lot of rain
meanings.example: There was a deluge of requests for interviews and statements.
meanings.example_cn: 对接受访谈和发表声明的要求铺天盖地地涌来。

meanings.example: He left school at 16 and immersed himself in the Labour Party.
meanings.example_cn: 他16岁离开学校投身工党。

meanings.meaning_en: having or deserving great fame, praise, and honour
meanings.example: a truly glorious future
meanings.example_cn: 无比美好的将来

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of a soft natural or artificial substance full of small holes, which can suck up liquid and is used for washing
meanings.example: a Victoria sponge
meanings.example_cn: 维多利亚海绵蛋糕

meanings.meaning_en: a quick look at someone or something that does not allow you to see them clearly
meanings.example: I glimpsed a figure at the window.
meanings.example_cn: 我瞥见窗前有个身影。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for information or advice from someone because it is their job to know something
meanings.example: If symptoms persist, consult a doctor without delay.
meanings.example_cn: 如果症状持续的话，马上咨询医生。

meanings.meaning_en: boring and ordinary, and having no variety or interest
meanings.example: ...her lawyer husband, trapped in a humdrum but well-paid job.
meanings.example_cn: ...她整天做着单调乏味的工作但收入颇丰的律师丈夫。

meanings.meaning_en: the top part of a hat or someone’s head
meanings.example: a hat with a high crown
meanings.example_cn: 高顶帽

meanings.meaning_en: to place a crown on the head of a new king or queen as part of an official ceremony in which they become king or queen
a general tendency in the way a situation is changing or developing
meanings.example: The current trend is towards more part-time employment.
meanings.example_cn: 当前的趋势是雇用更多的兼职人员。

meanings.meaning_en: to reach a long way for something
meanings.example: The procession stretched for several miles.
meanings.example_cn: 游行队伍延伸了数英里。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of stretching a part of your body out to its full length, or a particular way of doing this
to give a flower or plant pollen so that it can produce seeds
meanings.example: flowers pollinated by bees
meanings.example_cn: 由蜜蜂授粉的花

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing about a particular subject in a newspaper or magazine
meanings.example: The paper’s leading article (=  the main article  ) described the government as weak.
meanings.example_cn: 该报社论称政府软弱。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where people or animals can live peacefully or go to in order to be safe
meanings.example: ...Lake Baringo, a freshwater haven for a mixed variety of birds.
meanings.example_cn: …百瑞高湖，一个适合各种鸟类的淡水栖息地。

meanings.meaning_en: to take someone else’s child into your home and legally become its parent
meanings.example: Sally was adopted when she was four.
meanings.example_cn: 莎莉四岁时被人收养。

meanings.meaning_en: to stick out from somewhere
meanings.example: ...a huge round mass of smooth rock protruding from the water.
meanings.example_cn: …从水中突出来的一块光滑的圆形巨石。

meanings.meaning_en: a small church, or a room in a hospital, prison, big church etc in which Christians pray and have religious services
meanings.example: Bethan goes to chapel every Sunday.
meanings.example_cn: 贝唐每个星期天都去教堂做礼拜。

meanings.meaning_en: a copy of a valuable object, painting etc that is intended to deceive people
meanings.example: The painting was judged a fake.
meanings.example_cn: 这幅画被鉴定为赝品。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something seem real in order to deceive people
meanings.example: Jones can spot a fake from 20 feet away.
meanings.example_cn: 琼斯在20英尺开外就能认出假货。

meanings.meaning_en: slightly wet, especially in a way that is pleasant or suitable
meanings.example: Make sure the soil is moist before planting the seeds.
meanings.example_cn: 播种之前要确保土壤湿润。

meanings.example: The new tax laws were rammed through regardless of the opposition of the majority of the people.
meanings.example_cn: 不顾大多数人民的反对，新的税法强行通过了。

meanings.meaning_en: a dark grey rock that can easily be split into flat thin pieces
meanings.example: There were several slates missing from the roof.
meanings.example_cn: 房顶有几块石板瓦掉了。

meanings.meaning_en: a soft steady light
meanings.example: She had a healthy glow in her cheeks.
meanings.example_cn: 她脸上泛着健康的红晕。

meanings.meaning_en: if your face or body glows, it is pink or hot because you are healthy, have been doing exercise, or are feeling a strong emotion

meanings.meaning_cn: 联邦, 联盟, 同盟 "
meanings.meaning_en: a group of organizations, clubs, or people that have joined together to form a single group
meanings.example: the National Federation of Women’s Institutes
meanings.example_cn: 〔英国及英联邦国家〕妇女协会全国联合会

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to achieve what you want by deceiving people in a clever way
meanings.example: the tiger’s ferocity and cunning
meanings.example_cn: 老虎的凶猛和狡诈

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong movement of wind, air, rain etc
meanings.example: A gust of wind drove down the valley.
meanings.example_cn: 一阵狂风掠过山谷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 日常工作；琐碎烦人的杂务
